# [AquaDS Angular](https://masivapp.notion.site/Quick-Start-1f31de3976b9809891d8ca8aeaa4d5fa)

![version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/%40aqua-ds%2Fangular)
![lastUpdated](https://img.shields.io/npm/last-update/%40aqua-ds%2Fangular)


![AquaDs](https://img.notionusercontent.com/ext/https%3A%2F%2Fs3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic.notion-static.com%2Fbd2cb463-be69-4b79-a901-ef0ff01e283c%2Fsimbol_aqua.png/size/w=160?exp=1758922476&sig=gdBTpSOkMJyg1mAZzp5llZWD1HFegTHzrbLMcpbS3M0&id=1f21de39-76b9-80c9-9a15-007a540a7f73&table=custom_emoji)


✨ **Design together. Build together. Speak the same language.** ✨



`npm i @aqua-ds/angular`

---

Fully compatible with Angular's component system, including support for `ngModel`.

## Installation

To integrate Aqua DS into an **Angular** project, follow these steps.

To integrate **Aqua DS** with an Angular project, follow these steps:

1.  Ensure you have an Angular project initialized and you're using a recent version of Node.js and npm.
2. Install the Angular-compatible package:

```bash
npm i @aqua-ds/angular
```

# Using Aqua DS Components

This is a basic example of how to use the `<aq-button>` component from **Aqua DS** in an Angular component.

```tsx
// set-button.component.ts

import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/angular';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-button',
  imports: [AqButton],
  templateUrl: './set-button.component.html',
})

export class SetButtonComponent {
  handleClick(event: Event) {
    console.log('AqButton click from Angular ', event);
  }
}

```

```html
<!-- set-button.component.html -->
<div>
	<aq-button (click)="handleClick($event)" variant="primary" type="submit">
		<i class="aq-icon-settings"></i>Button
	</aq-button>
</div>
```

<aside>
💡

Always refer to the documentation of each individual component for a complete list of supported events, their purpose, and usage examples.

</aside>

Here’s how you can use components from the official list:

[Components](https://www.notion.so/Components-2011de3976b9801388eadaacd389ee67?pvs=21)

### Two-Way Binding with `ngModel` in Angular

If you plan to use `ngModel` with Aqua DS form components, you need to **import and register the `AWCValueAccessor`**. This allows Angular to communicate properly with the Web Component's value.

```tsx
// set-text-field.component.ts

import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqTextField, AWCValueAccessor } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; 

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-text-field',
  imports: [FormsModule, AWCValueAccessor, AqTextField],
  templateUrl: './set-text-field.component.html'
})

export class SetTextFieldComponent {
 textfieldValue = 'text'
}
```

```html
<!-- set-text-field.component.html -->
<div>
	<aq-text-field [(ngModel)]="textfieldValue" placeholder="This has v-model" label="This is a label"></aq-text-field>
</div>
```

Aqua-DS components supports Angular’s `[(ngModel)]` two-way binding through native Angular forms. To enable this, make sure to:

1. Import the `FormsModule` from Angular.
2. Use the `AwcValueAccessor` utility from `@aqua-ds/angular` to connect Aqua Web Components with Angular’s form control system.

<aside>
💡

**Tip:** Ensure `awcValueAccessor` is applied to your form component or directive setup to bridge the value accessor layer properly

</aside>

## Handling Component Events

Aqua DS components emit custom DOM events that are fully compatible with Angular's event handling system. This means that you can use the `(event)` syntax to listen for these events, just as you would with any standard Angular component.

```html
<aq-button 
	(click)="handleClick($event)"
	variant="primary"
	type="submit">
  Click Me
</aq-button>
```

```tsx
import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/angular';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-button',
  imports: [AqButton],
  templateUrl: './set-button.component.html',
})
export class SetButtonComponent {
  handleClick(event: any) {
    console.log('AqButton click from Angular ', event);
  }
}

```

```html
<aq-checkbox 
	id-checkbox="checkbox-1"
	name="checkbox-1"
	label="This is a checkbox 1"
	icon="aq-icon-message"
  required info="This is an information tooltip"
  value-checkbox="option3"
  (input)="handleValueChanged($event)">
 </aq-checkbox>
```

```tsx
import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqCheckbox} from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-checkbox',
  imports: [AqCheckbox],
  templateUrl: './set-checkbox.component.html',
})
export class SetCheckboxComponent {
  handleValueChanged(event: any) {
    console.log('Handling checkbox custom aqChange from Angular', event);
  }
}

```

## Passing Properties to Components

When using Aqua DS components in Angular, you can pass properties just like you would with any other Angular component. Aqua DS supports standard HTML attributes and custom component-specific inputs. In Angular templates, you typically use property binding with square brackets`[props]` to pass data to component inputs.

```tsx
<aq-button-split
    (clickRight)="handleClickRight($event)"
    (clickItem)="handleClickItem($event)"
    (clickLeft)="handleClickLeft($event)"
    variant="primary"
    size="medium"
    [items]="items"                
>Button Split</aq-button-split>
```

```tsx
import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButtonSplit } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-button-split',
  imports: [AqButtonSplit],
  templateUrl: './set-button-split.component.html',
})
export class SetButtonSplitComponent {
  items = [
    {
      id: 'id1',
      name: 'Item 1',
    },
    {
      id: 'id2',
      name: 'Item 2',
    },
  ];
  handleClickRight(event: any) {
    console.log('handleClickRight', event);
  }

  handleClickItem(event: any) {
    console.log('handleClickItem', event);
  }

  handleClickLeft(event: any) {
    console.log('handleClickLeft', event);
  }
}

```

# Important Notes

<aside>
💡

In Angular, you also need to declare the Aqua DS components in the IMPORTS section of the @Component decorator to make them available within your template.

</aside>

<aside>
💡

In Angular, the component class name is written in PascalCase (example: MyComponent), while the selector in the HTML is written in kebab-case (example: <my-component>). This facilitates readability and maintains consistency in the templates.

</aside>


✨ **Design together. Build together. Speak the same language.** ✨

FILE: packages/aqua-angular/src/lib/awc/value-accessor.ts
================================================
import { Directive, ElementRef, HostListener } from '@angular/core';
import { ControlValueAccessor } from '@angular/forms';

@Directive({})
export class ValueAccessor implements ControlValueAccessor {

  private onChange: (value: any) => void = () => {/**/};
  private onTouched: () => void = () => {/**/};
  protected lastValue: any;

  constructor(protected el: ElementRef) {}

  writeValue(value: any) {
    this.el.nativeElement.value = this.lastValue = value == null ? '' : value;
  }

  handleChangeEvent(value: any) {
    if (value !== this.lastValue) {
      this.lastValue = value;
      this.onChange(value);
    }
  }

  @HostListener('focusout')
  _handleBlurEvent() {
    this.onTouched();
  }

  registerOnChange(fn: (value: any) => void) {
    this.onChange = fn;
  }
  registerOnTouched(fn: () => void) {
    this.onTouched = fn;
  }

  setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean) {
    this.el.nativeElement.disabled = isDisabled;
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-angular/src/lib/awc/control-value-accessors/awc-value-accessors.ts
================================================
import {
    Directive,
    ElementRef,
    forwardRef,
    HostListener,
    Provider,
    Renderer2,
} from "@angular/core";
import { ControlValueAccessor, NG_VALUE_ACCESSOR } from "@angular/forms";

export const AWC_VALUE_ACCESSOR: Provider = {
    provide: NG_VALUE_ACCESSOR,
    useExisting: forwardRef(() => AWCValueAccessor),
    multi: true,
};

@Directive({
    selector: "aq-banner, aq-dialog, aq-drawer, aq-autocomplete, aq-flag-selector, aq-radio, aq-radio-group, aq-checkbox-group, aq-toggle, aq-code-editor, aq-number-field, aq-text-field, aq-tag-field, aq-color-picker, aq-date-picker, aq-search-bar",
    providers: [AWC_VALUE_ACCESSOR],
})
export class AWCValueAccessor implements ControlValueAccessor {
    constructor(private el: ElementRef, private renderer: Renderer2) { }

    private onChange = (_: any) => { };
    private onTouched = () => { };

    @HostListener("input", ["$event"])
    handleInput(event: any) {
        this.onChange(event.target?.value || event.detail?.value);
    }

    @HostListener("blur")
    handleBlur() {
        this.onTouched();
    }

    writeValue(value: boolean): void {
        this.renderer.setProperty(this.el.nativeElement, "value", value);
    }

    registerOnChange(fn: any): void {
        this.onChange = fn;
    }

    registerOnTouched(fn: any): void {
        this.onTouched = fn;
    }
}


================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-angular/src/lib/awc/control-value-accessors/boolean-value-accessor.ts
================================================
import { Directive, ElementRef } from '@angular/core';
import { NG_VALUE_ACCESSOR } from '@angular/forms';

import { ValueAccessor } from './value-accessor';

@Directive({
  /* tslint:disable-next-line:directive-selector */
  selector: 'aq-checkbox, aq-checkbox-button, aq-checkbox-card',
  host: {
    '(input)': 'handleChangeEvent($event?.detail?.checked ?? $event?.detail?.value ?? $event.target?.checked ?? $event.target?.value)',
  },
  providers: [
    {
      provide: NG_VALUE_ACCESSOR,
      useExisting: BooleanValueAccessor,
      multi: true
    }
  ],standalone: true
})
export class BooleanValueAccessor extends ValueAccessor {
  constructor(el: ElementRef) {
    super(el);
  }
  override writeValue(value: any) {
    console.log(' write value boolean ', value)
    this.el.nativeElement.checked = this.lastValue = value == null ? false : value;
  }
}

import { Directive, ElementRef, HostListener } from '@angular/core';
import { ControlValueAccessor } from '@angular/forms';

@Directive({})
export class ValueAccessor implements ControlValueAccessor {

  private onChange: (value: any) => void = () => {/**/};
  private onTouched: () => void = () => {/**/};
  protected lastValue: any;

  constructor(protected el: ElementRef) {}

  writeValue(value: any) {
    this.el.nativeElement.value = this.lastValue = value == null ? '' : value;
  }

  handleChangeEvent(value: any) {
    if (value !== this.lastValue) {
      this.lastValue = value;
      this.onChange(value);
    }
  }

  // @HostListener('focusout')
  // _handleBlurEvent() {
  //   this.onTouched();
  // }
  @HostListener('blur')
  _handleBlurEvent() {
    this.onTouched();
  }

  registerOnChange(fn: (value: any) => void) {
    this.onChange = fn;
  }
  registerOnTouched(fn: () => void) {
    this.onTouched = fn;
  }

  // setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean) {
  //   this.el.nativeElement.disabled = isDisabled;
  // }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/readme.md

[![Built With Stencil](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Built%20With%20Stencil-16161d.svg?logo=data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BCjxzdHlsZSB0eXBlPSJ0ZXh0L2NzcyI%2BCgkuc3Qwe2ZpbGw6I0ZGRkZGRjt9Cjwvc3R5bGU%%2BCg%3D%3D&colorA=16161d&style=flat-square)](https://stenciljs.com)

# Stencil Component Starter

> This is a starter project for building a standalone Web Components using Stencil.

Stencil is a compiler for building fast web apps using Web Components.

Stencil combines the best concepts of the most popular frontend frameworks into a compile-time rather than runtime tool. Stencil takes TypeScript, JSX, a tiny virtual DOM layer, efficient one-way data binding, an asynchronous rendering pipeline (similar to React Fiber), and lazy-loading out of the box, and generates 100% standards-based Web Components that run in any browser supporting the Custom Elements specification.

Stencil components are just Web Components, so they work in any major framework or with no framework at all.

## Getting Started

To start building a new web component using Stencil, clone this repo to a new directory:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/stenciljs/component-starter.git my-component
cd my-component
git remote rm origin
```

and run:

```bash
npm install
npm start
```

To build the component for production, run:

```bash
npm run build
```

To run the unit tests for the components, run:

```bash
npm test
```

Need help? Check out our docs [here](https://stenciljs.com/docs/my-first-component).

## Naming Components

When creating new component tags, we recommend _not_ using `stencil` in the component name (ex: `<stencil-datepicker>`). This is because the generated component has little to nothing to do with Stencil; it's just a web component!

Instead, use a prefix that fits your company or any name for a group of related components. For example, all of the [Ionic-generated](https://ionicframework.com/) web components use the prefix `ion`.

## Using this component

There are two strategies we recommend for using web components built with Stencil.

The first step for all two of these strategies is to [publish to NPM](https://docs.npmjs.com/getting-started/publishing-npm-packages).

You can read more about these different approaches in the [Stencil docs](https://stenciljs.com/docs/publishing).

### Lazy Loading

If your Stencil project is built with the [`dist`](https://stenciljs.com/docs/distribution) output target, you can import a small bootstrap script that registers all components and allows you to load individual component scripts lazily.

For example, given your Stencil project namespace is called `my-design-system`, to use `my-component` on any website, inject this into your HTML:

```html
<script type="module" src="https://unpkg.com/my-design-system"></script>
<!--
To avoid unpkg.com redirects to the actual file, you can also directly import:
https://unpkg.com/foobar-design-system@0.0.1/dist/foobar-design-system/foobar-design-system.esm.js
-->
<my-component first="Stencil" middle="'Don't call me a framework'" last="JS"></my-component>
```

This will only load the necessary scripts needed to render `<my-component />`. Once more components of this package are used, they will automatically be loaded lazily.

You can also import the script as part of your `node_modules` in your applications entry file:

```tsx
import 'foobar-design-system/dist/foobar-design-system/foobar-design-system.esm.js';
```

Check out this [Live Demo](https://stackblitz.com/edit/vitejs-vite-y6v26a?file=src%2Fmain.tsx).

### Standalone

If you are using a Stencil component library with `dist-custom-elements`, we recommend importing Stencil components individually in those files where they are needed.

To export Stencil components as standalone components make sure you have the [`dist-custom-elements`](https://stenciljs.com/docs/custom-elements) output target defined in your `stencil.config.ts`.

For example, given you'd like to use `<my-component />` as part of a React component, you can import the component directly via:

```tsx
import 'foobar-design-system/my-component';

function App() {
  return (
    <>
      <div>
        <my-component
          first="Stencil"
          middle="'Don't call me a framework'"
          last="JS"
        ></my-component>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

export default App;
```

Check out this [Live Demo](https://stackblitz.com/edit/vitejs-vite-b6zuds?file=src%2FApp.tsx).


================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/build-exports.js
================================================
// scripts/build-exports.js
import { readdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from "fs";
import path from "path";

const pkgPath = path.resolve("package.json");
const pkg = JSON.parse(readFileSync(pkgPath, "utf8"));

const componentsDir = path.resolve("dist/components");
const files = readdirSync(componentsDir);

// Construimos exports ordenados
const newExports = {
  ".": {
    import: "./dist/aqua-ds-charts/aqua-ds-charts.esm.js",
    require: "./dist/aqua-ds-charts/aqua-ds-charts.cjs.js"
  },
  "./loader": {
    import: "./loader/index.js",
    require: "./loader/index.cjs",
    types: "./loader/index.d.ts"
  }
};

// Agregamos cada componente ordenado alfabéticamente
files
  .filter((f) => f.endsWith(".js") && f.startsWith("aq-chart"))
  .sort()
  .forEach((file) => {
    const base = file.replace(/\.js$/, "");
    newExports[`./${base}`] = {
      import: `./dist/components/${file}`,
      types: `./dist/components/${base}.d.ts`
    };
  });

pkg.exports = newExports;

// Guardamos bonito con indentación
writeFileSync(pkgPath, JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + "\n");
console.log("✅ package.json exports updated!");

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-area/aq-chart-area.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, Watch, h, Element, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import Highcharts, { Options, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts';
import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import { Legend } from '../../helpers/legend';
import Titles from '../../helpers/titles';
import { Palette } from '../../helpers/palettesConfig';
import { assignColors } from '../../utils/commons/ColorPalettes';
import cloneDeep from 'lodash.clonedeep';
import { Palettes } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';
import { LegendAlignEnum, LegendLayoutEnum, LegendVerticalAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';
import { SubTitleTextAlignEnum, TitleTextAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/titles';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-area',
  styleUrl: 'aq-chart-area.scss',
})
export class AqChartArea {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) options: Options = { }

  @Prop() palette: Palettes = Palettes.CYAN;
  @Prop() customPalette: any = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    assignColors: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }

  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }  
  @Watch('customPalette')
  handleCustomPaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }

  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> { 
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }

  @Element() private element: HTMLElement;
  private chart?: Highcharts.Chart;

  private limitLegend = {
    [LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.CENTER, LegendAlignEnum.LEFT, LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM],
    },
    [LegendLayoutEnum.VERTICAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.MIDDLE],
    }
  }
  
  private limitTitle = {
    alignTitle: [TitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, TitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, TitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
    alignSubtitle: [SubTitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
  }

  private HelperPalette = Palette(this);
  private HelperLegend = Legend(this, this.limitLegend);
  private HelperTitle = Titles(this, this.limitTitle);

  private getChartOptions(): Options {
    return Highcharts.merge(generalOptions, 
      {
        accessibility: {
          enabled: false
        },
        chart: {
          type: 'area'
        },
        title: {
          text: ''
        },
        subtitle: {
          text: ''
        },
        tooltip: {
          pointFormat: '{series.name}: {point.x}'
        },
        lang: {
          locale: 'en-US'
        },
        legend: {
          enabled: true,
          useHTML: true,
          labelFormatter: function () {
            if(this.visible)
              return `
                <span
                  class="custom-legend-item" 
                  data-series-name="${this.name}"
                  style="
                  display: inline-block;
                  width: 14px;
                  height: 14px;
                  border-radius: 50%;
                  background-color: ${this.color};
                  margin-right: 8px;
                  vertical-align: middle;
                "></span>
                <span>${this.name}</span>
              `
            else return `
              <span
                class="custom-legend-item" 
                data-series-name="${this.name}"
                style="
                display: inline-block;
                width: 14px;
                height: 14px;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background-color: var(--color-paper-dark);
                margin-right: 8px;
                vertical-align: middle;
              "></span>
              <span>${this.name}</span>
              `
            },
        },
        xAxis: {
          allowDecimals: false,
        },
        plotOptions: {
          area: {
            fillOpacity: 0.3,
            marker: {
              enabled: false,
              symbol: 'circle',
              radius: 2,
              states: {
                hover: {
                  enabled: true,
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      this.setOptions(this.options)
  )}

  setOptions(options: any) {
    let opts = cloneDeep(options);
    opts.legend = this.HelperLegend.getLegendConf();
    opts = this.HelperTitle.setTitleStyles(opts);

    if (opts && Array.isArray(opts.series) && opts.series.length > 0) {
      const localPalette = this.HelperPalette.getLocalPalette();
      opts.series = assignColors(
        opts.series,
        localPalette,
        this.customPalette,
        this.customPalette.active,
        false,
        false,
      ).reverse();
    }
    return opts;
  }

  private renderChart() {
    const container = this.element.querySelector('#container');
    if (container)
      this.chart = Highcharts.chart(container as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
  }

  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() =>
      this.renderChart()
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div id="container" class="aq-chart-area" style={{ width: '100%', height: '400px' }}></div>
    );
  }
}



================================================

| `isGrouped`     | `is-grouped`     |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `false`                                                                                   |
| `options`       | `options`        |             | `Options`                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `{}`                                                                                      |

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-bar/aq-chart-bar.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Element, Watch, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import Highcharts, {  Options, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts';
import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import { assignColors, asignSameColor} from '../../utils/commons/ColorPalettes';
import { Legend } from '../../helpers/legend';
import { CustomPalette } from '../../types/global/global';
import { Palette } from '../../helpers/palettesConfig';
import Titles from '../../helpers/titles';
import cloneDeep from 'lodash.clonedeep';
import { Palettes } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';
import { LegendAlignEnum, LegendLayoutEnum, LegendVerticalAlignEnum} from '../../types/helpers/legend';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-bar'
})
export class AqChartBar {
  @Prop({mutable: true, reflect: true}) options: Options = {}
  
  @Prop() palette: Palettes = Palettes.CYAN;
  @Prop() customPalette: CustomPalette = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    asignSameColor: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }
  @Prop() isGrouped: boolean = false;

  private limitLegend = {
    [LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.CENTER, LegendAlignEnum.LEFT, LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM],
    },
    [LegendLayoutEnum.VERTICAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.MIDDLE],
    },
  }

  private HelperLegend = Legend(this, this.limitLegend);
  private HelperPalette = Palette(this);
  private HelperTitle = Titles();

  
  @Element() private element: HTMLElement;
  private chart: Highcharts.Chart;
  
  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  
  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  
  @Watch('customPalette')
  handleCustomPaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  
  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> { 
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }  
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }

  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }

  private setOptions(options: Options) {
    let opts : any = cloneDeep(options);
    opts.legend = this.isGrouped && this.HelperLegend.getLegendConf();
    opts = this.HelperTitle.setTitleStyles(opts);
      if (opts && Array.isArray(opts.series) && opts.series.length > 0) {
        const localPalette = this.HelperPalette.getLocalPalette();
        if (Array.isArray(opts.series[0].data) && !this.isGrouped) {
          opts.series[0].data = asignSameColor(
            opts.series[0].data,
            localPalette,
            0,
            this.customPalette,
            this.customPalette.active,
          );
        } else {
          opts.series = assignColors(
            opts.series,
            localPalette,
            this.customPalette,
            this.customPalette.active,
          );
        }
      }
      return opts;
  };

  private getChartOptions(): Options {
    return Highcharts.merge(generalOptions,{
      chart: {
        renderTo: 'container',
        type: 'bar',
      },
      title: {
        text: ''
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: ''
      },
      xAxis: {
        type: 'category',
      },
      yAxis: {
        type: 'linear',
      },
      legend: {
        enabled: this.isGrouped,
      },
      lang: {
        locale: 'en-US'
      }
    },this.setOptions(this.options));
  }

  private renderChart() {
    const container = this.element.querySelector('#container');

    if (container) {
      this.chart = Highcharts.chart(container as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
    }
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() =>
      this.renderChart()
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div id="container"></div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-column/aq-chart-column.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, Watch, h, Element, Event, EventEmitter, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import cloneDeep from 'lodash.clonedeep';
import Highcharts, { Options, SeriesClickEventObject, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts';
import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import { Legend } from '../../helpers/legend';
import Titles from '../../helpers/titles';
import { Palette } from '../../helpers/palettesConfig';
import { assignColors } from '../../utils/commons/ColorPalettes';
import { Palettes } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';
import { LegendAlignEnum, LegendLayoutEnum, LegendVerticalAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';
import { SubTitleTextAlignEnum, TitleTextAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/titles';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-column',
})
export class AqChartColumn {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) options: Options = { }
  @Prop() maxValue: number = 10;
  @Prop() isGrouped: boolean = false;

  @Prop() palette: Palettes = Palettes.CYAN;

  @Prop() customPalette: any = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    assignColors: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }

  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('isGrouped')
  handleIsGroupedChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }  
  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }  
  @Watch('customPalette')
  handleCustomPaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }

  @Event() clickColumn: EventEmitter<any>;

  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> { 
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }

  @Element() private element: HTMLElement;
  private chart: Highcharts.Chart;
  private limitLegend = {
    [LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.CENTER, LegendAlignEnum.LEFT, LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM],
    },
    [LegendLayoutEnum.VERTICAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.MIDDLE],
    }
  }
  private limitTitle = {
    alignTitle: [TitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, TitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, TitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
    alignSubtitle: [SubTitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
  }
  private HelperPalette = Palette(this);
  private HelperLegend = Legend(this, this.limitLegend);
  private HelperTitle = Titles(this, this.limitTitle);

  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }

  private getChartOptions(): Options {
    return Highcharts.merge(generalOptions, 
      {
        chart: {
          type: 'column'
        },
        title: {
          text: ''
        },
        subtitle: {
          text: ''
        },
        lang: {
          locale: 'en-US'
        },
        legend: {
          enabled: this.isGrouped
        },
        plotOptions: {
          column: {
            pointPadding: 0.2,
            groupPadding: 0.2,
            point: {
              events: {
                click: (e: SeriesClickEventObject) => {
                  let objectInfo = {};
                  
                  if (this.isGrouped) {
                    const { category, options } = e.point;
                    const { name } = e.point.series;
                    objectInfo = { name, category, options };
                  } else {
                    const { options } = e.point;
                    objectInfo = options;
                  }

                  this.clickColumn.emit(objectInfo);
                },
              },
            },
          }
        },
        yAxis: {
          type: 'linear',
        },
        xAxis: {
          type: 'category',
          crosshair: true,
        },
      },
      this.setOptions(this.options)
  )}

  setOptions(options: any) {
    let opts = cloneDeep(options);
    opts.legend = this.isGrouped ? this.HelperLegend.getLegendConf() : { enabled: false };
    opts = this.HelperTitle.setTitleStyles(opts);

    if (opts && Array.isArray(opts.series) && opts.series.length > 0) {
      const localPalette = this.HelperPalette.getLocalPalette();
      opts.series = assignColors(
        opts.series,
        localPalette,
        this.customPalette,
        this.customPalette.active,
        false,
        false,
      ).reverse();
    }
    return opts;
  }

  private renderChart() {
    const container = this.element.querySelector('#container');
    if (container)
      this.chart = Highcharts.chart(container as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() =>
      this.renderChart()
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div id="container" style={{ width: '100%', height: '400px' }}></div>
    );
  }
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-donut/aq-chart-donut.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, Watch, h, Element, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import Highcharts, { Options, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts';

import cloneDeep from 'lodash.clonedeep';

import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import { Legend } from '../../helpers/legend';
import Titles from '../../helpers/titles';
import { Palette } from '../../helpers/palettesConfig';
import { assignColors } from '../../utils/commons/ColorPalettes';
import { Palettes } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';
import { LegendAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';
import { LegendLayoutEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';
import { LegendVerticalAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';
import { SubTitleTextAlignEnum, TitleTextAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/titles';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-donut',
})
export class AqChartDonut {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) options: Options = {}
  @Prop() palette: Palettes = Palettes.CYAN;
  @Prop() customPalette: any = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    assignColors: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }

  @Prop() sortOptions = true;

  @Prop() tooltipPositionX = 0;
  @Prop() tooltipPositionY = 30;

  private limitLegend = {
    [LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.CENTER, LegendAlignEnum.LEFT, LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM],
    },
    [LegendLayoutEnum.VERTICAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.MIDDLE],
    },
  }
  private limitTitle = {
    alignTitle: [TitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, TitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, TitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
    alignSubtitle: [SubTitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
  }
  
  private HelperLegend = Legend(this, this.limitLegend);
  private HelperPalette = Palette(this);
  private HelperTitle = Titles(this, this.limitTitle);

  @Element() private element: HTMLElement;
  private chart: Highcharts.Chart;  

  
  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }  
  @Watch('customPalette')
  handleCustomPaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  
  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> { 
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }

  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }

  private getChartOptions(): Options {    
    return Highcharts.merge(generalOptions, 
      {
        chart: {
          renderTo: 'container',
          plotBackgroundColor: null,
          plotBorderWidth: null,
          plotShadow: false,
          type: 'pie',
        },
        title: {
          text: ''
        },
        subtitle: {
          text: ''
        },
        tooltip: {
          positioner: this.getPositioner(this.tooltipPositionX, this.tooltipPositionY),
          shadow: false,
          backgroundColor: 'transparent',
          formatter: function() {
            return `<span style="font-weight: var(--font-weight-semi-bold);">${this.name}</span><br><span style="display: block; font-size: 2em; color: ${this.color}; font-weight: var(--font-weight-semi-bold); font-size: var(--font-size-3xl); text-align: center;">${this.y}</span>`
          },
        },
        plotOptions: {
          pie: {
            allowPointSelect: true,
            cursor: 'pointer',
            dataLabels: {
              enabled: false,
            },
            showInLegend: true,
            innerSize: '45%',
          },
          xAxis: {
            gridLineColor: 'white',
          },
        },
        lang: {
          locale: 'en-US'
        },
      },
      this.setOptions(this.options)
  )}

  private setOptions(options: any) {
    let opts = cloneDeep(options);

    if (opts && Array.isArray(opts.series) && Array.isArray(opts.series[0].data)) {
      const localPalette = this.HelperPalette.getLocalPalette();

      let { data } = opts.series[0];
      if (this.sortOptions)
        data.sort((a: any, b: any) => b.y - a.y);

      if (this.palette) {
        data = assignColors(
          data,
          localPalette,
          this.customPalette,
          this.customPalette.active,
        );        
        opts.series[0] = { data };
      }
    }
    opts.legend = this.HelperLegend.getLegendConf();
    opts = this.HelperTitle.setTitleStyles(opts);
    return opts;
  }

  private getPositioner(tooltipPositionerX: number, tooltipPositionerY: number) {
    return function (labelWidth: number) {
      return { x: (this.chart.chartWidth - labelWidth)/2 + tooltipPositionerX,
        y: this.chart.plotHeight/2  + tooltipPositionerY 
      }
    }
  }

  private renderChart() {
    const container = this.element.querySelector('#container');
    if (container)
      this.chart = Highcharts.chart(container as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() =>
      this.renderChart()
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div id="container"></div>
    );
  }
}

import { Component, h, Element, Prop, Watch, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import Highcharts, { Options, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts';
import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import { Legend } from '../../helpers/legend';
import { assignColors } from '../../utils/commons/ColorPalettes';
import type { CustomPalette } from '../../types/global/global';
import { Palette } from '../../helpers/palettesConfig';
import Titles from '../../helpers/titles';
import cloneDeep from 'lodash.clonedeep';
import { Palettes } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';
import { SubTitleTextAlignEnum, TitleTextAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/titles';
import { LegendAlignEnum, LegendLayoutEnum, LegendVerticalAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-donut-thin'
})
export class AqChartDonutThin {
  @Prop({mutable: true, reflect: true}) options: Options = {}
  @Prop() palette: Palettes = Palettes.CYAN;
  @Prop() customPalette: CustomPalette = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    asignSameColor: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }
  
  @Prop() sortOptions = false;
  @Prop() tooltipPositionerX = 5;
  @Prop() tooltipPositionerY = 10;

  private limitTitle = {
    alignTitle: [TitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, TitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, TitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
    alignSubtitle: [SubTitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
  }

  private limitLegend = {
    [LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.CENTER, LegendAlignEnum.LEFT, LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM],
    },
    [LegendLayoutEnum.VERTICAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.MIDDLE],
    },
  }
  private HelperLegend = Legend(this, this.limitLegend);
  private HelperPalette = Palette(this);
  private HelperTitle = Titles(this, this.limitTitle);
  
  @Element() private element: HTMLElement;
  private chart: Highcharts.Chart;

  
  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  
  @Watch('customPalette')
  handleCustomPaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }

  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('tooltipPositionerX')
  handleTooltipPositionerXChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('tooltipPositionerY')
  handleTooltipPositionerYChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  
  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> { 
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }  
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }

  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }

  private setOptions(options: Options) {
    let opts : any = cloneDeep(options);
      if (opts && Array.isArray(opts.series) && Array.isArray(opts.series[0].data)) {
        let { data } = opts.series[0];
        if (this.sortOptions) {
          data.sort((a, b) => b.y - a.y);
        }
        if (this.palette) {
          data = assignColors(
            data,
            this.HelperPalette.getLocalPalette(),
            this.customPalette,
            this.customPalette.active,
          );
        }
        opts.series[0] = { data };
      }
      opts.legend = this.HelperLegend.getLegendConf();
      opts = this.HelperTitle.setTitleStyles(opts);
      return opts;
  };

  private getPositioner(tooltipPositionerX: number, tooltipPositionerY: number) {
    return function (labelWidth: number) {
      return { x: (this.chart.chartWidth - labelWidth)/2 + tooltipPositionerX,
        y: this.chart.plotHeight/2  + tooltipPositionerY 
      }
    }
  }

  private getChartOptions(): Options {
    return Highcharts.merge(generalOptions,
      {
        chart: {
          renderTo: 'container',
          plotBackgroundColor: null,
          plotBorderWidth: null,
          plotShadow: false,
          type: 'pie',
        },
        title: {
          text: ''
        },
        subtitle: {
          text: ''
        },
        tooltip: {
          positioner: this.getPositioner(this.tooltipPositionerX, this.tooltipPositionerY),
        },
        lang: {
          locale: 'en-US'
        },
        plotOptions: {
          pie: {
            allowPointSelect: true,
            cursor: 'pointer',
            dataLabels: {
              enabled: false,
            },
            showInLegend: true,
            innerSize: '80%',
          },
          xAxis: {
            gridLineColor: 'white',
          },
        },
      }
    ,this.setOptions(this.options));
  }

  private renderChart() {
    const container = this.element.querySelector('#container');
    if (container) {
      this.chart = Highcharts.chart(container as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
    }
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() =>
      this.renderChart()
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div id="container"></div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-geo-map/aq-chart-geo-map.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Element, Watch, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import Highcharts, { Options, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts/highmaps';
import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import Theme from '../../utils/commons/Theme';
import AquaMap from '../../utils/commons/worldMaps';
import type { CustomPalette } from '../../types/global/global';
import 'highcharts/modules/accessibility';
import { Colors } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';


@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-geo-map',
})
export class AqChartGeoMap {
  @Prop({mutable: true, reflect: true}) options: Options = {}
  @Prop() palette: string = "";
  @Prop() customPalette: CustomPalette = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    asignSameColor: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }
  
  @Element() private element: HTMLElement;
  private chart: Highcharts.Chart;
  
  
  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  
  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }

  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> { 
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }  
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }

  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }

  private setOptions(options: any) {
    return options;
  }

  private getChartOptions(): Options {
    return Highcharts.merge(generalOptions,
      {
        accessibility: {
          enabled: false,
        },
        chart: {
          renderTo: 'container',
          map: 'Aqua',
          events: {
            load() {
              this.mapZoom(0.3, 2000, -6700);
            },
          },
        },
        plotOptions: {
          map: {
            states: {
              hover: {
                enabled: true,
                color: 'red',
              },
            },
            marker: {
              enabled: true,
              symbol: 'circle',
              radius: 2,
              states: {
                hover: {
                  enabled: true,
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
        lang: {
          locale: 'en-US'
        },
        mapNavigation: {
          enabled: true,
        },
        legend: {
          enabled: false,
        },
        subtitle: {
          text: ''
        },
        title: {
          text: '',
          style: {
            color: 'var(--color-ink-base)',
            font: 'var(--font-size-xl) "Trebuchet MS", Verdana, sans-serif',
          },
        },
        series: [
          {
            name: '',
            data: [],
            states: {
              hover: {
                color: this.palette === '' ? '#F5F5FF' : Colors?.[this.palette]?.[0]
              }
            },
          },
        ],
        colorAxis: {
          min: 10,
          max: 1000,
          type: "logarithmic",
          stops: [  
            [0, 
              this.palette === '' ? '#F5F5FF' : Colors?.[this.palette]?.[0]
            ],            
            [0.5, this.palette === '' ? 'rgb(136,160,207)' : Colors?.[this.palette]?.[3] ],
            [1, this.palette === '' ? '#000066' : Colors?.[this.palette]?.[5] ] 
          ]
        },
      }
    ,this.setOptions(this.options), Theme('null'));
  } 
  
  private renderChart() {
    const container = this.element.querySelector('#container');
    if (container) {
      this.chart = Highcharts.mapChart(container as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
    }
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      AquaMap(Highcharts);
      this.renderChart();
    }
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div id="container"></div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-line/readme.md

# aq-chart-line



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property        | Attribute        | Description | Type                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Default                                                                                 |
| --------------- | ---------------- | ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `customPalette` | `custom-palette` |             | `any`                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | `{     active: false,     palette: [],     assignColors: false,     colorIndex: 0,   }` |
| `options`       | `options`        |             | `Options`                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `{ }`                                                                                   |
| `palette`       | `palette`        |             | `Palettes.BLUE \| Palettes.CYAN \| Palettes.GREEN \| Palettes.LIME \| Palettes.ORANGE \| Palettes.PURPLE \| Palettes.RED \| Palettes.ROSE \| Palettes.SPECIFICCOLORS \| Palettes.STATUS \| Palettes.TEAL \| Palettes.YELLOW` | `Palettes.CYAN`                                                                         |

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-line/aq-chart-line.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, Watch, h, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import cloneDeep from 'lodash.clonedeep';
import Highcharts, { Options, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts';
import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import { Legend } from '../../helpers/legend';
import Titles from '../../helpers/titles';
import { Palette } from '../../helpers/palettesConfig';
import { assignColors } from '../../utils/commons/ColorPalettes';

import { Palettes } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';
import { LegendAlignEnum, LegendLayoutEnum, LegendVerticalAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';
import { SubTitleTextAlignEnum, TitleTextAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/titles';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-line',
})
export class AqChartLine {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) options: Options = { }
  @Prop() palette: Palettes = Palettes.CYAN;  
  @Prop() customPalette: any = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    assignColors: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }

  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {    
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }  
  @Watch('customPalette')
  handleCustomPaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }

  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> { 
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }  
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }

  private containerEl!: HTMLElement; 

  private chart: Highcharts.Chart;
  private limitLegend = {
    [LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.CENTER, LegendAlignEnum.LEFT, LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM],
    },
    [LegendLayoutEnum.VERTICAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.MIDDLE],
    },
  }

  private limitTitle = {
    alignTitle: [TitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, TitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, TitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
    alignSubtitle: [SubTitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
  }
  
  private HelperPalette = Palette(this);
  private HelperLegend = Legend(this, this.limitLegend);
  private HelperTitle = Titles(this, this.limitTitle);

  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }

  private getChartOptions(): Options {
    return Highcharts.merge(generalOptions, 
      {
        chart: {
          type: 'line'
        },
        title: {
          text: ''
        },
        subtitle: {
          text: ''
        },
        lang: {
          locale: 'en-US'
        },
        legend: {
          enabled: true
        },
      },
      this.setOptions(this.options)
  )}

  setOptions(options: any) {
    let opts = cloneDeep(options);
    opts.legend = this.HelperLegend.getLegendConf();
    opts = this.HelperTitle.setTitleStyles(opts);

    if (opts && Array.isArray(opts.series) && opts.series.length > 0) {
      const localPalette = this.HelperPalette.getLocalPalette();
      opts.series = assignColors(
        opts.series,
        localPalette,
        this.customPalette,
        this.customPalette.active,
        false,
        false,
      ).reverse();
    }
    return opts;
  }

  private renderChart() {
    if (this.containerEl)
      this.chart = Highcharts.chart(this.containerEl as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() =>
      this.renderChart()
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div ref={(el) => (this.containerEl = el as HTMLElement)} style={{ width: '100%', height: '400px' }}></div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-progress-bar/aq-chart-progress-bar.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h, Element, Watch, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import Highcharts, { Options, SeriesBarOptions, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts';
import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import { Legend } from '../../helpers/legend';
import { Palette } from '../../helpers/palettesConfig';
import Titles from '../../helpers/titles';
import { assignColors } from '../../utils/commons/ColorPalettes';
import 'highcharts/modules/accessibility';
import { CustomPalette } from '../../types/global/global';
import cloneDeep from 'lodash.clonedeep';
import { Palettes } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';
import { LegendLayoutEnum, LegendAlignEnum, LegendVerticalAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';
import { TitleTextAlignEnum, SubTitleTextAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/titles';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-progress-bar',
})
export class AqChartProgressBar {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) options: Options = {};
  @Prop() palette: Palettes = Palettes.CYAN;
  @Prop() customPalette: CustomPalette = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    asignSameColor: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }
  
  @Prop() maxValue: number = 100;
  @Prop() height: number = 0;

  private limitLegend = {
    [LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL]: {
        align: [LegendAlignEnum.LEFT, LegendAlignEnum.CENTER],
        verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM,LegendVerticalAlignEnum.TOP],
      } 
    }
    
  private limitTitle = {
    alignTitle: [TitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, TitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, TitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
    alignSubtitle: [SubTitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
  }
  
  private HelperLegend = Legend(this, this.limitLegend);
  private HelperPalette = Palette(this);
  private HelperTitle = Titles(this, this.limitTitle);

  @Element() private element: HTMLElement;
  private chart: Highcharts.Chart;

  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('maxValue')
  handleMaxValueChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }
  @Watch('customPalette')
  handleCustomPaletteChange() {
      this.updateChart();
  }
  
  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> { 
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }  
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }
  
  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }
  private getTotalSum(series) {
    let totalSum = 0;

    series?.forEach((serie) => {
      totalSum += serie.data.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0);
    });

    return totalSum;
  }

  private setTotalBar(totalSum, maxValue, seriesOptions) {
    if (totalSum > maxValue) {
      console.error(
        'Aq-progress-bar: The sum of all series is greater than the maximum value (maxValue).',
      );
    } else if (totalSum < maxValue) {
      const emptySpace = maxValue - totalSum;

      const newSeries = {
        data: [emptySpace],
        color: '#B6B8BE',
        showInLegend: false,
        emptyColor: true,
        className: 'rounded-right-border',
        grouping: false,
      };

      seriesOptions?.push(newSeries);
    }

    return seriesOptions;
  }

  private updateSeriesValues(series: SeriesBarOptions[]): SeriesOptionsType[] {
    return series?.reduce((acc, current, index) => {
      const newDataValue = index > 0 ? current.data[0] + acc[index - 1].data[0] : current.data[0];
      acc.push({ ...current, data: [newDataValue] });
      return acc;
    }, []);
  }

  private setAllSeries(options: Options): SeriesOptionsType[] {
    const newOptions = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(options));
    const totalSum = this.getTotalSum(options.series);
    let series: SeriesOptionsType[] = [];
    series = this.setTotalBar(totalSum, this.maxValue, newOptions.series);
    series = this.updateSeriesValues(newOptions.series as SeriesBarOptions[]);
    return series
  }
  
  private setDefaultHeight() {
    const progressBarHeight = {
      basic: 40,
      title: 30,
      subtitle: 30,
      legends: 35,
    };
    const defaultHeight =
      progressBarHeight.basic +
      (this.options?.title?.text ? progressBarHeight.title : 0) +
      (this.options?.subtitle?.text ? progressBarHeight.subtitle : 0) +
      (this.options?.legend?.enabled ? progressBarHeight.legends : 0);
    return this.height != 0 ? this.height : defaultHeight;
  }

  private setOptions(options: Options) {
    let opts: any = cloneDeep(options);
    opts = {...opts, ...this.HelperTitle.getTitleConf()};
    opts.legend = this.HelperLegend.getLegendConf();
    
    opts = {...this.HelperTitle.setTitleStyles(opts), ...this.HelperTitle.getTitleConf()};


    if (opts && Array.isArray(opts.series) && opts.series.length > 0) {
      const localPalette = this.HelperPalette.getLocalPalette();
      opts.series = assignColors(
        opts.series,
        localPalette,
        this.customPalette,
        this.customPalette.active,
        false,
        false,
      ).reverse();
    }
    return opts;
  };

  private getChartOptions(): Options {
    const updatedOptions = {...this.options, series: this.setAllSeries(this.options)}
    return Highcharts.merge(generalOptions, {
      credits: false,
      tooltip: { enabled: false },
      chart: {
        height: this.setDefaultHeight(),
          type: 'bar',
        },
        title: {
          text: ''
        },
        subtitle: {
          text: ''
        },
        xAxis: {
          visible: false,
          height: 15,
        },
        yAxis: {
          visible: false,
          max: this.maxValue,
        },
        plotOptions: {
          bar: {
            events: {
              legendItemClick() {
                return false;
              },
            },
          },
          series: {
            borderRadius: {
              radius: 10,
              where: 'all',
            },
            enableMouseTracking: false,
            allowPointSelect: false,
            states: {
              inactive: {
                enabled: false,
              },
              select: {
                enabled: false,
              },
            },
          },
        },
        legend: {
          reversed: true,
          enableMouseTracking: false,
          align: 'center',
        },
        lang: {
          locale: 'en-US'
        },
      }, this.setOptions(updatedOptions));
  }

  private renderChart() {
    const container = this.element.querySelector('#container');

    if (container) {
      this.chart = Highcharts.chart(container as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
    }
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() =>
      this.renderChart()
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div id="container"></div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/components/aq-chart-stock-area/aq-chart-stock-area.tsx

import { Component, Prop, Watch, h, Element, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import HighchartsStock, { Options, SeriesOptionsType } from 'highcharts/highstock'; // Cambiado a highstock
import generalOptions from '../../utils/commons/generalOptions';
import { Legend } from '../../helpers/legend';
import Titles from '../../helpers/titles';
import { Palette } from '../../helpers/palettesConfig';
import { assignColors } from '../../utils/commons/ColorPalettes';
import cloneDeep from 'lodash.clonedeep';
import { Palettes } from '../../types/helpers/palette/colorPalette';
import { LegendAlignEnum, LegendLayoutEnum, LegendVerticalAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/legend';
import { SubTitleTextAlignEnum, TitleTextAlignEnum } from '../../types/helpers/titles';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-chart-stock-area',
  styleUrl: 'aq-chart-stock-area.scss',
})
export class AqChartStockArea {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) options: Options = {}

  @Prop() showRangeSelector = true;
  @Prop() palette: Palettes = Palettes.CYAN;
  @Prop() customPalette: any = {
    active: false,
    palette: [],
    assignColors: false,
    colorIndex: 0,
  }

  @Watch('options')
  handleOptionsChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }

  @Watch('palette')
  handlePaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }

  @Watch('customPalette')
  handleCustomPaletteChange() {
    this.updateChart();
  }

  @Method()
  async getChart(): Promise<Highcharts.Chart> {
    return this.chart;
  }
  @Method()
  async updateOptions(newOptions: Options) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, ...newOptions };
  }  
  @Method()
  async updateSeries(newSeries: SeriesOptionsType[]) { 
    this.options = { ...this.options, series: newSeries };
  }

  @Element() private element: HTMLElement;
  private chart: Highcharts.Chart;

  private limitLegend = {
    [LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.CENTER, LegendAlignEnum.LEFT, LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM],
    },
    [LegendLayoutEnum.VERTICAL]: {
      align: [LegendAlignEnum.RIGHT],
      verticalAlign: [LegendVerticalAlignEnum.MIDDLE],
    }
  }

  private limitTitle = {
    alignTitle: [TitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, TitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, TitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
    alignSubtitle: [SubTitleTextAlignEnum.CENTER, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.LEFT, SubTitleTextAlignEnum.RIGHT],
  }

  private HelperPalette = Palette(this);
  private HelperLegend = Legend(this, this.limitLegend);
  private HelperTitle = Titles(this, this.limitTitle);

  private updateChart() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.update(this.getChartOptions(), true, true, true);
    }
  }

  private getChartOptions(): Options {
    return HighchartsStock.merge(generalOptions,
      {
        chart: {
          type: 'area'
        },
        tooltip: {
          shared: true
        },
        title: {
          text: ''
        },
        subtitle: {
          text: ''
        },
        lang: {
          locale: 'en-US'
        },
        navigator: {
          enabled: true
        },
        rangeSelector: {
          enabled: false
        },
        legend: {
          enabled: true,
          useHTML: true,
          labelFormatter: function () {
            if(this.visible)
              return `
                <span
                  class="custom-legend-item" 
                  data-series-name="${this.name}"
                  style="
                  display: inline-block;
                  width: 14px;
                  height: 14px;
                  border-radius: 50%;
                  background-color: ${this.color};
                  margin-right: 8px;
                  vertical-align: middle;
                "></span>
                <span>${this.name}</span>
              `
            else return `
              <span
                class="custom-legend-item" 
                data-series-name="${this.name}"
                style="
                display: inline-block;
                width: 14px;
                height: 14px;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background-color: var(--color-paper-dark);
                margin-right: 8px;
                vertical-align: middle;
              "></span>
              <span>${this.name}</span>
            `
          },
        },
        xAxis: {
          allowDecimals: false,
        },
        plotOptions: {
          area: {
            fillOpacity: 0.3,
            marker: {
              enabled: false,
              symbol: 'circle',
              radius: 2,
              states: {
                hover: {
                  enabled: true,
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      this.setOptions(this.options)
    )
  }

  setOptions(options: any) {
    let opts = cloneDeep(options);
    opts.legend = this.HelperLegend.getLegendConf();
    opts = this.HelperTitle.setTitleStyles(opts);

    if (opts && Array.isArray(opts.series) && opts.series.length > 0) {
      const localPalette = this.HelperPalette.getLocalPalette();
      opts.series = assignColors(
        opts.series,
        localPalette,
        this.customPalette,
        this.customPalette.active,
        false,
        false,
      ).reverse();
    }
    return opts;
  }

  private renderChart() {
    const container = this.element.querySelector('#container');
    if (container)
      this.chart = HighchartsStock.stockChart(container as HTMLElement, this.getChartOptions());
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() =>
      this.renderChart()
    )
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (this.chart && this.chart.destroy) {
      this.chart.destroy();
      this.chart = undefined;
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div id="container" class="aq-chart-stock-area" style={{ width: '100%', height: '400px' }}></div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/helpers/base.ts
================================================
import { ComponentBase } from "../types/helpers/base";

export function Base(component: ComponentBase) {
  return {
    get getChart() {
      return component.$refs.chart.chart;
    },
    get getHeight(){
      const optionsHeight = {
        NoAxisNoLegend: 80,
        AxisNoLegend: 100,
        NoAxisLegend: 120,
        AxisLegend: 150,
      };
      const properties = `${component.options?.xAxis?.title ? 'Axis' : 'NoAxis'}NoLegend`;
      return component.height ? component.height : optionsHeight[properties];
    },
    update() {
      const options = component.isProgressBar ? component.chartOptions : component.options;
      component.getChart().update(options);
    },
    reflow() {
      component.getChart().reflow();
    },
    refreshSeries() {
      const series = [...component.options.series];
        series.forEach(() => {
          if (component.getChart().series[0]) {
            component.getChart().series[0].remove();
          }
        });
    }
  }
}


================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-charts-wc/src/helpers/legend.ts
================================================
import { ComponentLegend, LegendOptions, LimitLegend, LegendAlignEnum, LegendLayoutEnum, LegendVerticalAlignEnum } from "../types/helpers/legend";

export function Legend(component: ComponentLegend, limitLegend?: LimitLegend) {

  const validateLegend = () => {

      const orientation = component?.options?.legend?.layout === 'vertical'? LegendLayoutEnum.VERTICAL : LegendLayoutEnum.HORIZONTAL;


      const requestedAlign= component?.options?.legend?.align;
      const validAlign = limitLegend?.[orientation]?.align?.includes(requestedAlign as LegendAlignEnum) ? requestedAlign : limitLegend?.[orientation]?.align[0] || LegendAlignEnum.CENTER;

      const requestedVerticalAlign = component?.options?.legend?.verticalAlign;
      const validVerticalAlign = limitLegend?.[orientation]?.verticalAlign?.includes(requestedVerticalAlign as LegendVerticalAlignEnum) ? requestedVerticalAlign : limitLegend?.[orientation]?.verticalAlign[0] || LegendVerticalAlignEnum.BOTTOM;

      return { validLayout: orientation, validAlign, validVerticalAlign };
 
  }

  return {
    getLegendConf(withSymbolSize = false) { 
      let legend: LegendOptions = {
        layout: 'horizontal',
        enabled: true,
        itemStyle: {
          font: '',
          color: '',
        },
        itemHoverStyle: {
          color: '',
        },
        verticalAlign: 'bottom',
        align: 'center',
      };

      const { validAlign, validLayout, validVerticalAlign } = validateLegend();

      legend = {
        ...component?.options?.legend,
        verticalAlign: validVerticalAlign,
        align: validAlign,
        layout: validLayout,
        enabled: component?.options?.legend?.enabled !== undefined ? component?.options?.legend?.enabled : legend.enabled,
        symbolHeight: component?.options?.legend?.symbolHeight !== undefined ? component?.options?.legend?.symbolHeight : 15,
        symbolWidth: component?.options?.legend?.symbolWidth !== undefined ? component?.options?.legend?.symbolWidth : 30,
        itemStyle: {
          font: 'var(--font-size-xs), var(--font-family-basic)',
          color: 'var(--color-ink-base)',
        },
        itemHoverStyle: {
          color: 'var(--color-ink-light)',
        }
      }

      if (withSymbolSize) {
        if (component.options.legend.layout === 'vertical') {
          legend.symbolHeight = component.options.legend.symbolHeight;
        } else {
          legend.symbolWidth = component.options.legend.symbolWidth;
        }
      }
      
      return legend;
    },
  }
}
