FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/actions/aq-virtual-list/aq-virtual-list.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, Host, Listen, Prop, State, Watch, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { DOMManager } from 'utils/helpers/domManager';
import { VirtualScroll } from 'utils/helpers/virtualScroll';
import { PopoverWidths } from 'enum/PopoverWidths';
import { DEFAULT_WIDTH } from './constants/DefaultWidth';
import { IVirtualScrollConfig } from 'components';
import { UniqueIdGenerator } from 'utils/helpers/uidGenerator';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-virtual-list',
  styleUrls: ['./aq-virtual-list.scss', './aq-progress-bar.scss'],
})
export class AqVirtualList {
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @Prop() additionalConfig: IVirtualScrollConfig;
  @Prop() offset: number = 20;
  @Prop() popoverWidth: PopoverWidths | number = PopoverWidths.DEFAULT;
  @Prop() container: HTMLElement;
  @Prop() activator: HTMLElement;
  @Prop() isDynamic: boolean;

  @State() maxWidth: number = 50;

  rowMaxWidth: number = 50;
  virtualScroll: VirtualScroll = null;
  scrollListener: EventListener = null;
  result: Element = null;
  domManager: DOMManager = null;
  cid: string = '';

  @Watch('activator')
  onActivatorChange() {
    this.setMaxWidth();
  }

  @Listen('update')
  onUpdate() {
    if (!!this.virtualScroll) this.virtualScroll.render();
    else this.setInstance();
  }
  @Listen('updateContent')
  onUpdateContent() {
    this.virtualScroll.renderWindow();
  }

  async setInstance() {
    const el = this.el.querySelector('.aq-virtual-list');
    const scrolledElement = this.el.querySelector('.aq-scroll-bar');
    const content = el.querySelector('[slot="content"]');
    if (!!content) {
      const domManager = new DOMManager();
      const cloneElement = content;
      const rows = domManager.filterValidChilds(cloneElement.childNodes);
      this.calculateMaxWidth(rows);
      this.cid = new UniqueIdGenerator().generateId();
      if (!!rows && !!rows.length) {
        this.virtualScroll = new VirtualScroll({
          renderRows: rows,
          scrolledElement,
          container: this.container,
          itemCount: rows.length,
          viewportHeight: el.clientHeight,
          rowHeight: 28,
          nodePadding: 2,
          id: this.cid,
          scrollTop: scrolledElement.scrollTop,
        });
        this.virtualScroll.renderWindow();
      }
    }
  }
  calculateMaxWidth(rows: any[]) {
    if (!!rows === false || rows?.length <= 0) return;

    rows.forEach((row: HTMLElement) => {
      const width = row.getBoundingClientRect().width;
      if (this.rowMaxWidth < width) this.rowMaxWidth = width;
    });
  }
  setMaxWidth() {
    const value = Number(this.popoverWidth);
    if (!isNaN(value)) {
      this.maxWidth = value;
      return;
    }

    const widthTriggers = {
      [PopoverWidths.FULL]: this.getMaxWidthByFull,
      [PopoverWidths.AUTO]: this.getMaxWidthByAuto,
      [PopoverWidths.DEFAULT]: this.getMaxWidthByDefault,
    };
    if (!!this.activator && this.domManager) {
      this.maxWidth = widthTriggers[this.popoverWidth]();
    }
  }
  setScrollListener() {
    if (this.scrollListener) return;
    const element = this.el.querySelector('.aq-virtual-list');
    this.result = this.el.querySelector('.result-list');
    if (!!this.result) {
      const content = this.domManager.filterValidChilds(this.result.childNodes);
      this.scrollListener = () => {
        if (!!content) {
          this.setMaxWidth();
        }
      };
      element.addEventListener('scroll', this.scrollListener);
    }
  }
  disconnectListeners() {
    const element = this.el.querySelector('.aq-virtual-list');
    element.removeEventListener('scroll', this.scrollListener);
  }
  getMaxWidthByDefault() {
    return DEFAULT_WIDTH;
  }
  getMaxWidthByFull = () => {
    return this.activator.offsetWidth;
  };
  getMaxWidthByAuto = () => {
    return this.rowMaxWidth + this.offset;
  };
  get getMaxWidth() {
    return this.maxWidth;
  }

  componentDidRender() {
    this.setScrollListener();
  }
  disconnectedCallback() {
    if (!!this.virtualScroll) {
      this.virtualScroll.removeControllers();
    }
    this.disconnectListeners();
  }
  connectedCallback() {
    this.domManager = new DOMManager();
    this.setMaxWidth();
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host>
        <div
          class="aq-virtual-list"
          style={this.popoverWidth === PopoverWidths.AUTO ? { minWidth: `${this.getMaxWidth}px`, maxWidth: `${DEFAULT_WIDTH}px` } : { width: `${this.getMaxWidth}px` }}
        >
          <slot name="header"></slot>
          <div class="aq-virtual-list__content aq-scroll-bar">
            <slot name="content"></slot>
          </div>
          <slot name="footer"></slot>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

export const DEFAULT_WIDTH = 360;



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/actions/aq-virtual-list/interfaces/IVirtualList.ts
================================================
import { PopoverWidths } from '../../../../enum/PopoverWidths';
import { VirtualScroll } from 'utils/helpers/virtualScroll';
import { DOMManager } from 'utils/helpers/domManager';
import { IVirtualScrollConfig } from 'interfaces/IVirtualScrollConfig';

export interface IVirtualList {
  el: HTMLElement;

  // Props
  additionalConfig: IVirtualScrollConfig;
  container?: HTMLElement;
  offset?: number;
  popoverWidth?: PopoverWidths | number;
  isDynamic?: boolean;
  selection?: () => void;

  // Static
  virtualScroll: VirtualScroll;
  slot: ChildNode;
  scrollListener: EventListener;
  result: Element;
  domManager: DOMManager;
  maxWidth: number;

  // Methods
  setInstance: () => void;
  setMaxWidth: () => void;
  setScrollListener: () => void;
  disconnectListeners: () => void;
  getMaxWidthByDefault: () => number;
  getMaxWidthByFull: () => number;
  getMaxWidthByAuto: () => number;

  // Getters
  get getMaxWidth(): number;
}

@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/color' as colors;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/spacing' as spacing;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/font' as fonts;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/box-shadow' as box-shadow;

aq-audio-player {
  width: 100%;
}

.aq-audio-player {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: spacing.$spacing-size-short;
  min-width: 12.5rem;

  .aq-button {
    padding: 0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    height: spacing.$spacing-size-large;
    width: spacing.$spacing-size-large;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  &__time-legend {
    cursor: default;
    font-size: fonts.$font-size-xs;
    color: colors.$color-paper-darker;
    
    &--disabled {
      color: colors.$color-paper-dark;
    }
  }

  &__thumb {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);

    width: spacing.$spacing-size-short;
    height: spacing.$spacing-size-short;
    padding: 0;

    border-radius: 50%;
    border: none;

    background: colors.$color-primary-base;
    box-shadow: box-shadow.$shadow-basic;
    
    pointer-events: none;
    opacity: 0;
    transition:
      opacity 0.35s ease,
      transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1),
      left 0.1s linear;

    &:focus-visible,
    &:focus,
    &:active {
      box-shadow: box-shadow.$shadow-active;
      outline: none;
    }
  }

  &__progress-fill {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 0;
    height: spacing.$spacing-size-small;
    background: colors.$color-primary-base;
    border-radius: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    transition: width 0.1s linear;
    
    &--disabled {
      background: colors.$color-primary-light;
    }
  }

  &__progress-bar {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: spacing.$spacing-size-moderate;
    cursor: pointer;

    &--disabled {
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    &::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: spacing.$spacing-size-small;
      background: colors.$color-paper-light;

    }

    .aq-audio-player__thumb--visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transition: opacity 0.35s ease, transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), left 0.1s linear;
    }
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/actions/aq-voice-player/aq-audio-player/aq-audio-player.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Event, EventEmitter, h, Method, Prop, State, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { Howl } from 'howler';
import { IVoicePlayer } from '../interfaces/IVoicePlayer';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-audio-player',
  styleUrl: 'aq-audio-player.scss',
})
export class AqAudioPlayer implements IVoicePlayer {
  private progressInterval: any;
  private progressBarEl: HTMLDivElement;
  
  @Prop() audioSource: string | 'source' = '';
  @Prop() format: string[] = ['mp3', 'wav', 'ogg'];
  @Prop() resetOnEnd: boolean = false;
  @Prop() showCurrentTime: boolean = true;
  @Prop() isAutoPlay: boolean = false;
  @Prop() isDisabled: boolean = false;
    
  @State() sound: Howl;
  @State() isPlaying: boolean = false;
  
  @State() progress: number = 0;
  @State() currentTime: number = 0;

  @State() duration: number = 0;
  @State() isDragging: boolean = false;
  @State() newProgress: any;

  @Event() audioPlay!: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  @Event() audioPause!: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  @Event() audioEnded!: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  
  @Event() audioError!: EventEmitter<{ error: number }>;
  @Event() loadedAudio!: EventEmitter<{ duration: number }>;
  @Event() positionChange!: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;

  private thumbEl?: HTMLButtonElement;

  @Watch('audioSource')
  updateAudioSource() {
    this.loadSource();
  }

  @Method()
  async audioPlayPause() {
    this.playPause();
  }
  @Method()
  async getCurrentTime() {
    return this.currentTime;
  }
  @Method()
  async getDuration() {
    return this.duration;
  }

  private loadSource() {
    this.sound = new Howl({
      src: [this.audioSource],
      format: this.format,
      html5: false,
      autoplay: this.isAutoPlay
    });

    this.sound.on('load', () => {
      this.duration = this.sound.duration();
      this.loadedAudio.emit({ duration: this.duration })
      if(this.isAutoPlay) this.playPause();
    });

    this.sound.on('end', () => {
      this.isPlaying = false;
      clearInterval(this.progressInterval)

      if (this.resetOnEnd) {
      this.currentTime = 0;
      this.progress = 0;
      } else {
        this.currentTime = this.duration;
        this.progress = 100;
      }

      this.audioEnded.emit({ currentTime: this.currentTime })
    });

    this.sound.on('loaderror', (_, error) => {
      console.error('Error while loading the audio. Error: ', error);
      this.audioError.emit({ error })
    });
  }

  private formatTime(seconds: number): string {
    const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60).toString().padStart(2, '0');
    const secs = Math.floor(seconds % 60).toString().padStart(2, '0');
    return `${mins}:${secs}`;
  }

  private playPause = () => {
    if(this.isDisabled || this.sound.state() !== 'loaded') return;

    if (this.isPlaying) {
      this.sound.pause();
      this.audioPause.emit({ currentTime: this.currentTime });
      clearInterval(this.progressInterval);
    } else {
      this.sound.play();
      this.audioPlay.emit({ currentTime: this.currentTime });
      this.progressInterval = setInterval(() => this.updateProgress(), 100);
    }
    this.isPlaying = !this.isPlaying;
  };

  private updateProgress = () => {
    if (this.sound.playing() && !this.isDragging) {
      this.currentTime = this.sound.seek() as number;
      this.progress = (this.currentTime / this.duration) * 100;
    }
  };

  private seek = (newProgress: number) => {
    const newTime = newProgress * this.sound.duration();
    this.sound.seek(newTime);

    this.currentTime = newTime;
    this.progress = newProgress * 100;
    this.positionChange.emit({ currentTime: this.currentTime })
  };

  private onBarClick = (event: MouseEvent) => {
    const rect = this.progressBarEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    const clickX = event.clientX - rect.left;
    const newProgress = Math.min(Math.max(clickX / rect.width, 0), 1);
    this.seek(newProgress);
  };

  private onMouseDown = (event: MouseEvent) => {
    this.isDragging = true;
    this.updateThumbPosition(event);
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', this.onMouseMove);
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', this.onMouseUp);
  };

  private onMouseMove = (event: MouseEvent) => {
    if (this.isDragging) {
      this.updateThumbPosition(event);
    }
  };

  private onMouseUp = (event: MouseEvent) => {
    if (this.isDragging) {
      this.isDragging = false;
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        this.thumbEl?.focus();
      });

      const rect = this.progressBarEl.getBoundingClientRect();
      const clickX = event.clientX - rect.left;
      const newProgress = Math.min(Math.max(clickX / rect.width, 0), 1);

      this.seek(newProgress);
    }

    window.removeEventListener('mousemove', this.onMouseMove);
    window.removeEventListener('mouseup', this.onMouseUp);
  };

  private updateThumbPosition(event: MouseEvent) {
    const rect = this.progressBarEl.getBoundingClientRect();
    const clickX = event.clientX - rect.left;
    const newProgress = Math.min(Math.max(clickX / rect.width, 0), 1);

    this.currentTime = newProgress * this.sound.duration();
    this.progress = newProgress * 100;
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.loadSource();
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    clearInterval(this.progressInterval);
    this.sound.unload();
  }

  render() {
    const currentTime = this.formatTime(this.currentTime);
    const duration = this.formatTime(this.duration);
    const visualProgress = this.progress;

    const progressBarClass = {
      'aq-audio-player__progress-bar': true,
      'aq-audio-player__progress-bar--disabled': this.isDisabled,
    }

    const progressFillClass = {
      'aq-audio-player__progress-fill': true,
      'aq-audio-player__progress-fill--disabled': this.isDisabled,
    }

    const timeLegendClass = {
      'aq-audio-player__time-legend': true,
      'aq-audio-player__time-legend--disabled': this.isDisabled,
    }

    const thumbClass = {
      'aq-audio-player__thumb': true,
      'aq-audio-player__thumb--visible': this.isDragging,
    }

    return (
      <div class="aq-audio-player">
        <aq-button onClick={this.playPause} isDisabled={this.isDisabled}>
          <em class={this.isPlaying ? 'aq-icon-pause' : 'aq-icon-play-fill'}></em>
        </aq-button>
        {
          this.showCurrentTime &&
          <span class={timeLegendClass}>{currentTime}</span>
        }
        <div
          class={progressBarClass}
          ref={el => (this.progressBarEl = el as HTMLDivElement)}
          onClick={this.onBarClick}
          onMouseDown={this.onMouseDown}
        >
          <div
            class={progressFillClass}
            style={{ width: `${visualProgress}%` }}
          ></div>
          {
            !this.isDisabled &&
            <button
              class={thumbClass}
              style={{ left: `${visualProgress}%` }}
              tabindex="0"
              aria-label="Seek handle"
              ref={el => this.thumbEl = el}
            ></button>
          }
        </div>
        <span class={timeLegendClass}>{duration}</span>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/actions/aq-voice-player/aq-voice-player-core/aq-voice-player.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, Event, EventEmitter, Method, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { Label } from 'utils/helpers/label';
import { IVoicePlayer } from '../interfaces/IVoicePlayer';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-voice-player',
  styleUrl: 'aq-voice-player.scss',
})
export class AqVoicePlayer implements IVoicePlayer {
  // Audio player props
  @Prop() audioSource: IVoicePlayer['audioSource'] = '';
  @Prop() format: IVoicePlayer['format'] = ['mp3', 'wav', 'ogg'];
  @Prop() resetOnEnd = false;
  @Prop() showCurrentTime = true;
  @Prop() isAutoPlay = false;

  // Label direct props
  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() name = '';
  @Prop() isRequired = false;
  @Prop() info = '';
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';
  
  @Prop() isError = false;
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() helperText = '';
  
  @Prop() width = '100%';

  @Event() audioPlay!: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  @Event() audioPause!: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  @Event() audioEnded!: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  
  @Event() audioError!: EventEmitter<{ error: number }>;
  @Event() loadedAudio!: EventEmitter<{ duration: number }>;
  @Event() positionChange!: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;

  private onAudioPlay(ev: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) {
    ev.stopPropagation();
    this.audioPlay.emit({currentTime: ev.detail.currentTime});
  }
  private onAudioPause(ev: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) {
    ev.stopPropagation();
    this.audioPause.emit(ev.detail);
  }
  private onAudioEnded(ev: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) {
    ev.stopPropagation();
    this.audioEnded.emit({currentTime: ev.detail.currentTime});
  }
  private onAudioError(ev: CustomEvent<{ error }>) {
    ev.stopPropagation();
    this.audioError.emit({error: ev.detail.error});
  }
  private onLoadedMetadata(ev: CustomEvent<{ duration: number }>) {
    ev.stopPropagation();
    this.loadedAudio.emit({duration: ev.detail.duration});
  }
  private onPositionChange(ev: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) {
    ev.stopPropagation();
    this.positionChange.emit({currentTime: ev.detail.currentTime});
  }

  // Component API
  @Method()
  async audioPlayPause() {
    await this.coreEl.audioPlayPause();
  }
  @Method()
  async getCurrentTime() {
    const currentTime = await this.coreEl.getCurrentTime();
    return currentTime;
  }
  @Method()
  async getDuration() {
    const duration = await this.coreEl.getDuration();
    return duration;
  }

  @Element() host!: HTMLElement;
  private coreEl!: HTMLAqAudioPlayerElement;
  
  private labelHelper = Label(this);

  render() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-voice-player">
        {this.labelHelper.isLabelVisible && (
          <aq-label for={this.name} {...this.labelHelper.bindsLabel}>
            <span slot="text">
              {this.label}
            </span>
          </aq-label>
        )}
        <div class="aq-voice-player__player-container" style={{ width: this.width }}>
          <aq-audio-player
            ref={el => (this.coreEl = el as HTMLAqAudioPlayerElement)}
            audioSource={this.audioSource}
            format={this.format}
            resetOnEnd={this.resetOnEnd}
            showCurrentTime={this.showCurrentTime}
            isAutoPlay={this.isAutoPlay}
            isDisabled={this.isDisabled}
            onAudioPlay={(e) => this.onAudioPlay(e)}
            onAudioPause={(e) => this.onAudioPause(e)}
            onAudioEnded={(e) => this.onAudioEnded(e)}
            onAudioError={(e) => this.onAudioError(e)}
            onLoadedAudio={(e) => this.onLoadedMetadata(e)}
            onPositionChange={(e) => this.onPositionChange(e)}
          >
          </aq-audio-player>
          {
            this.isError &&
              <span class="aq-icon-alert-circle-fill aq-voice-player__icon-error"></span>
          }
        </div>
        {
          this.helperText &&
          <aq-helper-text isError={this.isError}><span slot="text">{this.helperText}</span></aq-helper-text>
        }
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/actions/aq-voice-player/interfaces/IVoicePlayer.ts
================================================
import { EventEmitter } from "@stencil/core";

export interface IVoicePlayer {
  audioSource: string | 'source';
  format: ['mp3', 'wav', 'ogg'] | string[];

  audioPlay: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  audioPause: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  audioEnded: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;
  audioError: EventEmitter<{ error: number }>;
  loadedAudio: EventEmitter<{ duration: number }>;
  positionChange: EventEmitter<{ currentTime: number }>;

  // Component API
  audioPlayPause(): Promise<void>;
  getCurrentTime(): Promise<number>;
  getDuration(): Promise<number>;
}

import { Component, Host, Prop, h, Element } from '@stencil/core';
import { ICardContent } from './interfaces/ICardContent';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-card-content',
  styleUrl: 'aq-card-content.scss',
})
export class AqCardContent implements ICardContent {
  @Prop() woPadding: boolean = false;
  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  private getStyleCardContend() {
    return {
      'aq-card-content': true,
      'aq-scroll-bar': true,
      'aq-card-content--wo-padding': this.woPadding
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClassCardContend = this.getStyleCardContend();
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class={cssClassCardContend}>
          <slot></slot>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-card/aq-card-header/aq-card-header.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Host, Prop, State, Event, EventEmitter, h, Element } from '@stencil/core';
import { ICardHeader } from './interfaces/ICardHeader';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-card-header',
  styleUrl: 'aq-card-header.scss',
})
export class AqCardHeader implements ICardHeader {
  @Prop() hasReturnIcon = false;
  @Prop() isReorder = false;

  @State() parentHasContent = true;

  @Event() reorder: EventEmitter<void>;
  @Event() return: EventEmitter<void>;
  @Event() clickHeader: EventEmitter<void>;

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  private onClickReorder = (event: globalThis.Event) => {
    event.stopPropagation();
    this.reorder.emit();
  };

  private onClickReturn = (event: globalThis.Event) => {
    event.stopPropagation();
    this.return.emit();
  };

  private onClickContent = (event: globalThis.Event) => {
    event.stopPropagation();
    this.clickHeader.emit();
  };

  private checkParentContent(): void {
    const parentSlot = this.el.parentElement?.querySelector('aq-card-content');
    this.parentHasContent = !!parentSlot;
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.checkParentContent();
  }

  get hasIcon() {
    return this.hasReturnIcon || this.isReorder;
  }
  private getStyleClassCardHeader() {
    return {
      'aq-card-header': true,
      'aq-card-header--borderless': !this.parentHasContent,
    };
  }

  private getStyleClassCardHeaderLeft() {
    return {
      'aq-card-header__left': true,
      'aq-card-header__left--spaced': this.hasIcon,
    };
  }
  render() {
    const cssClassCardHeader = this.getStyleClassCardHeader();
    const cssClassCardHeaderLeft = this.getStyleClassCardHeaderLeft();
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class={cssClassCardHeader}>
          {this.hasReturnIcon && !this.isReorder && (
            <div class="aq-card-header__return-icon" onClick={(e) => this.onClickReturn(e)}>
              <em class="aq-icon-chevron-left"></em>
            </div>
          )}
          {this.isReorder && !this.hasReturnIcon && (
            <div aria-hidden="true" class="aq-card-header__reorder" onClick={(e) => this.onClickReorder(e)}>
              <em class="aq-icon-six-dots"></em>
            </div>
          )}
          <div class={cssClassCardHeaderLeft} onClick={(e) => this.onClickContent(e)}>
            <div class="aq-card-header__title">
              <slot name="title"></slot>
            </div>

            <div class="aq-card-header__subtitle">
              <slot name="subtitle" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="aq-card-header__right">
            <slot name="options"></slot>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

  hasReturnIcon: boolean;
  isReorder: boolean;
  el: HTMLElement;
  parentHasContent: boolean;
  get hasIcon(): boolean;
}

import { Component, Host, Prop, State, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { ICard } from './interfaces/ICard';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-card',
  styleUrl: 'aq-card.scss',
})
export class AqCard implements ICard {
  @Prop() img: string = '';
  @Prop() lazyImg: string = 'https://resources.masivapp.com/img/general/default_image.svg';

  @State() localImage: string = '';
  @State() isLoaded: boolean = false;

  private handleImageLoad = () => {
    this.isLoaded = true;
  };

  render() {
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-card" tabindex="0">
          {!!this.img && !this.isLoaded && <img src={this.lazyImg} alt="image-card" />}
          {!!this.img && <img src={this.img} onLoad={this.handleImageLoad} alt="image-card" style={{ display: this.isLoaded ? 'block' : 'none' }} />}
          <slot></slot>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-collapse/aq-collapse-content/aq-collapse-content.tsx
================================================
import { Component, State, h, Element, Watch, Method } from '@stencil/core';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-collapse-content',
  styleUrl: 'aq-collapse-content.scss',
})
export class AqCollapseContent {
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @State() isActive: boolean = false;
  @State() isBooted: boolean = false;
  @State() visible: boolean = false;
  
  private contentElement!: HTMLElement;

  get getStyles() {
    return {
      'aq-collapse-content': true,
      'is-visible': this.visible,
    };
  }

  @Method()
  async updateActive(active: boolean): Promise<void> {
    this.isActive = active;
  }

  @Watch('isActive')
  onIsActiveChange(newVal: boolean, oldVal: boolean) {
    if (newVal) {
      this.isBooted = true;
    }

    if (this.contentElement && this.visible) {
      this.contentElement.style.height = `${this.contentElement.scrollHeight}px`;
    }

    if (oldVal === null) {
      this.visible = newVal;
    } else {
      this.visible = newVal;
    }
  }

  private beforeEnter(el: HTMLElement) {
    el.style.height = '0';
  }
  private enter(el: HTMLElement) {
    el.style.height = `${el.scrollHeight}px`;
    setTimeout(() => {
      el.style.height = 'auto';
    }, 200);
  }
  private beforeLeave(el: HTMLElement) {
    el.style.height = `${el.scrollHeight}px`;
  }
  private leave(el: HTMLElement) {
    el.style.height = '0';
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.visible = this.isActive;
    const collapse = this.el.closest('aq-collapse') as any;
    if (collapse && collapse.registerContent)
      collapse.registerContent(this);
  }

  componentDidRender() {
    if (!this.contentElement) return;
    
    if (!this.visible) {
      this.beforeLeave(this.contentElement);
      this.leave(this.contentElement);
      return;
    }

    this.beforeEnter(this.contentElement);
    this.enter(this.contentElement);
  }

  render() {
    const styles = this.getStyles;
    return (
      <div class={styles} ref={el => (this.contentElement = el as HTMLElement)}>
        <div class="aq-collapse-content__inner">
          <slot></slot>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-collapse/aq-collapse-header/aq-collapse-header.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, State, h, Element, Method, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-collapse-header',
  styleUrl: 'aq-collapse-header.scss',
})
export class AqCollapseHeader {
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @Prop() disableToggle: boolean = false;

  @State() visible: boolean = false;
  @State() isActive: boolean = false;
  @State() showBorder: boolean = false;

  @Watch('isActive')
  onIsActiveChange() {
    this.getShowDivider();
  }

  private async getShowDivider() {
    const collapse = this.el.closest('aq-collapse') as any;
    const isGroup = await collapse?.getGroupDivider();
    const isIndividual = await collapse?.getIndividualDivider();

    this.showBorder = (this.isActive && isGroup && !isIndividual) || (this.isActive && !isGroup && isIndividual);
  }
  get getHeaderStyles(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-collapse-header': true,
      'aq-collapse-header--active': this.showBorder,
    };
  }
  get getHeaderIconStyle(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-collapse-header__icon': true,
      'aq-collapse-header__icon--active': this.isActive,
    };
  }

  @Method()
  async toggle(permission: boolean, e?: Event): Promise<void> {
    if (!permission)
      this.onClick(e);

    if (!this.collapseContext) return;
    
    if (this.disableToggle && this.isActive) return;
    
    if (permission) {
      this.collapseContext.toggle();
      return;
    }

    this.collapseContext.toggle();
  }
  @Method()
  async updateActive(active: boolean): Promise<void> {
    this.isActive = active;
  }

  private onClick(event: Event) {
    emitEvent('click', this.el, { event }, event);
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    const getContext = async () => {
      this.collapseContext = this.el.closest('aq-collapse');
      if (this.collapseContext) {
        this.collapseContext.registerHeader(this);
      }
    };
    getContext();
    this.onIsActiveChange();
  }

  private collapseContext: any;

  private selfClick(event: Event, permission: boolean) {
    if (event.target === event.currentTarget)
      this.toggle(permission, event);
  }
  private clickStop(event: Event, permission: boolean) {
    event.stopPropagation();
    this.toggle(permission, event);
  }

  render() {
    const headerStyles = this.getHeaderStyles;
    const headerIconStyle = this.getHeaderIconStyle;

    return (
      <div class={headerStyles} onClick={evt => this.selfClick(evt, false)}>
        <div class={headerIconStyle} onClick={evt => this.clickStop(evt, true)}>
          <em class="aq-icon-chevron-down"></em>
        </div>
        <div class="aq-collapse-header__left" onClick={(e) => this.toggle(false, e)}>
          <div class="aq-collapse-header__title">
            <slot name="title">
              <slot>slot default</slot>
            </slot>
          </div>
          <div class="aq-collapse-header__subtitle">
            <slot name="subtitle" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="aq-collapse-header__right">
          <slot name="options"></slot>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-collapse/aq-collapse-host/aq-collapse.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, State, h, Element, Method, Watch, EventEmitter, Event } from '@stencil/core';
import { AqCollapseGroup } from 'components/data/aq-collapse-group/aq-collapse-group';
import { Events } from 'enum/Events';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-collapse',
  styleUrl: 'aq-collapse.scss',
})
export class AqCollapse {
  @Element() collapse;

  @Event() open: EventEmitter;
  @Event() close: EventEmitter;

  @Prop() idCollapse: string = '';
  @Prop({ reflect: true }) value: boolean = false;
  @Prop({ reflect: true }) showBorder: boolean = true;
  @Prop({ reflect: true }) showDivider: boolean = true;

  @State() visible: boolean = false;
  @State() headerVisible: boolean = false;
  @State() header: any = null;
  @State() content: any = null;
  @State() showDividerGroup: boolean = true;
  @State() collapseGroup: AqCollapseGroup;
  @State() individualDivider: boolean = true;
  @State() localShowBorder: boolean = true;

  @Watch('value')
  onValueChange(newVal: boolean) {
    this.onValueChanged(newVal);
  }
  @Watch('header')
  onHeaderChange(newVal) {
    this.headerVisible = newVal;
  }
  @Watch('visible')
  onVisibleChange() {
    this.setActive();
  }
  @Watch('showBorder')
  onShowBorderChange(newVal: boolean) {
    this.localShowBorder = newVal;
  }

  get getBorder(): boolean {
    return ((!!this.header || (!!this.content && this.visible)) && this.collapseGroup?.showBorder) || (this.showBorder && !this.collapseGroup);
  }
  get getCollapseStyles(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-collapse': true,
      'aq-collapse--border': this.getBorder,
      'aq-collapse--active': this.visible,
    };
  }

  @Method()
  async getIndividualDivider(): Promise<boolean> {
    return this.individualDivider;
  }
  @Method()
  async getGroupDivider(): Promise<boolean> {
    return this.showDividerGroup;
  }

  @Method()
  async toggle(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.visible) {
      this.hide();
    } else {
      this.show();
    }
  }
  @Method()
  async show(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.visible) {
      this.showOnParent();
      this.visible = true;
      this.open.emit();
    }
  }
  @Method()
  async hide(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.visible) {
      this.visible = false;
      this.close.emit();
    }
  }
  @Method()
  async registerHeader(vm: any): Promise<void> {
    this.header = vm;
  }
  @Method()
  async registerContent(vm: any): Promise<void> {
    this.content = vm;
  }
  @Method()
  async getCollapseContext() {
    return this;
  }

  private showOnParent() {
    if (this.collapseGroup) {
      (this.collapseGroup as any).show(this);
    }
  }
  private validateHeader() {
    this.headerVisible = !!this.header;
  }
  private eventOpenCollapse = (data: any) => {
    if (data.value === this.idCollapse) {
      this.show();
    }
  };
  private eventCloseCollapse = (data: any) => {
    if (data.value === this.idCollapse || data.noId) {
      this.hide();
    }
  };
  private eventToggleCollapse = (data: any) => {
    if (data.value === this.idCollapse) {
      this.toggle();
    }
  };
  private onValueChanged(newVal: boolean) {
    if (newVal) {
      this.show();
    } else {
      this.hide();
    }
  }
  private setActive() {
    if (this.content) {
      this.content.updateActive(this.visible);
    }
    if (this.header) {
      this.header.updateActive(this.visible);
    }
  }

  private initWatchers() {
    this.onVisibleChange();
    this.onValueChange(this.value);
    this.onHeaderChange(this.header);
  }

  private initElements() {
    this.validateHeader();
    this.eventsOn();
    this.setActive();
  }

  private initCollapseGroupConfig() {
    this.collapseGroup = this.collapse.closest('aq-collapse-group');
    if (this.collapseGroup) {
      this.collapseGroup.registerCollapse(this);
      this.localShowBorder = this.collapseGroup?.showBorder;
    }
  }

  private async configDividers() {
    this.showDividerGroup = this.collapseGroup?.showDividerGroup;
    this.individualDivider = typeof this.showDividerGroup === 'undefined' && this.showDivider;
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.initCollapseGroupConfig();
    this.initWatchers();
    this.initElements();
    this.configDividers();
    this.onValueChanged(this.value);
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    this.eventsOff();
    if (this.collapseGroup) {
      this.collapseGroup.unregisterCollapse(this);
    }
  }

  private eventsOn() {
    window.addEventListener(Events.EVENT_NAME_OPEN_GLOBAL_COLLAPSE, this.eventOpenCollapse);
    window.addEventListener(Events.EVENT_NAME_HIDE_GLOBAL_COLLAPSE, this.eventCloseCollapse);
    window.addEventListener(Events.EVENT_NAME_TOGGLE_GLOBAL_COLLAPSE, this.eventToggleCollapse);
  }
  private eventsOff() {
    window.removeEventListener(Events.EVENT_NAME_OPEN_GLOBAL_COLLAPSE, this.eventOpenCollapse);
    window.removeEventListener(Events.EVENT_NAME_HIDE_GLOBAL_COLLAPSE, this.eventCloseCollapse);
    window.removeEventListener(Events.EVENT_NAME_TOGGLE_GLOBAL_COLLAPSE, this.eventToggleCollapse);
  }

  render() {
    const collapseStyles = this.getCollapseStyles;
    return (
      <div class={collapseStyles} id={this.idCollapse}>
        <slot />
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-collapse-group/readme.md
================================================
# aq-collapse-group

## Properties

| ------------------ | -------------------- | ----------- | --------- | ------- |
| `isAccordion`      | `is-accordion`       |             | `boolean` | `false` |
| `showBorder`       | `show-border`        |             | `boolean` | `true`  |
| `showDividerGroup` | `show-divider-group` |             | `boolean` | `true`  |


## Methods

### `hideAll() => Promise<void>`



#### Returns

Type: `Promise<void>`



### `registerCollapse(vm: any) => Promise<void>`



#### Parameters

| Name | Type  | Description |
| ---- | ----- | ----------- |
| `vm` | `any` |             |

#### Returns

Type: `Promise<void>`



### `show(vm: HTMLElement) => Promise<void>`



#### Parameters

| Name | Type          | Description |
| ---- | ------------- | ----------- |
| `vm` | `HTMLElement` |             |

#### Returns

Type: `Promise<void>`



### `unregisterCollapse(vm: any) => Promise<void>`



#### Parameters

| Name | Type  | Description |
| ---- | ----- | ----------- |
| `vm` | `any` |             |

#### Returns

Type: `Promise<void>`

.aq-collapse-group {

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-collapse-group/aq-collapse-group.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, State, h, Method } from '@stencil/core';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-collapse-group',
  styleUrl: 'aq-collapse-group.scss',
})
export class AqCollapseGroup {
  @Prop() isAccordion: boolean = false;
  @Prop() showBorder: boolean = true;
  @Prop() showDividerGroup: boolean = true;

  // State
  @State() collapses: HTMLElement[] = [];

  @Method()
  async show(vm: HTMLElement) {
    if (this.isAccordion) {
      this.collapses.forEach(collapse => {
        if (collapse !== vm) {
          (collapse as any).hide?.();
        }
      });
    }
  }
  @Method()
  async hideAll() {
    this.collapses.forEach(collapse => {
      (collapse as any).hide?.();
    });
  }
  @Method()
  async registerCollapse(vm: any) {
    if (!this.collapses.includes(vm)) {
      this.collapses = [...this.collapses, vm];
    }
  }
  @Method()
  async unregisterCollapse(vm: any) {
    this.collapses = this.collapses.filter(collapse => collapse !== vm);
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-collapse-group">
        <slot />
      </div>
    );
  }
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-pagination/aq-pagination.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, State, h, Watch, Event, EventEmitter, Fragment, Element } from '@stencil/core';
import { UniqueIdGenerator } from 'utils/helpers/uidGenerator';
import { IDropdownItem } from '../../../interfaces/common/IDropdownItem';
import { IPagination } from './interfaces/IPagination';
import { Alignment } from 'enum';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-pagination',
  styleUrl: 'aq-pagination.scss',
})
export class AqPagination implements IPagination {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) page = 1;
  @Prop() totalPages: number;
  @Prop() records = 0;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) perPage = 10;
  @Prop() chunk = 3;
  @Prop() perPageValues: IPagination['perPageValues'] = [10, 25, 50, 100];
  @Prop() isSmall = false;
  @Prop() align: IPagination['align'] = Alignment.RIGHT;
  @Prop() showItemsPerPage = true;
  @Prop() cid = '';

  @State() startPage = 1;
  @State() currentPerPage = 1;
  @State() endPage = 1;
  @State() localTotalPages = 1;
  @State() uid: UniqueIdGenerator;

  @Event() setPage: EventEmitter<number>;
  @Event() setPerPageValue: EventEmitter<number>;

  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  @Watch('perPage')
  onPerPageChange() {
    this.updateTotalPages();
    this.setPaginationBounds();
  }
  @Watch('totalPages')
  onTotalPagesChange() {
    this.updateTotalPages();
    this.setPaginationBounds();
  }
  @Watch('page')
  onPageChange() {
    this.updateTotalPages();
    this.setPaginationBounds();
  }

  @Watch('records')
  onRecordsChange() {
    this.updateTotalPages();
  }
  get getFinalTotalPages() {
    return Math.ceil(this.records / this.perPage) || 1;
  }
  get getFinalPage() {
    return Math.min(this.page, this.getFinalTotalPages);
  }
  get prevPageActive() {
    return this.getFinalPage > 1;
  }
  get nextPageActive() {
    return this.getFinalPage < this.getFinalTotalPages;
  }
  get getStartEllipse() {
    return this.startPage > 1;
  }
  get getEndEllipse() {
    return this.endPage < this.getFinalTotalPages;
  }

  setPaginationBounds() {
    const totalPages = this.getFinalTotalPages;
    const currentPage = this.getFinalPage;
    const chunk = this.chunk;
    const halfChunk = Math.floor(chunk / 2);

    if (totalPages <= chunk + 2) {
      this.startPage = 1;
      this.endPage = totalPages;
    } else if (currentPage <= chunk) {
      this.startPage = 1;
      this.endPage = chunk;
    } else if (currentPage >= totalPages - chunk + 1) {
      this.startPage = totalPages - chunk + 1;
      this.endPage = totalPages;
    } else {
      this.startPage = currentPage - halfChunk;
      this.endPage = currentPage + halfChunk;
    }
  }
  setFirstPage() {
    this.emitPage(1);
  }
  setNextPage() {
    if (this.nextPageActive) {
      this.emitPage(this.getFinalPage + 1);
    }
  }
  setPrevPage() {
    if (this.prevPageActive) {
      this.emitPage(this.getFinalPage - 1);
    }
  }
  updateTotalPages() {
    this.localTotalPages = Math.ceil(this.records / this.perPage) || 1;
  }
  emitPage(value: number) {
    this.page = value;
    this.setPage.emit(value);
  }

  get getPerPageValuesObject() {
    let items: IDropdownItem[] = [];
    this.perPageValues.map(value => items.push({ label: value.toString() }));
    return items;
  }

  emitPerPageValue(event: any) {
    if (event.detail) {
      this.perPage = event.detail.label;
      this.setPerPageValue.emit(event.detail.label);
    }
  }

  get numberOfElements() {
    const to = this.perPage * this.getFinalPage;
    const from = to - this.perPage + 1;
    const total = this.records;
    return {
      from: this.records > 0 ? from : 0,
      to: to < total ? to : total,
      total,
    };
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.uid = new UniqueIdGenerator();
    this.updateTotalPages();
    this.setPaginationBounds();
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-pagination" id={this.cid || this.uid.generateId()}>
        <div class="aq-pagination-inline">
          {/* Per Page Selector */}
          <div class="aq-pagination__per-page" style={{ display: this.isSmall ? 'none' : 'flex' }}>
            <div class="aq-pagination__limit-field">
              {this.showItemsPerPage && <label>Items per page</label>}
              <aq-dropdown placement="top" popover-width="full" close-on-click items={this.getPerPageValuesObject} onItemSelection={event => this.emitPerPageValue(event)}>
                <aq-button slot="activator" isOutline has-disclosure>
                  {this.perPage}
                </aq-button>
              </aq-dropdown>
              <aq-divider orientation="vertical"></aq-divider>
              <div>
                {this.numberOfElements.from} - {this.numberOfElements.to} of {this.numberOfElements.total}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class={`aq-pagination__paginator aq-pagination__paginator--small-${this.align}`}>
            <span class={`aq-pagination__item ${!this.prevPageActive ? 'aq-pagination__item--disabled' : ''}`} onClick={() => this.setFirstPage()}>
              <em class="aq-icon-chevron-double-left"></em>
            </span>
            <span class={`aq-pagination__item ${!this.prevPageActive ? 'aq-pagination__item--disabled' : ''}`} onClick={() => this.setPrevPage()}>
              <em class="aq-icon-chevron-left"></em>
            </span>

            {this.getStartEllipse && (
              <Fragment>
                <span class="aq-pagination__item" onClick={() => this.setFirstPage()}>
                  1
                </span>
                <span class="aq-pagination__item">...</span>
              </Fragment>
            )}

            {Array.from({ length: this.endPage - this.startPage + 1 }, (_, i) => this.startPage + i).map(page => (
              <span class={`aq-pagination__item ${this.getFinalPage === page ? 'aq-pagination__item--active' : ''}`} onClick={() => this.emitPage(page)}>
                {page}
              </span>
            ))}

            {this.getEndEllipse && (
              <Fragment>
                <span class="aq-pagination__item">...</span>
                <span class="aq-pagination__item" onClick={() => this.emitPage(this.getFinalTotalPages)}>
                  {this.getFinalTotalPages}
                </span>
              </Fragment>
            )}

            <span class={`aq-pagination__item ${!this.nextPageActive ? 'aq-pagination__item--disabled' : ''}`} onClick={() => this.setNextPage()}>
              <em class="aq-icon-chevron-right"></em>
            </span>
            <span class={`aq-pagination__item ${!this.nextPageActive ? 'aq-pagination__item--disabled' : ''}`} onClick={() => this.emitPage(this.getFinalTotalPages)}>
              <em class="aq-icon-chevron-double-right"></em>
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-pagination/interfaces/IPagination.ts
================================================
import { ComponentInterface } from '@stencil/core';
import { IPaginationModel } from './IPaginationModel';
import { AlignType } from 'types/Alignment';
import { UniqueIdGenerator } from 'utils/helpers/uidGenerator';
import { IDropdownItem } from '../../../../interfaces/common/IDropdownItem';

export interface IPagination extends ComponentInterface {
  // Props
  perPageValues: number[];
  align: AlignType;

  // State
  uid: UniqueIdGenerator;

  // Getters
  get getFinalPage(): number;
  get getFinalTotalPages(): number;
  get prevPageActive(): boolean;
  get nextPageActive(): boolean;
  get getStartEllipse(): boolean;
  get getEndEllipse(): boolean;
  get numberOfElements(): IPaginationModel;
  get getPerPageValuesObject(): IDropdownItem[];

  // Methods
  setPaginationBounds: () => void;
  setFirstPage: () => void;
  setNextPage: () => void;
  setPrevPage: () => void;
  updateTotalPages: () => void;
  emitPage: (value: number) => void;
  emitPerPageValue: (event: any) => void;
}

export interface IPaginationModel {
  from: number;
  to: number;
  total: number;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-setting-step/aq-setting-container/aq-setting-container.tsx
================================================
import { Component, EventEmitter, Event, Host, Prop, h, Watch, State } from '@stencil/core';
import { ISettingContainer } from './interfaces/ISettingContent';
import { IStepOptionItem, StepOptionState } from 'types/StepOption';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-setting-container',
  styleUrl: 'aq-setting-container.scss',
})
export class AqSettingContainer implements ISettingContainer {
  @Prop() option: IStepOptionItem = {
    id: '',
    buttonSecondary: '',
    buttonPrimary: '',
    contentState: StepOptionState.INITIAL,
    buttonTertiary: '',
  };

  @Event() clickPrimary: EventEmitter;
  @Event() clickSecondary: EventEmitter;
  @Event() clickTertiary: EventEmitter;
  @Event() clickEdit: EventEmitter;
  @State() showSlots: StepOptionState = StepOptionState.INITIAL;

  @Watch('option')
  handleOptionChange() {
    this.showSlots = this.option?.contentState as StepOptionState || StepOptionState.INITIAL;
  }

  private getActions() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-setting-footer">
        <div>
          {this.option?.buttonTertiary && (
            <aq-button is-plain class="aq-setting-footer-tertiary" onClick={() => this.clickTertiary.emit(this.option.id)}>
              {this.option.buttonTertiary}
            </aq-button>
          )}
        </div>
        <div class="aq-setting-footer__right">
          {this.option?.buttonSecondary && (
            <aq-button is-outline onClick={() => this.clickSecondary.emit(this.option.id)}>
              {this.option.buttonSecondary}
            </aq-button>
          )}
          {this.option?.buttonPrimary && (
            <aq-button is-outline variant="primary" onClick={() => this.clickPrimary.emit(this.option.id)}>
              {this.option.buttonPrimary}
            </aq-button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  get slotEdit() {
    return `edit-${this.option.id}`;
  }

  get slotSummary() {
    return `summary-${this.option.id}`;
  }

  get slotInitial() {
    return `initial-${this.option.id}`;
  }

  private getEditing() {
    return (
      this.showSlots === StepOptionState.EDITING && (
        <div class="aq-setting-edit-content">
          <slot name={this.slotEdit}> Slot edit</slot>
        </div>
      )
    );
  }

  private getSummary() {
    return (
      this.showSlots === StepOptionState.SUMMARY && (
        <div class="aq-setting-edit-content">
          <slot name={this.slotSummary}>Slot summary</slot>
        </div>
      )
    );
  }


  private getInitial() {
    return (
      this.showSlots === StepOptionState.INITIAL && (
        <div>
          <slot name={this.slotInitial}></slot>
        </div>
      )
    );
  }

  private handleClickEdit(e: CustomEvent) {
    e.stopPropagation();
    this.clickEdit.emit(this.option.id);
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.showSlots = this.option?.contentState as StepOptionState || StepOptionState.INITIAL;
  }

  render() {
    const editing = this.getEditing();
    const summary = this.getSummary();
    const initial = this.getInitial();
    const actions = this.getActions();
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-setting-container">
          <aq-setting-header onClickEdit={e => this.handleClickEdit(e)} option={this.option} />
          
            <div>
              {this.showSlots === StepOptionState.EDITING && editing}
              {this.showSlots === StepOptionState.SUMMARY && summary}
              {this.showSlots === StepOptionState.INITIAL && initial}
              { this.showSlots !== StepOptionState.INITIAL && actions }
            </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-setting-step/aq-setting-header/aq-setting-header.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Event, EventEmitter, Host, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { ISettingHeader, SettingHeaderOption } from './interfaces/ISettingHeader';
import { StepOptionState } from 'types/StepOption';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-setting-header',
  styleUrl: 'aq-setting-header.scss',
})
export class AqSettingContent implements ISettingHeader {
  @Prop() option: Partial<SettingHeaderOption>;
  @Event() clickEdit: EventEmitter;
  
  get initial() {
    const contentState = this.option?.contentState || StepOptionState.INITIAL;
    return contentState.toLowerCase() === StepOptionState.INITIAL;
  }
  private getStyleClassSettingHeader(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-setting-header--initial': this.initial,
      'aq-setting-header': true,
    };
  }
  private getState() {
    const optionState = this.option.state.toLowerCase() || 'default';
    return optionState;
  }
  private getIcon() {
    let icon = '';
    switch (this.getState()) {
      case 'default':
        icon = 'aq-icon-check-circle';
        break;
      case 'success':
        icon = 'aq-icon-check-circle-fill';
        break;
      case 'error':
        icon = 'aq-icon-alert-circle-fill';
        break;
      case 'warning':
        icon = 'aq-icon-info-major-triangle-up-fill';
        break;
      default:
        icon = 'aq-icon-check-circle';
    }

    const classIcon = {
      [icon]: true,
      [`aq-setting-header__state--${this.getState()}`]: true,
    };
    return <em class={classIcon}></em>;
  }

  private getTitle() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-setting-header__title">
        <aq-subheading tooltipWidth={this.option.tooltipWidth} info={this.option.info}>
          <span slot="text">
            {this.option.title}
          </span>
        </aq-subheading>
      </div>
    );
  }
  get hasSubTitle() {
    return this.option?.subtitle && this.option?.subtitle !== '';
  }
  private getSubtitle() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-setting-header__subtitle">
        {this.hasSubTitle && <aq-helper-text><span slot="text">{this.option.subtitle}</span></aq-helper-text>}
        {!this.hasSubTitle && (
          <aq-helper-text>
            <span slot="text">&nbsp;</span>
          </aq-helper-text>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }

  get showSlots() {
    const contentState = this.option?.contentState || StepOptionState.INITIAL;

    const hasContentState = !(contentState.toLowerCase() === 'editing' || contentState.toLowerCase() === 'done');    
    return hasContentState;
  }

  get showEditButton() {
    return this.option?.buttonEdit;
  }

  render() {
    const cssClassSettingHeader = this.getStyleClassSettingHeader();
    const icon = this.getIcon();
    const title = this.getTitle();
    const subtitle = this.getSubtitle();

    return (
      <Host>
        <div class={cssClassSettingHeader}>
          <div class="aq-setting-header__icon">{icon}</div>
          <div class="aq-setting-header__left">
            {title}
            {subtitle}
          </div>
          <div class="aq-setting-header__right">
            {
              this.showSlots && this.showEditButton &&
              <aq-button is-outline onClick={() => this.clickEdit.emit(this.option.id)}>
                { this.option.buttonEdit }
              </aq-button>
            }
          </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}



================================================

export type SettingHeaderOption = {
    id: string;
    title: string;
    subtitle: string;
    info: string;
    state: 'default' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'success';
    stepComplete: boolean;
    stepActive: boolean;
    tooltipWidth: string;
    buttonEdit: string;
    buttonPrimary: string;
    contentState: string;
    buttonTertiary: string;
    buttonSecondary: string;
}
export interface ISettingHeader {
  option: Partial<SettingHeaderOption>;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-setting-step/aq-setting-step-host/aq-setting-step.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Event, EventEmitter, Fragment, Host, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { IStep } from './interfaces/IStep';
import { StepOption } from 'types/StepOption';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-setting-step',
  styleUrl: 'aq-setting-step.scss',
})
export class AqStep implements IStep {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) options: IStep['options'] = [];

  @Event() clickPrimary: EventEmitter;
  @Event() clickSecondary: EventEmitter;
  @Event() clickTertiary: EventEmitter;
  @Event() clickEdit: EventEmitter;

  
  private slotEdit(option: StepOption) {
    return `edit-${option.id}`;
  }
  private slotSummary(option: StepOption) {
    return `summary-${option.id}`;
  }

  private slotInitial(option: StepOption) {
    return `initial-${option.id}`;
  }

  private handleClick(event: CustomEvent, eventType: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'edit') {
    event.stopPropagation();
    const events = {
      primary: this.clickPrimary,
      secondary: this.clickSecondary,
      tertiary: this.clickTertiary,
      edit: this.clickEdit,
    };

    events[eventType].emit(event.detail);
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-setting-step">
          <aq-step-group isVertical>
          {this.options &&
              this.options?.map((option, index) => (
                <Fragment>
                    <aq-step-title slot={`title-${index + 1}`} key={index} status={option.stepStatus}></aq-step-title>
                    <aq-step-content slot={`content-${index + 1}`}>
                    <aq-setting-container
                      option={option}
                      onClickPrimary={e => this.handleClick(e, 'primary')}
                      onClickSecondary={e => this.handleClick(e, 'secondary')}
                      onClickTertiary={e => this.handleClick(e, 'tertiary')}
                      onClickEdit={e => this.handleClick(e, 'edit')}
                    >
                        <slot name={this.slotEdit(option)}></slot>

                        <slot name={this.slotSummary(option)}></slot>
          
                        <slot name={this.slotInitial(option)}></slot>
                    </aq-setting-container>
                    </aq-step-content>
                </Fragment>
              ))}
          </aq-step-group>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

}
