FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-table/aq-table-core/aq-table-core.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, Event, EventEmitter, h, Host, Prop, State, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { IAqTable } from './interface/IAqTable';

import { Cell, createTable, getCoreRowModel, Header, RowData, Table } from '@tanstack/table-core';
import { AqColumn, AqColumnDef } from '../interfaces/IColumnConfig';
import { AqTableFeature } from '../helpers/createAqTable';
import { IPagination } from '../../aq-pagination/interfaces/IPagination';
import { TableMode } from './enums/TableMode';
import { IColumnFilter } from '../interfaces/IColumnFilter';
import { ITableConfig } from './interface/IAqConfig';
import { COLUMN_META_DATA, TABLE_CONFIG } from './constants/TableConfig';
import Sortable from 'sortablejs';
import { Sort } from '../constants/Sort';
import { IIndexes } from './interface/IIndexes';
import { Virtualizer } from '@tanstack/virtual-core';
import { BuildTemplateGrid } from './helpers/buildTemplateGrid';
import { Alignment } from '../../../../enum/Alignment';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-table',
  styleUrl: 'aq-table-core.scss',
})
export class AqTable implements IAqTable {
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @Prop() columns: AqColumnDef[] = [];
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) data: RowData[] = [];
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) config: ITableConfig = TABLE_CONFIG;
  @Prop() hasHeader = false;
  @Prop() hasPagination = true;
  @Prop() loading = false;
  @Prop() loadingCustomQueryFilter: (query: string) => void;
  @Prop() mode: TableMode = TableMode.CLIENT;

  @State() canShowHeader: boolean = true;
  @State() instance: Table<RowData>;
  @State() localLoading: boolean = false;
  @State() showHeader: boolean = true;
  @State() showPagination: boolean = true;
  @State() showContent: boolean = true;
  @State() tableHeight: number = 0;
  @State() pagination: IPagination;
  @State() localColumns: AqColumnDef[] = [];
  @State() virtualizer: Virtualizer<Element, Element>;
  @State() page: number = 1;
  @State() totalPages: number = 1;
  @State() records: number = 1;
  @State() perPage: number = 10;
  @State() firtsRender: boolean = true;
  @State() copyData: RowData[] = [];
  @State() modifiedColumn: AqColumnDef[] = [];
  @State() columnOrder: Array<any> = [];
  @State() selectable: boolean = false;
  @State() selectionsData: Array<any> = [];

  headerContainer: HTMLElement;
  contentContainer: HTMLElement;
  scrollContainer: HTMLElement;
  copyColumns: AqColumnDef[] = [];
  indexes: IIndexes = { startIndex: null, endIndex: null };
  headerCells: NodeListOf<Element>;
  filteredData: RowData[] = [];
  basicConfig: ITableConfig = TABLE_CONFIG;
  buildTemplateGrid = new BuildTemplateGrid();
  headerCheckbox: HTMLElement = null;

  // TODO: Esto debería ser una constante
  selectionColumn: AqColumnDef = {
    id: 'select',
    accessorKey: 'select',
    size: 50,
    minSize: 50,
    maxSize: 50,
    meta: {
      enablePinning: false,
      enableResizing: false,
      enableSorting: false,
      enableReorder: false,
      enableTooltip: false,
      hoverDisabled: true,
      label: '',
      aligment: {
        content: Alignment.LEFT,
      },
    },
    header: () => {
      return document.createElement('aq-checkbox');
    },
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      if (this.selectionsData.length === 0 && !this.controlAction) {
        row.toggleSelected(false);
      } else {
        row.toggleSelected(this.selectionsData.includes(row.original));
      }
      const checkbox = document.createElement('aq-checkbox');
      checkbox.isChecked = row.getIsSelected();
      checkbox.addEventListener('change', async (e: any) => {
        this.handleRowSelection(e.target, e.detail.checked);

        row.toggleSelected(e.detail.checked);
        const selectedRowModelView = this.instance.getSelectedRowModel();
        this.updateHeaderCheckbox();
        this.emitSelectionChange(row.original, selectedRowModelView.rows);

      });
      return checkbox;
    },
  };

  @Event() pinChange: EventEmitter;
  @Event() sortChange: EventEmitter;
  @Event() sizeChange: EventEmitter;
  @Event() selectionChangeTable: EventEmitter;

  @Watch('loading')
  onLoadingChange(newValue: boolean) {
    this.localLoading = newValue;
  }
  @Watch('data')
  onDataChange(newValue: RowData[]) {
    const newData = this.setFilteredData([...newValue]);
    this.resetTableData(newData);
    this.resetTableContent();
    if (!!this.copyData === false) this.copyData = newValue;
  }
  @Watch('columns')
  onColumnsChange(newVal: AqColumnDef[]) {
    this.resetTableHeader();
    this.copyColumns = newVal;
    this.applyGridTemplate();
  }
  // TODO: Esto debería independizarse del componente
  createSortable(headerGroup: Element) {
    new Sortable.create(headerGroup, {
      animation: 150,
      group: 'nested',
      fallbackOnBody: true,
      swapThreshold: 0.65,
      handle: '.aq-table-header__cell-reorder',
      ghostClass: 'aq-table__ghost',
      filter: `.aq-table-header__cell-item[data-col-id="${this.selectionColumn.id}"]`, // Exclude selection column
      onStart: () => this.onStartSort(),
      onChange: evt => this.onMoveColumns(evt),
      onEnd: () => this.onColumnReorder(),
    });
  }
  // TODO: Separar features por helpers
  createTable() {
    this.instance = createTable({
      columns: [...this.setColumnsMeta()],
      data: this.filteredData,
      _features: [AqTableFeature],
      defaultColumn: {
        minSize: 100,
        maxSize: undefined,
        enableResizing: true,
        enableColumnFilter: true,
        enableGlobalFilter: true,
      },
      getRowId: (_row, index) => {
        const globalIndex = (this.page - 1) * this.perPage + index;
        return String(globalIndex);
      },
      enableRowSelection: true,
      onRowSelectionChange: (updater: any) => {
        const newSelection = typeof updater === 'function' ? updater(this.instance.getState().rowSelection) : updater;
        this.instance.setOptions(prev => ({
          ...prev,
          state: {
            ...prev.state,
            rowSelection: newSelection,
          },
        }));
      },
      onColumnVisibilityChange: (updater: any) => {
        this.instance.setOptions(prev => {
          const prevMap = prev.state.columnVisibility ?? {};
          const nextMap =
            typeof updater === 'function'
              ? updater(prevMap)
              : { ...prevMap, ...updater };

          return {
            ...prev,
            state: {
              ...prev.state,
              columnVisibility: nextMap,
            },
          };
        });
        this.resetTable();
        this.applyGridTemplate();
      },
      getCoreRowModel: getCoreRowModel(),
      state: {
        ...this.getConfig.state,
        columnOrder: [this.selectionColumn.id, ...this.columns.map(column => column.id)],
        columnVisibility: {
          status: true,
        },
        rowSelection: {},
      },
      onStateChange: () => {
        this.getConfig.udpate();
      },
      onPinChange: (columnId, newVal) => {
        const columns = [];
        this.copyColumns.forEach((column: any) => {
          if (column.accessorKey === columnId) {
            columns.push({ ...column, meta: { ...column.meta, pinned: newVal } });
            this.modifiedColumn = [column];
          } else {
            columns.push(column);
          }
        });
        this.renderColumn(this.modifiedColumn, columns);
        this.pinChange.emit({ id: columnId, value: newVal });
      },
      onSortChange: async (columnId, newVal) => {
        this.controlAction = true;  
        const index = this.columns.findIndex((column: any) => columnId === column.accessorKey);

        if (index === -1) {
          console.warn(`Not found: column with ID ${columnId}`);
          return;
        }

        if (this.mode === TableMode.SERVER) {
          const direction = newVal === Sort.ASC ? Sort.ASC : newVal === Sort.DESC ? Sort.DESC : undefined;
          if (!direction) return;

          await this.fetchServerData({
            sort: { columnId, direction },
          });
          return;
        } else {
          if (newVal === Sort.UNSET) {
            this.data = [...this.copyData];
            return;
          }

          const sortedData = [...this.data].sort((a, b) => {
            const valueA = a[columnId];
            const valueB = b[columnId];

            if (valueA === valueB) return 0;

            if (newVal === Sort.ASC) {
              return valueA > valueB ? 1 : -1;
            } else if (newVal === Sort.DESC) {
              return valueA < valueB ? 1 : -1;
            }
          });

          this.data = [...sortedData];
          this.sortChange.emit({ id: columnId, value: newVal });
        }
      },
      onTooltipChange: () => {},
      onIconChange: () => {},
      onLabelChange: () => {},
      onSizeChange: (columnId, size) => {
        const index = this.copyColumns.findIndex((column: any) => columnId === column.accessorKey);
        const measured = this.getHeaderWidth(columnId);
        if (index === -1) return;

        const nextSize = measured ?? size;

        if (nextSize == null) return;

        const col = this.copyColumns[index];
        const min = typeof col.minSize === 'number' ? col.minSize : 100;
        const max = typeof col.maxSize === 'number' ? col.maxSize : 1200;

        const clamped = Math.min(Math.max(nextSize, min), max);

        this.updateColumnSize(index, clamped, columnId);
        this.applyGridTemplate();
        this.sizeChange.emit({ id: columnId, value: size });
      },
      onReorderChange: () => {},
      renderFallbackValue: this.getConfig.errorValue,
    });
  }
  handleRowSelection(checkBoxRow: HTMLElement, value: boolean) {
    const rowEl = checkBoxRow.closest('.aq-table__content-cells-group');

    if (!!rowEl && value) {
      rowEl.classList.add('aq-table__content-cells-group--selected');
    } else {
      rowEl.classList.remove('aq-table__content-cells-group--selected');
    }
  }
  renderColumn(column?: AqColumnDef[], columns?: AqColumnDef[]) {
    if (!!column) {
      this.updateHeaderColumn(column);
      this.updateContentColumn(column);
      this.instance.setOptions(prev => ({
        ...prev,
        columns: [...columns],
      }));
      this.copyColumns = [...columns];
      this.applyGridTemplate();
    }
  }
  resetTable() {
    this.resetTableHeader();
    this.resetTableContent();
  }
  resetTableContent() {
    this.resetScroll();
    this.renderTableContent();
  }
  resetTableHeader() {
    this.clearTableHeader();
    this.renderTableHeader();
    this.setContentHeight();
  }
  resetTableData(data: any[]) {
    this.instance.setOptions(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      data: [...data],
    }));
  }
  setFilteredData(newValue?: RowData[]) {
    if (newValue.length === 0) return [];
    if (this.mode === TableMode.SERVER) return newValue.splice(0, this.perPage);

    const position = (this.page - 1) * this.perPage;
    this.filteredData = newValue.splice(position, this.perPage);
    return this.filteredData;
  }
  initClientTable() {
    this.initPagination();
    this.setFilteredData([...this.data]);
    this.copyData = [...this.data];
  }
  updatePage(val: number) {
    this.page = val;
  }

  // TODO: Esto debería independizarse del componente
  initPagination() {
    this.page = 1;
    this.records = this.data.length;
    this.perPage = this.getPerPage;
    this.totalPages = Math.ceil(this.records / this.perPage);
  }

  // TODO: Separar Client y Server
  async fetchServerData(
    {
      sort,
      filter,
    }: {
      sort?: { columnId: string; direction: Sort.ASC | Sort.DESC };
      filter?: string;
    } = {
      filter: '',
    },
  ) {
    if (!this.config.requestData) return;

    this.localLoading = true;
    const response = await this.config
      .requestData({
        page: this.page,
        perPage: this.perPage,
        sort,
        filter,
      })
      .finally(() => {
        this.localLoading = false;
      });

    this.data = [...response.data];
    this.records = response.count;
    this.totalPages = Math.ceil(this.records / this.perPage);
    this.applyGridTemplate();
  }
  async initServerTable() {
    this.initPagination();
    await this.fetchServerData();
  }
  configTableByMode() {
    switch (this.mode) {
      case TableMode.CLIENT:
        this.initClientTable();
        break;
      case TableMode.SERVER:
        this.initServerTable();
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }
  }
  setContentHeight() {
    setTimeout(() => {
      this.getContentHeight();
    }, 500);
  }
  queryFilterHandler({ detail }: CustomEvent<string>) {
    if (this.mode === TableMode.SERVER) {
      this.fetchServerData({ filter: detail });
    } else {
      this.instance.setGlobalFilter(detail);
      this.loadingCustomQueryFilter(detail);
    }
  }
  selectColumnHandler(evt: IColumnFilter) {
    const { item, checked } = evt;
    const columnId = item.toLocaleLowerCase();

    this.instance.setColumnVisibility({ [columnId]: !checked });
  }
  @State() unselectAllRows: boolean = false;
  @State() controlAction: boolean = false;
  deselectedAll({ detail }: CustomEvent<boolean>) {
    this.contentContainer.querySelectorAll('aq-checkbox').forEach(checkbox => {
      checkbox.value = detail;
      this.handleRowSelection(checkbox, detail);
    });
    this.instance.toggleAllRowsSelected(detail);
    this.selectionsData = [];
    this.unselectAllRows = true;
    const allHeaders = this.el.querySelectorAll('.aq-table-header__cell-item');
    allHeaders[0].querySelector('aq-checkbox').value = detail;
    this.emitSelectionChange(this.selectionsData, this.selectionsData);
    this.renderTableContent();
  }

  updateHeaderCheckbox() {
    if (this.headerCheckbox) {
      const isAllSelected = this.instance.getIsAllRowsSelected();
      const isSomeSelected = this.instance.getIsSomeRowsSelected();
      (this.headerCheckbox as any).isChecked = isAllSelected;
      (this.headerCheckbox as any).indeterminate = !isAllSelected && isSomeSelected;
    } 
    
    this.unselectAllRows = false;
    this.controlAction = false;
  }

  getSelectedRows() {
    const selectedRowModel = this.instance.getSelectedRowModel();
    const selectedRows = selectedRowModel.rows.map(row => row.original);
    return selectedRows;
  }

  emitSelectionChange(item: RowData | RowData[], selectedRowModelView: RowData[]) {
    if (!Array.isArray(item) && item && selectedRowModelView !== null) {
      this.selectionsData = this.selectionsData.filter((row: RowData) => row !== item);
      const selectedOriginals = selectedRowModelView?.map((row: any) => row.original);
      this.selectionsData = [...new Set([...this.selectionsData, ...selectedOriginals])];
      this.selectionChangeTable.emit({ valueChange: item, itemsSelected: this.selectionsData });
    }
    if (Array.isArray(item) && item.length > 0 && selectedRowModelView !== null) {
      item.forEach((row1: any) => {
        this.selectionsData = this.selectionsData.filter((row: RowData) => row !== row1?.original);
      });
      const selectedOriginals = selectedRowModelView?.map((row: any) => row.original);
      this.selectionsData = [...new Set([...this.selectionsData, ...selectedOriginals])];
      this.selectionChangeTable.emit({ valueChange: item, itemsSelected: this.selectionsData });
    }
    if (Array.isArray(item) && item.length > 0 && selectedRowModelView === null) {
      const selectedItems = item.map((row1: any) => row1?.original);
      selectedItems.forEach((row1: any) => {
        this.selectionsData = this.selectionsData.filter((row: RowData) => row !== row1);
      });
      this.selectionChangeTable.emit({ valueChange: selectedItems, itemsSelected: this.selectionsData });
    }
    if (this.unselectAllRows) {
      this.selectionsData = [];
      this.selectionChangeTable.emit({ valueChange: [], itemsSelected: this.selectionsData });
    }
  }
  renderTableHeadersCells(header: Header<any, any>): HTMLElement {
    const th = document.createElement('aq-table-header-cell');
    const column = header.column;
    if (!header.isPlaceholder && (!!column.columnDef.meta?.label || !!column.columnDef.header)) {
      th.column = column as AqColumn;
    }
    return th;
  }
  renderTableContentCells(cell: Cell<any, any>): HTMLElement {

    const td = document.createElement('aq-table-content-cell');
    const columnDef = cell.column.columnDef;
    let content: any = '';
    if (columnDef.id === this.selectionColumn.id && typeof columnDef.cell === 'function') {
      content = columnDef.cell(cell.getContext());
    } else if (columnDef.meta?.formatter) {
      const original = cell.getContext().row.original;
      content = columnDef.meta.formatter({ value: cell.getValue(), data: original });
    } else {
      content = cell.getValue() ?? '';
    }

    // Handle different content types
    if (content instanceof HTMLElement) {
      td.appendChild(content);
    } else if (typeof content === 'string' || typeof content === 'number') {
      const template = document.createElement('template');
      template.innerHTML = typeof content === 'string' ? content.trim() : content.toString();
      const firstChild = template.content.firstChild as HTMLElement;
      if (firstChild) {
        td.appendChild(firstChild);
      }
    }
    return td;
  }
  initScrollFeature() {
    this.contentContainer.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      const scrollLeft = this.contentContainer.scrollLeft;
      const headerCellGroup = this.el.querySelector('.aq-table__header-cells');
      headerCellGroup.scrollLeft = scrollLeft;
    });
  }
  updateHeaderColumn(columns: AqColumnDef[]) {
    const headerCells = this.el.querySelectorAll('.aq-table-header__cell-item');
    const headerGroup = this.el.querySelector('.aq-table-header__cell-group');
    headerCells.forEach((headerCell: any) => {
      columns.forEach((column: any) => {
        const { columnDef } = headerCell.column;
        if ((columnDef.accessorKey || columnDef.id) === column.id) {
          headerCell.column = { ...column };
        }
      });
    });
    this.createSortable(headerGroup);
  }
  updateContentColumn(columns: AqColumnDef[]) {
    const rowGroups = this.el.querySelectorAll('.aq-table__content-cells-group');
    this.instance.getRowModel().rows.forEach((row, index) => {
      row.getVisibleCells().forEach((cell, cellIndex) => {
        columns.forEach((updateColumn: any) => {
          const { columnDef }: any = cell.column;
          if (columnDef.accessorKey === updateColumn.id) {
            const cellElement = rowGroups[index].children[cellIndex] as HTMLElement;
            cellElement.innerHTML = '';
            const contentCell = this.renderTableContentCell(cell);
            const parent = rowGroups[index];

            const oldCell = parent.children[cellIndex];
            parent.replaceChild(contentCell, oldCell);
          }
        });
      });
    });
  }
  // TODO: Esto debería independizarse del componente
  clamp(val: number, min: number, max: number) {
    return Math.min(Math.max(val, min), max);
  }
  private applyGridTemplate() {
    const cols = this.copyColumns?.length ? this.copyColumns : this.columns;
    const allColumns = [...cols];

    const template = this.buildTemplateGrid.buildGridTemplateFromColumns(allColumns, this.instance);
    this.el.style.setProperty('--aq-cols', template);
  }
  private getHeaderEl(colId: string): HTMLElement | null {
    return this.el.querySelector(`.aq-table-header__cell-item[data-col-id="${colId}"]`);
  }
  private getHeaderWidth(colId: string): number | null {
    const el = this.getHeaderEl(colId);
    return el ? Math.round(el.getBoundingClientRect().width) : null;
  }
  renderTableHeaderColumn(header: Header<any, any>, headerGroup: HTMLElement) {
    if (!header.column.getIsVisible()) return;
    const headerCell = this.renderTableHeadersCells(header);
    headerCell.role = 'columnheader';
    headerCell.classList.add('aq-table-header__cell-item');

    headerCell.dataset.colId = header.column.id;

    headerGroup.appendChild(headerCell);
  }
  renderTableHeader() {
    const thead = document.createElement('div');
    thead.role = 'row';
    thead.classList.add('aq-table__header-cells-row');
    this.instance.getHeaderGroups().forEach(group => {
      const headerGroup = document.createElement('div');
      headerGroup.role = 'rowgroup';
      headerGroup.classList.add('aq-table-header__cell-group');
      headerGroup.classList.add('aq-table__header-cells-group');
      group.headers.forEach(header => {
        this.renderTableHeaderColumn(header, headerGroup);
        this.createSortable(headerGroup);
      });
      thead.appendChild(headerGroup);
    });

    this.headerContainer.appendChild(thead);
    setTimeout(() => {
      const selectionHeader = this.el.querySelector(`.aq-table-header__cell-item[data-col-id="${this.selectionColumn.id}"]`);
      if (selectionHeader && (selectionHeader as any).selectionCheckbox) {
        const checkbox = (selectionHeader as any).selectionCheckbox;
        const headerContent = selectionHeader.querySelector('.aq-table-header__cell-labels');
        if (headerContent) {
          headerContent.insertBefore(checkbox, headerContent.firstChild);
        }
      }
      this.ListenHeaders();
    }, 100);


  }

  ListenHeaders() {
    const allHeaders = this.el.querySelectorAll('.aq-table-header__cell-item');
    allHeaders.forEach((headerCell: HTMLElement) => {
      headerCell.addEventListener('change', async (e: any) => {
        const checked = e.detail.checked;
        
        const info = this.instance.getRowModel().rows;
        info.forEach((item: any) => {
          item.toggleSelected(checked);
        });

        this.headerCheckbox = headerCell.querySelector('aq-checkbox');
        this.updateHeaderCheckbox();
        if(e.detail.checked) {
          this.emitSelectionChange(this.instance.getRowModel().rows, this.instance.getRowModel().rows);
        } else {
          this.emitSelectionChange(this.instance.getSortedRowModel().rows, null);
        }
        
        this.renderTableContent();
      });
    });
  }

  updateColumnSize(_index: number, size: number, columnId: string) {
    this.instance.setOptions(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      columns: prev.columns.map(col => (col.id === columnId ? { ...col, size: size } : col)),
    }));

    const copy = this.copyColumns.map((col: any) => (col.accessorKey === columnId ? { ...col, size: size } : col));
    this.copyColumns = [...copy];
  }
  renderTableContentCell(cell: Cell<any, any>) {
    const { meta } = cell.column.columnDef;
    const { aligment } = meta;
    const contentCell: any = this.renderTableContentCells(cell);

    contentCell.role = 'cell';
    contentCell.classList.add('aq-table-content__cell-item');
    if (this.getIsAutoRowGrown) {
      contentCell.style.height = 'auto';
    } else {
      contentCell.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      contentCell.style.whiteSpace = 'nowrap';
      contentCell.style.height = '50px';
    }
    contentCell.column = cell.column;
    aligment?.content && contentCell.classList.add(`aq-table-content__cell-item--${aligment.content}`);

    return contentCell;
  }
  renderTableContent() {
    const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();

    this.instance.getRowModel().rows.forEach(row => {
      const rowGroup = document.createElement('div');
      rowGroup.role = 'rowgroup';
      rowGroup.classList.add('aq-table__content-cells-group');
      
      row.getVisibleCells().forEach(cell => {
        const contentCell = this.renderTableContentCell(cell);
        rowGroup.appendChild(contentCell);
      });
      
      if(this.config.enableSelectable) {
        const checkbox = rowGroup.querySelector('aq-checkbox');
        this.handleRowSelection(checkbox, row.getIsSelected());
      }
      
      fragment.appendChild(rowGroup);
    });
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (this.contentContainer.hasChildNodes()) {
        let content = this.contentContainer.childNodes;
        if (this.contentContainer.childNodes.length <= fragment.childNodes.length) {
          content.forEach(node => {
            if (!!fragment.childNodes.length) node.replaceWith(fragment.childNodes[0]);
          }, 0);
        } else {
          let anchor = fragment.childNodes.length;
          let childNumber = content.length;
          for (let i = 0; i < childNumber; i++) {
            if (i < anchor) content[i].replaceWith(fragment.childNodes[0]);
            else content[anchor].remove();
          }
        }
      }
      this.contentContainer.appendChild(fragment);
    });
  }
  onStartSort() {
    this.headerCells = this.el.querySelectorAll('.aq-table-header__cell-item');
  }
  onMoveColumns(evt: Sortable.SortableEvent) {
    const oldIndex = evt.oldIndex;
    const newIndex = evt.newIndex;

    if (oldIndex === newIndex) return;

    const headerCells = this.headerCells;
    const startMovedItem = headerCells[oldIndex] as any;
    const endMovedItem = headerCells[newIndex] as any;

    if (startMovedItem?.column?.id === this.selectionColumn.id || endMovedItem?.column?.id === this.selectionColumn.id) {
      return;
    }

    let betweenCells = [];
    const minIndex = Math.min(oldIndex, newIndex);
    const maxIndex = Math.max(oldIndex, newIndex);
    headerCells.forEach((_, index) => {
      if (index > minIndex && index < maxIndex) betweenCells.push((headerCells[index] as any).column);
    });

    this.indexes = { startIndex: oldIndex, startId: startMovedItem.column.id, endIndex: newIndex, endId: endMovedItem.column.id };

    if (!!startMovedItem === false || !!endMovedItem === false) return;
    headerCells.forEach(() => {
      this.modifiedColumn = [startMovedItem.column, ...betweenCells, endMovedItem.column];
    });
  }
  setColumnOrder() {
    const canPrintHeader = (column: AqColumn) => {
      if (typeof column.columnDef.header !== 'function') return column.columnDef.header;
      else return column.id;
    };

    const columns = this.instance.getAllColumns().map(column => {
      const metaColumnDef = column.columnDef?.meta || undefined;
      const existColumnLabel = !!metaColumnDef.label ? metaColumnDef.label : canPrintHeader(column);
      return {
        id: column.id,
        label: !!metaColumnDef ? `${existColumnLabel}` : `${column.id}`,
      };
    });

    if(this.config.enableSelectable) {
      const index = columns.findIndex(column => column.id === this.selectionColumn.id);
      columns.splice(index, 1);
    }
    this.columnOrder = [...columns];
  }
  onColumnReorder() {
    const columns = [...this.copyColumns];

    const toIndex = columns.findIndex((c: any) => c.accessorKey === this.indexes.endId);
    const fromIndex = columns.findIndex((c: any) => c.accessorKey === this.indexes.startId);

    if (fromIndex === -1 || toIndex === -1) return;

    if (this.indexes.startId === this.selectionColumn.id || this.indexes.endId === this.selectionColumn.id) {
      return;
    }

    const [moved] = columns.splice(fromIndex, 1);
    columns.splice(toIndex, 0, moved);

    this.copyColumns = [...columns];
    this.instance.setOptions(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      state: {
        ...prev.state,
        columnOrder: columns.map(c => c.id),
      },
      columns,
    }));

    this.setColumnOrder();
    this.renderColumn(this.modifiedColumn, columns);
  }
  resetScroll() {
    if (!!this.contentContainer) this.contentContainer.scrollTop = 0;
  }
  clearTableHeader() {
    if (this.headerContainer) this.headerContainer.innerHTML = '';
  }
  checkContent({ detail }) {
    this.canShowHeader = detail;
  }
  observeElementRect(el, callback) {
    const ro = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      callback(el.getBoundingClientRect());
    });
    ro.observe(el);
    return () => ro.disconnect();
  }
  observeElementOffset(el, callback) {
    const onScroll = () => callback(el.scrollTop);
    el.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
    callback(el.scrollTop);
    return () => el.removeEventListener('scroll', onScroll);
  }
  getContentHeight() {
    const header = this.el.querySelector('.aq-table__header');
    const footer = this.el.querySelector('.aq-table__pagination');
    const headerHeight = header?.getBoundingClientRect().height || 0;
    const footerHeight = footer?.getBoundingClientRect().height || 0;
    const paddingWrapper = this.el.querySelector('.aq-table__wrapper');
    const padding = window.getComputedStyle(paddingWrapper).getPropertyValue('padding-top').match(/\d+/g);
    const totalPadding = padding ? parseInt(padding[0]) * 2 : 0;

    this.tableHeight = this.getConfig.height - (headerHeight + footerHeight + totalPadding);
  }
  setColumnsMeta() {
    let columns: AqColumnDef[] = [];
    if (this.config.enableSelectable) {
      columns.unshift(this.selectionColumn);
    }
    const parsedColumns = this.columns.map(col => ({
      ...col,
      meta: {
        ...col.meta,
        ...COLUMN_META_DATA,
      },
    }));
    columns = [...columns, ...parsedColumns];

    return columns;
  }

  async onPerPageSelectionHandler(evt: CustomEvent<number>) {
    this.controlAction = false;
    this.perPage = evt.detail;
    this.page = 1;
    if (this.mode === TableMode.SERVER) {
      await this.fetchServerData();
    } else {
      const newData = this.setFilteredData([...this.data]);
      this.resetTableData(newData);
      this.resetTableContent();
    }
    this.updateHeaderCheckbox();
  }

  async onPageSelectionHandler(evt: CustomEvent<number>) {
    this.controlAction = false;
    this.page = evt.detail;
    if (this.mode === TableMode.SERVER) {
      await this.fetchServerData();
    } else {
      const newData = this.setFilteredData([...this.data]);
      this.resetTableData(newData);
      this.resetTableContent();
    }
    this.updateHeaderCheckbox();
  }

  get getHasHeader() {
    return this.hasHeader && this.canShowHeader;
  }
  get getHasPagination() {
    return this.hasPagination;
  }
  get getHasContent() {
    return true;
  }
  get getTableStyles() {
    return {
      'aq-table': true,
      'aq-table--with-pagination': this.hasPagination,
      'aq-table--without-pagination': !this.hasPagination,
      'aq-table--with-header': this.getHasHeader,
      'aq-table--without-header': !this.getHasHeader,
    };
  }
  get getIsLoading() {
    return this.localLoading;
  }
  get getTitle() {
    return this.getConfig.title;
  }
  get getTitleTooltip() {
    return this.getConfig.titleTooltip;
  }
  get getTitleIcon() {
    return this.getConfig.titleIcon;
  }
  get getHeight() {
    return this.getConfig.height;
  }
  get getIsAutoRowGrown() {
    return this.getConfig.rowAutoGrown;
  }
  get getPerPage() {
    return this.getConfig.perPage;
  }
  get getConfig() {
    return { ...this.basicConfig, ...this.config };
  }

  componentWillLoad(): void {
    this.createTable();
  }
  async componentDidLoad(): Promise<void> {
    this.setColumnsMeta();
    if (this.contentContainer) this.initScrollFeature();
    this.configTableByMode();
    this.renderTableHeader();
    this.onDataChange(this.data);
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      this.setContentHeight();
      this.firtsRender = false;
      this.copyColumns = [...this.columns];
      // TODO: Esto debe ir a un función
      if (this.config.enableSelectable) this.copyColumns.unshift(this.selectionColumn);
      this.setColumnOrder();
      this.applyGridTemplate();
    });
  }

  componentDidUpdate(): void {
    const rowModelRows = this.instance.getRowModel().rows.map(row => row.original);
    const allRowsSelected = rowModelRows.every(row => this.selectionsData.includes(row));
    if (this.instance.getAllColumns()[0].id === this.selectionColumn.id) {
      const allHeaders = this?.el?.querySelectorAll('.aq-table-header__cell-item');
      (allHeaders[0]?.querySelector('aq-checkbox') as any).value = allRowsSelected;
    }
  }

  render() {
    this.showHeader = this.hasHeader && this.canShowHeader;
    this.showPagination = this.getHasPagination;
    this.showContent = this.getHasContent;

    return (
      <Host class={this.getTableStyles} role="table" style={{ minHeight: `${this.getHeight}px`, display: 'block' }}>
        <div class="aq-table__wrapper" aq-spinner={`{"show": ${this.getIsLoading}}`}>
          <div class="aq-table__header" role="row">
            <div class="aq-table__header-slots" role="rowheader">
              {this.showHeader && (
                <aq-table-toolbar
                  hasHeader={this.hasHeader}
                  options={this.columnOrder}
                  titleToolbar={this.getTitle}
                  titleTooltip={this.getTitleTooltip}
                  titleIcon={this.getTitleIcon}
                  checkedItems={this.selectionsData.length}
                  onDeselectedAll={event => this.deselectedAll(event)}
                  onEnableHeader={event => this.checkContent(event)}
                  onQueryFilter={event => this.queryFilterHandler(event)}
                  onSelectColumn={event => this.selectColumnHandler(event.detail)}
                >
                  <slot name="header-left" slot="header-left"></slot>
                  <slot name="header-right" slot="header-right"></slot>
                </aq-table-toolbar>
              )}
            </div>
            <div class="aq-table__header-cells" role="cell" ref={el => (this.headerContainer = el)}></div>
          </div>
          {this.showContent ? (
            <div class="aq-table__content" role="row" style={{ height: `${this.tableHeight}px` }}>
              <div class="aq-table__content-cells" ref={el => (this.contentContainer = el)} style={{ minHeight: `${this.tableHeight}px`, height: `${this.tableHeight}px` }}></div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <aq-table-no-content style={{ height: `${this.tableHeight}px`, display: 'block' }} text={this.getConfig.errorValue}></aq-table-no-content>
          )}
          {this.showPagination && (
            <div class="aq-table__pagination">
              <aq-pagination
                records={this.records}
                perPage={this.perPage}
                totalPages={this.totalPages}
                page={this.page}
                chunk={this.getConfig.chunk}
                perPageValues={this.getConfig.perPageValues}
                onSetPerPageValue={event => this.onPerPageSelectionHandler(event)}
                onSetPage={event => this.onPageSelectionHandler(event)}
              ></aq-pagination>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

  perPage: 10,
  perPageValues: [10, 25, 50, 100],
  height: 500,
  state: {
    columnPinning: {},
  },
  udpate: () => {},
  errorValue: '',
  enablePin: true,
  enableTooltip: true,
  enableSort: true,
  enableReorder: true,
  enableResize: true,
};

export const COLUMN_META_DATA: AqColumnDef['meta'] = {
  enablePinning: true,
  enableResizing: true,
  enableSorting: true,
  enableReorder: true,
  enableTooltip: true,

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-table/aq-table-core/helpers/buildTemplateGrid.ts
================================================
import { AqColumnDef, RowData } from 'components';
import { Num } from '../types/Num';
import { Table } from '@tanstack/table-core';

export class BuildTemplateGrid {
  toNum(v: Num) {
    return typeof v === 'number' && !Number.isNaN(v) ? v : null;
  }

  trackFor(col: AqColumnDef): string {
    const size = this.toNum(col.size);
    const min = col.minSize ? this.toNum(col.minSize) : 100;
    const max = col.maxSize ? `${this.toNum(col.maxSize)}px` : '100%';

    if (size !== null) {
      return `clamp(${min}px, ${size}px, ${max})`;
    }
    return `minmax(${min}px, 1fr)`;
  }

  buildGridTemplateFromColumns(cols: AqColumnDef[], instance: Table<RowData>): string {
    const visible = cols
      .filter(c => {
        // Handle selection column (no accessorKey)
        return instance.getColumn(c.accessorKey)?.getIsVisible() !== false;
      })
      .map(c => {
        return { ...c, ...cols.find(realC => realC.accessorKey === c.accessorKey) };
      });

    return visible.map(c => this.trackFor(c)).join(' ');
  }
}

import { TableState } from '@tanstack/table-core';
import { ITablePagination } from '../../interfaces/IPagination';

interface IRequestParam {
  perPage: number;
  page: number;
  sort?: { columnId: string; direction: 'asc' | 'desc' };
  filter?: string;
}

interface IRequestData {
  data: any[];
  count: number;
}

export interface IAqConfig {
  state: Partial<TableState>;
  udpate?: () => void;
  errorValue?: string;
  title?: string;
  titleTooltip?: string;
  titleIcon?: string;
  height?: number;
  enablePin?: boolean;
  enableTooltip?: boolean;
  enableSort?: boolean;
  enableReorder?: boolean;
  enableResize?: boolean;
  enableSelectable?: boolean;
  requestData?: (data: IRequestParam) => Promise<IRequestData>;
  rowAutoGrown?: boolean;
}
export type ITableConfig = IAqConfig & ITablePagination;

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-table/aq-table-header-cell/aq-table-header-cell.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, Fragment, Prop, State, Watch, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { AqColumn, AqColumnDef } from '../interfaces/IColumnConfig';
import { Sort } from '../constants/Sort';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-table-header-cell',
  styleUrl: 'aq-table-header-cell.scss',
})
export class AqTableHeaderCell {
  @Element() el!: HTMLElement;

  @Prop() column!: AqColumn;

  @State() pinned = false;
  @State() showPinned = false;
  @State() sort: Sort = Sort.UNSET;
  @State() columnDef!: AqColumnDef;
  @State() showTooltip = false;
  @State() size: string;

  private _headerHtml: string | null = null;
  private _headerVNode: any | null = null;
  private _headerText: string = '';

  @Watch('column')
  onColumnChange(newVal: AqColumn) {
    this.setValues(newVal);
    this.computeHeaderOnce();
  }

  @Watch('pinned')
  onPinnedChange(newVal: boolean) {
    setTimeout(() => (this.showPinned = newVal), 200);
  }

  handlePin = () => {
    this.pinned = !this.pinned;
    this.column.setPin(this.pinned);
  };

  handleSort = () => {
    this.sort = this.sort === Sort.UNSET ? Sort.ASC : this.sort === Sort.ASC ? Sort.DESC : Sort.UNSET;
    this.column.setSort(this.sort);
  };

  get getMeta() {
    return this.columnDef?.meta || {};
  }
  get getHasColumns() {
    return !!this.getMeta.pinned || !!this.getMeta.sort;
  }
  get getSortClass() {
    return {
      'aq-table-header__cell-sort': true,
      'aq-icon-chevron-up-down': this.sort === Sort.UNSET,
      'aq-icon-chevron-up': this.sort === Sort.ASC,
      'aq-icon-chevron-down': this.sort === Sort.DESC,
    };
  }
  get getSortElement() {
    if (this.getMeta.sort && this.getMeta.enableSorting) {
      return <em onClick={this.handleSort} class={this.getSortClass}></em>;
    }
  }
  get getPinnedClass() {
    return {
      'aq-table-header__cell-pinned': true,
      'aq-icon-pin': !this.pinned,
      'aq-icon-pin-fill': this.pinned,
    };
  }
  get getPinnedElement() {
    if (this.getMeta.enablePinning) {
      return <em onClick={this.handlePin} class={this.getPinnedClass}></em>;
    }
  }
  get getTooltipElement() {
    if (this.getMeta.tooltip) {
      return (
        <em class="aq-table-header__cell-tooltip aq-icon-info-circle">
          <aq-tooltip config={{ placement: 'top' }}>
            <span>{this.getMeta.tooltip}</span>
          </aq-tooltip>
        </em>
      );
    }
  }
  get getIconClass() {
    return {
      'aq-table-header__cell-icon': true,
      'aq-table-header__cell-icon--left-sloted': !!this.getMeta.reorder && !this.getMeta.pinned,
      [`${this.getMeta.icon}`]: !!this.getMeta.icon,
    };
  }
  get getIconElement() {
    if (this.getMeta.icon) return <em class={this.getIconClass}></em>;
  }
  get getReorderClasses() {
    return {
      'aq-table-header__cell-reorder aq-icon-six-dots': true,
      'aq-table-header__cell-reorder--hide': this.pinned,
    };
  }
  get getLabelClass() {
    return {
      'aq-table-header__cell-label': true,
      'aq-table-header__cell-label--left-sloted': !!this.getMeta.reorder && !this.getMeta.icon && !this.pinned,
    };
  }
  get getDivider() {
    return this.getMeta.enableResizing && <div class="aq-table-header__cell-divider" onMouseDown={evt => this.onResizeStart(evt, this.column)}></div>;
  }
  get getLabel() {
    return this.getMeta ? this.getMeta.label : this.columnDef?.header ?? '';
  }

  private computeHeaderOnce() {
    this._headerHtml = null;
    this._headerVNode = null;
    this._headerText = '';

    const header = this.columnDef?.header;

    if (!!this.getLabel) {
      return (this._headerText = String(this.getLabel ?? ''));
    }

    if (header == null) {
      this._headerText = String(this.getLabel ?? '');
      return;
    }

    if (typeof header === 'string' || typeof header === 'number') {
      this._headerText = String(header);
      return;
    }

    if (typeof header === 'function') {
      const out = header({ column: this.column } as any);

      if (out instanceof HTMLElement) {
        this._headerHtml = out.outerHTML;
        return;
      }

      if (out && typeof out === 'object') {
        this._headerVNode = out;
        return;
      }

      this._headerText = String(out ?? '');
      return;
    }

    if ((header as any) instanceof HTMLElement) {
      this._headerHtml = (header as HTMLElement).outerHTML;
      return;
    }

    this._headerText = String(header);
  }

  setValues(newVal?: AqColumn) {
    this.columnDef = newVal?.columnDef || this.column?.columnDef;
    this.sort = (this.getMeta.sort as Sort) ?? Sort.UNSET;
    this.pinned = !!(newVal?.columnDef.enablePinning || this.getMeta.pinned);
    this.showPinned = this.pinned;
  }

  setCellTooltip() {
    const cellHeader = this.el.querySelector('.aq-table-header__cell-labels') as HTMLElement;
    const label = this.el.querySelector('.aq-table-header__cell-label') as HTMLElement;

    if (!cellHeader || !label) return;
    const iconWidth = this.getMeta.icon ? 14 : 0;
    const cellHeaderWidth = cellHeader.getBoundingClientRect().width - iconWidth;
    const labelWidth = label.scrollWidth;
    this.showTooltip = cellHeaderWidth < labelWidth && !!this.getMeta.enableTooltip;
  }

  private startX!: number;
  private startWidth!: number;
  private minWidth = 50;
  private maxWidth = Infinity;

  onResizeStart(evt: MouseEvent, column: AqColumn) {
    evt.preventDefault();
    this.startX = evt.pageX;
    const measured = Math.round(this.el.getBoundingClientRect().width);
    const sizeFromDef = typeof column.columnDef.size === 'number' ? column.columnDef.size : null;
    this.startWidth = sizeFromDef ?? measured;
    this.minWidth = typeof column.columnDef.minSize === 'number' ? column.columnDef.minSize : 50;
    this.maxWidth = typeof column.columnDef.maxSize === 'number' ? column.columnDef.maxSize : Infinity;
    this.el.querySelector('.aq-table-header__cell-divider')?.classList.add('aq-table-header__cell-divider--resizing');
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', this.onResizing);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', this.onResizeEnd);
  }
  onResizing = (evt: MouseEvent) => {
    const diff = evt.pageX - this.startX;
    const newSize = Math.max(this.startWidth + diff, 50);
    const finalSize = Math.min(Math.max(newSize, this.minWidth), this.maxWidth);
    const headerItem = this.el;
    const cell = this.el.querySelector('.aq-table-header__cell') as HTMLElement;
    headerItem.style.width = `${finalSize}px`;
    cell.style.width = `${finalSize}px`;
  };
  onResizeEnd = () => {
    document.removeEventListener('mousemove', this.onResizing);
    document.removeEventListener('mouseup', this.onResizeEnd);
    this.el.querySelector('.aq-table-header__cell-divider')?.classList.remove('aq-table-header__cell-divider--resizing');
    this.column.setSize(this.el.getBoundingClientRect().width);
    this.setCellTooltip();
  };

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.setValues();
    this.computeHeaderOnce();
  }
  componentDidLoad() {
    this.setCellTooltip();
  }
  componentDidUpdate() {
    this.setCellTooltip();
  }
  render() {
    return (
      <Fragment>
        <div class={!this.column.columnDef.meta?.hoverDisabled ? 'aq-table-header__cell' : 'aq-table-header__cell--no-hover'}>
          <div class="aq-table-header__cell-labels">
            {(!this.getMeta.enableReorder || this.getMeta.reorder) && !this.showPinned && <em class={this.getReorderClasses}></em>}
            {this.getIconElement}

            <span class={this.getLabelClass}>
              {this.showTooltip && <aq-tooltip config={{ placement: 'top' }}>{this.getLabel}</aq-tooltip>}

              {/* 1) HTML crudo */}
              {this._headerHtml != null && <span innerHTML={this._headerHtml}></span>}

              {/* 2) VNode/JSX */}
              {this._headerHtml == null && this._headerVNode}

              {/* 3) Texto */}
              {this._headerHtml == null && !this._headerVNode && this._headerText}
            </span>

            {this.getTooltipElement}
          </div>

          {this.getHasColumns && (
            <div class="aq-table-header__cell-config">
              {this.getPinnedElement}
              {this.getSortElement}
            </div>
          )}

          {this.getDivider}
        </div>
      </Fragment>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-table/aq-table-toolbar/aq-table-toolbar.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Event, EventEmitter, h, Host, Prop, State } from '@stencil/core';
import { ITableToolbar } from './interface/ITableToolbar';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { Element } from '@stencil/core';
import { PopoverWidths } from 'enum';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-table-toolbar',
  styleUrl: 'aq-table-toolbar.scss',
})
export class AqTableToolbar implements ITableToolbar {
  @Element() host!: HTMLElement;

  @Prop() hasHeader = true;
  @Prop() options: Array<any> = [];
  @Prop() titleToolbar: string;
  @Prop() titleTooltip?: string;
  @Prop() titleIcon?: string;
  @Prop() checkedItems: number = 0;

  @State() localOptions: Array<any> = [];

  titleSlot = null;
  headerLeftSlot = null;
  headerRightSlot = null;

  @Event() enableHeader: EventEmitter<boolean>;
  @Event() queryFilter: EventEmitter<string>;
  @Event() selectColumn: EventEmitter<any>;
  @Event() deselectedAll: EventEmitter<boolean>;

  setTitleSlot(el: Element) {
    this.titleSlot = el;
    this.checkContent();
  }
  setHeaderLeftSlot(el: Element) {
    this.headerLeftSlot = el;
    this.checkContent();
  }
  setHeaderRightSlot(el: Element) {
    this.headerRightSlot = el;
    this.checkContent();
  }
  handleSelection({ checked, item }) {
    emitEvent('selectColumn', this.host, { checked, item });
  }
  checkContent() {
    const isContentEnable = this.hasHeader || (!!this.headerLeftSlot && !!this.headerRightSlot && !!this.titleSlot);
    if (!!isContentEnable) this.enableHeader.emit(isContentEnable);
  }
  setFilter(event: Event) {
    this.queryFilter.emit((event as CustomEvent).detail.value);
  }
  capitalize(str: string) {
    return str.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + str.slice(1);
  }
  handleClose() {
    this.deselectedAll.emit(false);
  }
  checkItem(item) {
    const checkbox = document.getElementById(item.id) as any;
    checkbox.value = !checkbox.value;
    this.handleSelection({ checked: checkbox.value, item: item.id });
  }

  get getOptions() {
    return this.options;
  }
  get hasTitle() {
    return !!this.titleToolbar;
  }
  get hasTitleIcon() {
    return !!this.titleIcon;
  }
  get getTitleIconClass() {
    return {
      'aq-table__toolbar-icon': true,
      [`${this.titleIcon}`]: !!this.titleIcon,
    };
  }
  get getCheckedItems() {
    return `${this.checkedItems} item${this.checkedItems > 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
  }

  get getCheckedTag() {
    return this.checkedItems > 0 ? <aq-tag class="aq-table__toolbar-checked-tag" text={this.getCheckedItems} has-close-icon onClose={() => this.handleClose()}></aq-tag> : <></>;
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.checkContent();
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-table__toolbar">
          <div class="aq-table__toolbar--left">
            {this.hasTitle && (
              <aq-subheading info={this.titleTooltip}>
                <span slot="text">
                  {this.hasTitleIcon && <em class={this.getTitleIconClass}></em>}
                  {this.titleToolbar}
                </span>
              </aq-subheading>
            )}
            {this.getCheckedTag}
            <slot ref={el => this.setHeaderLeftSlot(el)} name="header-left"></slot>
          </div>
          <div class="aq-table__toolbar--right">
            <div class="aq-table__toolbar-filters">
              <aq-search-bar class="toolbar-widget" placeholder="This is a placeholder button" is-button onInput={event => this.setFilter(event)}></aq-search-bar>
              <aq-dropdown class="toolbar-widget" placement="bottom-end" popover-width={PopoverWidths.AUTO} is-disabled={false}>
                <aq-button slot="activator">
                  <em class="aq-icon-table"></em>
                </aq-button>
                <div slot="content" key="headerDropdown">
                  {this.getOptions.map((item: any) => (
                    <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item" onSelection={() => this.checkItem(item)}>
                      <aq-checkbox
                        onChange={({ detail }: any) => this.handleSelection({ checked: detail.checked, item: item.id })}
                        id={item.id}
                        name={item.id}
                        label={this.capitalize(item.label)}
                      ></aq-checkbox>
                    </aq-dropdown-item>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </aq-dropdown>
            </div>
            <slot ref={el => this.setHeaderRightSlot(el)} name="header-right"></slot>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-table/helpers/createAqTable.ts
================================================
import { Column, ColumnDef, functionalUpdate, RowData, Table, TableFeature, Updater } from '@tanstack/table-core';
import { Sort } from '../constants/Sort';

const DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
  icon: '',
  label: '',
  pinned: false,
  reorder: true,
  sort: Sort.UNSET,
  tooltip: '',
  aligment: null,
};

export interface AqOptions {
  onPinChange: (columnId: string, pin: boolean) => void;
  onLabelChange: (columnId: string, label: string) => void;
  onTooltipChange: (columnId: string, tooltip: string) => void;
  onSortChange: (columnId: string, sort: Sort) => void;
  onIconChange: (columnId: string, icon: string) => void;
  onReorderChange: (columnId: string, reorder: boolean) => void;
  onSizeChange: (columnId: string, size: number) => void;
}

export interface AqColumnInstance {
  setPin?: (updater: Updater<boolean>) => void;
  togglePin?: () => void;
  setLabel?: (updater: Updater<string>) => void;
  setTooltip?: (updater: Updater<string>) => void;
  setSort?: (updater: Updater<Sort>) => void;
  toggleSort?: () => void;
  setIcon?: (updater: Updater<string>) => void;
  setReorder?: (updater: Updater<boolean>) => void;
  setMeta?: (value?: AqColumnInstance) => void;
  setSize?: (updater: Updater<number>) => void;
}

export const AqTableFeature: TableFeature<any> = {
  getDefaultColumnDef: <T extends RowData>(): Partial<ColumnDef<T>> => {
    return { meta: { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG }, size: undefined };
  },

  createColumn: <TData extends RowData, TValue>(column: Column<TData, TValue>, table: Table<TData>) => {
    // column.setMeta = (value?: AqTableState) => {
    //   column.setState((state: TableState & AqTableState) => {
    //     return {
    //       ...state,
    //       ...value.meta,
    //     };
    //   });
    // };
    column.setIcon = (updater: Updater<string>) => {
      const meta = column.columnDef.meta ?? {};
      const prevIcon = meta.icon;

      const newIcon = functionalUpdate(updater, prevIcon); // Aquí `updater` puede ser (prev) => string o un string
      column.columnDef.meta = {
        ...meta,
        icon: newIcon,
      };
      table.options.onIconChange?.(column.id, newIcon);
    };
    column.setPin = (updater: Updater<boolean>) => {
      const meta = column.columnDef.meta ?? {};
      const prevPin = meta.pinned;

      const newPin = functionalUpdate(updater, prevPin); // Aquí `updater` puede ser (prev) => string o un string
      column.columnDef.meta = {
        ...meta,
        pinned: newPin,
      };

      table.options.onPinChange?.(column.id, newPin);
    };
    column.setTooltip = (updater: Updater<string>) => {
      const meta = column.columnDef.meta ?? {};
      const prevTooltip = meta.tooltip;

      const newTooltip = functionalUpdate(updater, prevTooltip); // Aquí `updater` puede ser (prev) => string o un string
      column.columnDef.meta = {
        ...meta,
        tooltip: newTooltip,
      };
      table.options.onTooltipChange?.(column.id, newTooltip);
    };
    column.setSort = (updater: Updater<Sort>) => {
      const meta = column.columnDef.meta ?? {};
      const prevSort = meta.sort;

      const newSort = functionalUpdate(updater, prevSort); // Aquí `updater` puede ser (prev) => string o un string
      column.columnDef.meta = {
        ...meta,
        sort: newSort,
      };
      table.options.onSortChange?.(column.id, newSort);
    };
    column.setReorder = (updater: Updater<boolean>) => {
      const meta = column.columnDef.meta ?? {};
      const prevReorder = meta.reorder;

      const newReorder = functionalUpdate(updater, prevReorder); // Aquí `updater` puede ser (prev) => string o un string
      column.columnDef.meta = {
        ...meta,
        reorder: newReorder,
      };
      table.options.onReorderChange?.(column.id, newReorder);
    };
    column.togglePin = () => {
      column.setPin(old => {
        return !old;
      });
    };
    column.toggleSort = () => {
      column.setSort(old => {
        switch (old) {
          case Sort.UNSET:
            return Sort.ASC;
          case Sort.ASC:
            return Sort.DESC;
          case Sort.DESC:
            return Sort.UNSET;
          default:
            return Sort.UNSET;
        }
      });
    };
    column.setSize = (updater: Updater<number>) => {
      const prevSize = column.columnDef.size;

      const newSize = functionalUpdate(updater, prevSize);
      table.options.onSizeChange?.(column.id, newSize);
    };
    column.columnDef.meta = {
      ...DEFAULT_CONFIG,
      ...column.columnDef.meta,
    };
  },
};

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/data/aq-table/helpers/flexRender.ts
================================================
export const flexRender = (renderer: any, context: any): string | HTMLElement => {
  if (typeof renderer === 'function') {
    return renderer(context);
  }

  return typeof renderer === 'string' ? renderer : String(renderer);
};

import type { Column, ColumnDef, Row, RowData } from '@tanstack/table-core';
import { Sort } from '../constants/Sort';
import { IAlignment } from './IAligment';

export interface AqColumnProp {
  icon?: string;
  pinned?: boolean;
  tooltip?: string;
  label?: string;
  enablePinning?: boolean;
  enableSorting?: boolean;
  enableResizing?: boolean;
  enableReorder?: boolean;
  enableTooltip?: boolean;
  sort?: Sort;
  reorder?: boolean;
  aligment?: IAlignment;
  formatter?: (value: any, row?: Row<RowData>) => string | HTMLElement;
  hoverDisabled?: boolean;
}

export type AqColumnDef = ColumnDef<RowData, any> & {
  accessorKey?: string;
  meta?: AqColumnProp;
};

export type AqColumn = AqColumnDef & Column<RowData, any>;

@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/color' as colors;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/font' as fonts;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/spacing' as spacing;

$icon-colors: (
  default: colors.$color-paper-dark,
  info: colors.$color-primary-base,
  success: colors.$color-success-base,
  danger: colors.$color-danger-base,
  warning: colors.$color-warning-base,
);

@mixin badge-variant($name, $text-color, $background-color, $disabled-text-color, $disabled-background-color) {
  &.#{$name} {
    color: $text-color;
    background-color: $background-color;

    &.is-disabled {
      color: $disabled-text-color;
      background-color: $disabled-background-color;
    }
  }
}

aq-badge {
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.aq-badge {
  font-family: fonts.$font-family-basic;
  font-weight: fonts.$font-weight-semi-bold;
  font-size: calc(fonts.$font-size-m * 0.75);

  border-radius: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;

  display: inline-flex;

  align-items: center;
  min-height: spacing.$spacing-size-medium;

    background-color: colors.$color-paper-light;
  }

    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    vertical-align: middle;
    font-size: 1em;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  &.is-status {
    @each $state, $color in $icon-colors {
      .aq-badge__icon--#{$state} {
        color: $color;
      }
    }
  }

  @include badge-variant('info',
    colors.$color-primary-dark,
    colors.$color-primary-light,
    colors.$color-primary-light,
    colors.$color-primary-lighter
  );

  @include badge-variant('danger',
    colors.$color-danger-dark,
    colors.$color-danger-light,
    colors.$color-danger-light,
    colors.$color-danger-lighter
  );

  @include badge-variant('success',
    colors.$color-success-dark,
    colors.$color-success-light,
    colors.$color-success-light,
    colors.$color-success-lighter
  );

  @include badge-variant('warning',
    colors.$color-warning-dark,
    colors.$color-warning-light,
    colors.$color-warning-light,
    colors.$color-warning-lighter
  );

  // status variant
  &.is-status {
    &.default {
      color: colors.$color-ink-lighter;
      background-color: colors.$color-paper-lighter;
    }
    &.info {
      background-color: colors.$color-primary-lighter;

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/feedback/aq-badge/aq-badge.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';

import type { StyleClassMap } from '../../../types/StyleClassMap';
import { IBadge } from './interfaces/IBadge';
import { StateIcons } from './enums/StateIcons';
import { BadgeVariant } from './enums/BadgeVariants';
import { DefaultColors } from 'enum/colors/DefaultColors';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-badge',
  styleUrl: 'aq-badge.scss',
})
export class AqBadge implements IBadge {
  @Prop() state: IBadge['state'] = DefaultColors.DEFAULT;
  @Prop() variant: IBadge['variant'] = BadgeVariant.BADGE;

  @Prop() showIcon = false;
  @Prop() icon = '';
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;

  @Prop() useDot = false;
  @Prop() customClass = '';

  getDefaultIconName() {
    const icons = {
      info: StateIcons.INFO,
      success: StateIcons.SUCCESS,
      warning: StateIcons.WARNING,
      danger: StateIcons.DANGER,
      default: StateIcons.DEFAULT,
    };
    return icons[this.state];
  }

  renderIcon() {
    if (!this.showIcon || this.useDot) return null;

    const isIconPredefinedColor = this.variant === 'status' && this.customClass.length === 0;

    const icon = this.icon.length > 0 ? this.icon : this.getDefaultIconName();
    const iconClass = isIconPredefinedColor ? `aq-badge__icon--${this.state}` : '';

    return <em class={`${icon} ${iconClass}`}></em>;
  }

  renderDot() {
    if (!this.useDot) return null;

    const dotClass = this.customClass.length === 0 ? `aq-badge__icon--${this.state}` : '';

    return <em class={`aq-icon-circle-fill aq-font-size-2xs ${dotClass}`}></em>;
  }

  getStyleClassMap(): StyleClassMap {
    const isCustom = !!this.customClass;

    return {
      'aq-badge': true,
      'is-status': this.variant === 'status',
      'is-disabled': this.variant === 'badge' && this.isDisabled && !isCustom,
      [this.state]: !isCustom,
      [this.customClass]: true,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMap();
    return (
      <div class={cssClass}>
        {this.renderDot()}
        {this.renderIcon()}
        <slot></slot>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

  BADGE = 'badge',

  WARNING = 'aq-icon-three-dots-circle-fill',

}

  state: DefaultColorsType | CoreColorsType;
  variant: BadgeVariantType;

  // Methods
  getDefaultIconName: () => StateIcons;
  renderIcon: () => HTMLElement | null;
  renderDot: () => HTMLElement | null;

}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/feedback/aq-banner/aq-banner.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, State, Event, Element, EventEmitter, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { BannerState } from 'interfaces/common/IBanner';
import { IBanner } from 'interfaces/common/IBanner';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-banner',
  styleUrl: 'aq-banner.scss',
})
export class AqBanner{
  @Prop() hasCloseIcon: boolean = true;
  @Prop() state: IBanner['state'] = BannerState.INFO;
  @Prop() titleBanner: string = '';
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value: boolean = true;

  @State() visible: boolean = true;
  @State() showActions: boolean = true;

  @Event() close: EventEmitter<void>;

  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  @Watch('value')
  valueChanged(newValue: boolean) {
    this.visible = newValue;
    if (!newValue) this.close.emit();
    
    emitEvent('input', this.hostElement, { value: this.value });
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.visible = this.value;
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      this.checkSlotContent();
    });
  }

  private checkSlotContent() {
    const actionsSlot = this.hostElement.querySelector(`[slot='actions']`);
    if (actionsSlot) {
      this.showActions = true;
    } else {
      this.showActions = false;
    }
  }
  private getState() {
    return !this.state ? BannerState.INFO : this.state.toLowerCase();
  }
  private getIcon() {
    let icon = 'aq-icon-info-circle-fill';
    if (this.state === BannerState.WARNING) {
      icon = 'aq-icon-info-major-triangle-up-fill';
    } else if (this.state === BannerState.DANGER) {
      icon = 'aq-icon-alert-circle-fill';
    } else if (this.state === BannerState.SUCCESS) {
      icon = 'aq-icon-check-circle-fill';
    }
    return (
      <span class={this.getClassIcon()}>
        <em class={icon}></em>
      </span>
    );
  }

  private handleClose() {
    this.value = false;
  }

  private getClose() {
    return (
      this.hasCloseIcon && (
        <div class="aq-banner__close" onClick={() => this.handleClose()}>
          <em class="aq-icon-close"></em>
        </div>
      )
    );
  }

  private getContent() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-banner__content">
        {this.titleBanner && <div class={this.getClassContent()}>{this.titleBanner}</div>}
        <div class="aq-banner__text" >
          <slot />
        </div>
        {this.showActions && (
          <div class="aq-banner__actions">
            <slot name="actions" />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }
  private getClassContent() {
    return {
      'aq-banner__title': true,
      'aq-banner__title--bottom-spacing': this.titleBanner ? true : false,
    };
  }
  private getClassIcon() {
    return {
      'aq-button__icon': true,
      [`aq-banner__icon--${this.getState()}`]: true,
    };
  }
  private getStyleClassMapp() {
    return {
      'aq-banner': true,
      [`aq-banner--${this.state}`]: true,
    };
  }

  private getStyleClassStatus() {
    return {
      'aq-banner__status': true,
      [`aq-banner__status--${this.getState()}`]: true,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMapp();
    const cssClassBanner = this.getStyleClassStatus();
    const icon = this.getIcon();
    const content = this.getContent();
    const close = this.getClose();
    return (
      <aq-transition class={`${this.visible ? 'aq-banner__transition' : 'aq-banner__transition--hidden'}`} transitionType="collapse" duration="0.3s" visible={this.visible}>
        <div class={cssClass}>
          <div class={cssClassBanner}></div>
          <div class="aq-banner__container">
            {icon}
            {content}
            {close}
          </div>
        </div>
      </aq-transition>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/feedback/aq-flag/aq-flag.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop } from '@stencil/core';
import { Countries } from './types/IACountries';
import { allCountries } from './constants/countries';
import { FLAG_BASE_URL } from './constants/flagConfig';
import { getNameFlag } from './helpers/getNameFlag';
import { FlagAlign, FlagIdentifier, IFlag } from './interfaces/IFlag';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-flag',
  styleUrls: ['aq-flag.scss'],
})
  
export class AqFlag implements IFlag {
  @Prop() isName: boolean = true;
  @Prop() showShortName: boolean = false;
  @Prop() showCallSign: boolean = false;
  @Prop() alignFlag: IFlag['alignFlag'] = FlagAlign.LEFT;
  @Prop() identifier: IFlag['identifier'] = FlagIdentifier.CODE;
  @Prop() country: string = '';

  private getCountry() {
    const localCountries: Countries = allCountries;
    const searchBy = this.identifier === FlagIdentifier.CODE ? 'country' : this.identifier.toLocaleLowerCase();
    const value = this.identifier === FlagIdentifier.ISO3 ? this.country.toUpperCase() : this.country.toLowerCase();
    const country = localCountries.find(auxCountry => auxCountry[searchBy] === value);
    return country || { country: '', iso2: '', iso3: '', name: '' };
  }

  private getFlag() {
    const flag = this.getCountry().iso2;
    return flag.toLowerCase();
  }

  private getCountryName() {
    const { iso3, name, country, iso2 } = this.getCountry();
    return this.getNameInternal(iso3, iso2, name, country);
  }

  private getNameInternal(iso3: string, iso2: string, name: string, country: string): string {
    return getNameFlag(iso3, iso2, name, country, this.identifier, this.isName, this.showShortName, this.showCallSign);
  }

  private flagUrl(flag: string) {
    return `${FLAG_BASE_URL}${flag}.svg`;
  }

  render() {
    const flag = this.getFlag();
    const countryName = this.getCountryName();
    return (
      <div class="aq-flag">
        {this.alignFlag === 'left' && flag &&
          <span class={`fi .fis aq-flag__flag--country`}
            style={{ backgroundImage: `url(${this.flagUrl(flag)})` }}
          ></span>
        }
        <span class="aq-flag__country">{countryName}</span>
        {this.alignFlag === 'right' && flag &&
          <span class={`fi .fis aq-flag__flag--country `}
            style={{ backgroundImage: `url(${this.flagUrl(flag)})` }}
          ></span>
        }
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/feedback/aq-flag/helpers/getNameFlag.ts
================================================
export function getNameFlag(
    iso3: string,
    iso2: string,
    name: string,
    country: string,
    identifier: 'iso3' | 'iso2' | 'code',
    isName: boolean,
    showShortName: boolean,
    showCallSign: boolean,
): string {
    const iso = identifier === 'iso3' ? iso3 : iso2;
    const nameFlagFull = name;
    const nameFlagAbr = iso.toLocaleUpperCase();
    let message = '';
    switch (true) {
        case showShortName && showCallSign && isName:
            message = `${nameFlagAbr} (+${country})`;
            break;
        case showShortName && !showCallSign && isName:
            message = `${nameFlagAbr}`;
            break;
        case isName && showCallSign:
            message = `${nameFlagFull} (+${country})`;
            break;
        case isName || (!showShortName && isName):
            message = `${nameFlagFull}`;
            break;
        case !isName && !showCallSign:
            message = '';
            break;
        case !isName && showCallSign:
            message = `(+${country})`;
            break;
        default:
            break;
    }
    return message.trim();
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/feedback/aq-flag/interfaces/IFlag.ts
================================================
import { ComponentInterface } from '@stencil/core';

export enum FlagIdentifier {
  ISO2 = 'iso2',
  ISO3 = 'iso3',
  CODE = 'code',
}

export enum FlagAlign {
  LEFT = 'left',
  RIGHT = 'right',
}

export interface IFlag extends ComponentInterface {
  isName: boolean;
  showShortName: boolean;
  showCallSign: boolean;
  alignFlag: FlagAlign | `${FlagAlign}`;
  identifier: FlagIdentifier | `${FlagIdentifier}`;
  country: string;
}

export type Country = {
  capital?: string;
  continent?: string;
  flag_1x1: string;
  flag_4x3: string;
  iso2: string;
  iso3: string;
  iso: boolean;
  name: string;
  country: string;
};

@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/color' as colors;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/extended-color' as extended-colors;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/font' as fonts;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/spacing' as spacing;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/box-shadow' as box-shadow;

:root {
  --aq-progress-bar-text-color: #{colors.$color-ink-base};
  --aq-progress-bar-color: #{colors.$color-paper-base};
}

@mixin progressVariant($name, $color-progress) {
  &--#{$name} {
    --custom-progress-color: #{$color-progress};

    &::-moz-progress-bar {
      background-color: $color-progress;
    }

    &::-webkit-progress-value {
      background-color: $color-progress;
    }
  }
}
.aq-progress-bar {
  font-family: fonts.$font-family-basic;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  width: 100%;

  &__content {
    width: 100%;
    padding: spacing.$spacing-size-minor (spacing.$spacing-size-minor + spacing.$spacing-size-small);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-start;

    &__header {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: row;
      justify-content: space-between;
      
      padding: 0px;

      font-size: fonts.$font-size-xs;
      line-height: fonts.$font-line-height-8;
      color: colors.$color-ink-dark;
    }

    &__status {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-end;

      em {
        font-size: fonts.$font-size-m;
        margin-right: spacing.$spacing-size-small;
      }

      &--success {
        &,
        em[class^='aq-icon-']::before {
          color: colors.$color-success-base;
        }
      }

      &--error {
        &,
        em[class^='aq-icon-']::before {
          color: colors.$color-danger-base;
        }
      }
    }

    &__progress {
      --custom-progress-color: var(--color-primary-base);
      height: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
      border-radius: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
      margin-top: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
      width: 100%;

      &::-moz-progress-bar {
        background-color: colors.$color-primary-base;
      }

      &::-webkit-progress-value {
        background-color: colors.$color-primary-base;
        border-radius: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
      }

      &::-webkit-progress-bar {
        background: colors.$color-paper-light;
        border-radius: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
      }

      @include progressVariant('success', colors.$color-success-base);

      @include progressVariant('error', colors.$color-danger-base);

      @include progressVariant('custom', var(--custom-progress-color));

      @include progressVariant('paused', colors.$color-ink-dark);
    }

    &__label {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: spacing.$spacing-size-small;

      &__name {
        color: colors.$color-ink-base;
        font-size: fonts.$font-size-xs;
        font-weight: fonts.$font-weight-semi-bold;
      }

      &__size {
        margin-top: spacing.$spacing-size-small;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        font-size: fonts.$font-size-xs;

        &__divider {
          margin: 0 spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
        }

        &__text {
          color: colors.$color-paper-darker;
          font-weight: fonts.$font-weight-semi-bold;
        }

        &__info {
          color: colors.$color-paper-darker;
          font-weight: fonts.$font-weight-regular;
        }
      }

      &__rows-info {
        margin-top: spacing.$spacing-size-small;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: row;
        font-size: fonts.$font-size-xs;
        color: colors.$color-paper-darker;

        &__divider {
          margin: 0 spacing.$spacing-size-short;
        }

        &__title {
          font-weight: fonts.$font-weight-semi-bold;
        }

        &__value {
          font-weight: fonts.$font-weight-regular;
          margin-left: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  &__icon {
    padding: spacing.$spacing-size-minor 0;
    color: colors.$color-ink-base;
    font-size: fonts.$font-size-l;
  }

  &__helper-text {
    margin-top: calc(spacing.$spacing-size-minor * -1);
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/feedback/aq-progress-bar/aq-progress-bar.tsx
================================================
import { StyleClassMap } from '../../../types/StyleClassMap';
import { LabelStatus } from './enum/LabelStatus';
import { Component, Fragment, Host, Prop, State, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { IProgressBar } from './interfaces/IProgressBar';
import { Label } from 'utils/helpers/label';
import { DisplayFormat } from '../../../enum/DisplayFormat';
import { StateStyle } from '../../../enum/StateStyle';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-progress-bar',
  styleUrl: 'aq-progress-bar.scss',
})
export class AqProgressBar implements IProgressBar {
  @Prop() progress: IProgressBar['progress'] = DisplayFormat.NUMBERED;
  @Prop() state: IProgressBar['state'] = StateStyle.ACTIVE;

  @Prop() value = 0;
  @Prop() max = 100;
  @Prop() size = '';
  @Prop() sizeInfo = '';
  @Prop() rows = '';
  @Prop() records = '';
  @Prop() color = '';
  @Prop() helperText = '';
  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() info = '';
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';

  @Prop() isFile = false;
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() isRequired = false;

  @State() status: IProgressBar['status'] = {
    ['is-success']: LabelStatus.SUCCESS,
    ['is-error']: LabelStatus.ERROR,
    ['is-paused']: LabelStatus.PAUSED,
  };

  private labelHelper = Label(this);

  get getState() {
    return this.state || StateStyle.ACTIVE;
  }
  get getProgressValue() {
    const percentage = Math.round((this.value / this.max) * 100);
    return this.progress === DisplayFormat.TEXT ? this.status[this.getState] : `${percentage}%`;
  }
  get getIsColor() {
    return !!this.color && (this.color.startsWith('#') || this.color.startsWith('rgb'));
  }
  get customStyle() {
    return this.getIsColor ? { '--custom-progress-color': this.color } : {};
  }
  getStateClass(className: string): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      [`${className}--success`]: this.getState === StateStyle.SUCCESS,
      [`${className}--error`]: this.getState === StateStyle.ERROR,
      [`${className}--paused`]: this.getState === StateStyle.PAUSED,
    };
  }
  get getIsHelperTextVisible() {
    return !!this.helperText;
  }
  get getProgress() {
    return !this.progress ? DisplayFormat.NUMBERED : this.progress.toLowerCase();
  }
  get getIsProgress() {
    let isProgress = false;
    if ((this.getProgress === DisplayFormat.TEXT && Object.keys(this.status).includes(this.getState)) || this.getProgress === DisplayFormat.NUMBERED) {
      isProgress = true;
    }
    return isProgress;
  }
  get getIsLabelVisible() {
    return this.label?.length > 0;
  }
  get getIsText() {
    return this.getIsLabelVisible;
  }
  get getValueText() {
    return this.label;
  }
  get getIsSizeInfo() {
    return !!this.sizeInfo;
  }
  get getIsSize() {
    return !!this.size;
  }
  get getIsRows() {
    return !!this.records;
  }

  getStatusClass(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-progress-bar__content__status': true,
      ...this.getStateClass('aq-progress-bar__content__status'),
    };
  }
  getProgressBarClass(): StyleClassMap {
    let classes: StyleClassMap = {
      'aq-progress-bar__content__progress': true,
      'aq-progress-bar__content__progress--custom': this.getIsColor,
      'aq-progress-bar__content__progress__helper-text': this.getIsHelperTextVisible,
    };
    if (!this.getIsColor) classes = { ...classes, ...this.getStateClass('aq-progress-bar__content__progress') };

    return {
      ...classes,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const statusCss = this.getStatusClass();
    const progressBarCss = this.getProgressBarClass();

    return (
      <Host class="aq-progress-bar">
        {this.isFile && <em class="aq-progress-bar__icon aq-icon-file"></em>}

        <div class="aq-progress-bar__content">
          {/* Header Section */}
          <div class="aq-progress-bar__content__header">
            <div class="aq-progress-bar__content__label">
              {/* AQ-LABEL */}
              {this.getIsText && <aq-label {...this.labelHelper.bindsLabel}>
                <span slot="text">
                  {this.getValueText}
                </span>
                </aq-label>}

              {this.isFile && (
                <Fragment>
                  <div class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__size">
                    <span class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__size__text">{this.size}</span>
                    {this.getIsSizeInfo && this.getIsSize && <aq-divider class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__size__divider" orientation="vertical" />}
                    <span class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__size__info">{this.sizeInfo}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__rows-info">
                    {/* LANGUAGE ROWS */}
                    {this.getIsRows && <span class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__rows-info__title">Rows </span>}
                    <span class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__rows-info__value">{this.rows}</span>
                    {this.getIsRows && <aq-divider class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__rows-info__divider" v-if="" orientation="vertical" />}

                    {/* LANGUAGE RECORDS*/}
                    {this.getIsRows && <span class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__rows-info__title">Records </span>}
                    <span class="aq-progress-bar__content__label__rows-info__value">{this.records}</span>
                  </div>
                </Fragment>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Status */}
            <div class={statusCss}>
              {this.getState === StateStyle.SUCCESS && <em class="aq-icon-check-circle-fill"></em>}
              {this.getState === StateStyle.ERROR && <em class="aq-icon-alert-circle-fill"></em>}
              {this.getIsProgress && <span>{this.getProgressValue}</span>}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Progress Bar */}
          <progress class={progressBarCss} style={this.customStyle} value={this.value} max={this.max}></progress>

          {/* Helper Text */}
          {this.getIsHelperTextVisible && (
            <div class="aq-text-field__helper-text">
              <aq-helper-text><span slot="text">{this.helperText}</span></aq-helper-text>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}
