import { DisplayFormatType, StateStyleType, StyleClassMap } from 'types';

export interface IProgressBar {
  // Props
  progress: DisplayFormatType;
  state: StateStyleType;

  // States
  status: IStatus;

  // Getters
  get getState(): StateStyleType;
  get getProgressValue(): string;
  get getIsColor(): string | boolean;
  get customStyle(): StyleClassMap | {};

  get getProgress(): string;
  get getIsProgress(): boolean;
  get getIsLabelVisible(): boolean;
  get getIsText(): boolean;
  get getValueText(): string;
  get getIsSizeInfo(): boolean;
  get getIsSize(): boolean;
  get getIsRows(): boolean;

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/feedback/aq-tag/aq-tag.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h, Fragment, Event, EventEmitter } from '@stencil/core';
import { ITag } from './interfaces/ITag';
import { DefaultColors } from 'enum/colors/DefaultColors';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-tag',
  styleUrl: 'aq-tag.scss',
})
export class AqTag implements ITag {
  @Prop() text = '';
  @Prop() icon = '';
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() hasCloseIcon = false;
  @Prop() variant: ITag['variant'] = DefaultColors.DEFAULT;

  @Event() close: EventEmitter<{ close: boolean; event: globalThis.Event }>;

  private handleClose(event: globalThis.Event) {
    this.close.emit({ close: true, event });
  }

  get getStyleClassMap() {
    return {
      'aq-tag': true,
      'is-disabled': this.isDisabled,
      [this.variant]: !!this.variant,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMap;
    return (
      <Fragment>
        <div class={cssClass}>
          <div class="aq-tag__left">
            {this.icon && <span class={`aq-tag__icon ${this.icon}`} />}
            {this.text}
          </div>
          {this.hasCloseIcon && <span class="aq-icon-close aq-tag__icon-close" onClick={e => this.handleClose(e)} />}
        </div>
      </Fragment>
    );
  }
}

import { ComponentInterface } from '@stencil/core';
import { CoreColorsType, DefaultColorsType, StyleClassMap } from 'types';

export interface ITag extends ComponentInterface {
  variant: DefaultColorsType | CoreColorsType;

  get getStyleClassMap(): StyleClassMap;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-autocomplete/aq-autocomplete-core/aq-autocomplete-core.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, State, Element, Watch, Listen, Event, EventEmitter, Method, Host } from '@stencil/core';
import { PopoverWidths } from 'enum/PopoverWidths';
import { Instance } from 'tippy.js';
import { IAutocompleteCore } from './interfaces/IAutocompleteCore';
import { DOMManager } from 'utils/helpers/domManager';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-autocomplete-core',
  styleUrl: 'aq-autocomplete-core.scss',
})
export class AqAutocompleteCore implements IAutocompleteCore {
  @Prop() type: 'input' | 'button' = 'input';
  @Prop() popoverWidth: PopoverWidths | number = PopoverWidths.AUTO;
  @Prop() allowSelectAll = false;
  @Prop() isMultiple = false;
  @Prop() isMaxSelected = false;
  @Prop() items: IAutocompleteCore['items'] = [];
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) iconDisclosure = '';
  @Prop() disabledAllOptions = false;
  @Prop() cleanOnEscape = false;
  @Prop() filter = '';
  @Prop() maxShowSelected = 2;
  @Prop() maxSelect = 2;
  @Prop() isReadonly = false;
  @Prop() closeOnSelect = false;
  @Prop() showCheckbox = false;
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() isLoading = false;
  @Prop() infoBanner = {
    title: '',
    message: '',
    state: '',
    visible: false,
    close: true,
  };
  @Prop() filterPropertyName = 'text';
  @Prop() showRadio = false;
  @Prop() noResultsText = '';
  @Prop() showAllItems = false;
  @Prop() selectDefault = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) selectedItems: any[] = []; // Recibe del padre
  @Prop() activatorElement = null;
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value: { options: any[], disabled: boolean, disabledLocal: boolean, value: string }; // Recibe del padre
  
  @Prop() hasHelperText = false;
  // 
  isAllSelected: boolean;
  keyVirtualScrollList: number;
  //
  @State() popoverConfig = {
    hideOnClick: false,
    hideOnClickOutside: true,
    interactive: true,
    appendTo: document.body,
  };
  @State() localItems: any[] = [];
  @State() renderItemsArray: any[] = [];
  @State() popoverInstance: Instance;
  @State() footer = false;
  @State() localMaxSelect;
  @State() placement: IAutocompleteCore['placement'] = 'bottom-start';

  @State() useSlotted = false;
  @State() slottedContent: HTMLElement[];

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @Event() aqSelections: EventEmitter<any>;
  @Event() updateMaxSelect: EventEmitter<any>;
  @Event() aqInstancePopover: EventEmitter<any>;
  @Event() showPopover: EventEmitter<boolean>;

  @Watch('value')
  onValueChange(newValue, oldVal) {
    if(!newValue?.value) return;
    if(newValue?.value === oldVal?.value) return;

    const value = this.renderItemsArray.findIndex(selected => selected.value === this.value.value);
    this.handleSelection(this.renderItemsArray[value]);
  }
  @Watch('localItems')
  onLocalItemsChange(newItems) {
    this.renderItemsArray = newItems.map(item => ({ ...item }));
  }
  @Watch('items')
  onItemsChange(newItems) {
    this.localItems = newItems.map(item => ({ ...item }));
    this.normalizeInputData();
  }
  @Watch('filter')
  onFilterChange(newVal: string, oldVal: string) {
    if (newVal === oldVal) return;
    this.applyFilter();
  }

  @Listen('keydown', { target: 'window' })
  handleEscape(event: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (event.key === 'Escape' && this.cleanOnEscape) {
      this.popoverInstance?.hide();
      this.iconDisclosure = 'aq-icon-chevron-down';
    }
  }

  getSlot() {
    const content = this.el.querySelector('[slot="content"]') as HTMLSlotElement;
    if (content) {
      this.useSlotted = true;
      const domManager = new DOMManager();
      const elements = domManager.filterValidChilds(content.childNodes);
      this.slottedContent = elements;
    }
  }
  
  normalizeInputData() {
    if(!this.useSlotted) return;
    if(this.useSlotted && this.items.length < 1) return;

    this.localItems = this.slottedContent.map((el, i) => ({
      el,
      ...this.localItems[i]
    }));
  }

  @Method()
  async handleSelection(item: { options: any[], disabled: boolean, disabledLocal: boolean, value: string }, ancestors?, onlySelect = false) {
    if(!item) return;
    if (item?.disabled || item?.disabledLocal) return;
    
    const simulatedSelectedItems = [...this.selectedItems];
    if(!this.isMultiple && JSON.stringify(item) === JSON.stringify(simulatedSelectedItems[0])) return;

    const index = simulatedSelectedItems.findIndex(selected => selected.value === item.value);
    const hasOptions = !!item.options;

    if (index === -1) {
      if (hasOptions) {
        const allowedItems = this.maxSelect - simulatedSelectedItems.length;

        if (item.options.length <= allowedItems)
          this.updateMaxSelect.emit(1);
      }

      simulatedSelectedItems.push(item);
      this.aqSelections.emit({ item: { ...item } });

    } else if (!onlySelect) {
      if (hasOptions && this.localMaxSelect > this.maxSelect) {
        this.updateMaxSelect.emit(-1);
      }

      simulatedSelectedItems.splice(index, 1);
      this.aqSelections.emit({ item: { ...item } });
    }

    if (ancestors && this.isMultiple) {
      for (let i = ancestors.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        const currentAncestor = ancestors[i];
        const allChildrenSelected = currentAncestor.options.every(child => {
          return simulatedSelectedItems.some(selected => selected.value === child.value)
        }
        );

        if (!item?.options || item?.options.length <= this.maxSelect) {
          if (allChildrenSelected) {
            this.updateMaxSelect.emit(1);
            if (!simulatedSelectedItems.some(selected => selected.value === currentAncestor.value)) {
              this.aqSelections.emit({ ...currentAncestor });
              simulatedSelectedItems.push(currentAncestor);
            }
          } else {
            const ancestorIndex = simulatedSelectedItems.findIndex(selected => selected.value === currentAncestor.value);
            if (ancestorIndex !== -1) {
              this.updateMaxSelect.emit(-1);
              this.aqSelections.emit({ item: { ...currentAncestor }, mode: 'deselectAncestorOnly' });
              simulatedSelectedItems.splice(ancestorIndex, 1);
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.localItems = this.items.map(item => ({ ...item }));

    this.localMaxSelect = this.maxSelect;
    this.getSlot();
    this.normalizeInputData();
    this.renderItemsArray = this.localItems;
    
    this.onValueChange(this.value, { value: '' })
  }

  @Event() aqinstancePopover: EventEmitter<any>;

  get getPopoverConfig() {
    return {
      ...this.popoverConfig,
      placement: this.placement,
      maxWidth: 'auto',
      offset: [0, 4],
      interactive: true,
      hideOnClickOutside: true,
      onHide: instance => {
        this.showPopover.emit(false);
        this.aqinstancePopover.emit(instance);
      },
      onMount: instance => {
        this.aqinstancePopover.emit(instance);
        if (this.isDisabled || this.isReadonly || this.isLoading) {
          instance?.disable();
        }
      },
    };
  }
  get getInfoBanner() {
    if (this.isMultiple && this.selectedItems.length === this.maxSelect) {
      return <aq-banner
        titleBanner={this.infoBanner.title}
        state={this.infoBanner.state as 'warning' | 'info' | 'success' | 'danger'}
        value={this.infoBanner.visible}
        hasCloseIcon={this.infoBanner.close}
      >
        {this.infoBanner.message}
      </aq-banner>
    }
  }

  private selectDeselectAll(itemsArray: IAutocompleteCore['items'], isAllSelected: boolean) {
    if (!this.isMultiple) return;

    this.isAllSelected = isAllSelected;
    const currentSelectedItems = [...itemsArray];

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      currentSelectedItems.forEach((item) => {
        this.aqSelections.emit({ ...item });
      });
    })
  }

  // Handle filter functions
  private getHighlightedText(text: string, filter: string) {
    if (!filter) return text;

    const trimmedFilter = filter.trim();
    if (!trimmedFilter) return text;

    const regex = new RegExp(`(${trimmedFilter})(\\s)?`, "gi");

    return text.replace(regex, (_, p1, p2) => {
      const strong = `<strong style='font-weight:700;'>${p1}</strong>`;
      const space = p2 ? '&nbsp;' : '';
      return `${strong}${space}`;
    });
  }
  private applyFilter() {
    if (!this.filter) {
      this.renderItemsArray = this.localItems.map(item => ({ ...item }));
      return;
    }
    const filterLower = this.filter.toLowerCase();
    const filterItems = (items) => {
      return items
        .map(item => {
          if (!item) return null;

          const matches = item[this.filterPropertyName]?.toLowerCase().includes(filterLower);
          if (item.options) {
            const filteredOptions = filterItems(item.options);
            if (!matches && filteredOptions.length === 0) return null;
            return {
              ...item,
              options: filteredOptions,
              highlightedText: this.getHighlightedText(item[this.filterPropertyName], this.filter)
            };
          }
          return matches ? {
            ...item,
            highlightedText: this.getHighlightedText(item[this.filterPropertyName], this.filter)
          } : null;
        })
        .filter(Boolean);
    };

    this.renderItemsArray = filterItems(this.localItems);
    if (this.renderItemsArray.length === 0) {
      this.renderItemsArray = [{ [this.filterPropertyName]: this.noResultsText, isNoResults: true, disabled: true }];
    }
  }

  private renderDivider() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-autocomplete__divider">
        <aq-divider orientation="horizontal"></aq-divider>
      </div>
    )
  }
  renderItems(item, level = 1, isSelected = false, ancestors: any[] = []) {
    if (item.isDivider) return this.renderDivider();

    const isSelectedItem = isSelected || !!this.selectedItems.some(selected => selected.value === item.value);
    const source = { isSelected: isSelectedItem }

    if (this.disabledAllOptions || (!isSelectedItem && this.isMaxSelected))
      item = { ...item, disabledLocal: true }

    return <div>
      <aq-autocomplete-item
        paddingItem={`calc(${level} * 1rem)`}
        onClick={() => this.handleSelection(item, ancestors)}
        isDisabled={item.disabled || item.disabledLocal}
        isNoResults={item.isNoResults}
        isMultiselect={this.isMultiple}
        source={source}
      >
        {
          this.isMultiple && this.showCheckbox &&
          <aq-checkbox
            isChecked={isSelectedItem}
            isDisabled={item.disabledLocal || item.disabled}
            indeterminate={item.indeterminate}
            value={isSelectedItem}
            label={
              <span class="aq-autocomplete-item__text"
                innerHTML={item?.highlightedText || item?.text}>
              </span>
            }>
          </aq-checkbox>
        }
        {
          !this.showCheckbox &&
          <span innerHTML={item?.highlightedText || item?.text}></span>
        }
        {
          !this.isMultiple && this.showRadio &&
          <aq-radio
            style={{ width: `auto` }}
            isChecked={isSelectedItem}
            idRadio="radio-autocomplete"
            name="radio-autocomplete"
            isDisabled={item.disabledLocal || item.disabled}
            label={<span class="aq-autocomplete-item__text" innerHTML={item?.highlightedText || item?.text}></span>}
            value={item?.text}
            valueRadio={item?.text}
          >
          </aq-radio>
        }
      </aq-autocomplete-item>
      {
        item.options && item.options.map(option =>
          this.renderItems(option, level + 1, false, [...ancestors, item])
        )
      }
    </div>
  }
  private getContent(item: any) {
    const isSelectedItem = !!this.selectedItems.some(selected => selected.value === item.value);
    const source = { isSelected: isSelectedItem }
    if(this.useSlotted && this.renderItemsArray.length > 0) {
      return (
        <div>
          <aq-autocomplete-item
            onClick={() => this.handleSelection(item)}
            isDisabled={item.disabled || item.disabledLocal}
            source={source}
            isNoResults={item.isNoResults}
          >
            {
              !item.isNoResults &&
              <div
                ref={(el) => {
                  if (el) {
                    el.innerHTML = '';
                    el.appendChild(item.el);
                  }
                }}
              >
              </div>
            }
            {
              item.isNoResults &&
              <span innerHTML={item?.text}></span>
            }
          </aq-autocomplete-item>
        </div>
      )
    }
    return (
      <div>
        {this.renderItems(item)}
      </div>
    )
  }

  hasPopoverFooterSlot(el: Element) {
    this.footer = !!el.querySelector('[slot="footer"]');
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host>
        <aq-popover
          trigger={this.activatorElement}
          slot="popover"
          ref={el => this.hasPopoverFooterSlot(el)}
          config={{ ...this.getPopoverConfig as any }}
          onAqshow={e => {
            this.popoverInstance = e.detail;
            this.aqInstancePopover.emit(this.popoverInstance);
            this.showPopover.emit(true);
          }}
          disabled={this.isDisabled || this.isReadonly || this.isLoading}
        >
          {
            <virtual-scroll-list
              items={this.renderItemsArray}
              renderItem={(item) => {
                return (
                  this.getContent(item)
                );
              }}
              estimatedItemHeight={30}
              maxRenderCount={20}
              showAllItems={this.showAllItems}
              width={this.popoverWidth}
            >
              <slot name="header" slot="header"></slot>
              <div style={{ display: this.infoBanner.visible ? 'block' : 'none', width: "100%" }}>
                {this.getInfoBanner}
              </div>
              {
                this.allowSelectAll && this.isMultiple && <div class="aq-list-menu__header_all">
                  <aq-button isDisabled={this.isAllSelected} onClick={() => this.selectDeselectAll(this.localItems, true)}>Select All</aq-button>
                  <aq-button isDisabled={!this.isAllSelected} onClick={() => this.selectDeselectAll(this.selectedItems, false)}>Deselect All</aq-button>
                </div>
              }
            </virtual-scroll-list>
          }
          { this.footer && <aq-divider orientation="horizontal"></aq-divider> }
          <div class="aq-autocomplete__footer-container">
            <slot name="footer"></slot>
          </div>
        </aq-popover>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-autocomplete/aq-autocomplete-core/interfaces/IAutocompleteCore.ts
================================================
import { ComponentInterface } from '@stencil/core';
import { IPopover } from 'interfaces/common/IPopoverConfig';
import { PopoverWidths } from 'enum/PopoverWidths';
import { Instance, Placement } from 'tippy.js';

export interface IAutocompleteCore extends ComponentInterface {
  type: 'input' | 'button';
  popoverWidth: PopoverWidths | number;
  allowSelectAll: boolean;
  isMultiple: boolean;
  items: Items[];
  iconDisclosure: string;
  disabledAllOptions: boolean;
  cleanOnEscape: boolean;
  maxShowSelected: number;
  maxSelect: number;
  isReadonly: boolean;
  closeOnSelect: boolean;
  showCheckbox: boolean;
  isDisabled: boolean;
  isLoading: boolean;
  infoBanner: {
    title: string;
    message: string;
    state: string;
    visible: boolean;
    close: boolean;
  };
  showRadio: boolean;
  noResultsText: string;
  showAllItems: boolean;
  
  selectDefault: boolean;

  activatorElement: HTMLElement | null;
  popoverConfig: IPopover | any;
  placement: Placement;
  popoverInstance: Instance;
  localItems: any[];
  isAllSelected: boolean;
  selectedItems: any[];
  keyVirtualScrollList: number;

  el: HTMLElement;
}

interface Items {
  value: number | string;
  text: string;
  tagConfig?: {
    tagWidth: number;
    tagIcon: string;
    tagColor: string;
  };
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-autocomplete/aq-autocomplete-host/aq-autocomplete.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, State, Element, Watch, Listen, Event, EventEmitter } from '@stencil/core';
import { IAutocompleteCore } from 'components';
import { PopoverWidths } from 'enum/PopoverWidths';
import { Instance } from 'tippy.js';
import { AqEvent, emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { Label } from 'utils/helpers/label';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-autocomplete',
  styleUrl: 'aq-autocomplete.scss',
})
export class AqAutocomplete {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value: any; // string or autocomplete item type
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) items = [];
  @Prop() returnMode: 'originalObject' | 'keys' = 'originalObject';
  @Prop() type: 'input' | 'button' = 'input';
  @Prop() closeOnSelect = false;
  @Prop() cleanOnEscape = false;
  @Prop() hasClear = true;
  
  // TODO revisar el disabled, cuando se quita/pone se pierde la ref del popover
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() isReadonly = false;
  @Prop() isError = false;
  @Prop() isPlain = false;
  @Prop() isLoading = false;
  @Prop() selectDefault = false;
  @Prop() showRadio = false;
  @Prop() disabledAllOptions = false;
  
  // TODO revisar el isMultiple, cuando se quita/pone se pierde la ref del popover
  @Prop() isMultiple = false;
  @Prop() maxShowSelected = 2;
  @Prop() maxSelect = 2;
  @Prop() filterPropertyName = 'text';
  @Prop() cleanFilterOnSelect = false;
  @Prop() showBadgeCounter = false;
  @Prop() showSelectedCounter = false;
  @Prop() allowSelectAll = false;
  @Prop() showCheckbox = false;
  @Prop() selectionInfoBanner = {
    title: 'Banner title',
    message: '<Reached max allowed selection> message.',
    state: 'warning',
    visible: false,
    close: true,
  };

  @Prop() autocomplete: 'on' | 'off' = 'off';
  @Prop() idParent = '';
  @Prop() placeholder = '';
  @Prop() helperText = '';
  @Prop() sublabel = '';
  @Prop() icon = '';

  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() isRequired = false;
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';
  @Prop() info = '';

  @Prop() popoverWidth: PopoverWidths | number = PopoverWidths.AUTO;
  @Prop() fontSizeSelectedOption = '0.875rem';
  @Prop() noResultsText = 'No results';

  @State() showAllItems = false;
  @State() popoverInstance: Instance;
  @State() textfieldValue = '';
  @State() filter = '';
  @State() hasDisclosure = true;
  @State() iconDisclosure: string = 'aq-icon-chevron-down';
  @State() selectedItems: any[] = [];
  @State() activatorElement = null;
  @State() localMaxSelect = this.maxSelect;

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;
  @Event() itemSelection: EventEmitter;

  private labelHelper = Label(this);

  @Watch('value')
  watchValue(newVal, oldVal) {
    if(JSON.stringify(newVal) === JSON.stringify(oldVal)) return;

    emitEvent('change', this.el, { value: this.value });
    emitEvent('input', this.el, { value: this.value });
    this.itemSelection.emit(this.value);
  }
  @Watch('maxSelect')
  watchMaxSelect(newVal: number) {
    this.localMaxSelect = newVal;
  }
  @Watch('disabledAllOptions')
  watchItems() {
    this.items = [...this.items]
  }
  @Listen('keydown', { target: 'window' })
  async onCleanOnEscape(event: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (event.key === 'Escape' && this.cleanOnEscape ) {
      await this.clearTextFieldInput();      
      this.selectedItems = [...[]]
      this.value = '';      
      emitEvent('input', this.el, { value: this.value });
    }
  }

  handleInput(event: AqEvent) {
    this.filter = event.detail.value;
  }

  // Handle prop based functitons
  async clearTextFieldInput() {
    const activatorField = this.isMultiple
      ? this.el.querySelector('aq-tag-field')
      : this.el.querySelector('aq-text-field');

    if (activatorField && activatorField.clearInput) {
      await activatorField.clearInput();
    }
    this.filter = '';
  }
  async validateCleanFilterOnSelect() {
    if (this.cleanFilterOnSelect) {
      await this.clearTextFieldInput();
    }
  }
  
  // Badge
  private setBadge() {
    const tagField = this.el.querySelector('.aq-tag-field__input');
    const badge = this.el.querySelector('#aq-autocomplete-badge');

    if (tagField && badge)
      tagField.after(badge);

    return !!tagField && !!badge && this.selectedItems.length > 0;
  }
  get getBadge() {
    return <span id="aq-autocomplete-badge">{this.setBadge() && this.showBadgeCounter && this.isMultiple &&
      <aq-badge>{this.selectedItems.length}</aq-badge>}</span>
  }

  // Is Loading
  private setSpinner() {
    const currentField = this.isMultiple ? this.el.querySelector('.aq-tag-field__input')
      : this.el.querySelector('.aq-text-field__input');
    const spinner = this.el.querySelector('#aq-autocomplete-spinner');

    if (currentField && spinner)
      currentField.after(spinner);

    return !!currentField && !!spinner;
  }
  get loadingSpinner() {
    return <span id="aq-autocomplete-spinner" style={{ position: "absolute", right: "-3%" }}>{
        this.isLoading && this.setSpinner() &&
        <span class="aq-autocomplete__spinner">Spinner</span>
      }</span>
  }

  // Popover instance
  handleInstancePopover(e: any) {
    this.popoverInstance = e.detail;
    if (this.popoverInstance.state.isShown)
      this.iconDisclosure = 'aq-icon-chevron-down';
    else
      this.iconDisclosure = 'aq-icon-chevron-up';
  }
  validateCloseOnSelect() {
    if (this.closeOnSelect)
      this.popoverInstance?.hide();
  }

  // Emitted value
  updateValue() {
    let value = null;
    
    if (this.returnMode === 'keys') {
      value = this.isMultiple
      ? this.selectedItems.map(item => item.value)
      : this.selectedItems[0]?.value ?? null;
    } else if(this.returnMode === 'originalObject') {
      value = this.isMultiple
      ? this.selectedItems
      : this.selectedItems[0] ?? null;
    }

    this.value = value;
  }


  // Handle input events
  handleClear(e: AqEvent) {
    if (this.disabledAllOptions) return;
    
    this.clearTextFieldInput();
    
    this.textfieldValue = '';
    this.selectedItems = [];
    this.value = '';
    emitEvent('input', this.el, { value: this.value }, e);
  }
  // Tag field
  getAncestors(item) {
    const ancestors = [];
    const findParent = (currentItem, items) => {
      for (const parent of items) {
        if (parent.options?.some(opt => opt.value === currentItem.value)) {
          ancestors.push(parent);
          findParent(parent, this.items);
          break;
        }
        if (parent.options) {
          findParent(currentItem, parent.options);
        }
      }
    };

    findParent(item, this.items);
    return ancestors.reverse();
  }
  async handleCloseTag(item: any) {
    const core = this.el.querySelector('aq-autocomplete-core');
    if (!core)
      return;
  
    const ancestors = this.getAncestors(item);
    
    requestAnimationFrame(async() => {
      const isAlreadySelected = this.selectedItems.some(selected => selected.value === item.value);
      if(isAlreadySelected)
        await core.handleSelection(item, ancestors);
    })
  }

  private handleMaxSelect(e: CustomEvent) {
    if(e.detail === 0) this.localMaxSelect = this.maxSelect;
    else this.localMaxSelect += e.detail;
  }

  private getIsMaxSelectedReached() {
    return this.isMultiple && this.selectedItems.length === this.localMaxSelect;
  }

  // Handle item selection
  private handleSelection(payload: { item: IAutocompleteCore['item'], mode: 'default' | 'deselectAncestorOnly' }) {
    const item = payload.item ?? payload;
    const mode = payload.mode ?? 'default';

    if (item.disabled || item.disabledLocal) return;

    if (this.isMultiple) {
      const isAlreadySelected = this.selectedItems.some(selected => selected.value === item.value);
      if (isAlreadySelected) {
        // TODO If ancestor was selected -> -1 in maxSelected
        this.selectedItems = this.selectedItems.filter(selected => selected.value !== item.value);
        if (mode !== 'deselectAncestorOnly' && item.options) {
          const removeChildren = (options) => {
            options.forEach(child => {
              this.selectedItems = this.selectedItems.filter(selected => selected.value !== child.value);
              if (child.options) removeChildren(child.options);
            });
          };
          removeChildren(item.options);
        }
      }
      
      if(!isAlreadySelected && this.selectedItems.length < this.localMaxSelect) {
        if(!item?.options || item?.options.length <= this.localMaxSelect) {
          this.selectedItems = [...this.selectedItems, item];
        }
        if (item.options) {
          const addChildren = (options) => {
            options.forEach(child => {
              requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                if(this.selectedItems.length < this.localMaxSelect) {
                  if (!this.selectedItems.some(selected => selected.value === child.value)) {
                    this.selectedItems = [...this.selectedItems, child];
                  }
                  if (child.options) addChildren(child.options);
                }
              })
            });
          };
          addChildren(item.options);
        }
      }

      this.selectedItems = [...this.selectedItems]
    }

    if(!this.isMultiple) {
      this.selectedItems = [item];
    }

    if (this.closeOnSelect && !this.isMultiple) {
      this.popoverInstance?.hide();
    }
  }
  validateClick(item: any) {
    if(this.isMultiple) {
      this.handleSelection(item)
    }
    
    if(!this.isMultiple) {
      const currentItem = item.item;
      this.selectedItems = [currentItem];
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        this.textfieldValue = currentItem.text;
      })
    }

    this.validateCloseOnSelect();
    this.validateCleanFilterOnSelect();
    this.updateValue();
  }
  handleSelectedItems(item: any) {
    this.validateClick(item);
  }

  private validateFontSizeSelectedOption() {
    // const currentField = this.isMultiple ? this.el.querySelector('.aq-tag-field__input')
    //   : this.el.querySelector('.aq-text-field__input');

    // if (currentField) {
    //   const fieldElement = currentField as HTMLElement;
    //   fieldElement.classList.add(this.fontSizeSelectedOption);
    // }
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    if(Array.isArray(this.value)) {
      this.value.forEach(element => {
        const selectedValue = this.items.findIndex((el) => el.value === element.value)
        this.handleSelectedItems({ item: this.items[selectedValue] })
      })
    }
  }
  componentDidRender(): void {
    this.validateFontSizeSelectedOption()

    if (!this.activatorElement || this.activatorElement !== this.activatorElement) {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        this.showAllItems = false;
        const activator = this.isMultiple ? this.el.querySelector('.aq-tag-field__container') : this.el.querySelector('.aq-text-field__container');
        if (activator) {
          this.activatorElement = activator;
        }
        
        if (this.type === 'button') {
          const input = activator.querySelector('input');
          input.type = 'button';
          input.style.cursor = 'pointer';
          input.style.textAlign = 'justify';
          if (this.selectDefault) {
            this.handleSelectedItems({ item: this.items[0] });
          }
        }
      });
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <div class="aq-autocomplete">
        {
          this.label &&
          <aq-label {...this.labelHelper.bindsLabel}><span slot="text">{this.label}</span></aq-label>
        }

        {!this.isMultiple && (
          <aq-text-field
            value={this.textfieldValue}
            autocomplete={this.autocomplete}
            placeholder={this.placeholder}
            sublabel={this.sublabel}
            icon={this.icon}
            helperText={this.helperText}
            isDisabled={this.isDisabled || this.isLoading}
            isPlain={this.isPlain}
            isError={this.isError}
            isReadonly={this.isReadonly}
            hasDisclosure={this.hasDisclosure && !this.isLoading}
            iconDisclosure={this.iconDisclosure}
            hasClear={this.hasClear}
            showClearOnHover={true}
            onInput={(e) => this.handleInput(e)}
            onClear={(e) => this.handleClear(e)}
          >
            <slot name="left-content" slot="left-content"></slot>
          </aq-text-field>
        )}

        {this.isMultiple && (
          <aq-tag-field
            mode="object"
            allowUserCreateTags={false}
            value={this.selectedItems}
            autocomplete={this.autocomplete}
            placeholder={this.placeholder}
            sublabel={this.sublabel}
            icon={this.icon}
            helperText={this.helperText}
            isDisabled={this.isDisabled || this.isLoading}
            isPlain={this.isPlain}
            isError={this.isError}
            isReadonly={this.isReadonly}
            showSelectedCounter={this.showSelectedCounter}
            maxSelect={this.maxSelect}
            maxShowSelected={this.maxShowSelected}
            hasClear
            onInput={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
            onChange={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
            onTextChange={(e) => this.handleInput(e)}
            onClearAllValues={(e) => this.handleClear(e)}
            onCloseTag={async (e) => await this.handleCloseTag(e.detail.value)}
          >
            {
              !this.isLoading &&
              <span slot="right" class={this.iconDisclosure} style={{ color: "var(--color-paper-base)" }}></span>
            }
          </aq-tag-field>
        )}

        { this.getBadge }
        { this.loadingSpinner }

        <aq-autocomplete-core
          activatorElement={this.activatorElement}
          selectDefault={this.selectDefault}
          isDisabled={this.isDisabled || this.isLoading}
          type={this.type}
          popoverWidth={this.popoverWidth}
          allowSelectAll={this.allowSelectAll}
          isMultiple={this.isMultiple}
          items={this.items}
          selectedItems={this.selectedItems}
          cleanOnEscape={this.cleanOnEscape}
          iconDisclosure={this.iconDisclosure}
          disabledAllOptions={this.disabledAllOptions}
          maxSelect={this.localMaxSelect}
          isReadonly={this.isReadonly}
          closeOnSelect={this.closeOnSelect}
          showCheckbox={this.showCheckbox}
          value={this.value}
          infoBanner={
            {
              ...this.selectionInfoBanner,
              visible: this.getIsMaxSelectedReached()
            }
          }
          isMaxSelected={this.getIsMaxSelectedReached()}
          showRadio={this.showRadio}
          noResultsText={this.noResultsText}
          isLoading={this.isLoading}
          filter={this.filter}
          showAllItems={this.showAllItems}
          onAqInstancePopover={(e) => this.handleInstancePopover(e)}
          onAqSelections={(e) => this.handleSelectedItems(e.detail)}
          onUpdateMaxSelect={(e) => this.handleMaxSelect(e)}
          filterPropertyName={this.filterPropertyName}
          hasHelperText={!!this.helperText}
        >
          <slot slot="header" name="header" />
          <slot slot="footer" name="footer" />
          <slot slot="content" name="content" />
        </aq-autocomplete-core>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

import { Component, ComponentInterface, Element, h, Prop } from '@stencil/core';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-autocomplete-item',
  styleUrl: 'aq-autocomplete-item.scss',
})
export class AqAutocompleteItem implements ComponentInterface {
  
  @Prop() isMultiselect = false;
  @Prop() paddingItem = ''
  @Prop() source = { isSelected: false };
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() isNoResults = false;
  
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;
  
  private getStyleClass() {
    return {
      'aq-autocomplete-item': true,
      'aq-autocomplete-item--no-results': this.isNoResults,
      'aq-autocomplete-item--disabled': this.isDisabled,
      'aq-autocomplete-item--multiselect': this.isMultiselect,
      'aq-autocomplete-item--selected': this.source.isSelected,
    }
  }

  render() {
    const getStyleClass = this.getStyleClass();
    return (
      <div class={getStyleClass} style={{
        paddingLeft: this.paddingItem,
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'space-between',
        minWidth: 'fit-content',
      }}>
        <slot></slot>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-autocomplete/virtual-scroll-list/virtual-scroll-list.tsx
================================================
import { Host, Element, State, Prop, Component, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { PopoverWidths } from 'enum/PopoverWidths';
import { DOMManager } from 'utils/helpers/domManager';

@Component({
  tag: 'virtual-scroll-list',
  styleUrl: 'virtual-scroll-list.scss',
  scoped: true,
})
export class VirtualScrollList {
  @Prop() items: any[] = [];
  @Prop() renderItem: (item: any) => any;
  @Prop() estimatedItemHeight: number = 30;
  @Prop() maxRenderCount: number = 20;
  @Prop() width: PopoverWidths | number = PopoverWidths.DEFAULT;
  @Prop() showAllItems: boolean = false;
  @Prop() flagSelector: boolean = false;

  @State() scrollTop: number = 0;
  @State() viewportHeight: number = 300;
  @Element() hostEl!: HTMLElement;
  @State() currentVisibleItems: any[] = [];
  @State() minimunWidth: any = 0;
  @State() widthPopover: number = 0;
  @State() cachedMultiItemWidth: number = 0;
  @State() keyVirtualScrollList: number = 0;
  @State() heightDefault: number = 32;
  @State() visibleItmesDefault: number = 11;
  @State() widthVirtual = 0;

  @State() slottedContent: HTMLElement[];

  private scrollContainer!: HTMLElement;

  connectedCallback() {
    this.hostEl.addEventListener('scroll', this.handleScroll);
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    this.hostEl.removeEventListener('scroll', this.handleScroll);
  }
  componentDidLoad() {
    this.scrollContainer = this.hostEl.querySelector('.sc-virtual-list');

    if (this.scrollContainer)
      this.scrollContainer.addEventListener('scroll', this.handleScroll);
    
    const content = this.scrollContainer.querySelector('[slot="content"]') as HTMLSlotElement;
    if (content) {
      const domManager = new DOMManager();
      const elements = domManager.filterValidChilds(content.childNodes);
      this.slottedContent = elements;
    }
  }

  componentDidRender() {
    const newWidth = Number(this.getWidth());
    const newScrollTop = this.scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      if (this.widthVirtual !== newWidth) {
        this.widthVirtual = newWidth;
      }
      if (this.scrollTop !== newScrollTop) {
        this.scrollTop = newScrollTop;
      }
    });
  }

  private handleScroll = (ev: Event) => {
    const target = ev.target as HTMLElement;
    const maxScroll = target.scrollHeight - target.clientHeight - 5;
    if (target.scrollTop > maxScroll) {
      target.scrollTop = maxScroll;
    }
    this.scrollTop = target?.scrollTop;
  };

  private getVisibleItems() {
    
    const { scrollTop, estimatedItemHeight } = this;

    const useSlotted = !this.items?.length && this.slottedContent?.length > 0;
    const totalItems = useSlotted ? this.slottedContent : this.items;

    const startIndex = Math.floor(scrollTop / estimatedItemHeight);
    const endIndex = Math.min(totalItems.length, startIndex + this.maxRenderCount);

    const visibleItems = totalItems.slice(startIndex, this.showAllItems ? totalItems.length : endIndex);
    return visibleItems;
  }

  private countOptions = item => {
    let count = 0;
    if (item.options) {
      count += item.options.length;
      item.options.forEach(option => {
        count += this.countOptions(option);
      });
    }
    return count;
  };

  private calculateHeight = (items: any[]): number => {
    let totalHeight = 0;
    for (const item of items) {
      totalHeight += item.isDivider ? 10 : this.estimatedItemHeight;
      if (item.options && Array.isArray(item.options)) {
        totalHeight += this.calculateHeight(item.options);
      }
    }
    return this.showAllItems ? totalHeight : totalHeight + 10;
  };

  private getWidth() {
    if (this.width && this.width == 'full') {
      const popover = this.hostEl.closest('aq-popover');
      const autocomplete = popover?.querySelector('aq-autocomplete') || popover?.closest('aq-autocomplete') || this.hostEl.closest('aq-autocomplete');
      if (autocomplete) {
        const width = autocomplete?.getBoundingClientRect()?.width;
        const widthPopover = width ? width : 300;
        this.widthPopover = widthPopover;
        return widthPopover;
      }
    }
    if (this.width && this.width == 'auto') {
      const container = this.hostEl.querySelector('.sc-virtual-list');
      const children = Array.from(container?.children || []);
      const widthVirtualList = [];
      let widthVirtual = 0;
      children.forEach(child => {
        const aqAutocompleteItem = child.querySelector('aq-autocomplete-item');
        if (aqAutocompleteItem) {
          const aqAutocompleteItemRect = aqAutocompleteItem?.children[0]?.getBoundingClientRect() || { width: 0 };
          const aqAutocompleteItems = child.querySelectorAll('aq-autocomplete-item');
          if (aqAutocompleteItems.length > 1) {
            if (this.cachedMultiItemWidth === 0) {
              let totalWidth = 0;
              aqAutocompleteItems.forEach(item => {
                totalWidth = Math.max(totalWidth, item.getBoundingClientRect().width);
              });
              this.cachedMultiItemWidth = totalWidth;
            }
            widthVirtualList.push(this.cachedMultiItemWidth);
          } else {
            widthVirtualList.push(aqAutocompleteItemRect.width + 30);
          }
        }
        widthVirtual = Math.max(...widthVirtualList);
      });
      return widthVirtual;
    } else {
      return this.width;
    }
  }

  private getPositions(visibleItems: any[]): { item: any; top: number }[] {
    let space = 0;
    let totalOptions = 0;
    const scrolledStartIndex = Math.floor(this.scrollTop / this.estimatedItemHeight);
    return visibleItems.map((item, i) => {
      if (visibleItems[i - 1]) {
        totalOptions += this.countOptions(visibleItems[i - 1]);
      }
      const index = i + scrolledStartIndex;
      const top = (index - space + totalOptions) * this.estimatedItemHeight;
      return { item, top };
    });
  }
  render() {
    const visibleItems = this.getVisibleItems();
    const positionedItems = this.getPositions(visibleItems);
    
    const useSlotted = !this.items?.length && this.slottedContent?.length;

    let height = this.viewportHeight;
    if (visibleItems.length < this.visibleItmesDefault) {
      height = this.calculateHeight(this.items);
    }
    
    const widthVirtual = Number(this.getWidth());
    const widthVirtualList = this.widthPopover == 0 ? (Number(widthVirtual) < 40 ? 40 : widthVirtual) : this.widthPopover;
    const withFinaly = this.flagSelector ? Number(widthVirtualList) + 15 : Number(widthVirtualList) + 20;
    if (visibleItems.length === 1) {
      height = this.heightDefault;
    }
    return (
      <Host style={{ display: "block", width: `${withFinaly}px`, overflow: "hidden" }}>
        <div style={{ width: `${withFinaly}px` }}>
          <slot name="header"></slot>
          <div class="sc-virtual-list" style={{ height: `${height}px` }}>
            {
              <div style={{ display: 'none' }}>
                <slot slot="content" name="content" />
              </div>
            }
            {
              useSlotted && (
                positionedItems.map(({ item, top }) => (
                  <div
                    class="virtual-item"
                    style={{
                      position: 'absolute',
                      top: `${top}px`,
                      height: `${this.estimatedItemHeight}px`
                    }}
                    ref={(el) => {
                      if (el) {
                        el.innerHTML = '';
                        el.appendChild(item);
                      }
                    }}
                  >
                  </div>
                ))
              )
            }

            {
              !useSlotted &&
              positionedItems.map(({ item, top }, i) => {
                const isDivider = item.isDivider;
                return (
                  <div
                    key={item.id || i}
                    class="virtual-item"
                    style={{
                      top: `${top}px`,
                      height: isDivider ? '0px' : `${this.estimatedItemHeight}px`,
                    }}
                  >
                    {this.renderItem(item)}
                  </div>
                );
              })
            }
            <div style={{ height: '20px' }}></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-checkbox/aq-checkbox/aq-checkbox.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Element, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { ICheckbox } from './interfaces/ICheckbox';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-checkbox',
  styleUrl: 'aq-checkbox.scss',
})
export class AqCheckbox implements ICheckbox {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) value = null;
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) isChecked = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) indeterminate = false;

  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  
  @Prop() icon = '';
  @Prop() info = '';
  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';
  
  @Prop() name = '';
  @Prop() idCheckbox = '';
  @Prop() valueCheckbox = '';

  @Prop() isRequired = false;

  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  @Watch('value')
  syncChecked(newVal: boolean) {
    this.isChecked = newVal !== null && newVal !== undefined ? newVal : this.isChecked;
  }

  private checkboxInput?: HTMLInputElement;

  componentWillLoad() {
    // Prioritize the external value
    this.isChecked = this.value !== null && this.value !== undefined ? this.value : this.isChecked;
  }

  async handleCheckedChange(e: MouseEvent) {
    this.isChecked = this.checkboxInput.checked;
    this.value = this.isChecked;
    this.indeterminate = false;
    emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { checked: this.isChecked, value: this.valueCheckbox }, e);
  }

  get getLabel() {
    return this.label;
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <label class={`aq-checkbox ${this.isDisabled ? 'is-disabled' : ''}`}>
        <input
          type="checkbox"
          class="aq-checkbox__input"
          disabled={this.isDisabled}
          id={this.idCheckbox}
          indeterminate={this.indeterminate}
          name={this.getLabel}
          value={this.valueCheckbox}
          checked={this.isChecked}
          ref={el => (this.checkboxInput = el)}
          onClick={(e) => this.handleCheckedChange(e)}
          onChange={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
        />
        <span class="aq-checkbox__item"></span>
        {
          (this.label || this.icon) &&
          <div class="aq-checkbox__title">
            {this.icon && <em class={`aq-checkbox__icon ${this.icon}`}></em>}
            <span class="aq-checkbox__label">{this.label}</span>
          </div>
        }
        { this.isRequired && <span class="aq-label__required">*</span> }
        {
          !!this.info &&
          <span class="aq-checkbox__tooltip">
            <aq-tooltip config={{ placement: 'top', maxWidth: this.tooltipWidth }}>
              <span> {this.info} </span>
            </aq-tooltip>
            <em class="aq-icon-info-circle" />
          </span>
        }
      </label>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-checkbox/aq-checkbox/interfaces/ICheckbox.ts
================================================
export interface ICheckbox {
  idCheckbox: string;
  name: string;
  icon: string;
  label: string;
  info: string;
  tooltipWidth: string;
  valueCheckbox: string;

  value: boolean;
  indeterminate: boolean;
  isDisabled: boolean;
  isRequired: boolean;

  get getLabel(): string;
  handleCheckedChange: (e: MouseEvent) => Promise<void>;
}

@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/spacing' as spacing;

@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/color' as colors;

.aq-checkbox-button {
  font-family: fonts.$font-family-basic;
  font-size: fonts.$font-size-s;
  font-weight: fonts.$font-weight-semi-bold;
  line-height: fonts.$font-line-height-7;

  border: spacing.$spacing-size-basic solid colors.$color-paper-base;
  border-radius: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
  
  color: colors.$color-ink-base;
  background-color: transparent;

  cursor: pointer;
  padding: calc(spacing.$spacing-size-minor + spacing.$spacing-size-small) spacing.$spacing-size-medium;
  gap: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;

  display: inline-flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;

  transition: .3s;

  &__icon {
    font-size: fonts.$font-size-l;
  }
  
  &:active:not(.is-disabled) {
    box-shadow: box-shadow.$shadow-active;
  }

  &:hover {
    background: colors.$color-paper-lighter;
    box-shadow: box-shadow.$shadow-basic;
  }

  &:focus-visible{
    outline: none;
  }
  
  &:focus,
  &:has(input:focus),
  &:active {
    background: colors.$color-paper-lighter;
    box-shadow: box-shadow.$shadow-focus;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  &.is-disabled {
    pointer-events: none;
    color: colors.$color-paper-base;
    cursor: default;
  }

  &--checked {
    color: colors.$color-primary-base;
    border-color: colors.$color-primary-base;
    
    &:focus,
    &:has(input:focus),
    &:hover,
    &:active:not(.is-disabled) {
      background: colors.$color-primary-lighter;
    }

    &.is-disabled {
      border-color: colors.$color-primary-light;
      background: colors.$color-white;
        
      * { color: colors.$color-primary-light }
    }
  }

  &--vertical {
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: spacing.$spacing-size-short spacing.$spacing-size-moderate;
  }

  .aq-checkbox__item {
    display: none;
  }
  .aq-checkbox__title {
    padding: 0;
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-checkbox/aq-checkbox-button/aq-checkbox-button.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from '../../../../types/StyleClassMap';
import { AqEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { ICheckboxButton } from './interfaces/ICheckboxButton';
import { GroupOrientation } from 'enum/Orientation';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-checkbox-button',
  styleUrl: 'aq-checkbox-button.scss',
})
export class AqCheckboxButton implements ICheckboxButton {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) value = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) isChecked = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) indeterminate = false;

  @Prop() isDisabled = false;

  @Prop() icon = '';
  @Prop() info = '';
  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';

  @Prop() name = '';
  @Prop() idCheckbox = '';
  @Prop() valueCheckbox = '';
  
  @Prop() orientation: ICheckboxButton['orientation'] = GroupOrientation.HORIZONTAL;

  @Watch('value')
  syncChecked(newVal: boolean) {
    if(newVal !== null || newVal !== undefined) this.isChecked = newVal;
  }

  handleAqChange(event: AqEvent) {
    this.isChecked = event.detail.checked;
    this.value = this.isChecked;
    this.indeterminate = false;
  }

  private getTooltip() {
    return (
      this.info && (
        <aq-tooltip config={{ placement: 'top', maxWidth: this.tooltipWidth }}>
          <span>{this.info}</span>
        </aq-tooltip>
      )
    );
  }

  private getCheckboxClassMap(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'is-disabled': this.isDisabled,
      'aq-checkbox-button': true,
      'aq-checkbox-button--checked': this.isChecked,
      [`aq-checkbox-button--${this.orientation}`]: true,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const checkboxClass = this.getCheckboxClassMap();
    const tooltip = this.getTooltip();

    return (
      <label class={checkboxClass}>
        {
          this.icon &&
          <span class={`${this.icon} aq-checkbox-button__icon`}></span>
        }
        {this.label && (
          <aq-checkbox
            value={this.value || this.isChecked}
            isDisabled={this.isDisabled}
            label={this.label}
            name={this.name}
            isChecked={this.isChecked || this.value}
            idCheckbox={this.idCheckbox}
            valueCheckbox={this.valueCheckbox}
            onChange={(event) => this.handleAqChange(event)}
          ></aq-checkbox>
        )}
        {this.info && tooltip}
      </label>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-checkbox/aq-checkbox-card/aq-checkbox-card.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Element, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from '../../../../types/StyleClassMap';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { ICheckboxCard } from './interfaces/ICheckboxCard';
import { GroupOrientationType } from 'types/Orientation';
import { GroupOrientation } from 'enum/Orientation';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-checkbox-card',
  styleUrl: 'aq-checkbox-card.scss',
})
export class AqCheckboxCard implements ICheckboxCard {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) value = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) isChecked = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) indeterminate = false;

  @Prop() isDisabled = false;

  @Prop() icon = '';
  @Prop() subLabel = '';
  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() name = '';
  @Prop() idCheckbox = '';
  @Prop() valueCheckbox = '';

  @Prop() orientation: GroupOrientationType = GroupOrientation.HORIZONTAL;

  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  @Watch('value')
  syncChecked(newVal: boolean) {
    if(newVal !== null || newVal !== undefined) this.isChecked = newVal;
  }

  handleAqChange() {
    this.value = !this.value;
    this.indeterminate = false;
    emitEvent('input', this.hostElement, { checked: this.isChecked, value: this.valueCheckbox });
    emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { checked: this.isChecked, value: this.valueCheckbox });
  }

  private getStyleClassMap(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-checkbox-card': true,
      'is-disabled': this.isDisabled,
      [`aq-checkbox-card--${this.orientation}`]: true,
      'aq-checkbox-card--checked': this.isChecked
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMap();
    return (
      <div class={cssClass}>
        <aq-card>
          <aq-card-content onClick={() => {this.handleAqChange()}}>
            <aq-checkbox
              value={this.isChecked || this.value}
              isDisabled={this.isDisabled}
              indeterminate={this.indeterminate}
              icon={this.icon}
              label={this.label}
              name={this.name}
              isChecked={this.isChecked || this.value}
              idCheckbox={this.idCheckbox}
              valueCheckbox={this.valueCheckbox}
              onChange={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
              onInput={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
            ></aq-checkbox>
            <aq-helper-text class="aq-checkbox-card__sublabel"><span slot="text">{this.subLabel}</span></aq-helper-text>
          </aq-card-content>
        </aq-card>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

export interface ICheckboxCard {

  subLabel: string;
  valueCheckbox: string;
  orientation: GroupOrientationType;

  value: boolean;

  isDisabled: boolean;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-checkbox-group/aq-checkbox-group.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Element, Host, Fragment } from '@stencil/core';
import { ICheckboxGroup } from './interfaces/ICheckboxGroup';
import { AqEvent, emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { Label } from 'utils/helpers/label';
import { GroupOrientation } from 'enum/Orientation';
import { CheckboxGroupType } from './enum/CheckboxGroupType';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-checkbox-group',
  styleUrl: 'aq-checkbox-group.scss',
})
export class AqCheckboxGroup implements ICheckboxGroup {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value: ICheckboxGroup['value'] = [];

  @Prop() info = '';
  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() helperText = '';

  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() isRequired = false;

  @Prop() orientation: ICheckboxGroup['orientation'] = GroupOrientation.HORIZONTAL;
  @Prop() type: ICheckboxGroup['type'] = CheckboxGroupType.CHECKBOX;
  @Prop() options: ICheckboxGroup['options'];

  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  handleCheckedChange(event: AqEvent) {
    const { checked, value } = event.detail;
    this.value = checked ? [...new Set([...this.value, value])] : this.value.filter(item => item !== value);

    emitEvent('input', this.hostElement, { value: this.value }, event);
    emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { value: this.value }, event);
  }

  get getLabel() {
    return this.label;
  }

  private labelHelper = Label(this);
  private getDividerOrientation() {
    return this.orientation === 'horizontal' ? 'vertical' : 'horizontal';
  }

  private getValue(value: string) {
    return !!this.value?.includes(value);
  }
  private getCheckboxCard() {
    return (
      <div class={`aq-checkbox-group--card aq-checkbox-group--${this.orientation}`}>
        {this.options.map((item, idx) => (
          <aq-checkbox-card
            isChecked={this.getValue(item.valueCheckbox)}
            indeterminate={item.indeterminate}
            isDisabled={item.isDisabled || this.isDisabled}
            icon={item.icon}
            label={item.label}
            name={item.name}
            idCheckbox={item.idCheckbox || `${item.label}-${idx}`}
            valueCheckbox={item.valueCheckbox || item.name}
            subLabel={item.subLabel}
            onChange={e => this.handleCheckedChange(e)}
            onInput={e => e.stopPropagation()}
          ></aq-checkbox-card>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }
  private getCheckboxButton() {
    return (
      <div class={`aq-checkbox-group--button aq-checkbox-group--${this.orientation}`}>
        {this.options.map((item, idx) => (
          <Fragment>
            <aq-checkbox-button
              isChecked={this.getValue(item.valueCheckbox)}
              indeterminate={item.indeterminate}
              isDisabled={item.isDisabled || this.isDisabled}
              orientation={item.orientation}
              icon={item.icon}
              label={item.label}
              name={item.name}
              tooltipWidth={item.tooltipWidth}
              idCheckbox={item.idCheckbox || `${item.label}-${idx}`}
              valueCheckbox={item.valueCheckbox || item.name}
              onChange={e => this.handleCheckedChange(e)}
              onInput={e => e.stopPropagation()}
            ></aq-checkbox-button>
            {idx < this.options.length - 1 && <aq-divider class="aq-checkbox-group__divider" orientation={this.getDividerOrientation()}></aq-divider>}
          </Fragment>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }
  private getCheckbox() {
    return (
      <div class={`aq-checkbox-group--default aq-checkbox-group--${this.orientation}`}>
        {this.options.map((item, idx) => (
          <aq-checkbox
            isChecked={this.getValue(item.valueCheckbox)}
            indeterminate={item.indeterminate}
            isRequired={item.isRequired}
            isDisabled={item.isDisabled || this.isDisabled}
            icon={item.icon}
            info={item.info}
            label={item.label}
            name={item.name}
            tooltipWidth={item.tooltipWidth}
            idCheckbox={item.idCheckbox || `${item.label}-${idx}`}
            valueCheckbox={item.valueCheckbox || item.name}
            onChange={e => this.handleCheckedChange(e)}
            onInput={e => e.stopPropagation()}
          ></aq-checkbox>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  private getClasses(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      "aq-checkbox-group--is-checkbox": this.type === 'checkbox',
    };
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host class="aq-checkbox-group">
        <aq-label {...this.labelHelper.bindsLabel} class="aq-checkbox-group__label">
          <span slot="text">{this.label}</span>
        </aq-label>
        <div class={this.getClasses()}>
          {this.type === 'checkbox' && this.getCheckbox()}
          {this.type === 'button' && this.getCheckboxButton()}
          {this.type === 'card' && this.getCheckboxCard()}
        </div>
        <aq-helper-text class="aq-checkbox-group__helper-text">
          <span slot="text">{this.helperText}</span>
        </aq-helper-text>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

import { GroupOrientationType } from "types/Orientation";
import { CheckboxGroupType } from "../enum/CheckboxGroupType";
import { ICheckbox } from "components/forms/aq-checkbox/aq-checkbox/interfaces/ICheckbox";
import { ICheckboxButton } from "components/forms/aq-checkbox/aq-checkbox-button/interfaces/ICheckboxButton";
import { ICheckboxCard } from "components/forms/aq-checkbox/aq-checkbox-card/interfaces/ICheckboxCard";

export interface ICheckboxGroup {
  value: string[];

  label: string;
  helperText: string;
  info: string;

  isDisabled: boolean;
  isRequired: boolean;

  orientation: GroupOrientationType;
  type: CheckboxGroupType | `${CheckboxGroupType}`;

  options: ICheckbox[] | ICheckboxButton[] | ICheckboxCard[];

  hostElement: HTMLElement;
  get getLabel(): string;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-code-editor/aq-code-editor.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h, State, Host, Watch } from '@stencil/core';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-code-editor',
  styleUrls: ['./utils/prism.css', 'aq-code-editor.scss'],
})
export class AqCodeEditor {
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) value: string = '';
  @Prop() height: number = 200;

  @Prop() language: string = 'javascript';
  @Prop() showLineNumbers: boolean = false;
  @Prop() readonly: boolean = false;

  @State() highlightedCode: string = '';

  @Watch('value')
  updateCode(newVal: string) {
    this.value = newVal;
    this.highlightCode();
  }

  private codeBlockElement!: HTMLElement;

  async componentDidLoad() {
    if (!globalThis.Prism) {
      await import('./utils/prism');
    }
    this.highlightCode();
  }

  componentWillUpdate() {
    this.highlightCode();
  }

  private highlightCode() {
    this.highlightedCode = this.value ? globalThis.Prism.highlight(this.value, globalThis.Prism.languages.javascript, this.language)  + '<br>' : '&nbsp;';

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      if (this.codeBlockElement) {
        globalThis.Prism.highlightElement(this.codeBlockElement);
      }
    });
  }

  private handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    const textarea = event.target as HTMLTextAreaElement;
    if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === 'NumpadEnter') {
      event.preventDefault();

      const { selectionStart, selectionEnd, value } = textarea;
      const beforeCursor = value.substring(0, selectionStart);
      const afterCursor = value.substring(selectionEnd);

      const linesBeforeCursor = beforeCursor.split('\n');
      const currentLine = linesBeforeCursor[linesBeforeCursor.length - 1];
      const indent = currentLine.match(/^\s*/)?.[0] || '';

      const newValue = beforeCursor + '\n' + indent + afterCursor;
      const newCursorPos = selectionStart + indent.length + 1;

      this.value = newValue;

      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        textarea.setSelectionRange(newCursorPos, newCursorPos);
      });
    }
  };

  private handleInput = (event: Event) => {
    const target = event.target as HTMLTextAreaElement;
    this.value = target.value;
  };

  render() {
    return (
      <Host class="aq-code-editor" style={{ 'height': `${this.height}px` }}>
        <div class="editor-container" style={{ 'min-height': `${this.height}px` }}>          
          {/* Textarea for Editing */}
          <textarea
            style={{ paddingLeft: this.showLineNumbers ? '2.5em' : '10px' }}
            value={this.value}
            onInput={this.handleInput}
            onKeyDown={this.handleKeyDown}
            spellcheck={false}
            readOnly={this.readonly}
          ></textarea>

          {/* Highlighted Code Block */}
          <pre
            class={{
              'line-numbers': this.showLineNumbers,
              [`language-${this.language}`]: true,
            }}
            style={{ 'min-height': `${this.height}px` }}
          >
            <code
              ref={(el) => (this.codeBlockElement = el as HTMLElement)}
              innerHTML={this.highlightedCode}
            ></code>
          </pre>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-code-editor/utils/prism.css
================================================
/* PrismJS 1.30.0
https://prismjs.com/download.html#themes=prism-tomorrow&languages=markup+css+clike+javascript&plugins=line-numbers */

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-color-picker/aq-alpha/aq-alpha.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Element, State} from '@stencil/core';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { Colors } from '../types/ColorPickerTypes';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-alpha',
  styleUrl: 'aq-alpha.scss',
})
export class AqAlpha {
  @Prop() value: Colors = {hsv: {h: 0, s: 0, v: 0, a: 0}, hsl: {h: 0, s: 0, l: 0, a: 0}, rgba: {r: 0, g: 0, b: 0, a: 0}, hex: '', hex8: '', a: 0};

  private containerEl!: HTMLElement;
  private boundHandleChange: (event: TouchEvent | MouseEvent, skip?: boolean) => void;
  private boundHandleMouseUp: () => void;
  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;
    
  constructor() {
    this.boundHandleChange = this.handleChange.bind(this);
    this.boundHandleMouseUp = this.handleMouseUp.bind(this);
  }

  private handleMouseDown(event: MouseEvent) {
    this.handleChange(event, true);
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', this.boundHandleChange);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', this.boundHandleMouseUp);
  }

  private handleMouseUp() {
    this.unbindEventListeners();
  }

  unbindEventListeners() {
    document.removeEventListener('mousemove', this.boundHandleChange);
    document.removeEventListener('mouseup', this.boundHandleMouseUp);
  }
  
  @State() pointerAlpha: string = '';
  private handleChange(e: TouchEvent | MouseEvent, skip = false) {
    if (!skip) e.preventDefault();
      const container  = this.containerEl;
      if (!container) {
        return;
      }
      const containerWidth = container.clientWidth;
      const xOffset = container.getBoundingClientRect().left + window.scrollX;
      const pageX = (e instanceof MouseEvent) ? e.pageX : e.touches?.[0]?.pageX || 0;
      const left = pageX - xOffset;

       
      let a;
      if (left < 0) {
        a = 0;
      } else if (left > containerWidth) {
        a = 1;
      } else {
        a = Math.round((left * 100) / containerWidth) / 100;
      }
      if (this.value.a !== a) {
        emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { value:{
            h: this.value.hsl.h,
            s: this.value.hsl.s,
            l: this.value.hsl.l,
            a,
            source: 'rgba',
          } }, e);
      }      
      this.pointerAlpha = a * 100 + '%';    
  }
  get gradientColor() {
    const { rgba } = this.value;
      const rgbStr = [rgba.r, rgba.g, rgba.b].join(',');
      return `linear-gradient(to right, rgba(${rgbStr}, 0) 0%, rgba(${rgbStr}, 1) 100%)`;
  }

 

  render() {
    return (
      <div   class="vc-alpha">
        <div class="vc-alpha-checkboard-wrap">
            <aq-checkboard></aq-checkboard>
        </div>
        <div class="vc-alpha-gradient" style={{ background: this.gradientColor }}></div>
        <div
        class="vc-alpha-container"
        ref={(el) => this.containerEl = el as HTMLElement}
        onMouseDown={(e) => this.handleMouseDown(e)}
        onTouchMove={(e) => this.handleChange(e)}
        onTouchStart={(e) => this.handleChange(e)}
        >
        <div class="vc-alpha-pointer" role="presentation" style={{ left: this.pointerAlpha }}>
            <div class="vc-alpha-picker"></div>
        </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-color-picker/aq-checkboard/aq-checkboard.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop} from '@stencil/core';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-checkboard',
  styleUrl: 'aq-checkboard.scss',
})
export class AqCheckboard {
  @Prop() white = '#fff';
  @Prop() grey = '#e6e6e6';
  @Prop() size = 8;

  private checkboardCache = {};

  private renderCheckboard(c1: string, c2: string, size: number) {
    if (typeof document === 'undefined') {
      return null;
    }
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    canvas.width = canvas.height = size * 2;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) {
      return null;
    }
    ctx.fillStyle = c1;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    ctx.fillStyle = c2;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, size, size);
    ctx.translate(size, size);
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, size, size);
    return canvas.toDataURL();
  }

  private getCheckboard(c1: string, c2: string, size: number) {
    const key = `${c1},${c2},${size}`;
  
    if (this.checkboardCache[key]) {
      return this.checkboardCache[key];
    }
    const checkboard = this.renderCheckboard(c1, c2, size);
    this.checkboardCache[key] = checkboard;
    return checkboard;
  }

    get bgStyle() {
        return {
            'background-image': `url(${this.getCheckboard(this.white, this.grey, this.size)})`,
        };
    }
  render() {
    return (
      <div class="vc-checkerboard" style={this.bgStyle}></div>
    );
  }
}

    position: absolute;
    height: -5px;
    transform: rotate(45deg);
    width: 2px;
    bottom: 0.5px;
    right: 0px;
  }

  &__container {
    width: 232px;
    position: fixed;
    background: white;
    box-shadow: box-shadow.$shadow-basic;
    border-radius: 4px;

    &--show {
      display: block;
    }
    &--hide {
      display: none;
    }
  }

  .iro-wrapper-with-slot {
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
  
  /* Estilo del slot (si quieres controlarlo) */
  ::slotted([slot="custom-action"]) {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 4px;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
}




================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-color-picker/aq-color-picker-host/aq-color-picker.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Host, h, Prop, State, Element, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { Label } from 'utils/helpers/label';
import { Colors } from '../types/ColorPickerTypes';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { defaultPresetColors } from 'utils/helpers/colors';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-color-picker',
  styleUrl: 'aq-color-picker.scss',
})
export class AqColorPicker {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value = '';
  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() helperText = '';
  @Prop() isError = false;
  @Prop() isPlain = false;
  @Prop() selectColor = true;
  @Prop() isRequired = false;
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() isReadonly = false;
  @Prop() alpha = true;
  @Prop() presetColors: string[] = defaultPresetColors;
  @State() isVisible = true;
  @State() colors: Colors = { hsv: { h: 0, s: 0, v: 0, a: 0 }, hsl: { h: 0, s: 0, l: 0, a: 0 }, rgba: { r: 0, g: 0, b: 0, a: 0 }, hex: '', hex8: '', a: 0 };
  @State() textColor: string = '';

  @Watch('value')
  handleValueChange(newValue: string, oldValue: string) {
    this.onValueChange(newValue, oldValue);
  }

  @State() textColorField: string = '';

  @Watch('textColor')
  handleTextColorChange(newValue: string, oldValue: string) {
    if (newValue !== oldValue) {
      this.textColorField = newValue;
    }
  }

  @Watch('textColorField')
  handleTextColorFieldChange(newValue: string, oldValue: string) {
    if (newValue !== oldValue && newValue !== undefined) {
      this.value = newValue;
    }
  }

  private labelHelper = Label(this);

  get showSelector() {
    return this.selectColor;
  }

  get disabled() {
    return this.isDisabled || this.isReadonly;
  }

  get isTransparent() {
    return this.textColorField?.substring(this.textColorField?.length - 2)?.toLowerCase() === '00';
  }

  private cssClassAqColorPicker(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-color-picker__selector': true,
      'aq-color-picker__selector--error': this.isError,
      'aq-color-picker__selector--plain': this.isPlain,
      'aq-color-picker__selector--readonly': this.isReadonly,
    };
  }

  handleClick() {
    if (!this.isVisible && !this.isDisabled && !this.isReadonly) {
    }
  }

  private cssClassAqColorPickerContainer(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-color-picker__container': true,
      'aq-color-picker__container--show': this.isVisible,
      'aq-color-picker__container--hide': !this.isVisible,
    };
  }

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @State() activatorElement = null;
  @State() popoverConfig: any = {
    hideOnClick: false,
    hideOnClickOutside: false,
    trigger: 'click',
    interactive: true,
    appendTo: document.body,
  };

  get getPopoverConfig() {
    return {
      ...this.popoverConfig,
      placement: 'bottom-start',
      maxWidth: 'auto',
      offset: [0, 0],
      onClickOutside: (instance, event) => {
        const target = event.target as HTMLElement;

        const isAutocompletePopover = target.closest('aq-autocomplete-core') || target.closest('.tippy-box[data-tippy-root]') || target.closest('[data-tippy-root]');

        const isColorPickerPopover = target.closest('aq-color-picker') || target.closest('.aq-color-picker__container');

        if (isAutocompletePopover) {
          return;
        }

        if (isColorPickerPopover) {
          return;
        }
        instance?.hide();
      },
    };
  }

  componentDidLoad(): void {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      if (!this.activatorElement) {
        const activator = this.el.querySelector('.aq-field-group__slot-container');
        if (activator) {
          this.activatorElement = activator;
        }
      }
      this.validateValue();
    });
  }

  validateValue() {
    if (this.value !== '#000000FF' && this.value !== '') {
      this.onValueChange(this.value);
    } else {
      this.onValueChange('#892CD1FF');
    }
  }

  onValueChange(newVal, oldVal?) {
    if (newVal !== oldVal) {
      this.textColor = newVal;
    }
  }

  handleInputText(e) {
    if (e?.detail?.value !== undefined) {
      this.textColorField = e?.detail?.value;
    }
  }

  handleInputSketch(e) {
    if (e?.detail?.value !== 0 && e?.detail?.value !== 1) {
      this.textColorField = e?.detail?.value?.hex8;
    }
    if (this.textColorField !== undefined) {
      this.value = this.textColorField;
      emitEvent('input', this.el, { value: this.textColorField, e }, e);
    }
  }

  render() {
    const cssClassAqColorPicker = this.cssClassAqColorPicker();
    const cssClassAqColorPickerContainer = this.cssClassAqColorPickerContainer();
    const getPopoverConfig = this.getPopoverConfig;
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-color-picker">
          <aq-label class="aq-color-picker__label" {...this.labelHelper.bindsLabel}>
            <span slot="text">{this.label}</span>
          </aq-label>
          <div class={cssClassAqColorPicker} onClick={this.handleClick}>
            <aq-field-group helperText={this.helperText} isError={this.isError}>
              {this.showSelector && (
                <aq-button isOutline isPlain={this.isPlain} isDisabled={this.disabled}>
                  <div class="aq-color-picker__miniature" style={{ backgroundColor: this.textColorField }}>
                    <span class="aq-color-picker__miniature-vector"></span>
                    {this.isTransparent && <span class="aq-color-picker__line-transparent-1"></span>}
                    {this.isTransparent && <span class="aq-color-picker__line-transparent-2"></span>}
                  </div>
                </aq-button>
              )}
              <aq-text-field
                isDisabled={this.isDisabled}
                onInput={e => this.handleInputText(e)}
                value={this.textColorField}
                isReadonly={this.isReadonly}
                isError={this.isError}
                isPlain={this.isPlain}
              ></aq-text-field>
            </aq-field-group>

            {!this.isDisabled && !this.isReadonly && (
              <aq-popover slot="popover" disabled={this.isDisabled || this.isReadonly} trigger={this.activatorElement} config={{ ...getPopoverConfig }}>
                <div class={cssClassAqColorPickerContainer}>
                  <aq-sketch-picker
                    presetColors={this.presetColors}
                    onInput={e => this.handleInputSketch(e)}
                    value={this.colors}
                    newColor={this.textColor}
                    disableAlpha={!this.alpha}
                  ></aq-sketch-picker>
                </div>
              </aq-popover>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-color-picker/aq-editable-input/aq-editable-input.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Element} from '@stencil/core';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-editable-input',
  styleUrl: 'aq-editable-input.scss',
})
export class AqEditableInput {
    @Prop() label: string = '';
    @Prop() labelText: string = '';
    @Prop() desc: string = '';
    @Prop({ mutable: true }) value: number | string = '';
    @Prop() min: number = 0;
    @Prop() max: number = 100;
    @Prop() arrowOffset: number = 1;

    @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

    private update(e: any) {
        this.value = e.detail.value;
        this.handleChange(e.detail.value);
    }

    private handleKeyDown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
        let  val  = this.value;
      const number = Number(val);

      if (number) {
        const amount = this.arrowOffset || 1;

        // Up
        if (e.keyCode === 38) {
          val = number + amount;
          this.handleChange(val);
          e.preventDefault();
        }

        // Down
        if (e.keyCode === 40) {
          val = number - amount;
          this.handleChange(val);
          e.preventDefault();
        }
      }
    }

    private handleChange(newVal: any) {
        const data: any = {};
        data[this.label] = newVal;
        if (data.hex === undefined && data['#'] === undefined) {
            emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { value: data });
        } else if (newVal?.length > 5) {
            emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { value: data });
        }
      }

      get labelId() {
        return `input__label__${this.label}__${Math.random().toString().slice(2, 5)}`;
      }

    render() {
        return (
      <aq-text-field
        sublabel={this.labelText}
        aria-labelledby={this.labelId}
        value={this.value}
        onInput={(e) => this.update(e)}
        onKeyDown={(e) => this.handleKeyDown(e)}
      ></aq-text-field>
    );
  }
}
