FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-color-picker/aq-hue/aq-hue.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Host, h, Prop, State, Element} from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { Colors } from '../types/ColorPickerTypes';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-hue',
  styleUrl: 'aq-hue.scss',
})
export class AqHue {
  @Prop() value: Colors = {hsv: {h: 0, s: 0, v: 0, a: 0}, hsl: {h: 0, s: 0, l: 0, a: 0}, rgba: {r: 0, g: 0, b: 0, a: 0}, hex: '', hex8: '', a: 0};
  @Prop() direction: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' = 'horizontal';
  @State() pullDirection: 'right' | 'left' = 'right';
  @State() oldHue: number = 0;

  private containerEl!: HTMLElement;
  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  get colors() {
    const { h } = this.value.hsl;
      if (h !== 0 && h - this.oldHue > 0) this.pullDirection = 'right';
      if (h !== 0 && h - this.oldHue < 0) this.pullDirection = 'left';
      this.oldHue = h;

      return this.value;
  }
  private directionClass(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'vc-hue': true,
      'vc-hue--horizontal': this.direction === 'horizontal',
      'vc-hue--vertical': this.direction === 'vertical',
    };
  }
  private boundHandleChange: (event: TouchEvent | MouseEvent, skip?: boolean) => void;
  private boundHandleMouseUp: () => void;

  constructor() {
    this.boundHandleChange = this.handleChange.bind(this);
    this.boundHandleMouseUp = this.handleMouseUp.bind(this);
  }

  private handleMouseDown(event: MouseEvent) {
    this.handleChange(event, true);
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', this.boundHandleChange);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', this.boundHandleMouseUp);
  }

  private handleMouseUp() {
    this.unbindEventListeners();
  }

  unbindEventListeners() {
    document.removeEventListener('mousemove', this.boundHandleChange);
    document.removeEventListener('mouseup', this.boundHandleMouseUp);
  }

  private handleChange(e: TouchEvent | MouseEvent, skip = false) {
    if (!skip) e.preventDefault();

    const  container  = this.containerEl;
    if (!container) {
      return;
    }

    const containerWidth = container.clientWidth;
    const containerHeight = container.clientHeight;

    const xOffset = container.getBoundingClientRect().left + window.scrollX;
    const yOffset = container.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY;
    const pageX = (e instanceof MouseEvent) ? e.pageX : e.touches?.[0]?.pageX || 0;
    const pageY = (e instanceof MouseEvent) ? e.pageY : e.touches?.[0]?.pageY || 0;
    const left = pageX - xOffset;
    const top = pageY - yOffset;

    let h;
    let percent;

    if (this.direction === 'vertical') {
      if (top < 0) {
        h = 360;
      } else if (top > containerHeight) {
        h = 0;
      } else {
        percent = -((top * 100) / containerHeight) + 100;
        h = (360 * percent) / 100;
      }

      if (this.colors.hsl.h !== h) {
        emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { value: {
            h,
            s: this.colors.hsl.s,
            l: this.colors.hsl.l,
            a: this.colors.hsl.a,
            source: 'hsl',
          } }, e);
      }
    } else {
      if (left < 0) {
        h = 0;
      } else if (left > containerWidth) {
        h = 360;
      } else {
        percent = (left * 100) / containerWidth;
        h = (360 * percent) / 100;
      }

      if (this.colors.hsl.h !== h) {
        emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { value: {
          h,
          s: this.colors.hsl.s,
          l: this.colors.hsl.l,
          a: this.colors.hsl.a,
          source: 'hsl',
        } }, e);
      }
    }
  }
  
  get pointerTop() {
    if (this.direction === 'vertical') {
      if (this.colors.hsl.h === 0 && this.pullDirection === 'right') return 0;
      return `${-((this.colors.hsl.h * 100) / 360) + 100}%`;
    }
    return 0;
  }

  get pointerLeft() {
    if (this.direction === 'vertical') {
      return 0;
    }
    if (this.colors.hsl.h === 0 && this.pullDirection === 'right') return '100%';
    return `${(this.colors.hsl.h * 100) / 360}%`;
  }


  render() { 
    const directionClass = this.directionClass();
    return (
      <Host class={directionClass}>
        <div
        class="vc-hue-container"
        role="slider"
        aria-valuemin="0"
        aria-valuemax="360"
        aria-valuenow={this.value.hsl.h}
        ref={(el) => this.containerEl = el as HTMLElement}
        onMouseDown={(e) => this.handleMouseDown(e)}
        onTouchMove={(e) => this.handleChange(e)}
        onTouchStart={(e) => this.handleChange(e)}>
            <div
                class="vc-hue-pointer"
                style={{ top: `${this.pointerTop}`, left: `${this.pointerLeft}` }}
                role="presentation"
            >
                <div class="vc-hue-picker"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-color-picker/aq-saturation/aq-saturation.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Host, h, Prop, Element} from '@stencil/core';
import { Colors } from '../types/ColorPickerTypes';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-saturation',
  styleUrl: 'aq-saturation.scss',
})

export class AqSaturation {
  @Prop() colors: Colors = {hsv: {h: 0, s: 0, v: 0, a: 0}, hsl: {h: 0, s: 0, l: 0, a: 0}, rgba: {r: 0, g: 0, b: 0, a: 0}, hex: '', hex8: '', a: 0};
  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  private containerEl!: HTMLElement;
  private boundHandleChange: (event: TouchEvent | MouseEvent, skip?: boolean) => void;
  private boundHandleMouseUp: () => void;

  constructor() {
    this.boundHandleChange = this.handleChange.bind(this);
    this.boundHandleMouseUp = this.handleMouseUp.bind(this);
  }

  get bgColor() {
    return `hsl(${this.colors.hsv.h}, 100%, 50%)`
  }

  get pointerTop() {
    return `${-(this.colors.hsv.v * 100) + 100}%`;
  }

  get pointerLeft() {
    return `${this.colors.hsv.s * 100}%`
  }

  private limitInRange(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
    return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
  }

  private lastChangeTime = 0;
  private changeDelay = 20; 

  private handleChange(event: TouchEvent | MouseEvent, skip = false) {
    if (!skip) event.preventDefault();
    const  container = this.containerEl;
    if (!container) return;

    const containerWidth = container.clientWidth;
    const containerHeight = container.clientHeight;
    const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
    const xOffset = rect.left + window.scrollX;
    const yOffset = rect.top + window.scrollY;
    const pageX = (event instanceof MouseEvent) ? event.pageX : event.touches?.[0]?.pageX || 0;
    const pageY = (event instanceof MouseEvent) ? event.pageY : event.touches?.[0]?.pageY || 0;
    const left = this.limitInRange(pageX - xOffset, 0, containerWidth);
    const top = this.limitInRange(pageY - yOffset, 0, containerHeight);
    const saturation = left / containerWidth;
    const bright = this.limitInRange(-(top / containerHeight) + 1, 0, 1);

    const now = Date.now();

    if (now - this.lastChangeTime >= this.changeDelay) {
      this.lastChangeTime = now;
      this.onChange({
        h: this.colors.hsv.h,
        s: saturation,
        v: bright,
        a: this.colors.hsv.a,
        source: 'hsva',
      event: event,
    });
    }
  }

  private onChange(param: any) {
    emitEvent('change', this.hostElement, { value: param }, param.event);
  }
  
  handleMouseDown() {
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', this.boundHandleChange);
    
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', this.boundHandleChange);
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', this.boundHandleMouseUp);
  }

  handleMouseUp() {
    this.unbindEventListeners();
  }

  unbindEventListeners() {
    document.removeEventListener('mousemove', this.boundHandleChange);
    document.removeEventListener('mouseup', this.boundHandleChange);
    document.removeEventListener('mouseup', this.boundHandleMouseUp);
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host class="aq-saturation"
        style={{background: this.bgColor}}
        ref={(el) => this.containerEl = el as HTMLElement}
        onMouseDown={() => this.handleMouseDown()}
        onTouchMove={(e) => this.handleChange(e)}
        onTouchStart={(e) => this.handleChange(e)}
      >
        <div class="aq-saturation--white"></div>
        <div class="aq-saturation--black"></div>
        <div class="aq-saturation-pointer" style={{top: this.pointerTop, left: this.pointerLeft}}>
            <div class="aq-saturation-circle"></div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-color-picker/aq-sketch-picker/aq-sketch-picker.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Watch, Element, State } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { Colors } from '../types/ColorPickerTypes';
import tinycolor from 'tinycolor2';
import { PopoverWidths } from 'enum/PopoverWidths';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { defaultPresetColors } from 'utils/helpers/colors';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-sketch-picker',
  styleUrl: 'aq-sketch-picker.scss',
})
export class AqSketchPicker {
  @Prop() disableAlpha: boolean = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value: Colors = {
    hsv: { h: 0, s: 0, v: 0, a: 0 },
    hsl: { h: 0, s: 0, l: 0, a: 0 },
    rgba: { r: 0, g: 0, b: 0, a: 0 },
    hex: '',
    hex8: '',
    a: 0,
  };
  @Prop() newColor: string = '';
  @Prop() presetColors: string[] = defaultPresetColors;
  @State() val: Colors = this.colorChangeSketch(this.value);
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @Watch('value')
  handleValueChange(newValue: Colors) {
    if (newValue.hex8 !== this.val.hex8) {
      this.val = this.colorChangeSketch(newValue);
      this.value = this.val;
    }
    emitEvent('input', this.el, { value: this.val });
  }

  @Watch('newColor')
  handleNewColorChange(newValue: string) {
    this.inputChange({ HEX: newValue });
  }

  private isValidHex(hex: string) {
    return tinycolor(hex).isValid();
  }

  private inputChange(inputData: any) {
    const data = inputData?.detail?.value || inputData;
    if (!data) {
      return;
    }
    if (data.HEX) {
      const hex: string = data.HEX;
      if (this.isValidHex(hex)) {
        this.colorChange({
          hex: hex,
          source: 'hex',
        });
      }
    } else if (data.r || data.g || data.b || data.a) {
      this.colorChange({
        r: data.r || this.value.rgba.r,
        g: data.g || this.value.rgba.g,
        b: data.b || this.value.rgba.b,
        a: data.a || this.value.rgba.a,
        source: 'rgba',
      });
    }
  }

  private colorChangeSketch(data, oldHue?) {
    const alphax = data && data.a;
    let color;

    // hsl is better than hex between conversions
    if (data && data.hsl) {
      color = tinycolor(data.hsl);
    } else if (data && data.hex && data.hex?.length > 0) {
      color = tinycolor(data.hex);
    } else if (data && data.hsv) {
      color = tinycolor(data.hsv);
    } else if (data && data.rgba) {
      color = tinycolor(data.rgba);
    } else if (data && data.rgb) {
      color = tinycolor(data.rgb);
    } else {
      color = tinycolor(data);
    }

    // eslint-disable-next-line
    if (color && (color._a === undefined || color._a === null)) {
      color.setAlpha(alphax || 1);
    }

    const hsl = color.toHsl();
    const hsv = color.toHsv();

    if (hsl.s === 0) {
      hsv.h = hsl.h = data.h || (data.hsl && data.hsl.h) || oldHue || 0;
    }

    return {
      hsl,
      hex: color.toHexString().toUpperCase(),
      hex8: color.toHex8String().toUpperCase(),
      rgba: color.toRgb(),
      hsv,
      oldHue: data.h || oldHue || hsl.h,
      source: data.source,
      a: data.a || color.getAlpha(),
    };
  }

  private cssClassSketchPicker(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'vc-sketch': true,
      'vc-sketch__disable-alpha': this.disableAlpha,
    };
  }

  private childChange(event: any) {
    this.colorChange(event.detail.value || event.detail);
  }

  @State() oldHue: number;
  @State() fieldsIndex: number = 0;

  private colorChange(data) {
    this.oldHue = this.value.hsl.h;
    this.value = this.colorChangeSketch(data, this.oldHue);
  }

  get activeColor() {
    const { rgba } = this.value;
    return `rgba(${[rgba.r, rgba.g, rgba.b, rgba.a].join(',')})`;
  }

  get optionsSelect() {
    return [
      {
        id: 0,
        text: 'HEX',
        value: 0,
      },
      {
        id: 1,
        text: this.disableAlpha ? 'RGB' : 'RGBA',
        value: 1,
      },
    ];
  }

  get hasAlpha() {
    return this.value.a < 1;
  }

  updateFieldsIndex(e: any) {
    this.fieldsIndex = e.detail.value;
  }

  private handlePreset(c) {
    this.colorChange({
      hex: c,
      source: 'hex',
    });
  }

  isTransparent(color: string) {
    return tinycolor(color).getAlpha() === 0;
  }

  render() {
    const cssClassSketchPicker = this.cssClassSketchPicker();
    return (
      <div class={cssClassSketchPicker}>
        <div class={'vc-sketch-saturation-wrap'}>
          <aq-saturation colors={this.value} onChange={e => this.childChange(e)}></aq-saturation>
        </div>
        <div class={'vc-sketch-controls'}>
          <div class={'vc-sketch-color-wrap'}>
            <div class={'vc-sketch-active-color'} aria-label={`Current color is ${this.activeColor}`} style={{ background: this.activeColor }}></div>
            <div class="vc-sketch-color-wrap__copy">
              <em class="mui-icon-duplicate vc-sketch-color-wrap__copy-icon"></em>
            </div>
            <aq-checkboard></aq-checkboard>
          </div>
          <div class="vc-sketch-sliders">
            <div class="vc-sketch-hue-wrap">
              <aq-hue value={this.value} onChange={e => this.childChange(e)}></aq-hue>
            </div>
            {!this.disableAlpha && (
              <div class="vc-sketch-alpha-wrap">
                <aq-alpha value={this.value} onChange={e => this.childChange(e)}></aq-alpha>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class={'vc-chrome-fields-wrap'}>
          {this.fieldsIndex === 0 && (
            <div class={'vc-chrome-fields'}>
              <div class={'vc-chrome-field'}>
                {this.hasAlpha ? (
                  <aq-editable-input label="HEX" labelText="HEX" value={this.value.hex8} onChange={e => this.inputChange(e)}></aq-editable-input>
                ) : (
                  <aq-editable-input label="HEX" labelText="HEX" value={this.value.hex} onChange={e => this.inputChange(e)}></aq-editable-input>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {this.fieldsIndex === 1 && (
            <div class={'vc-chrome-fields'}>
              <div class={'vc-chrome-field'}>
                <aq-field-group>
                  <aq-editable-input label="r" value={this.value.rgba.r} onChange={e => this.inputChange(e)}></aq-editable-input>
                  <aq-editable-input label="g" value={this.value.rgba.g} onChange={e => this.inputChange(e)}></aq-editable-input>
                  <aq-editable-input label="b" value={this.value.rgba.b} onChange={e => this.inputChange(e)}></aq-editable-input>
                  {!this.disableAlpha && <aq-editable-input label="a" value={this.value.a} arrow-offset="0.01" max={1} onChange={e => this.inputChange(e)}></aq-editable-input>}
                </aq-field-group>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          <div class={'vc-chrome-toggle-btn'} aria-label="Change another color definition">
            <aq-autocomplete
              returnMode="keys"
              selectDefault
              type="button"
              hasClear={false}
              onInput={e => {
                this.updateFieldsIndex(e);
              }}
              value={this.fieldsIndex}
              closeOnSelect
              items={this.optionsSelect}
              popover-width={PopoverWidths.FULL}
            ></aq-autocomplete>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class={'aq-color-picker__color-list'}>
          <aq-divider></aq-divider>
          <div class={'vc-sketch-presets'}>
            {this.presetColors.map(color =>
              this.isTransparent(color) ? (
                <div class={'vc-sketch-presets-color'} style={{ background: color }} key={color} onClick={() => this.handlePreset(color)}></div>
              ) : (
                <div class={'vc-sketch-presets-color'} style={{ background: color }} key={color} onClick={() => this.handlePreset(color)}>
                  <checkboard />
                </div>
              ),
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

export type Colors = {
    hsv: {
        h: number;
        s: number;
        v: number;
        a: number;
    };
    hsl: {
        h: number;
        s: number;
        l: number;
        a: number;
    };
    rgba: {
        r: number;
        g: number;
        b: number;
        a: number;
    };
    a: number;
    hex: string;
    hex8: string;
};

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-calendar/aq-calendar.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Event, EventEmitter, Fragment, Host, Method, Prop, State, Watch, h } from '@stencil/core';
import Calendar from './utils/calendar';
import { CalendarObject } from './utils/calendarImpl';
import { SELECTION } from '../utils/constants/ranges';
import { IRangeSelection } from '../aq-range/interface/IRange';
import { DateTime } from 'luxon';
import { DATE_MODE, SELECTION_MODE } from '../utils/constants/selectionMode';
import { ICalendarInstance } from '../interfaces/ICalendarInfo';
import { DateFormatter } from '../utils/helpers/dateService';
import { DATE_FORMAT } from '../utils/constants/format';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-calendar',
  styleUrl: 'aq-calendar.scss',
})
export class AqCalendar {
  @Prop() startsOnMonday: boolean = false;
  @Prop() isRange: boolean = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) value: string = '';
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) selection: IRangeSelection = SELECTION;
  @Prop() offset: number;
  @Prop() mode: DATE_MODE = DATE_MODE.SINGLE;
  @Prop() hasTime: boolean = false;

  @Prop() uid: string;
  @Prop() calendarInfo: ICalendarInstance[];

  @State() localCalendar: CalendarObject;

  @Event() mouseOverDate: EventEmitter<string>;
  @Event() daysSelected: EventEmitter<{}>;

  private dateFormatter = new DateFormatter();
  public localData: CalendarObject;
  private Calendar = new Calendar();

  @Watch('value')
  handleValueChange(newValue, oldValue) {
    if (newValue != oldValue) this.initCalendar();
  }
  @Watch('calendarInfo')
  handleCalendarInfoChange(newValue) {
    if (this.isRange) this.Calendar.setCalendarInfo(newValue);
    this.initCalendar();
  }

  removeISOHour(value: string) {
    if(!!value) return value.match(/^(([0-9]*|\-)+)/g)?.[0];
    else return ''
  }
  componentWillLoad() {
    this.initCalendar();
  }

  initCalendar() {
    this.Calendar.setId(this.uid);
    if (this.isRange) this.Calendar.setCalendarInfo(this.calendarInfo);
    let selectionDate = this.isRange ? this.selection.date : null;
    this.Calendar.init({
      selectedDate: this.value,
      selectionDate,
      startsOnMonday: this.startsOnMonday,
    });
    this.localCalendar = this.Calendar.getCalendar();
    this.value = this.localCalendar.selectedDate.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd').toString();
  }

  @Method()
  async getCalendarData() {
    return this.localCalendar;
  }

  @Method()
  async previousMonth() {
    this.Calendar.calendarBefore();
    this.localCalendar = this.Calendar.getCalendar();
  }

  @Method()
  async nextMonth() {
    this.Calendar.calendarNext();
    this.localCalendar = this.Calendar.getCalendar();
  }

  getDayBySelection(value: string) {
    return this.mode === DATE_MODE.SINGLE ? this.value === value : this.selection.date.start === value || this.selection.date.end === value;
  }
  get getISOFormat() {
    return this.hasTime ? DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO_WITH_TIME : DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO;
  }
  changeValueDay(day) {
    const dayISO = DateTime.fromFormat(day.date, DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO).toISO();

    if (this.mode === DATE_MODE.SINGLE) {
      this.value = day.date;
      this.daysSelected.emit({
        calendar: this.localCalendar,
        value: this.value,
      });
    } else if (this.mode === DATE_MODE.RANGE) {
      const selection = { ...this.selection };
      const format = this.getISOFormat;
      const { start, end } = this.selection.date || { start: '', end: '' };

      if (!start || (start && end)) {
        selection.date = { start: this.dateFormatter.formatDate(dayISO, format), end: '' };
      } else if (start && !end) {
        const startDate = DateTime.fromISO(start);
        const endDate = DateTime.fromISO(dayISO);

        if (endDate < startDate) {
          selection.date = {
            start: this.dateFormatter.formatDate(dayISO, format),
            end: this.dateFormatter.formatDate(start, format)
          };
        } else {
          selection.date = {
            start: this.dateFormatter.formatDate(start, format),
            end: this.dateFormatter.formatDate(dayISO, format)
          };
        }
      }

      this.daysSelected.emit({
        calendar: this.localCalendar,
        value: selection.date,
      });
    }
  }
  handleMouseOver(day) {
    this.mouseOverDate.emit(day);
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-calendar">
          <div class="aq-calendar-grid">
            {(() => {
              const weekdays = ['Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat'];
              if (this.startsOnMonday) weekdays.push(weekdays.shift());

              return (
                <Fragment>
                  {weekdays.map(day => (
                    <div class="weekday">{day}</div>
                  ))}
                </Fragment>
              );
            })()}
            {this.localCalendar.showed.days?.map(day => {
              const dayISOFull = DateTime.fromFormat(day.date, DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO).toISO();
              const dayISO = this.removeISOHour(dayISOFull);
              const { start: startDate, end: endDate, hover: hoverDate } = this.selection?.date || {};
              const start = this.removeISOHour(startDate);
              const end = this.removeISOHour(endDate);
              const hover = this.removeISOHour(hoverDate);

              const isStart = start && dayISO === start;
              const isEnd = end && dayISO === end;
              const isInRange = start && end && DateTime.fromISO(dayISO) > DateTime.fromISO(start) && DateTime.fromISO(dayISO) < DateTime.fromISO(end);
              
              const isHoverPreview =
                (this.selection?.mode === SELECTION_MODE.SELECTION || this.selection?.mode === SELECTION_MODE.HOVER) &&
                start &&
                !end &&
                hover &&
                DateTime.fromISO(dayISO) >= DateTime.min(DateTime.fromISO(start), DateTime.fromISO(hover)) &&
                DateTime.fromISO(dayISO) <= DateTime.max(DateTime.fromISO(start), DateTime.fromISO(hover));

              const isHoveredEnd = this.selection?.mode === SELECTION_MODE.HOVER && start && day.date === hover;

              return (
                <div
                  class={{
                    'aq-day': true,
                    'aq-present-day': this.localCalendar.today.toFormat(DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO) === dayISO,
                    'aq-hover-preview': !!day.date && isHoverPreview,
                    'aq-selected-day': !!day.date && this.getDayBySelection(day.date),
                    'aq-range-start': isStart,
                    'aq-range-end': isEnd,
                    'aq-range-in': isInRange,
                    'aq-hovered-end': !!day.date && isHoveredEnd,
                  }}
                  value-day={day.date}
                  onMouseOver={() => this.handleMouseOver(day.date)}
                  onClick={this.changeValueDay.bind(this, day)}
                >
                  {day.days}
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-calendar/utils/calendar.ts
================================================
import { DateTime } from 'luxon';
import CalendarImp, { CalendarConf, DaysObject } from './calendarImpl';
import { IDateValue } from '../../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { ICalendarInstance } from '../../interfaces/ICalendarInfo';

export default class Calendar implements CalendarImp {
  private defaultConf: CalendarConf;
  private daysCalendar: DaysObject[];
  private selectedDate: DateTime;
  private selectionDate: IDateValue;
  private showedDate: DateTime;
  private showedMonth: string;
  private uid: string;
  private calendarInfo: ICalendarInstance[];
  private actualDate: DateTime = DateTime.now();

  init(conf: CalendarConf): void {
    try {
      this.defaultConf = conf;
      if (!!conf.selectionDate) {
        this.selectionDate =
          !!conf.selectionDate?.start || !!conf.selectionDate?.end
            ? { start: DateTime.fromISO(conf.selectionDate.start).toString(), end: DateTime.fromISO(conf.selectionDate.end).toString() }
            : { start: DateTime.now().toString(), end: DateTime.now().plus({ days: 1 }).toString() };
        const calendarDate = DateTime.fromISO(this.getCalendarInfoByUID().value);
        const date = this.getCalendarInfo(calendarDate);
        this.updateMonthAndDate(date);
      } else {
        this.selectedDate = conf.selectedDate ? DateTime.fromISO(conf.selectedDate) : DateTime.now();
        this.updateMonthAndDate(this.selectedDate);
      }
      this.preRenderShowed();
    } catch {
      throw new Error();
    }
  }

  getCalendar() {
    return {
      showed: {
        days: this.daysCalendar,
        month: this.showedDate.month,
        year: this.showedDate.year,
        monthName: this.showedMonth,
      },
      selectedDate: this.selectedDate,
      selectionDate: this.selectionDate,
      monthStr: this.showedMonth,
      today: this.actualDate,
    };
  }
  getCalendarInfoByUID() {
    return this.calendarInfo.find(item => item.uid === this.uid);
  }
  calendarNext() {
    this.updateMonthAndDate(this.showedDate.plus({ month: 1 }));
    this.preRenderShowed();
  }

  calendarBefore() {
    this.updateMonthAndDate(this.showedDate.minus({ month: 1 }));
    this.preRenderShowed();
  }

  preRenderShowed() {
    this.daysCalendar = this.calendarDaysResult(this.showedDate);
  }

  getCalendarInfo(value: DateTime) {
    const date = value.isValid ? value : DateTime.fromISO(this.selectionDate?.start);
    return date.isValid ? date : DateTime.now();
  }
  setId(value: string): void {
    this.uid = value;
  }
  updateMonthAndDate(value: DateTime) {
    this.showedDate = value.startOf('month');
    this.showedMonth = value.toFormat('LLLL');
  }
  setCalendarInfo(calendarInfo: ICalendarInstance[]): void {
    this.calendarInfo = [...calendarInfo];
    const month1 = DateTime.fromISO(this.calendarInfo[0].value).get('month');
    const month2 = DateTime.fromISO(this.calendarInfo[1].value).get('month');
    if (month1 === month2) {
      this.calendarInfo[1].value = DateTime.fromISO(this.calendarInfo[0].value).plus({ months: 1 }).toISO();
    }
    const calendarDate = DateTime.fromISO(this.getCalendarInfoByUID().value);
    const date = this.getCalendarInfo(calendarDate);
    this.updateMonthAndDate(date);

    this.selectedDate = date;
  }

  private calendarDaysResult(date: DateTime) {
    const initialDay = date.startOf('month').weekday;

    const startOffset = this.defaultConf.startsOnMonday ? (initialDay == 0 ? 6 : initialDay - 1) : initialDay;
    const addsDays = startOffset == 7 ? [] : Array(startOffset).fill({ days: '', date: '' });
    const daysInMonth = date.daysInMonth;
    const days = [
      ...addsDays,
      ...Array.from({ length: daysInMonth }, (_, i) => ({
        days: i + 1,
        date: date.startOf('month').plus({ days: i }).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd'),
      })),
    ];
    return days;
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-calendar/utils/calendarImpl.ts
================================================
import { DateTime } from 'luxon';
import { IDateValue } from '../../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { ICalendarInstance } from '../../interfaces/ICalendarInfo';

export default interface CalendarImp {
  init(conf: CalendarConf): void;
  getCalendar(): CalendarObject;
  calendarNext(): void;

  setId(value: string): void;
  setCalendarInfo(calendarInfo: ICalendarInstance[]): void;
}

export type CalendarConf = {
  selectedDate: string;
  startsOnMonday: boolean;
  selectionDate?: IDateValue;
};

export type CalendarObject = {
  showed: {
    days: DaysObject[];
    month: number;
    year: number;
    monthName: string;
  };
  today: DateTime;
  selectedDate: DateTime;
  selectionDate?: IDateValue;
};

export type DaysObject = {
  days: number;
  date: string;
};

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-date/aq-date.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Host, h, Element, Prop, State, Watch, EventEmitter, Event } from '@stencil/core';
import { CalendarObject } from 'components';
import { IRangeSelection } from '../aq-range/interface/IRange';
import { SELECTION } from '../utils/constants/ranges';
import { DateTime } from 'luxon';
import { DATE_MODE, RANGE_STATUS } from '../utils/constants/selectionMode';
import { IMonthSelection } from '../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { ICalendarInstance } from '../interfaces/ICalendarInfo';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-date',
  styleUrl: 'aq-date.scss',
})
export class AqDate {
  @Element() host!: HTMLElement;

  @Prop({ mutable: true }) value: string;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) selection: IRangeSelection = SELECTION;
  @Prop() isRange: boolean = false;
  @Prop() isStart: boolean = false;
  @Prop() isEnd: boolean = false;
  @Prop() hasTime: boolean = false;
  @Prop() currentStartDate: IMonthSelection = null;
  @Prop() currentEndDate: IMonthSelection = null;
  @Prop() timeValue: string = '';
  @Prop() timePickerLabel: string = '';
  @Prop() uid: string = '';
  @Prop() calendarInfo: ICalendarInstance[] = [];

  @State() calendarData: CalendarObject;
  @State() localStart: string = '';
  @State() localEnd: string = '';
  @State() localHover: string = '';

  @Event() dayChanged: EventEmitter<{}>;
  @Event() mouseOverDate: EventEmitter<string>;
  @Event() monthSelection: EventEmitter;

  private localCalendar: HTMLAqCalendarElement;

  componentDidLoad() {
    this.localCalendar = this.host.querySelector('aq-calendar');
    this.localCalendar.getCalendarData().then(data => {
      this.calendarData = data;
      if (this.isRange) this.checkDate();
    });
  }

  @Watch('value')
  handleValueChange(newValue, oldValue) {
    this.updateCalendarData(newValue, oldValue);
  }
  @Watch('selection')
  handleSelectionChange(newValue, oldValue) {
    this.updateLocalVariablesBySelection(newValue);
    this.updateCalendarData(newValue, oldValue);
  }
  updateLocalVariablesBySelection(newValue) {
    this.localStart = newValue.date?.start;
    this.localEnd = newValue.date?.end;
    this.localHover = newValue.date?.hover;
  }
  updateCalendarData(newValue, oldValue) {
    if (!!oldValue === false || newValue != oldValue) {
      setTimeout(() => {
        this.localCalendar.getCalendarData().then(data => {
          this.calendarData = data;
        });
      }, 100);
    }
  }
  getDateFromObject(date: IMonthSelection) {
    if(!!date) return DateTime.fromObject({
      month: date?.month,
      year: date?.year,
    })?.startOf('month');
  }
  checkDate() {
    const rangeMode = this.isStart ? RANGE_STATUS.START : RANGE_STATUS.END;

    emitEvent('onMonthSelection', this.host, {
      rangeMode,
      month: this.calendarData?.showed?.month,
      year: this.calendarData?.showed?.year,
    })
  }

  previousMonth() {
    this.localCalendar.previousMonth();
    this.localCalendar.getCalendarData().then(data => {
      this.calendarData = data;
      if (this.isRange) this.checkDate();
    });
  }

  nextMonth() {
    this.localCalendar.nextMonth();
    this.localCalendar.getCalendarData().then(data => {
      this.calendarData = data;
      if (this.isRange) this.checkDate();
    });
  }

  dayClicked(event: CustomEvent) {
    const selected = event.detail.value;
    this.emitValueChanged(selected);
  }

  emitValueChanged(newVal) {
    this.dayChanged.emit({
      calendar: this.calendarData,
      value: newVal,
    });
  }
  handleMouseOverDate({ detail }) {
    this.mouseOverDate.emit(detail);
  }

  get canGetPrevMonth() {
    if(!!this.value === false && !!this.selection?.date?.start === false) return false; 
    if (!this.isRange) return true;
    if (this.isEnd) {
      const currentEnd = this.getDateFromObject(this.currentEndDate);
      const currentStartDate = this.getDateFromObject(this.currentStartDate);

      const limitDate = currentStartDate?.startOf('month');
      return currentEnd?.minus({ months: 1 })?.diff(limitDate, 'months').months >= 1;
    } else return true;
  }
  get canGetNextMonth() {
    if(!!this.value === false && !!this.selection?.date?.start === false) return false; 
    if (!this.isRange) return true;
    if (this.isStart) {
      const currentStart = this.getDateFromObject(this.currentStartDate);
      const currentEndDate = this.getDateFromObject(this.currentEndDate);

      const limitDate = currentEndDate?.startOf('month');
      return limitDate?.diff(currentStart?.plus({ months: 1 }), 'months').months >= 1;
    } else return true;
  }
  get calendarSelectedValue() {
    return this.value;
  }

  render() {
    const getPrevMonth = this.canGetPrevMonth;
    const getNextMonth = this.canGetNextMonth;

    return (
      <Host class="aq-date">
        <div class="aq-date-wrapper">
          <div class="aq-date-controls">
            <button style={{ visibility: getPrevMonth ? 'visible' : 'hidden' }} onClick={this.previousMonth.bind(this)}>
              <em class="aq-icon-chevron-left"></em>
            </button>
            <div class="aq-date-info">
              {this.calendarData?.showed.monthName} {this.calendarData?.showed.year}
            </div>
            <button style={{ visibility: getNextMonth ? 'visible' : 'hidden' }} onClick={this.nextMonth.bind(this)}>
              <em class="aq-icon-chevron-right"></em>
            </button>
          </div>
          <aq-calendar
            uid={this.uid}
            is-range={this.isRange}
            has-time={this.hasTime}
            selection={this.isRange ? this.selection : null}
            mode={this.isRange ? DATE_MODE.RANGE : DATE_MODE.SINGLE}
            calendarInfo={this.calendarInfo}
            value={this.calendarSelectedValue}
            onDaysSelected={this.dayClicked.bind(this)}
            onMouseOverDate={evt => this.handleMouseOverDate(evt)}
          ></aq-calendar>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

================================================
# aq-date-picker



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property            | Attribute             | Description | Type                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Default                 |
| ------------------- | --------------------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------- |
| `bannerObject`      | `banner-object`       |             | `IBanner`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `undefined`             |
| `cid`               | `cid`                 |             | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `undefined`             |
| `closeOnClick`      | `close-on-click`      |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `true`                  |
| `format`            | `format`              |             | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `this.getDateISOFormat` |
| `hasTime`           | `has-time`            |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `undefined`             |
| `icon`              | `icon`                |             | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `undefined`             |
| `info`              | `info`                |             | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `undefined`             |
| `isDisabled`        | `is-disabled`         |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `undefined`             |
| `isError`           | `is-error`            |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `undefined`             |
| `isPlain`           | `is-plain`            |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `undefined`             |
| `isRange`           | `is-range`            |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `false`                 |
| `isReadonly`        | `is-readonly`         |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `undefined`             |
| `isRequired`        | `is-required`         |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `undefined`             |
| `label`             | `label`               |             | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `undefined`             |
| `placeholder`       | `placeholder`         |             | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `undefined`             |
| `placement`         | `placement`           |             | `"auto" \| "auto-end" \| "auto-start" \| "bottom" \| "bottom-end" \| "bottom-start" \| "left" \| "left-end" \| "left-start" \| "right" \| "right-end" \| "right-start" \| "top" \| "top-end" \| "top-start"` | `undefined`             |
| `ranges`            | `ranges`              |             | `IRange`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `RANGES`                |
| `showSummaryHeader` | `show-summary-header` |             | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `true`                  |
| `sublabel`          | `sublabel`            |             | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `undefined`             |
| `translations`      | `translations`        |             | `IDatePickerTranslation`                                                                                                                                                                                     | `DEFAULT_TRANSLATIONS`  |
| `value`             | `value`               |             | `IDateValue \| string`                                                                                                                                                                                       | `undefined`             |

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-date-picker/aq-date-picker.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, h, Host, Prop, State, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { IDatePicker } from './interfaces/IDatePicker';
import { Instance, Placement } from 'tippy.js';
import { IDateValue } from '../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { IBanner } from 'interfaces/common/IBanner';
import { RANGES } from '../utils/constants/ranges';
import { IRange } from '../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { DateFormatter, DateParser } from '../utils/helpers/dateService';
import { IDatePickerTranslation } from '../interfaces/ITranslations';
import { DEFAULT_TRANSLATIONS } from '../utils/constants/translations';
import { DATE_FORMAT } from '../utils/constants/format';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { DateTime } from 'luxon';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-date-picker',
  styleUrl: 'aq-date-picker.scss',
})
export class AqDatePicker implements IDatePicker {
  @Element() el;

  @Prop({ mutable: true }) value: string | IDateValue;
  @Prop() isDisabled: boolean;
  @Prop() isRequired: boolean;
  @Prop() isReadonly: boolean;
  @Prop() isError: boolean;
  @Prop() isPlain: boolean;
  @Prop() isRange: boolean = false;
  @Prop() hasTime: boolean;
  @Prop() ranges: IRange = RANGES;
  @Prop() showSummaryHeader: boolean = true;
  @Prop() sublabel: string;
  @Prop() label: string;
  @Prop() info: string;
  @Prop() placeholder: string;
  @Prop() cid: string;
  @Prop() icon: string;
  @Prop() format: string = this.getDateISOFormat;
  @Prop() placement: Placement;
  @Prop() closeOnClick = true;
  @Prop() translations: IDatePickerTranslation = DEFAULT_TRANSLATIONS;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) bannerObject: IBanner;

  @State() textFieldValue: string;
  @State() activatorElement = null;
  @State() localValue: string | IDateValue;
  @State() forceUpdate: number = 0;
  @State() popoverConfig = {
    hideOnClick: false,
    hideOnClickOutside: this.closeOnClick,
    appendTo: document.body,
    customMount: instance => {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        this.popoverInstance = instance;
      });
    },
  };

  popoverInstance: Instance;
  dateFormatter: DateFormatter;
  dateParser: DateParser;

  @Watch('value')
  onValueChange(newVal) {
    this.localValue = newVal;
    this.setTextFieldText(newVal);
  }

  @Watch('isRange')
  onIsRangeChange(newVal: boolean) {
      this.localValue = null;
      this.textFieldValue = '';
    this.activatorElement = null;
    if(newVal === false) {
    this.value = null;
    }
    this.forceReinitialize();
    setTimeout(() => {
        if (newVal === true) {
          const currentDay = this.setCurrentDay();
          this.value = this.dateFormatter.formatDateForValue(currentDay, this.isRange, this.getDateISOFormat);
        }
      this.loadInitDatePicker();
      }, 10);
    }
  

  constructor() {
    this.dateFormatter = new DateFormatter();
    this.dateParser = new DateParser();
  }

  forceReinitialize() {
    this.forceUpdate++;
  }

  handleBlur() {
    if (!this.popoverInstance?.state?.isMounted && !this.isReadonly) {
      this.popoverInstance?.show();
    }
  }
  setActivatorElement() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      const aqButton = this.el.querySelector('aq-button');
      const activator = aqButton.querySelector('button');
      if (activator) {
        this.activatorElement = activator;
      }
    });
  }
  setTextFieldText(value) {
    this.textFieldValue = this.dateFormatter.formatDateForDisplay(value, this.isRange, this.format);
  }
  setCurrentDay() {
    return this.isRange ? {
      start: DateTime.now().toFormat(this.getDateISOFormat),
      end: DateTime.now().plus({month: 1}).startOf('month').toFormat(this.getDateISOFormat)
    } : DateTime.now().toFormat(this.getDateISOFormat);
  }
  handleClick() {
    const textField = this.el.querySelector('aq-text-field');
    const input = textField.querySelector('input');
    input.readOnly = true;
    textField.querySelector('.aq-text-field__container').classList.add('aq-text-field--focus');
  }
  handleCloseHeaderSummary() {
    this.showSummaryHeader = false;
  }
  handleApply({ detail: { value, event } }) {
    this.setTextFieldText(value);
    this.value = this.dateFormatter.formatDateForValue(value, this.isRange, this.getDateISOFormat);
    this.popoverInstance?.hide();
    event.stopPropagation();
    emitEvent('input', this.el, { value: this.value }, event);
  }
  handleUpdate({ detail }) {
    this.localValue = detail;
  }
  handleClean() {
    this.localValue = this.value;
  }
  handleCancel({ detail }: { detail: MouseEvent }) {
    this.popoverInstance?.hide();
    this.handleClean();
    detail.stopPropagation();
  }
  handleCloseBanner() {
    this.bannerObject.value = false;
  }
  setCapitalize(value: string) {
    const upperCaseLetter = value.slice(0, 1).toUpperCase();
    return `${upperCaseLetter}${value.slice(1, value.length)}`;
  }

  get getDateISOFormat() {
    return this.hasTime ? DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO_WITH_TIME : DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO;
  }
  get getCssStyleAqTextField(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'autocomplete-error-text-field': this.isError,
    };
  }
  get getPopoverConfig() {
    return {
      ...this.popoverConfig,
      placement: this.placement,
      onHide: () => {
        const textField = this.el.querySelector('aq-text-field');
        textField.querySelector('.aq-text-field__container').classList.remove('aq-text-field--focus');
      },
    };
  }
  get getValueNotStringType() {
    return typeof this.value !== 'string';
  }
  get getContent() {
    if (this.isRange && !!this.ranges) return <aq-range></aq-range>;
    else if (typeof this.value === 'string') return <aq-date value={this.value}></aq-date>;
  }

  componentDidRender() {
    this.setActivatorElement();
  }

  loadInitDatePicker() {
    if(!!this.value) {
      this.localValue = typeof this.value !== 'string' && this.isRange ? { ...this.value } : this.value;
      this.setTextFieldText(this.localValue);
    } else {
      const currentDay = this.setCurrentDay();
      this.value = this.dateFormatter.formatDateForValue(currentDay, this.isRange, this.getDateISOFormat);
      emitEvent('input', this.el, { value: this.value });
    }
  }
  handleClickIconClose() {
    this.popoverInstance?.hide();
  }
  componentDidLoad() {
    this.loadInitDatePicker();
  }

  render() {
    const getPopoverConfig = this.getPopoverConfig;
    const cssStyleAqTextField = this.getCssStyleAqTextField;

    return (
      <Host class="aq-date-picker" id={this.cid}>
        <div class="aq-date-picker__activator">
          <aq-button isOutline onClick={() => this.handleClick()}></aq-button>
          <aq-text-field
            info={this.info}
            class={cssStyleAqTextField}
            label={this.label}
            isRequired={this.isRequired}
            sublabel={this.sublabel}
            value={this.textFieldValue}
            icon={this.icon}
            placeholder={this.placeholder}
            isDisabled={this.isDisabled}
            isPlain={this.isPlain}
            isError={this.isPlain ? false : this.isError}
            onBlur={() => this.handleBlur()}
            isReadonly={this.isReadonly}
          ></aq-text-field>
        </div>
        <aq-popover slot="popover" disabled={this.isDisabled || this.isReadonly} trigger={this.activatorElement} config={{ ...getPopoverConfig }}>
          <aq-date-picker-panel
            onClickIconClose={() => this.handleClickIconClose()}
            key={this.isRange? 'range': 'single'}
            isRange={this.isRange}
            hasTime={this.hasTime}
            value={this.localValue}
            translations={this.translations}
            realValue={this.value}
            showSummaryHeader={this.showSummaryHeader}
            ranges={{ ...this.ranges }}
            format={this.format}
            bannerObject={{ ...this.bannerObject }}
            onUpdate={evt => this.handleUpdate(evt)}
            onApply={evt => this.handleApply(evt)}
            onClean={() => this.handleClean()}
            onCancel={evt => this.handleCancel(evt)}
          ></aq-date-picker-panel>
        </aq-popover>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-date-picker-panel/aq-date-picker-panel.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, Event, EventEmitter, Fragment, h, Prop, State, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { IDateValue, IRange } from '../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { RANGES } from '../utils/constants/ranges';
import { IBanner } from 'interfaces/common/IBanner';
import { DateFormatter, DateParser, DateRangeService } from '../utils/helpers/dateService';
import { IDatePickerTranslation } from '../interfaces/ITranslations';
import { DATE_FORMAT } from '../utils/constants/format';
import { DateTime } from 'luxon';
import { UniqueIdGenerator } from 'utils/helpers/uidGenerator';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-date-picker-panel',
  styleUrl: 'aq-date-picker-panel.scss',
})
export class AqDatePickerPanel {
  @Element() host!: HTMLElement;

  @Prop() isRange: boolean = false;
  @Prop() hasTime: boolean = false;
  @Prop() value: string | IDateValue;
  @Prop() realValue: string | IDateValue;
  @Prop() showSummaryHeader: boolean = true;
  @Prop() ranges: IRange = RANGES;
  @Prop() format: string;
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) bannerObject: IBanner;
  @Prop() translations: IDatePickerTranslation;

  @State() localValue: string | IDateValue;
  @State() localTime: string | IDateValue;
  @State() shortcutRender: number = 0;
  @State() canShowRangeLabel: boolean = false;

  @Event() apply: EventEmitter<any>;
  @Event() clean: EventEmitter<void>;
  @Event() cancel: EventEmitter<MouseEvent>;
  @Event() update: EventEmitter<any>;
  @Event() clickIconClose: EventEmitter<void>;

  @Watch('value')
  onValueChange(newVal) {
    this.setLocalValue(newVal);
    if (this.hasTime) this.setLocalTime(newVal);
  }

  dateFormatter: DateFormatter;
  dateParser: DateParser;
  dateRangeService: DateRangeService;

  constructor() {
    this.dateFormatter = new DateFormatter();
    this.dateRangeService = new DateRangeService();
    this.dateParser = new DateParser();
  }

  getDateAndTime(value, time?) {
    const { start, end } = this.parseDateToGetTime(value, this.format);
    if (!!time) {
      const { start: startTime, end: endTime } = time;
      const isoFormat = this.getDateISOFormat;
      const startDate = this.dateFormatter.convertToISO(start, isoFormat, true, isoFormat).replace(/T([0-9\:]+)/g, `T${startTime}`);
      const endDate = this.dateFormatter.convertToISO(end, isoFormat, true, isoFormat).replace(/T([0-9\:]+)/g, `T${endTime}`);
      return { start: startDate, end: endDate };
    } else {
      return { start, end };
    }
  }
  formatDurationRange(value, time): string {
    const { start, end } = this.getDateAndTime(value, time);
    const durationRange = this.dateRangeService.formatDurationRange({ start, end }, this.getDateISOFormat);

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      this.canShowRangeLabel = durationRange.length > 0;
    });

    return durationRange;
  }
  handleUpdateRange({ detail }) {
    this.setLocalValue(detail);
    emitEvent('onUpdate', this.host, this.localValue)
  }
  handleCancel(evt) {
    this.cancel.emit(evt);
    this.setLocalValue(this.value);
  }
  handleClean() {
    this.clean.emit();
    this.setLocalValue(this.value);
  }
  handleCloseHeaderSummary() {
    this.clickIconClose.emit(); 
  }
  handleApply(value, evt) {
    const ISOFormat = this.getDateISOFormat;
    let date;
    if (this.hasTime) {
      date = this.getDateAndTime(this.localValue, this.localTime);
    }
    let format = !!date ? ISOFormat : this.format;
    let emittedValue =
      typeof value !== 'string'
        ? this.dateRangeService.convertRangeToISO(date || value, format, false, ISOFormat)
        : this.dateFormatter.convertToISO(value, ISOFormat, true, ISOFormat);
    this.apply.emit({ value: emittedValue, event: evt });
  }
  handleCloseBanner() {
    this.bannerObject.value = false;
  }
  handleDayChange(evt) {
    const {
      detail: { value },
    } = evt;
    if (this.hasTime && !this.isRange) {
      const time = this.extractHourAndMinute(this.localTime);
      this.localValue = this.dateFormatter.convertToISO(value, DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO, true, this.getDateISOFormat).replace(/T([0-9\:]+)/g, `T${time}`);
    } else {
      const format = this.getDateISOFormat;
      this.localValue = this.dateFormatter.convertToISO(value, format, true, format);
    }
  }
  handleTimeUpdate({ detail }) {
    if (typeof this.localTime !== 'string' && typeof this.localValue !== 'string') {
      const { value, type } = detail;
      const localTime = { ...this.localTime };
      localTime[type] = value[type];
      this.localTime = { ...localTime };
      const { start, end } = this.getDateAndTime(this.localValue, this.localTime);
      this.localValue = this.dateFormatter.formatRangeForDate({ start, end }, this.format);
    } else if (typeof this.localTime === 'string' && typeof this.localValue === 'string') {
      this.localTime = detail.value;
      let time = this.extractHourAndMinute(this.localTime);
      let format = this.getDateISOFormat;
      this.localValue = this.dateFormatter.convertToISO(this.localValue, format, true, format).replace(/T([0-9\:]+)/g, `T${time}`);
    }
  }
  handleRangeSelected({ detail }) {
    const value = this.dateFormatter.formatRangeForDate(detail, this.format);
    const { start, end } = this.getDateAndTime(value, this.localTime);
    this.localValue = this.dateFormatter.formatRangeForDate({ start, end }, this.format);
  }

  parseDateToGetTime(value, format?) {
    const isoFormat = this.getDateISOFormat;
    const hasFormat = !!format;
    const date =
      typeof value !== 'string'
        ? hasFormat
          ? this.dateFormatter.formatRangeForISO(value, format, false, isoFormat)
          : this.dateFormatter.formatRangeForISO(value, isoFormat, true, isoFormat)
        : this.dateParser.parseFromISO(value);
    return date as IDateValue;
  }
  extractHourAndMinute(value) {
    const dt = DateTime.fromISO(value);
    return `${dt.hour.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${dt.minute.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
  }
  setLocalValue(value) {
    if (!!value) {
      if (typeof value !== 'string') {
        const { start, end } = this.dateFormatter.formatRangeForDate(value, this.format);
        this.localValue = { start: `${start}`, end: `${end}` };
        this.forceShortcutRender();
      } else {
        this.localValue = this.dateFormatter.formatDate(value, this.getDateISOFormat);
      }
    }
  }
  forceShortcutRender() {
    this.shortcutRender++;
  }
  setLocalTime(value) {
    if (!!value && this.isRange) {
      const time = this.parseDateToGetTime(this.value);
      const start = this.extractHourAndMinute(time.start);
      const end = this.extractHourAndMinute(time.end);
      this.localTime = typeof value !== 'string' && typeof this.localTime !== 'string' ? { start, end } : value;
    } else if (!!value && !this.isRange) {
      this.localTime = this.extractHourAndMinute(value);
    }
  }

  get getCssStyleAqDatePicker(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-date-picker__content': true,
      'aq-date-picker__content--range': this.isRange,
      'aq-date-picker__content--individual': !this.isRange,
    };
  }
  get getCssStyleFooter(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-date-picker__footer': true,
      'aq-date-picker__footer--space-between': this.isRange,
    };
  }
  get getDateISOFormat() {
    return this.hasTime ? DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO_WITH_TIME : DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO;
  }
  get getHeaderIsRangeText() {
    if (typeof this.localValue !== 'string')
      return (
        <span class="summary-header__info-text">
          <span class="summary-header__info-text--label">{this.translations.range.start}:</span>
          <span class="summary-header__info-text">{this.localValue?.start}</span>
          <span class="summary-header__info-text--label summary-header__info-text--last">{this.translations.range.end}:</span>
          <span class="summary-header__info-text">{this.localValue?.end}</span>
        </span>
      );
  }
  get getHeaderText() {
    if (typeof this.localValue === 'string') { return <span class="summary-header__info-text">{this.dateFormatter.formatDate(this.localValue, this.format)}</span>; }
    else {
      return <span class="summary-header__info-text">{this.localValue?.start}</span>;
    }

  }
  get getHeaderContent() {
    return (
      this.showSummaryHeader && (
        <div class="aq-date-picker__summary-header">
          <div class="summary-header__info">
            <span class="summary-header__info-icon">
              <em class="aq-icon-calendar-dots"></em>
            </span>
            <span class="summary-header">{this.isRange ? this.getHeaderIsRangeText : this.getHeaderText}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="summary-header__close-icon" onClick={() => this.handleCloseHeaderSummary()}>
            <em class="aq-icon-close"></em>
          </div>
        </div>
      )
    );
  }
  get getRangesContent() {
    if (!!this.localValue && this.isRange && typeof this.localValue !== 'string' && typeof this.value !== 'string') {
      return (
          <aq-range-shortcuts
            ranges={{ ...this.ranges }}
            format={this.format}
            isoFormat={this.getDateISOFormat}
            value={{...this.localValue}}
            // version={this.shortcutRender}
            realValue={{...this.value}}
            translations={this.translations}
            onUpdate={evt => this.handleUpdateRange(evt)}
          ></aq-range-shortcuts>
      );
    }
  }
  get getContent() {
    if (this.isRange && !!this.ranges && typeof this.localValue !== 'string')
      return (
        <aq-range
          value={this.localValue}
          isoFormat={this.getDateISOFormat}
          format={this.format}
          translations={this.translations}
          hasTime={this.hasTime}
          onRangeSelected={evt => this.handleRangeSelected(evt)}
        ></aq-range>
      );
    else if (typeof this.localValue === 'string') {
      const uid = new UniqueIdGenerator().generateId();
      return <aq-date uid={uid} isRange={false} value={this.localValue} onDayChanged={evt => this.handleDayChange(evt)} hasTime={this.hasTime}></aq-date>;
    }
  }
  get getTimePicker() {
    if (this.isRange && !!this.ranges && typeof this.localTime !== 'string' && this.hasTime)
      return (
        <aq-range-time-picker
          value={this.localTime}
          isRange={this.isRange}
          translations={this.translations}
          onUpdateTime={evt => this.handleTimeUpdate(evt)}
        ></aq-range-time-picker>
      );
    else if (typeof this.localTime === 'string') {
      return (
        <div class="aq-date-time__wrapper">
          <aq-time-picker value={this.localTime} onChange={evt => this.handleTimeUpdate(evt as any)}></aq-time-picker>
        </div>
      );
    }
  }
  get getFooter() {
    return (
      <Fragment>
        {this.isRange && typeof this.localValue !== 'string' && !!this.localValue && (
          <div>
            {this.canShowRangeLabel && <span class="aq-date-picker__footer--label">{this.translations.range.range}:</span>}
            <span class="aq-date-picker__footer--value">{this.formatDurationRange(this.localValue, this.localTime)}</span>
          </div>
        )}
        <div>
          <aq-button variant="default" onClick={() => this.handleClean()}>
            {this.translations.clear}
          </aq-button>
          <aq-button is-outline onClick={evt => this.handleCancel(evt)}>
            {this.translations.cancel}
          </aq-button>
          <aq-button variant="primary" onClick={evt => this.handleApply(this.localValue, evt)}>
            {this.translations.apply}
          </aq-button>
        </div>
      </Fragment>
    );
  }
  get getBannerContent() {
    return (
      !!this.bannerObject &&
      this.bannerObject?.value && (
        <div class="aq-date-picker__banner">
          <aq-banner {...this.bannerObject} onClose={() => this.handleCloseBanner()}>
            {this.bannerObject.content}
          </aq-banner>
        </div>
      )
    );
  }
  get getCalendarsClasses() {
    return {
      'aq-date-picker__calendars--time': this.hasTime,
      'aq-date-picker__calendars': true,
    };
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    if(!!this.value) this.setLocalValue(this.value);
    if(this.hasTime && !!this.value) this.setLocalTime(this.value);
  }

  render() {
    const getCalendarsClasses = this.getCalendarsClasses;

    return (
      <Fragment>
        <div class={this.getCssStyleAqDatePicker}>
          {this.getHeaderContent}
          <div class="aq-date-picker__body">
            {this.getRangesContent}
            <div class="aq-date-picker__content">
              {this.getBannerContent}
              <div class={getCalendarsClasses}>{this.getContent}</div>
              {this.getTimePicker}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class={this.getCssStyleFooter}>{this.getFooter}</div>
      </Fragment>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-range/aq-range.tsx
================================================
// aq-range.tsx
import { Component, Host, h, State, Event, EventEmitter, Prop, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { IRangeSelection } from './interface/IRange';
import { DateTime } from 'luxon';
import { SELECTION } from '../utils/constants/ranges';
import { RANGE_STATUS, SELECTION_MODE } from '../utils/constants/selectionMode';
import { IDateValue, IMonthSelection } from '../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { UniqueIdGenerator } from 'utils/helpers/uidGenerator';
import { ICalendarInstance } from '../interfaces/ICalendarInfo';
import { IDatePickerTranslation } from '../interfaces/ITranslations';
import { DATE_FORMAT } from '../utils/constants/format';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-range',
  styleUrl: 'aq-range.scss',
})
export class AqRange {
  @Prop() value: IDateValue = { start: '', end: '' };
  @Prop() hasTime: boolean = false;
  @Prop() format: string;
  @Prop() translations: IDatePickerTranslation;
  @Prop() isoFormat: DATE_FORMAT = DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO;

  @State() startDate: string = '';
  @State() endDate: string = '';
  @State() status: number = null;
  @State() selection: IRangeSelection = SELECTION;
  @State() hoverDate: string = '';
  @State() startValue: string = '';
  @State() endValue: string = '';
  @State() currentStartDate: IMonthSelection = null;
  @State() currentEndDate: IMonthSelection = null;
  @State() calendarInfo: ICalendarInstance[];

  @Event() rangeSelected: EventEmitter<{ start: string; end: string }>;

  uidLeft: string;
  uidRight: string;

  @Watch('value')
  onValueChange(newVal) {
    this.setRange(newVal);
  }
  @Watch('selection')
  onSelectionChange(newVal: IRangeSelection) {
    if (!!newVal.date.start) this.currentStartDate = this.getMonthAndYear(newVal.date.start);
    if (!!newVal.date.end) this.currentEndDate = this.getMonthAndYear(newVal.date.end);
  }
  getMonthAndYear(date: string) {
    const cleanDate = date?.split('T')[0]; // elimina la hora si viene en formato ISO con tiempo
    if (!cleanDate) return null;
    const dateISO = DateTime.fromFormat(cleanDate, DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO).toISO();
    const month = DateTime.fromISO(dateISO).get('month');
    const year = DateTime.fromISO(dateISO).get('year');
    return { month, year };
  }
  setRange(value: IDateValue) {
    this.startValue = DateTime.fromFormat(value.start, this.format).toFormat(this.isoFormat);
    this.endValue = DateTime.fromFormat(value.end, this.format).toFormat(this.isoFormat);
    this.selection.mode = SELECTION_MODE.SELECTION;
    this.selection.date = {
      start: this.startValue,
      end: this.endValue,
      hover: '',
    };
    this.forceSelectionUpdate();
    this.setCalendarInfo({ start: this.startValue, end: this.endValue });
  }
  setCalendarInfo(value: IDateValue) {
    this.calendarInfo = [
      { uid: this.uidLeft, value: value.start },
      { uid: this.uidRight, value: value.end },
    ];
  }
  isInRange(date: string) {
    if (!this.startDate || !this.endDate) return false;
    const d = new Date(date).getTime();
    return d >= new Date(this.startDate).getTime() && d <= new Date(this.endDate).getTime();
  }
  isStart(date: string) {
    return date === this.startDate;
  }
  isEnd(date: string) {
    return date === this.endDate;
  }
  handleDayChange({ detail }) {
    switch (this.status) {
      case 1:
        this.finishSelection(detail);
        this.sortDate();
        break;
      case 2:
        this.resetSelection();
        this.handleDayChange({ detail });
        break;
      default:
        this.initSelection(detail);
        break;
    }
    this.forceSelectionUpdate();
  }
  resetSelection() {
    this.status = null;
    this.selection.mode = SELECTION_MODE.NONE;
    this.selection.date = {
      start: '',
      end: '',
      hover: '',
    };
  }
  setUID() {
    this.uidLeft = new UniqueIdGenerator().generateId();
    this.uidRight = new UniqueIdGenerator().generateId();
  }
  initSelection({ value }) {
    this.status = 1;

    this.selection.mode = SELECTION_MODE.HOVER;
    this.selection.date = {
      start: value.start,
      end: '',
      hover: '',
    };
  }
  finishSelection({ value }) {
    this.status = 2;
    this.selection.mode = SELECTION_MODE.SELECTION;
    this.selection.date = { ...this.selection.date, start: value.start, end: value.end };

    this.hoverDate = '';
    this.emitSelection();
  }
  forceSelectionUpdate() {
    const selection = { ...this.selection };
    this.selection = { ...selection };
  }
  sortDate() {
    const { start, end } = this.selection.date;

    const date1 = DateTime.fromISO(start);
    const date2 = DateTime.fromISO(end);

    this.selection.date = {
      ...this.selection.date,
      start: DateTime.min(date1, date2).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd'),
      end: DateTime.max(date1, date2).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd'),
    };
    this.startValue = this.selection.date.start;
    this.endValue = this.selection.date.end;
  }
  emitSelection() {
    const { start, end } = this.selection.date;
    this.rangeSelected.emit({ start, end });
  }
  updateHoverDate({ detail }) {
    this.selection.date.hover = detail;
    this.hoverDate = detail;
  }
  handleMonthSelection({ detail }) {
    const date = { month: detail.month, year: detail.year };

    if (detail.rangeMode === RANGE_STATUS.START) this.currentStartDate = date;
    if (detail.rangeMode === RANGE_STATUS.END) this.currentEndDate = date;
  }

  get getIdLeft() {
    return this.uidLeft;
  }
  get getIdRight() {
    return this.uidRight;
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.setUID();
    this.setCalendarInfo({ start: this.value.start, end: this.value.end });
  }

  render() {
    const idLeft = this.getIdLeft;
    const idRight = this.getIdRight;

    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-range">
          <aq-date
            uid={idLeft}
            calendarInfo={this.calendarInfo}
            selection={{ ...this.selection }}
            currentStartDate={this.currentStartDate}
            currentEndDate={this.currentEndDate}
            has-time={this.hasTime}
            is-range
            is-start
            time-picker-label={this.translations.range.start}
            onDayChanged={evt => this.handleDayChange(evt)}
            onMouseOverDate={evt => this.updateHoverDate(evt)}
            onMonthSelection={evt => this.handleMonthSelection(evt)}
          ></aq-date>
          <aq-date
            uid={idRight}
            calendarInfo={this.calendarInfo}
            selection={{ ...this.selection }}
            currentEndDate={this.currentEndDate}
            currentStartDate={this.currentStartDate}
            has-time={this.hasTime}
            is-range
            is-end
            time-picker-label={this.translations.range.end}
            onDayChanged={evt => this.handleDayChange(evt)}
            onMouseOverDate={evt => this.updateHoverDate(evt)}
            onMonthSelection={evt => this.handleMonthSelection(evt)}
          ></aq-date>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

import { SELECTION_MODE } from '../../utils/constants/selectionMode';

export interface IRangeSelection {
  mode: SELECTION_MODE;
  date: IDateValue;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-range-shortcuts/aq-range-shortcuts.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, Event, EventEmitter, h, Prop, State, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { RANGES } from '../utils/constants/ranges';
import { IRange } from '../aq-date-picker/interfaces/IRanges';
import { IDateValue } from '../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { DateTime } from 'luxon';
import { DATE_FORMAT } from '../utils/constants/format';
import { IDatePickerTranslation } from '../interfaces/ITranslations';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-range-shortcuts',
})
export class AqRangeShortcuts {
  @Element() el;
  @Prop() ranges: IRange = RANGES;
  @Prop() format: string;
  @Prop() isoFormat: DATE_FORMAT = DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO;
  @Prop() value: IDateValue;
  // @Prop() version: number = 0;
  @Prop() realValue: IDateValue;
  @Prop() translations: IDatePickerTranslation;

  @Watch('value')
  onValueChange(newVal) {
    this.setRangeSelection(newVal);
  }
  @Watch('ranges')
  onRangesChange(newVal) {
    this.localRanges = this.parseObject({ ...newVal });
  }

  @State() rangeSelection: string;
  @State() localRanges: IRange = RANGES;

  @Event() update: EventEmitter<{ start: string; end: string }>;

  handleRange(value: DateTime[], key: string) {
    if (this.rangeSelection !== key) {
      this.rangeSelection = key;
      emitEvent('update', this.el, {
        start: value[0].toFormat(this.isoFormat),
        end: value[1].toFormat(this.isoFormat),
      });
    }
  }
  setCapitalize(value: string) {
    const upperCaseLetter = value.slice(0, 1).toUpperCase();
    return `${upperCaseLetter}${value.slice(1, value.length)}`;
  }
  get getCustomRanges() {
    let date = { start: DateTime.fromISO(this.realValue.start).toFormat(this.format), end: DateTime.fromISO(this.realValue.end).toFormat(this.format) };
    let customRange = [DateTime.fromFormat(date.start, this.format), DateTime.fromFormat(date.end, this.format)];
    const parsedRange = this.parseObject({ ...this.ranges, custom: customRange });
    let localRanges = { ...parsedRange };
    return { values: Object.values(localRanges), keys: Object.keys(localRanges) };
  }
  parseToCompare(value, format) {
    return DateTime.fromFormat(value, format).toFormat(DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO);
  }
  isSameRange(rangeA: IDateValue, rangeB: IDateValue, format: string): boolean {
    const rangeBStart = this.parseToCompare(rangeB.start, format);
    const rangeBEnd = this.parseToCompare(rangeB.end, format);

    return DateTime.fromISO(rangeA.start).toFormat(DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO) === rangeBStart && DateTime.fromISO(rangeA.end).toFormat(DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO) === rangeBEnd;
  }
  parseValues(rangeValues: IRange) {
    const values = Object.values(rangeValues);
    const newValues = [];
    let rangeStartDate;
    let rangeEndDate;
    for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i++) {
      const [rangeStart, rangeEnd] = values[i];
      if (typeof rangeStart === 'string' && typeof rangeEnd === 'string') {
        rangeStartDate = DateTime.fromISO(rangeStart).startOf('day');
        rangeEndDate = DateTime.fromISO(rangeEnd).endOf('day');
        newValues.push([rangeStartDate, rangeEndDate]);
      } else {
        newValues.push(values[i]);
      }
    }
    return newValues;
  }
  parseObject(rangeValues: IRange) {
    const keys = Object.keys(rangeValues);
    const parsedRange = { ...rangeValues };
    const parsedValues = this.parseValues(this.ranges);
    keys.forEach((key, index) => {
      parsedRange[key] = parsedValues[index];
    });
    return parsedRange;
  }
  setRangeSelection(newVal: IDateValue) {
    if (!newVal || !newVal.start || !newVal.end) return;

    let foundMatch = this.translations.rangeSelection.custom; // Por defecto: "Custom"
    const keys = Object.keys(this.ranges);

    const parsedValues = this.parseValues(this.ranges);
    for (let i = 0; i < parsedValues.length; i++) {
      const [rangeStart, rangeEnd] = parsedValues[i];
      if (!!rangeStart === false || !!rangeEnd === false) break;

      const shortcut = { start: rangeStart.toFormat(DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO), end: rangeEnd.toFormat(DATE_FORMAT.FORMAT_ISO) };

      if (this.isSameRange(shortcut, newVal, this.format)) {
        foundMatch = keys[i];
        break;
      }
    }
    this.rangeSelection = foundMatch;
  }

  get getObjectSplit() {
    return { keys: Object.keys(this.localRanges), values: Object.values(this.localRanges) };
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    this.setRangeSelection(this.value);
  }

  render() {
    const { values, keys } = this.getCustomRanges;

    return (
      <div class="aq-date-picker__shortcuts">
        {keys.map((item: string, index: number) => (
          <button
            class={{ 'aq-date-picker__shortcuts-item': true, 'aq-date-picker__shortcuts-item--active': this.rangeSelection === keys[index] }}
            onClick={() => this.handleRange(values[index], keys[index])}
          >
            {this.setCapitalize(item)}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-date-picker/aq-range-time-picker/aq-range-time-picker.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, Event, EventEmitter, h, Host, Prop } from '@stencil/core';
import { IDateValue } from '../interfaces/IDateValue';
import { IDatePickerTranslation } from '../interfaces/ITranslations';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-range-time-picker',
  styleUrl: 'aq-range-time-picker.scss',
})
export class AqRangeTimePicker {
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @Prop({ mutable: true }) value: IDateValue;
  @Prop() translations: IDatePickerTranslation;
  @Prop() isRange: boolean;

  @Event() updateTime: EventEmitter<any>;

  handleUpdate(value, type) {
    const newValue = { ...this.value };
    newValue[type] = value.detail.value;
    this.updateTime.emit({
      value: newValue,
      type,
    });
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-range-time-picker-wrapper">
          <div class="aq-range-time-picker__item">
            <aq-time-picker label={`${this.translations.timeWrapper.start}:`} value={this.value?.start} onChange={evt => this.handleUpdate(evt, 'start')}></aq-time-picker>
          </div>
          <div class="aq-range-time-picker__item">
            <aq-time-picker label={`${this.translations.timeWrapper.end}:`} value={this.value?.end} onChange={evt => this.handleUpdate(evt, 'end')}></aq-time-picker>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}
