================================================
import { h, Component, Prop } from '@stencil/core';
import { Stroke, StrokeType } from './types/stroke';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-text-editor',
  styleUrl: 'aq-text-editor.scss',
})
export class AqTextEditor {
  @Prop() stroke: StrokeType;

  get classStroke() {
    let classStroke = '';
    if (this.stroke === 'plain') {
      classStroke = 'aq-text-field--plain';
    }
    return classStroke;
  }
  get getTextFieldClass() {
    return {
      'aq-text-field': true,
      'aq-text-field--plain': this.stroke === Stroke.Plain,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const textFieldClass = this.getTextFieldClass;

    return <div class={textFieldClass}></div>;
  }
}

@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/spacing' as spacing;

@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/extended-color' as extended-colors;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/font' as fonts;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/box-shadow' as box-shadow;

.aq-text-field {
  text-align: left;
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;

  &__label {
    align-items: center;
  }

  &__container {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto auto 1fr auto;

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/forms/aq-text-field/aq-text-field.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Event, EventEmitter, Prop, h, Watch, State, Element, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';
import { Label } from 'utils/helpers/label';
import { UniqueIdGenerator } from 'utils/helpers/uidGenerator';
import { ICON_CLOSE, ICON_DISCLOSURE } from './constants/Icons';
import { ITextField } from './interfaces/ITextField';
import { DEFAULT_MAX_LENGTH, MAX_LENGTH, TEXT_AREA_MAX_LENGTH } from './constants/MaxLength';
import { Events } from 'enum';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-text-field',
  styleUrl: 'aq-text-field.scss',
})
export class AqTextField implements ITextField {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value: string | number = '';
  
  @Prop({ mutable: true }) idTextField: string;
  @Prop() name: string;
  @Prop() type: ITextField['type'] = 'text';
  @Prop() autocomplete: ITextField['autocomplete'] = 'off';
  
  @Prop() iconClear = ICON_CLOSE;

  @Prop() label = '';
  @Prop() sublabel = '';
  @Prop() helperText = '';
  @Prop() placeholder = '';
  @Prop() icon = '';
  
  @Prop() textareaHeight = TEXT_AREA_MAX_LENGTH;
  @Prop() maxLength = DEFAULT_MAX_LENGTH;
  
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';
  @Prop() info = '';
  
  @Prop() isTextarea = false;
  @Prop() strictLength = false;
  @Prop() charCounter = false;
  
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() isReadonly = false;
  @Prop() isRequired = false;
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) isError = false;

  @Prop() hasDisclosure = false;
  @Prop() iconDisclosure = ICON_DISCLOSURE;

  @Prop() hasClear = false;
  @Prop() showClearOnHover = false;

  @Prop() isPlain = false;

  @State() localType = this.type;
  @State() hasFocus = false;

  @State() isPassword = false;
  @State() showPassword = false;

  @Event() clear: EventEmitter<{ clear: boolean; value: string | number; event: globalThis.Event }>;

  @Event() clickDisclosure: EventEmitter<{ clear: boolean; value: string | number; event: globalThis.Event }>;
  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  @Watch('value')
  protected valueChanged() {
    this.value = this.getValue();
  }

  @Method()
  async clearInput() {
    this.value = '';
    if (this.inputElement) {
      this.inputElement.value = '';
    }
  }

  private inputElement?: HTMLInputElement | HTMLTextAreaElement;
  private labelHelper = Label(this);

  private getValueLength() {
    const newValue = this.getValue();
    return newValue.length;
  }

  private getMaxLength() {
    return this.strictLength ? this.maxLength : MAX_LENGTH;
  }

  private getValue() {
    this.value == null ? '' : this.value;
    return this.value.toString();
  }

  private getHasError() {
    return this.isError && !this.isDisabled;
  }

  private getInputTypeConfig() {
    this.localType = this.type;
    if (this.type === 'password') this.isPassword = true;
  }

  private getShowPasswordIcon() {
    return {
      'aq-icon-sight-on': !this.showPassword,
      'aq-icon-sight-off': this.showPassword,
    };
  }

  private renderCounter() {
    return <aq-helper-text><span slot='text'>{`${this.getValueLength()}/${this.maxLength}`}</span></aq-helper-text>;
  }

  private getContainerClass() {
    return {
      'aq-text-field__container--plain': this.isPlain,
      'aq-text-field__container--error': this.getHasError(),
      'aq-text-field__container--disabled': this.isDisabled,
      'aq-text-field__container--readonly': this.isReadonly,
      'aq-text-field__container--textarea': this.isTextarea,
      'aq-text-field__container': true,
    };
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.getInputTypeConfig();
    this.idTextField = this.idTextField || new UniqueIdGenerator().generateId();
  }

  /* Events */
  private handleInput(event: globalThis.Event) {
    const input = event.target as HTMLInputElement | null;
    if (input) this.value = input.value || '';
    const newValue = this.getValue();
    emitEvent(Events.EVENT_NAME_INPUT, this.hostElement, { value: newValue, event }, event);
  }

  private handleChange(event?: globalThis.Event) {
    emitEvent(Events.EVENT_NAME_CHANGE, this.hostElement, { value: this.value, event }, event);
  }

  private handleFocus(hasFocus: boolean) {
    this.hasFocus = hasFocus;
    emitEvent(hasFocus ? Events.EVENT_NAME_FOCUS : Events.EVENT_NAME_BLUR, this.hostElement);
  }

  private handleClose(event: globalThis.Event) {
    this.clear.emit({ clear: true, value: this.value, event });
  }

  private handleDisclosure() {
    this.clickDisclosure.emit();
  }

  private toggleShowPasswordIcon() {
    this.showPassword = !this.showPassword;
    this.localType = this.showPassword ? 'text' : 'password';
  }

  render() {
    const showDisclosure = this.hasDisclosure && !this.isPassword && !this.isReadonly;
    const showClear = this.hasClear && !this.isPassword;

    return (
      <div class="aq-text-field">
        {this.labelHelper.isLabelVisible && (
          <aq-label class="aq-text-field__label" for={this.name || this.idTextField} {...this.labelHelper.bindsLabel}>
            <span slot="text">
              {this.label}
            </span>
          </aq-label>
        )}
        <div class={this.getContainerClass()}>
          {(this.sublabel || this.icon) && (
            <label class="aq-text-field__sublabel">
              {!this.isTextarea && <em class={`${this.icon} aq-text-field__icon`}></em>}
              <span>{this.sublabel}</span>
            </label>
          )}
          <div class="aq-text-field__left-content">
            <slot name="left-content"></slot>
          </div>
          {!this.isTextarea && (
            <input
              ref={el => this.inputElement = el}
              class="aq-text-field__input"
              placeholder={this.placeholder}
              autoComplete={this.autocomplete}
              id={this.idTextField}
              name={this.name}
              type={this.localType}
              value={this.value}
              disabled={this.isDisabled}
              readonly={this.isReadonly}
              required={this.isRequired}
              maxLength={this.getMaxLength()}
              onInput={e => this.handleInput(e)}
              onChange={e => this.handleChange(e)}
              onFocus={() => this.handleFocus(true)}
              onBlur={() => this.handleFocus(false)}
            />
          )}
          {this.isTextarea && (
            <textarea
              ref={el => this.inputElement = el}
              class="aq-text-field__input"
              placeholder={this.placeholder}
              id={this.idTextField}
              name={this.name}
              value={this.value}
              disabled={this.isDisabled}
              readonly={this.isReadonly}
              required={this.isRequired}
              maxLength={this.getMaxLength()}
              onInput={e => this.handleInput(e)}
              onChange={e => this.handleChange(e)}
              onFocus={() => this.handleFocus(true)}
              onBlur={() => this.handleFocus(false)}
              style={{ height: `${this.textareaHeight}px` }}
            />
          )}
          <div class="aq-text-field__right">
            {showClear && (
              <em
                class={`aq-text-field__icon-clear ${this.showClearOnHover ? 'aq-text-field__icon-clear--on-hover' : ''} ${this.iconClear}`}
                onClick={e => this.handleClose(e)}
              ></em>
            )}
            {showDisclosure && <em class={this.iconDisclosure} onClick={() => this.handleDisclosure()}></em>}
            {this.isPassword && <em onClick={() => this.toggleShowPasswordIcon()} class={this.getShowPasswordIcon()}></em>}
          </div>
        </div>
        {(this.helperText || this.charCounter) && (
          <div class="aq-text-field__footer-container">
            <aq-helper-text isError={this.getHasError()}><span slot='text'>{this.helperText}</span></aq-helper-text>
            {this.charCounter && this.renderCounter()}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/imagesAndIcons/aq-avatar/aq-avatar.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h, Fragment } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from '../../../types/StyleClassMap';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-avatar',
  styleUrl: 'aq-avatar.scss',
})
export class AqAvatar {
  @Prop() text: string = '';
  @Prop() showAvatar: boolean = true;
  @Prop() showText: boolean = true;

  @Prop() backgroundColor: string = '';
  @Prop() textColor: string = '';

  get getAvatarImage() {
    let letters = '';
    this.text.split(' ').forEach(letter => {
      if (letters?.length < 2) {
        letters += letter.charAt(0);
      }
    });
    return letters;
  }

  get customStyle() {
    const isColorBackgroundColor = this.getIsColor(this.backgroundColor);
    const isColorTextColor = this.getIsColor(this.textColor);

    const style = {};

    if(isColorBackgroundColor) style['--custom-avatar-background-color'] = this.backgroundColor;
    if(isColorTextColor) style['--custom-avatar-text-color'] = this.textColor;

    return style;
  }

  private getIsColor(color: string) {
    return !!color && (color.startsWith('#') || color.startsWith('rgb'));
  }

  private getStyleClassMap(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-avatar': true,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMap();
    return (
      <Fragment>
        <div class={cssClass}>
          {this.showAvatar && (
            <div class="aq-avatar__image" style={this.customStyle}>
              {this.getAvatarImage}
            </div>
          )}
          {this.showText && <div class="aq-avatar__text">{this.text}</div>}
        </div>
      </Fragment>
    );
  }
}

import { Component, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from '../../../types/StyleClassMap';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-divider',
  styleUrl: 'aq-divider.scss'
})
export class AqTag {
  @Prop() orientation: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' = 'horizontal';

  private getStyleClassMap(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-divider': true,
      [`aq-divider--${this.orientation}`]: true,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMap();
    return (
      <div class={cssClass}>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/imagesAndIcons/aq-transition/aq-transition.scss
================================================
.aq-transition {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 100%;
  // Fade basic styles
  &__fade {
    transition: opacity var(--transition-duration, 0.3s) ease;
  }

  // Slide basic styles
  &__slide {
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height var(--transition-duration, 0.3s) ease,
      opacity var(--transition-duration, 0.3s) ease;
  }

  // Collapse basic styles
  &__collapse {
    transition: transform var(--transition-duration, 0.3s) ease,
      opacity var(--transition-duration, 0.3s) ease;
  }

  // States
  &__visible {
    visibility: visible;
    opacity: 1;
    
    &.aq-transition__slide {
      max-height: 100%;
    }

    &.aq-transition__collapse {
      transform: scale(1) translateY(0);
    }
  }

  &__hidden {
    visibility: hidden;
    opacity: 0;

    &.aq-transition__slide {
      max-height: 0;
    }

    &.aq-transition__collapse {
      max-height: 0;
      transform: scaleY(0);
      transform-origin: top;
    }
  }
}


================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/imagesAndIcons/aq-transition/aq-transition.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h, Method } from '@stencil/core';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-transition',
  styleUrl: 'aq-transition.scss',
})
export class AqTransition {
  @Prop() visible: boolean = true;
  @Prop() transitionType: 'fade' | 'slide' | 'collapse' = 'collapse';
  @Prop() duration: string = '0.3s';


  @Method() async show() {
    this.visible = true;
  }

  @Method() async hide() {
    this.visible = false;
  }

  get cssClass() {
    return {
      'aq-transition': true,
      [`aq-transition__${this.transitionType}`]: true,
      'aq-transition__visible': this.visible,
      'aq-transition__hidden': !this.visible,

    };
  }
  render() {
    const cssClass = this.cssClass;
    const styles = {
      '--transition-duration': this.duration
    };

    return (
      <div class={cssClass} style={styles}>
        <slot></slot>
      </div>
    );
  }
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-breadcrumb/aq-breadcrumb.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, Element } from '@stencil/core';
import { Breadcrumb } from './types/BreadcrumdType';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-breadcrumb',
  styleUrl: 'aq-breadcrumb.scss',
})
export class AqBreadcrumb {
  @Prop() breadcrumbs: Array<Breadcrumb> = [];
  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  handleClick(breadcrumb: Breadcrumb, event: Event) {
    emitEvent('click', this.hostElement, { value: breadcrumb }, event);
  }

  render() {
    const activeIndex = this.breadcrumbs.findIndex(breadcrumb => breadcrumb?.active);
    const visibleBreadcrumbs = activeIndex >= 0 ? this.breadcrumbs.slice(0, activeIndex) : this.breadcrumbs;

    return (
      <p class="aq-breadcrumb">
        {visibleBreadcrumbs.map(breadcrumb => (
          <span class="aq-breadcrumb__item">
            <a onClick={event => this.handleClick(breadcrumb, event)}>{breadcrumb.label}</a>
            <span class="aq-breadcrumb__separator">/</span>
          </span>
        ))}
        {activeIndex >= 0 && (
          <span onClick={event => this.handleClick(this.breadcrumbs[activeIndex], event)} class="aq-breadcrumb__last-item">
            {this.breadcrumbs[activeIndex].label}
          </span>
        )}
      </p>
    );
  }
}



================================================

export type Breadcrumb = {
    url: string;
    label: string;
    active?: boolean;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-step-group/aq-step-content/aq-step-content.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Host, State, Method, Element } from '@stencil/core';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-step-content',
  styleUrl: 'aq-step-content.scss',
})

export class AqStepContent {
  @State() isActive = false;
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;
  @Method()
  async updateIsActive(isActive: boolean) {
    this.isActive = isActive;
  }

  cssClassContainerContent() {
    return {
      'aq-step-content': true,
    }
  }

  render() {
    const cssClassContainerContent = this.cssClassContainerContent();
    const stepGroup = this.el.closest('aq-step-group');
    const isVertical = stepGroup.isVertical;
    return (
      <Host hidden={!isVertical && !this.isActive} class={cssClassContainerContent}>
        <slot></slot>
      </Host>)
  }
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-step-group/aq-step-group-host/aq-step-group.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Element, Prop, State, Method, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { IStepGroup } from './interfaces/IStepGroup';
    
@Component({
  tag: 'aq-step-group',
  styleUrl: 'aq-step-group.scss',
})

export class AqStepGroup implements IStepGroup {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) currentStep = 1;
  @Prop() isVertical = false;

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;
  @State() stepsTitles: HTMLElement[] = [];
  @State() stepsContents: HTMLElement[] = [];

  @Watch('currentStep')
  currentStepHandler(newValue: number) {
    const stepContents = this.el.querySelectorAll('aq-step-content');
    if(newValue > stepContents.length) {
      newValue = stepContents.length;
    }
    if(newValue < 1) {
      newValue = 1;
    }
    stepContents.forEach((stepContent, index) => {
      if (index === newValue - 1) {
        stepContent.updateIsActive(true);
      }
      else {
        stepContent.updateIsActive(false);
      }
    });
  }

  @Method()
  async registerStepTitle(step: HTMLElement) {
    const stepsTitles = this.el.querySelectorAll('aq-step-title');
    const item = step as HTMLAqStepTitleElement;
    const index = Array.from(stepsTitles).indexOf(item);
    return {index, total: stepsTitles.length};
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.stepsTitles = Array.from(this.el.querySelectorAll('aq-step-title'));
    this.stepsContents = Array.from(this.el.querySelectorAll('aq-step-content'));
    this.currentStepHandler(this.currentStep);
  }

  private getContainerClass(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-step-group': true,
      'aq-step-group--vertical': this.isVertical,
      'aq-step-group--horizontal': !this.isVertical,
    };
  }

  private mutationObservers: MutationObserver[] = [];

  componentDidLoad() {
    this.observeStepSlotChanges();
  }
  
  disconnectedCallback() {
    this.mutationObservers.forEach(observer => observer.disconnect());
    this.mutationObservers = [];
  }  

  private observeStepSlotChanges() {
    this.mutationObservers.forEach(observer => observer.disconnect());
    this.mutationObservers = [];
    this.stepsTitles.forEach((step) => {
      const stepTitle = step.querySelector('aq-step-title');

      if (stepTitle) {
        const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
          this.stepsTitles = Array.from(this.el.querySelectorAll('aq-step-title'));
        });
        observer.observe(stepTitle, { attributes: true });
        this.mutationObservers.push(observer);
      }
    });
  }

  render() {
    const containerCssClass = this.getContainerClass()

    return (
      this.isVertical ? (
        <div class={containerCssClass}>
          {this.stepsTitles.map((_step, index) => {
            return (
              <div style={{display: 'flex', gap: '10px'}}>
                <slot name={`title-${index + 1}`}></slot>
                <slot name={`content-${index + 1}`}></slot>
              </div>
            )
          })
        }
        </div>
      ) : (
          <div>
            <div class={containerCssClass}>
              {this.stepsTitles.map((_step, index) => {
                return (
                  <slot name={`title-${index + 1}`}></slot>
                )
              })}
            </div>
            <div class="aq-step-group__content">
              {this.stepsContents.map((_step, index) => {
                return (
                  <slot name={`content-${index + 1}`}></slot>
                )
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
      )
    )
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-step-group/aq-step-group-host/interfaces/IStepGroup.ts
================================================
export interface IStepGroup {
    currentStep: number;
    isVertical: boolean;

    // Watcher functions
    currentStepHandler(newValue: number): void;

    // Methods
    registerStepTitle(step: HTMLElement): Promise<{
        index: number;
        total: number;
    }>;
}

      &::before {
        content: "";
        border-top: spacing.$spacing-size-basic dashed colors.$color-danger-base;
      }
    }
    &--complete {
      &::before {
        content: "";
        border-top: spacing.$spacing-size-basic solid colors.$color-primary-base;
      }
    }
    &--active-with-error {
      &::before {
        content: "";
        border-top: spacing.$spacing-size-basic solid colors.$color-danger-base;
      }
    }
  }

  &__step-container-horizontal__after { 
    &::after {
      border-top: spacing.$spacing-size-basic dashed colors.$color-paper-dark;
    }
    &--active {
      &::after {
        content: "";
        border-top: spacing.$spacing-size-basic dashed colors.$color-primary-base;
      }
    }
    &--complete {
      &::after {
        content: "";
        border-top: spacing.$spacing-size-basic solid colors.$color-primary-base;
      }
    }  
    &--error {
      &::after {
        content: "";
        border-top: spacing.$spacing-size-basic dashed colors.$color-danger-base;
      }
    }
    &--active-with-error {
      &::after {
        content: "";
        border-top: spacing.$spacing-size-basic solid colors.$color-danger-base;
      }
    }
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-step-group/aq-step-title/aq-step-title.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, State, Element, Method, Watch } from '@stencil/core';
import { IStepTitle, StepTitleStatus } from './interfaces/IStepTittle';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-step-title',
  styleUrl: 'aq-step-title.scss',
})

export class AqStepTitle implements IStepTitle {
  @Prop({ reflect: true }) status: IStepTitle['status'] = StepTitleStatus.DEFAULT;

  @State() numberStep: any;
  @State() isVertical: boolean;
  @State() totalSteps: number;
  @State() stepsTitles: IStepTitle[];

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  componentDidLoad() {
    this.getStatusBeforeStep();
  }
  
  componentWillLoad() {
    this.stepsTitles = Array.from(this.el.closest('aq-step-group')?.querySelectorAll('aq-step-title') || []);
  }
  
  async connectedCallback() {
    const stepGroup = this.el.closest('aq-step-group');
    this.isVertical = stepGroup.isVertical;
    if (stepGroup) {
      const {index, total} = await stepGroup.registerStepTitle(this.el);
      this.numberStep = index;
      this.totalSteps = total;
    }
  }
  
  @Watch('status')
  statusChanged() {
    this.updateAfterStep();
  }

  @Watch('numberStep')
  numberStepChanged() {
    this.getStatusBeforeStep();
  }

  updateAfterStep() {
    this.stepsTitles?.[this.numberStep + 1]?.updateStatus({status: this.status});
  }

  @Method()
  async updateStatus({status}: {status: IStepTitle['status']}) {
    this.previousStatus = status;
  }

  getStepIcon(status: IStepTitle['status']) {
    const stepStatusClass = {
      active: status === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE,
      error: status === StepTitleStatus.ERROR,
      'aq-step-title__step-number': true,
    }

    if(status === StepTitleStatus.COMPLETE) return <em class="aq-step-group__step-icon aq-icon-check-circle complete"></em>;
    if(status === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE_WITH_ERROR) return <em class="aq-step-group__step-icon aq-icon-alert-circle active-with-error"></em>;
    return <div class={stepStatusClass}>{this.numberStep}</div>;
  }

  getLineBefore() {
    const verticalLine = 'aq-step-title__vertical-line-before';
    return {
      [verticalLine]: this.isVertical,
      [`${verticalLine}--initial`]: this.previousStatus === undefined,
      [`${verticalLine}--default`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.DEFAULT,
      [`${verticalLine}--active`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE,
      [`${verticalLine}--error`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.ERROR,
      [`${verticalLine}--complete`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.COMPLETE,
      [`${verticalLine}--active-with-error`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE_WITH_ERROR,
    }
  }

  getLine() {
    const verticalLine = 'aq-step-title__vertical-line';
    return {
      [verticalLine]: this.isVertical && this.numberStep !== this.totalSteps - 1,
      [`${verticalLine}--initial`]: this.previousStatus === undefined,
      [`${verticalLine}--default`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.DEFAULT,
      [`${verticalLine}--active`]: this.status === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE,
      [`${verticalLine}--error`]: this.status === StepTitleStatus.ERROR,
      [`${verticalLine}--complete`]: this.status === StepTitleStatus.COMPLETE,
      [`${verticalLine}--active-with-error`]: this.status === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE_WITH_ERROR,
    }
  }

  @State() previousStatus: string;

  getStatusBeforeStep() {
    this.previousStatus = this.stepsTitles?.[this.numberStep-1]?.getAttribute('status');
  }

  cssClassContainerHorizontal() {
    const lastStep = this.numberStep === this.totalSteps - 1;
    const stepTitleContainer = 'aq-step-title__step-container-horizontal'

    return {
      [stepTitleContainer]: true,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__before`]: this.numberStep !== 0,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__after`]: !lastStep,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__after--active`]: this.status === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE && !lastStep,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__after--error`]: this.status === StepTitleStatus.ERROR && !lastStep,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__after--complete`]: this.status === StepTitleStatus.COMPLETE && !lastStep,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__after--active-with-error`]: this.status === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE_WITH_ERROR && !lastStep,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__before--active`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__before--error`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.ERROR,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__before--complete`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.COMPLETE,
      [`${stepTitleContainer}__before--active-with-error`]: this.previousStatus === StepTitleStatus.ACTIVE_WITH_ERROR,
    }
  }

  cssClassContainerVertical() {
    return {
      'aq-step-title__step-container-vertical': true,
    }
  }

  render() {
    return (
        this.isVertical ? (
          <div class={this.cssClassContainerVertical()}>
          <div class="aq-step-title__step-header-vertical">
            <div class={this.getLineBefore()}></div>
            {this.getStepIcon(this.status)}
            <div class={this.getLine()}></div>
          </div>
          
          <div class="aq-step-title__content-vertical">
            <slot></slot>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : (
          <div>
            <div class={this.cssClassContainerHorizontal()}>
            <div class="aq-step__step-header-horizontal">
                {this.getStepIcon(this.status)}
            </div>
          </div>
            <div class="aq-step-title__content-horizontal">
            <slot></slot>
          </div>
        </div>
      )    
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-step-group/aq-step-title/interfaces/IStepTittle.ts
================================================
import type { ComponentInterface } from "@stencil/core";

export enum StepTitleStatus { 
  DEFAULT = 'is-default',
  ACTIVE = 'is-active',
  COMPLETE = 'is-complete',
  ERROR = 'is-error',
  ACTIVE_WITH_ERROR = 'is-active-with-error',
}

export interface IStepTitle extends ComponentInterface {
  status: StepTitleStatus | `${StepTitleStatus}`;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-tab-group/aq-tab/aq-tab.tsx
================================================
import { Component, State, Element, Prop, Host, h, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { ITab } from './interfaces/ITab';
import { DefaultColors } from 'enum';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-tab',
  styleUrl: 'aq-tab.scss',
})
export class AqTab implements ITab {
  @Prop() text = '';
  @Prop() state: ITab['state'] = DefaultColors.DEFAULT;
  @Prop() icon = '';
  @Prop() number = 0;
  @Prop() customClass = '';
  @Prop() isDraggable = false;
  @Prop() isDisabled = false;

  @State() index = 1;
  @State() selectedIndex = 0;
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  get isActive() {
    return this.selectedIndex === this.index;
  }

  get isText() {
    return this.text?.length > 0;
  }

  get getNumber() {
    return this.number > 0;
  }
  private getClassAqTabText(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-tab__text': true,
      'aq-tab__badge': this.getNumber,
    };
  }

  private getClassIcon(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      [this.icon]: true,
      'aq-tab__content__icon': true,
    };
  }

  private getClassAqButton(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-tab__button': true,
      'aq-tab': true,
      'aq-tab--selected': this.isActive,
    };
  }
  private isIcon() {
    return this.icon && this.icon !== '';
  }
  private getIcon() {
    const cssClassIcon = this.getClassIcon();
    return this.isIcon && <em class={cssClassIcon}></em>;
  }

  private getClassSelected(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-tab__selected-bar': true,
      'aq-tab__selected-bar--active': this.isActive,
    };
  }
  clickTab(event: Event) {
    const tabGroup = this.el.closest('aq-tab-group');
    if (!tabGroup) return;

    const sibling = tabGroup.querySelectorAll('aq-tab-items')[0];
    if (sibling) {
      (sibling as HTMLAqTabItemsElement).updateSelectTab(this.index);
    }
    tabGroup.clickTab?.(this.index);

    event?.stopPropagation();
  }

  @Method()
  async updateSelectTab(val: number) {
    if (!this.isDisabled) this.selectedIndex = val;
  }

  async connectedCallback() {
    const parentElement = this.el.closest('aq-tab-group');
    if (parentElement) {
      this.index = await parentElement.registerTab?.(this.el);
      parentElement.addEventListener('tapGroupChange', this.handleStepChange.bind(this));
    }

    if (this.isDisabled) {
      const Tabs = parentElement.querySelectorAll('aq-tab');
      this.selectedIndex = this.index + 1;
      Tabs[this.index].updateSelectTab(this.selectedIndex);
    }

    if (this.selectedIndex === 0) this.selectedIndex = 1;
  }

  handleStepChange(event: CustomEvent<number>) {
    this.selectedIndex = event.detail;
  }

  render() {
    const cssClassAqTabText = this.getClassAqTabText();
    const cssClassAqButton = this.getClassAqButton();
    const cssClassSelected = this.getClassSelected();
    const icon = this.getIcon();

    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-tab__container">
          <div class="aq-tab__sublabel">
            <slot name="subtitle"></slot>
          </div>
          <button type="button" disabled={this.isDisabled} class={cssClassAqButton} onClick={event => this.clickTab(event)}>
            {this.isDraggable && (
              <span class="aq-tab__draggable">
                <em class="aq-icon-six-dots"></em>
              </span>
            )}

            <div class="aq-tab__content">
              <div class="aq-tab__content--justify">
                <div class={cssClassAqTabText}>
                  {icon}
                  <slot></slot>
                </div>
                {this.getNumber && (
                  <aq-badge isDisabled={this.isDisabled} state={this.state} customClass={this.customClass}>
                    {this.number.toString()}
                  </aq-badge>
                )}
              </div>
              <slot name="subtitle"></slot>
            </div>
            <div class={cssClassSelected}></div>
          </button>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

import { DefaultColorsType } from 'types';
import { CoreColorsType } from 'types/colors/CoreColors';

export interface ITab {
  text: string;
  state: DefaultColorsType | CoreColorsType;
  icon: string;
  number: number;
  customClass: string;
  isDraggable: boolean;
  isDisabled: boolean;

  index: number;
  selectedIndex: number;
  el: HTMLElement;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-tab-group/aq-tab-group-host/aq-tab-group.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Host, Element, Event, EventEmitter, State, Prop, h, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import { ITabGroup } from './interfaces/ITabGroup';
import { Alignment } from 'enum';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-tab-group',
  styleUrl: 'aq-tab-group.scss',
})
export class AqTabGroup implements ITabGroup {
  @Prop() value = 0;
  @Prop() vertical = false;
  @Prop() align: ITabGroup['align'];

  @State() selectedIndex = 0;

  @Event() tapGroupChange: EventEmitter<number>;
  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  get isAlignTabs() {
    return this.align === Alignment.LEFT;
  }
  get getClassAqTabGroupContainer() {
    return {
      'aq-tab-group__container': true,
      'aq-tab-group__container--vertical': this.vertical,
    };
  }
  get getClassAqTabGroupTabs() {
    return {
      'aq-tab-group__tabs': true,
      'aq-tab-group__tabs--vertical': this.vertical,
      'aq-tab-group__tabs--horizontal__right': this.isAlignTabs,
    };
  }
  
  @Method()
  async registerTab(tab: HTMLElement) {
    const tabGroups = this.el.closest('aq-tab-group');
    const tabGroup = tabGroups.querySelectorAll('aq-tab');
    const item = tab as HTMLAqTabElement;
    const index = Array.from(tabGroup).indexOf(item);
    return index + 1;
  }

  @Method()
  async clickTab(index: number) {
    this.selectTab(index);
    this.tapGroupChange.emit(index);
  }

  selectTab(index: number) {
    this.selectedIndex = index;
    emitEvent('change', this.el, this.selectedIndex);
  }
  render() {
    const cssClassAqTabGroupTabs = this.getClassAqTabGroupTabs;
    const cssClassAqTabGroupContainer = this.getClassAqTabGroupContainer;
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class="aq-tab-group">
          <div class= {cssClassAqTabGroupContainer}>
            <div class={cssClassAqTabGroupTabs}>
              <slot></slot>
            </div>
            <div class="aq-tab-group__content">
              <slot name="content" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-tab-group/aq-tab-group-host/interfaces/ITabGroup.ts
================================================
import { SideAligmentType, StyleClassMap } from "types";

export interface ITabGroup {
  align: SideAligmentType;

  get isAlignTabs(): boolean;
  get getClassAqTabGroupContainer(): StyleClassMap;
  get getClassAqTabGroupTabs(): StyleClassMap;
}

import { Component, Element, State, Watch, Host, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { ITabItem } from './interfaces/ITabItem';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-tab-item',
  styleUrl: 'aq-tab-item.scss',
})
export class AqTabItem implements ITabItem {
  @State() numberStep = 1;
  @State() selectedIndex = 0;

  private isDisabled = false;

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @Watch('selectedIndex')
  handleselectedIndexChange() {
    if (this.numberStep === this.selectedIndex && !this.isDisabled) this.show();
    else this.hide();
  }

  show() {
    this.el.style.display = 'block';
  }

  hide() {
    this.el.style.display = 'none';
  }

  private getIsDisabled() {
      const tabsItems = this.el.closest('aq-tab-items');
      if (!tabsItems) return false;
      const tabGroup = tabsItems.closest('aq-tab-group');
      const Tabs = tabGroup.querySelectorAll('aq-tab');
      if (!Tabs) return false;
      this.isDisabled = (Tabs[this.numberStep-1] as HTMLAqTabElement).isDisabled;
  }


  componentDidRender() {
    this.getIsDisabled();
    this.handleselectedIndexChange();
  }
  
  async componentDidLoad() {
    const parentElement = this.el.closest('aq-tab-items');
    if (parentElement) {
      this.numberStep = await parentElement.registerTabItem?.(this.el);
      parentElement.addEventListener('tabItemChange', this.handleStepChange.bind(this));
    }
    if (this.selectedIndex === 0) this.selectedIndex = 1;
    if (this.isDisabled) {
      const tabGroup = parentElement.closest('aq-tab-group');
      const Tabs = tabGroup.querySelectorAll('aq-tab');

      let consecutive = true;
      let lastDisabledIndex = -1;
      for (let i = 0; i < Tabs.length; i++) {
        if ((Tabs[i] as HTMLAqTabElement).isDisabled) {
          if (consecutive) {
            lastDisabledIndex = i;
          }
        } else {
          if (lastDisabledIndex !== -1) {
            consecutive = false;
            break;
          }
        }
      }
      
      if (lastDisabledIndex !== -1 && !consecutive) {
        this.selectedIndex = lastDisabledIndex + 2;
      }
      parentElement.updateSelectTab(this.selectedIndex);
    }

  }

  handleStepChange(event: CustomEvent<number>) {
    this.selectedIndex = event.detail;
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host>
        <slot></slot>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}



================================================

export interface ITabItem {
  numberStep: number;
  selectedIndex: number;
  el: HTMLElement;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-tab-group/aq-tab-items/aq-tab-items.tsx
================================================
import { Component, State, Host, Event, EventEmitter, Prop, Element, Method, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { Sizes } from 'utils/helpers/sizes';
import { ITabItems } from './interfaces/ITabItems';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-tab-items',
  styleUrl: 'aq-tab-items.scss',
})
export class AqTabItems implements ITabItems {
  @Prop() maxHeight = '';
  @Prop() minHeight = '';
  @Prop() maxWidth = '';
  @Prop() minWidth = '';
  @Prop() height = '';
  @Prop() width = '';

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  @State() selectedIndex = 1;
  @Event() tabItemChange: EventEmitter<number>;

  @Method()
  async updateSelectTab(val: number) {
    this.selectedIndex = val;
    this.tabItemChange.emit(this.selectedIndex);
  }

  @Method()
  async registerTabItem(tab: HTMLElement) {
    const tabsItems = this.el.closest('aq-tab-items');
    const TabItem = tabsItems.querySelectorAll('aq-tab-item');
    const Item = tab as any;
    const tabIndex = Array.from(TabItem).indexOf(Item);
    return tabIndex + 1;
  }

  private SizesHelper = Sizes(this);
  async componentWillLoad() {
    await this.updateSelectTab(this.selectedIndex);
  }

  get isVertical() {
    const tabGroup = this.el.previousElementSibling as HTMLAqTabGroupElement;
    if (!tabGroup) return false;

    return tabGroup.vertical;
  }
  private getClassAqTabItems(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-tab-items': !this.isVertical,
      'aq-tab-items--vertical': this.isVertical,
      'aq-scroll-bar': true,
    };
  }
  render() {
    const cssClaaAqTabItems = this.getClassAqTabItems();
    return (
      <Host class={cssClaaAqTabItems} style={this.SizesHelper.mixinSizeStyle}>
        <slot></slot>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/navigations/aq-tab-group/aq-tab-items/interfaces/ITabItems.ts
================================================
export interface ITabItems {
  maxHeight: number | string;
  minHeight: number | string;
  maxWidth: number | string;
  minWidth: number | string;
  height: number | string;
  width: number | string;
  el: HTMLElement;
  selectedIndex: number;

  updateSelectTab(val: number): Promise<void>;
  registerTabItem(tab: HTMLElement): Promise<number>;

  get isVertical(): boolean;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/overlays/aq-dialog/aq-dialog.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Host, State, Event, EventEmitter, Element, Prop, Watch, h, Listen, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import { UniqueIdGenerator } from 'utils/helpers/uidGenerator';
import { ZIndex } from 'utils/helpers/zIndex';
import { IDialog } from './interfaces/IDialog';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-dialog',
  styleUrl: 'aq-dialog.scss',
})
export class AqDialog implements IDialog {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value = false;
  @Prop() hasCloseIcon = true;
  @Prop() closeOnBackdrop = true;
  @Prop() closeOnEscape = true;

  @Prop() titleDialog = '';
  @Prop() size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' | 'full' = 'small';
  @Prop() state: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | '' = '';

  @Prop() hasHeader = true;
  @Prop() allowMaximize = false;
  @Prop() woPadding = false;
  @Prop() footer = true;
  @Prop() idDialog = '';

  @State() uid = '';
  @State() baseZIndex = 0;
  @State() isMaximize = false;

  @Event() close: EventEmitter<void>;
  @Event() open: EventEmitter<void>;

  @Element() el: HTMLElement;

  private zIndexManager = ZIndex.getInstance();

  @Watch('value')
  watchHandlerValue(newValue: boolean) {
    if (newValue) this.show();
    else this.hide();

    emitEvent('input', this.el, { value: this.value });  
  }

  @Listen('keydown', { target: 'window' })
  handleKeyDown(event: KeyboardEvent) {
    event.stopPropagation();
    if (event.key === 'Escape' && this.closeOnEscape) {
      if (this.zIndexManager.getLastIndex(this.uid)) {
        this.zIndexManager.deleteZIndex(this.uid);
        this.value = false
      };
    }
  }

  @Listen('click', { target: 'window' })
  handleDirectiveClick(event: Event) {
    const target = event.target as HTMLElement;
    const idToggle = this.el.id;
    const directive = `aq-dialog-${idToggle}`;
    const getElement = target.closest(`[aq-dialog], .${directive}`);
    if (getElement) {
      const hasDirective = getElement.classList.contains(directive);
      if (hasDirective && !this.value) {
        this.value = true;
      }
    }
  }

  validateUid() {
    this.uid = this.idDialog.length > 0 ? this.idDialog : new UniqueIdGenerator().generateId();
  }

  private getIcon() {
    let icon = '';
    switch (this.state.toLowerCase()) {
      case 'info':
        icon = 'aq-icon-info-circle-fill';
        break;
      case 'success':
        icon = 'aq-icon-check-circle-fill';
        break;
      case 'warning':
        icon = 'aq-icon-info-major-triangle-up-fill';
        break;
      case 'danger':
        icon = 'aq-icon-alert-circle-fill';
        break;
      default:
        icon = '';
    }

    const classIcon = {
      ['aq-dialog__state--' + this.getState]: true,
      [icon]: true,
    };
    return <em class={classIcon}></em>;
  }

  get getState() {
    return this.state.toLowerCase();
  }

  get contentStyle() {
    return {
      zIndex: JSON.stringify(this.baseZIndex + 1),
    };
  }

  get backDropStyle() {
    return {
      zIndex: JSON.stringify(this.baseZIndex),
    };
  }

  get showHeader() {
    return this.hasHeader && this.titleDialog;
  }

  get showMaximize() {
    return this.allowMaximize && this.size !== 'full';
  }

  private getStyleAqDialogMaximize() {
    return {
      'aq-dialog__maximize': true,
      'aq-icon-arrows-in': this.isMaximize,
      'aq-icon-arrows-out': !this.isMaximize,
    };
  }

  private handleMaximize() {
    this.isMaximize = !this.isMaximize;
  }
  private getIconMaximize() {
    const cssClassAqDialogMaximize = this.getStyleAqDialogMaximize();
    return this.showMaximize && <em class={cssClassAqDialogMaximize} onClick={() => this.handleMaximize()}></em>;
  }

  @Method()
  async hide() {
    this.value = false;
    this.isMaximize = false;
    this.zIndexManager.deleteZIndex(this.uid);
    this.close.emit();
  }

  @Method()
  async show() {
    this.value = true;
    this.baseZIndex = this.zIndexManager.setZIndex(this.uid);
    this.open.emit();
  }

  private handleClose(event: Event) {
    this.value = false;
    event.stopPropagation();
  }

  getIconClose() {
    return this.hasCloseIcon && <em class="aq-icon-close aq-dialog__close" onClick={event => this.handleClose(event)}></em>;
  }

  getStyleAqDialogBody() {
    return {
      'aq-dialog__body aq-scroll-bar': true,
      'aq-dialog__body--wo-padding ': this.woPadding,
    };
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.validateUid();
  }

  getStyleAqDialogContent() {
    return {
      'aq-dialog__content': true,
      'aq-dialog__content--full': this.isMaximize,
      ['aq-dialog__content--' + this.size]: !this.isMaximize,
    };
  }

  closeBackdrop() {    
    if (this.closeOnBackdrop)
      this.value = false;
  }
  render() {
    const cssClassAqDialogContent = this.getStyleAqDialogContent();
    const icon = this.getIcon();
    const iconMaximize = this.getIconMaximize();
    const iconClose = this.getIconClose();

    const cssClassAqDialogBody = this.getStyleAqDialogBody();

    return (
      <Host class="aq-dialog">
        <aq-transition transitionType="fade">
          <div class={cssClassAqDialogContent} style={{ display: this.value ? 'flex' : 'none', ...this.contentStyle }}>
            {this.hasHeader && (
              <div class="aq-dialog__header">
                <div class="aq-dialog__header-content">
                  <div class="aq-dialog__header-left">
                    {icon}
                    <slot name="before-title" slot="before-title"></slot>
                    <span>{this.titleDialog}</span>
                    <slot name="after-title" slot="after-title"></slot>
                  </div>
                  <div class="aq-dialog__header-right">
                    <slot name="header-right" slot="header-right"></slot>
                    {iconMaximize}
                    {iconClose}
                  </div>
                </div>
                { this.showHeader && <aq-divider></aq-divider> }
              </div>
            )}
            <div class={cssClassAqDialogBody}>
              <slot></slot>
            </div>
            {
              this.footer && (
                <div class="aq-dialog__footer">
                  <aq-divider></aq-divider>
                  <div class="aq-dialog__footer-content">
                    <slot name="footer-left" slot="footer-left"></slot>
                    <slot name="footer-right" slot="footer-right"></slot>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )
            }
          </div>
        </aq-transition>
        <aq-transition transitionType="fade"  >
          <div class="aq-dialog__backdrop" style={{ display: this.value ? 'block' : 'none', ...this.backDropStyle }} onClick={() => this.closeBackdrop()}></div>
        </aq-transition>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/overlays/aq-dialog/interfaces/IDialog.ts
================================================
import { EventEmitter } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';

export interface IDialog {
  value: boolean;
  size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' | 'full';
  state: string;
  hasHeader: boolean;
  titleDialog: string;
  hasCloseIcon: boolean;
  allowMaximize: boolean;
  woPadding: boolean;
  footer: boolean;
  closeOnBackdrop: boolean;
  closeOnEscape: boolean;
  idDialog: string;

  uid: string;
  baseZIndex: number;
  isMaximize: boolean;

  close: EventEmitter;
  open: EventEmitter;

  el: HTMLElement;

  hide(): void;
  show(): void;
  validateUid(): void;

  get getState(): string;
  get contentStyle(): object;
  get backDropStyle(): object;

  getStyleAqDialogContent: () => StyleClassMap;
  getIconClose: () => StyleClassMap;
}

@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/color' as colors;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/extended-color' as extended-colors;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/font' as fonts;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/spacing' as spacing;
@use '@aqua-ds/style-guidelines/scss/variables/box-shadow' as box-shadow;

.aq-drawer {
  font-family: fonts.$font-family-basic;
  
  position: fixed;
  height: 100%;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  
  transform: translateX(100%);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: transform 0.4s ease, opacity 0.4s ease;
  
  background-color: colors.$color-white;
  box-shadow: 0 .5rem .75rem rgba(19,19,22,.15);
  
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  
  &.open {
    transform: translateX(0);
    opacity: 1;
  }

  &--small {
    width: 448px;
  }
  &--medium {
    width: 640px;
  }
  &--large {
    width: 960px;
  }

  &--float-left {
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    transform: translateX(-100%);
  }
  &--float-right {
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
  }

  &__backdrop {
    position: fixed;
    background-color: #000;
    opacity: 0.1;
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    z-index: 1148;
  }

  &__title {
    color: colors.$color-paper-darker !important;
  }

  &__icon-close, &__back-icon {
    color: colors.$color-paper-darker;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

    &--info {
      color: colors.$color-primary-base;
    }
    &--warning {
      color: colors.$color-warning-base;
    }
    &--danger {
      color: colors.$color-danger-base;
    }
    &--success {
      color: colors.$color-success-base;
    }
  }

  &__header {
    display: flex; 
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    height: 3.5rem;
    gap: spacing.$spacing-size-short;
    padding: spacing.$spacing-size-moderate spacing.$spacing-size-moderate spacing.$spacing-size-moderate spacing.$spacing-size-large;
  }
  
  &__header-content {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: spacing.$spacing-size-minor;
    width: 100%;
    color: colors.$color-paper-darker;
  }

    display: flex;

    width: 100%;
  }

  &__content {

  }

  &__footer {

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/overlays/aq-drawer/aq-drawer.tsx
================================================
import { Component, h, Prop, State, Event, Element, EventEmitter, Fragment, Host, Watch, Listen, Method } from '@stencil/core';
import { UniqueIdGenerator } from 'utils/helpers/uidGenerator';
import { ZIndex } from 'utils/helpers/zIndex';

import { PopoverWidths } from 'enum/PopoverWidths';
import type { StyleClassMap } from 'types/StyleClassMap';
import { emitEvent } from 'utils/helpers/eventEmitter';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-drawer',
  styleUrl: 'aq-drawer.scss',
})
export class AqDrawer {
  @Prop({ mutable: true, reflect: true }) value: boolean = false;
  @Prop() hasCloseIcon: boolean = true;
  @Prop() hasBackIcon: boolean = false;
  @Prop() closeOnBackdrop: boolean = true;
  @Prop() closeOnEscape: boolean = false;

  @Prop() icon: string = '';
  @Prop() titleDrawer: string = '';
  @Prop() floatSide: 'right' | 'left' = 'right';
  @Prop() size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' = 'small';
  @Prop() state: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | '' = '';

  @Prop() options: any[] = [];

  @State() showActions = true;

  @State() idDrawer = '';
  @State() uid = '';
  @State() baseZIndex = 0;

  @Event() close: EventEmitter<void>;
  @Event() open: EventEmitter<void>;

  @Element() hostElement!: HTMLElement;

  private zIndexManager = ZIndex.getInstance();

  @Watch('value')
  watchHandlerValue(newValue: boolean) {
    if (newValue) this.show();
    else this.hide();

    emitEvent('input', this.hostElement, { value: this.value });
  }

  @Listen('keydown', { target: 'window' })
  handleKeyDown(event: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (event.key === 'Escape' && this.closeOnEscape) {
      if (this.zIndexManager.getLastIndex(this.uid)) {
        this.zIndexManager.deleteZIndex(this.uid);
        this.value = false;
      }
    }
  }

  @Listen('click', { target: 'window' })
  handleDirectiveClick(event: Event) {
    const target = event.target as HTMLElement;
    const idToggle = this.hostElement.id;
    const directive = `aq-drawer-${idToggle}`;
    const getElement = target.closest(`[aq-drawer], .${directive}`);
    if (getElement) {
      const hasDirective = getElement.classList.contains(directive);
      if (hasDirective && !this.value) this.value = true;
    }
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.validateUid();
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      this.baseZIndex = this.zIndexManager.setZIndex(this.uid);
    });
  }

  get contentStyle() {
    return {
      zIndex: JSON.stringify(this.baseZIndex + 1),
    };
  }

  get backDropStyle() {
    return {
      visibility: this.value ? 'visible' : 'hidden',
      zIndex: JSON.stringify(this.baseZIndex),
    };
  }

  validateUid() {
    this.uid = this.idDrawer.length > 0 ? this.idDrawer : new UniqueIdGenerator().generateId();
  }

  closeDrawer() {
    this.value = false;
  }

  @Method()
  async hide() {
    this.value = false;
    this.zIndexManager.deleteZIndex(this.uid);
    this.close.emit();
  }

  @Method()
  async show() {
    this.value = true;
    this.baseZIndex = this.zIndexManager.setZIndex(this.uid);
    this.open.emit();
  }

  closeBackdrop() {
    if (this.closeOnBackdrop) this.closeDrawer();
  }

  private checkSlotContent(slotName: string) {
    const hasSlot = this.hostElement.querySelector(`[slot=${slotName}]`);
    return hasSlot;
  }

  private hasOptions() {
    return this.options.length > 0;
  }

  private getStateIcon() {
    const stateIconClass = {
      info: `aq-icon-info-circle-fill aq-drawer__state-icon--info`,
      success: `aq-icon-check-circle-fill aq-drawer__state-icon--success`,
      danger: `aq-icon-alert-circle-fill aq-drawer__state-icon--danger`,
      warning: `aq-icon-info-major-triangle-up-fill aq-drawer__state-icon--warning`,
    };

    const currentStateIconClass = stateIconClass[this.state] || '';

    return <em class={currentStateIconClass}></em>;
  }

  private getFooter() {
    const hasFooterContent = this.checkSlotContent('footer-left') || this.checkSlotContent('footer-right');

    return (
      <Fragment>
        {hasFooterContent && <aq-divider></aq-divider>}
        <div class="aq-drawer__footer">
          <div>{hasFooterContent && <slot name="footer-left"></slot>}</div>
          <div>{hasFooterContent && <slot name="footer-right"></slot>}</div>
        </div>
      </Fragment>
    );
  }

  private getHeader() {
    const hasHeaderSlot = this.checkSlotContent('header');
    const showHeaderTitle = this.icon || this.titleDrawer || hasHeaderSlot;

    return (
      <Fragment>
        <div class="aq-drawer__header">
          {this.hasBackIcon && <em onClick={() => this.closeDrawer()} class="aq-drawer__back-icon aq-icon-chevron-left"></em>}
          {showHeaderTitle && (
            <div class="aq-drawer__header-content">
              {this.icon && <em class={this.icon}></em>}
              {hasHeaderSlot && <slot name="header"></slot>}
              {this.titleDrawer && (
                <aq-heading level={5} customClass="aq-drawer__title">
                  <span slot="text">
                    {this.titleDrawer}
                  </span>
                </aq-heading>
              )}
              {this.getStateIcon()}
            </div>
          )}
          <div class="aq-drawer__header-right">
            {this.hasOptions() && (
              <aq-dropdown items={this.options} popoverWidth={PopoverWidths.AUTO} placement="bottom">
                <aq-button slot="activator">
                  <em class="aq-icon-three-dots-vertical"></em>
                </aq-button>
              </aq-dropdown>
            )}
            {this.hasCloseIcon && (
              <span onClick={() => this.closeDrawer()}>
                <i class="aq-drawer__icon-close aq-icon-close"></i>
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
        {showHeaderTitle && <aq-divider></aq-divider>}
      </Fragment>
    );
  }

  private getStyleClassMap(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-drawer': true,
      'open': this.value,
      [`aq-drawer--float-${this.floatSide}`]: true,
      [`aq-drawer--${this.size}`]: true,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMap();
    return (
      <Host>
        <div class={cssClass} style={this.contentStyle}>
          <div>{this.getHeader()}</div>
          <div class="aq-drawer__content">
            <slot></slot>
          </div>
          {this.getFooter()}
        </div>
        <aq-transition transitionType="fade">
          <div class="aq-drawer__backdrop" style={this.backDropStyle} onClick={() => this.closeBackdrop()}></div>
        </aq-transition>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/overlays/aq-popover/aq-popover.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Host, h, Prop, State, Watch, Element, Method, Event, EventEmitter } from '@stencil/core';
import { Popover } from '../../../utils/helpers/popover';
import { Trigger } from 'types/PopoverTrigger';
import { POPOVER_CONFIG } from '../../../constants/PopoverConfig';
import { IPopoverComponent } from './interfaces/IPopoverComponent';
import { IPopover } from '../../../interfaces/common/IPopoverConfig';
import { Instance, Props } from 'tippy.js';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-popover',
  styleUrl: 'aq-popover.scss',
  shadow: false,
})
export class AqPopover implements IPopoverComponent {
  @Element() element: Element;

  @Prop() trigger: Trigger;
  @Prop() config: IPopover = POPOVER_CONFIG;
  @Prop() disabled: boolean = false;

  @State() slot: Element;

  localConfig: IPopover = POPOVER_CONFIG;
  popoverConfig: Instance<Props>[];
  instance: Popover;

  @Event() aqshow: EventEmitter;
  @Event() aqhide: EventEmitter;

  @Watch('config')
  onConfigChange(newVal: IPopover) {
    this.localConfig = newVal;
  }
  @Watch('trigger')
  onTriggerChange() {
    this.getSlot();
    this.createPopover();
  }
  @Watch('disabled')
  onDisabledChange() {
    this.getSlot();
    this.createPopover();
  }

  @Method()
  async setInstance() {
    if (!this.disabled && !!this.slot) {
      this.instance = new Popover(this.trigger);
      const config = {
        content: this.slot,
        ...this.localConfig,
        ...this.config,
      };
      this.buildPopoverInstance(config);
    }
  }

  createPopover() {
    this.setDefaultConfig();
    this.setInstance();
  }
  buildPopoverInstance(config: IPopover) {
    this.popoverConfig = this.instance.buildInstance({ ...config });
  }
  setDefaultConfig() {
    this.localConfig = {
      ...POPOVER_CONFIG,
      onShow: instance => {
        this.aqshow.emit(instance);
      },
      onHide: () => {
        this.aqhide.emit();
      },
      ...this.config,
    };
  }
  setElement(el: Element) {
    this.slot = el;
  }
  getSlot() {
    const slot = this.element;

    if (slot instanceof HTMLElement) {
      this.setElement(slot);
    } else {
      console.error('Popover: no valid slot found for the popover.', slot);
    }
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    this.createPopover();
  }

  render() {
    this.getSlot();
    return (
      <Host class="aq-popover">
        <div>{this.disabled ? <slot name="popover"></slot> : null}</div>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/overlays/aq-popover/interfaces/IPopoverComponent.ts
================================================
import { Trigger } from '../../../../types/PopoverTrigger';
import { Popover } from '../../../../utils/helpers/popover';
import { IPopover } from '../../../../interfaces/common/IPopoverConfig';
import { Instance, Props } from 'tippy.js';

export interface IPopoverComponent {
  // Props
  trigger?: Trigger;
  config: IPopover;
  disabled: boolean;

  // State
  instance: Popover;
  popoverConfig?: Instance<Props>[];
  slot?: Element;
  localConfig: IPopover;

  // Async methods
  setInstance: () => void;

  // Methods
  setDefaultConfig: () => void;
  setElement: (el: HTMLElement) => void;
  getSlot: () => void;
}

  border-color: transparent;
  border-style: solid;
}
.tippy-content {
  pointer-events: all;
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.45;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  white-space: normal;
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

  bottom: 0;
}

}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/overlays/aq-tooltip/aq-tooltip.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Element, Host, Prop, State, Watch, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { Popover } from '../../../utils/helpers/popover';
import { IPopover } from '../../../interfaces/common/IPopoverConfig';
import { TOOLTIP_CONFIG } from '../../../constants/TooltipConfig';
import { IPopoverComponent } from '../interfaces/IPopoverComponent';
import { Trigger } from 'types/PopoverTrigger';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-tooltip',
  styleUrls: ['aq-tooltip.scss', 'aq-tooltip-theme.scss', 'aq-tooltip-animation.scss'],
  shadow: false,
})
export class AqTooltip implements IPopoverComponent {
  @Element() element: Element;

  @Prop() config: IPopover = TOOLTIP_CONFIG;
  @Prop() trigger: Trigger;
  @Prop() isDisabled: boolean = false;

  @State() slot: Element;
  @State() parent: HTMLElement;

  instance: Popover;
  localConfig: IPopover = TOOLTIP_CONFIG;

  @Watch('config')
  onConfigChange(newVal: IPopover) {
    this.localConfig = newVal;
  }
  @Watch('trigger')
  onTriggerChange() {
    this.getSlot();
    this.createTooltip();
  }

  setDefaultConfig() {
    this.localConfig = {
      ...TOOLTIP_CONFIG,
      ...this.config,
    };
  }
  setInstance() {
    if (!this.isDisabled) {
      this.instance = new Popover([this.parent]);
      this.instance.buildInstance({
        content: this.element,
        ...this.localConfig,
        ...this.config,
      });
    }
  }
  createTooltip() {
    this.setDefaultConfig();
    this.setInstance();
  }
  setParent(el: ChildNode) {
    this.parent = el.parentElement;
  }
  setElement(el: Element) {
    this.slot = el;
    this.setParent(el);
  }
  getSlot() {
    const slot = this.element;
    if (!!slot) {
      this.setElement(slot);
    }
  }

  componentWillLoad() {
    this.getSlot();
    this.setDefaultConfig();
    this.onConfigChange(this.config);
  }

  componentDidLoad() {
    this.createTooltip();
  }

  render() {
    return (
      <Host hidden={this.isDisabled}>
        <slot></slot>
      </Host>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/overlays/interfaces/IPopoverComponent.ts
================================================
import { Trigger } from '../../../types/PopoverTrigger';
import { Popover } from '../../../utils/helpers/popover';
import { IPopover } from '../../../interfaces/common/IPopoverConfig';
import { Instance, Props } from 'tippy.js';

export interface IPopoverComponent {
  // Props
  trigger?: Trigger;
  config: IPopover;
  isDisabled: boolean;

  // State
  instance: Popover;
  popoverConfig?: Instance<Props>[];
  slot?: Element;
  localConfig: IPopover;

  // Async methods
  setInstance: () => void;

  // Methods
  setDefaultConfig: () => void;
  setElement: (el: HTMLElement) => void;
  getSlot: () => void;
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/titlesAndText/aq-heading/aq-heading.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { IPopover } from '../../../interfaces/common/IPopoverConfig';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-heading',
  styleUrl: 'aq-heading.scss',
})
export class AqHeading {
  @Prop() info = '';
  @Prop() customClass = '';
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';

  @Prop() level: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 = 2;

  private getTooltip() {
    const getConfig: IPopover = {};
    getConfig.placement = 'top';
    if (!!this.tooltipWidth) getConfig.maxWidth = this.tooltipWidth;
    return (
      !!this.info && (
        <aq-tooltip config={{ ...getConfig }}>
          <span> {this.info} </span>
        </aq-tooltip>
      )
    );
  }

  render() {
    const tooltip = this.getTooltip();

    const Tag = `h${this.level}`;
    return (
      <Tag class={`${this.customClass} aq-heading`}>
        <slot name="text"></slot>
        {!!this.info && (
          <span class="aq-heading__tooltip">
            {tooltip}
            <span class="aq-icon-info-circle" />
          </span>
        )}
      </Tag>
    );
  }
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/titlesAndText/aq-label/aq-label.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from '../../../types/StyleClassMap';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-label',
  styleUrl: 'aq-label.scss',
})
export class AqLabel {
  @Prop() for = '';
  @Prop() info = '';
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';

  @Prop() isDisabled = false;
  @Prop() isRequired = false;

  private getStyleClassMap(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-label': true,
      'is-disabled': this.isDisabled,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMap();
    return (
      <div class={cssClass}>
        <label htmlFor={this.for}>
          <slot name="text"></slot>
        </label>

        {this.isRequired && <span class="aq-label__required">*</span>}
        {!!this.info && (
          <span>
            <aq-tooltip config={{ placement: 'top', maxWidth: this.tooltipWidth }}>
              <span> {this.info} </span>
            </aq-tooltip>
            <span class="aq-icon-info-circle" />
          </span>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/titlesAndText/aq-link/aq-link.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';
import { StyleClassMap } from '../../../types/StyleClassMap';
import { ILink } from './interfaces/ILink';
import { TargetLink } from './enum/TargetLink';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-link',
  styleUrl: 'aq-link.scss',
})
export class AqLabel implements ILink {
  @Prop() target = TargetLink.SELF;
  @Prop() href = '';

  @Prop() isDisabled = false;

  private getStyleClassMap(): StyleClassMap {
    return {
      'aq-link': true,
      'is-disabled': this.isDisabled,
    };
  }

  render() {
    const cssClass = this.getStyleClassMap();
    return (
      <a rel="noopener" href={this.href} target={this.target} class={cssClass}>
        <slot name="text"></slot>
      </a>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/titlesAndText/aq-link/enum/TargetLink.ts
================================================
export enum TargetLink {
    BLANK = '_blank',
    SELF = '_self',
    PARENT = '_parent',
    TOP = '_top',
    FRAMENAME = 'framename',
}


================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/titlesAndText/aq-link/interfaces/ILink.ts
================================================
import { TargetLink } from "../enum/TargetLink";

export interface ILink {
    target: TargetLink | `${TargetLink}`;
    href: string;
    isDisabled: boolean;
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/components/titlesAndText/aq-subheading/aq-subheading.tsx
================================================
import { Component, Prop, h } from '@stencil/core';

@Component({
  tag: 'aq-subheading',
  styleUrl: 'aq-subheading.scss',
})
export class AqSubheading {
  @Prop() isRequired = false;
  @Prop() tooltipWidth = '';
  @Prop() info = '';
  @Prop() level: 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 = 2;
  @Prop() customClass = '';

  get infoIsVisible() {
    return this.info?.length > 0;
  }

  private getTooltip() {
    return (
      this.info !== '' && (
        <aq-tooltip config={{ placement: 'top', maxWidth: this.tooltipWidth }}>
          <span>{this.info}</span>
        </aq-tooltip>
      )
    );
  }
  render() {
    const Tag = `h${this.level}`;

    const tooltip = this.getTooltip();
    return (
      <Tag class="aq-subheading">
        <slot name="text"></slot>
        {this.isRequired && <span class="aq-subheading--required"></span>}
        <span>
          {tooltip}
          {this.info && <span class="aq-icon-alert-circle aq-subheading__info" aria-hidden="true" />}
        </span>
      </Tag>
    );
  }
}

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/directives/init.ts
================================================
class InitDirectives {
  private directives = {};
  private static _instance: InitDirectives;
  private appliedDirectives = new WeakMap();

  private constructor() {}

  public static getInstance(): InitDirectives {
    if (!InitDirectives._instance) {
      InitDirectives._instance = new InitDirectives();
    }
    return InitDirectives._instance;
  }

  private elementHasDirective(element: HTMLElement): boolean {
    return Object.keys(this.directives).some(dir => element.hasAttribute(dir));
  }

  private applyDirectives(root: Node) {
    Object.keys(this.directives).forEach(directiveName => {
      const selector = `[${directiveName}]`;
      const elements =
        root instanceof HTMLElement && root.matches(selector)
          ? [root]
          : (root as HTMLElement).querySelectorAll(selector);
        
      elements.forEach((el: HTMLElement) => {
        if (this.appliedDirectives.has(el)) return;
        this.appliedDirectives.set(el, true);

        const value = el.getAttribute(directiveName);
        let parsedValue = value;

        if (value) {
          try {
            parsedValue = JSON.parse(value);
          } catch (e) {
            console.warn(`Error parsing JSON in ${directiveName}:`, value);
          }
        }

        this.directives[directiveName](el, parsedValue);
      });
    });
  }

  initDirectives = () => {
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        this.applyDirectives(document.body);
      });
    } else {
      this.applyDirectives(document.body);
    }

    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutationsList => {
      for (const mutation of mutationsList) {
        if (mutation.type === 'childList' && mutation.target !== document.body) {
          if (mutation.target.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
            const el = mutation.target as HTMLElement;
            if (this.elementHasDirective(el)) {
              this.applyDirectives(el);
            }
          }

          mutation.addedNodes.forEach((node: Node) => {
            if (node.nodeType !== Node.ELEMENT_NODE) return;
            const el = node as HTMLElement;

            this.applyDirectives(el);
          });

          mutation.removedNodes.forEach(node => {
            if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
              this.cleanupDirectives(node);
            }
          });
        } else if (mutation.type === 'attributes') {
          const directiveName = this.getDirectiveNameFromAttribute(mutation.attributeName);
          if (directiveName && this.directives[directiveName] && mutation.target instanceof HTMLElement) {
            const el = mutation.target;
            const newValue = el.getAttribute(mutation.attributeName);
            this.directives[directiveName](el, this.parseDirectiveValue(newValue));
          }
        }
      }
    });

    observer.observe(document.body, {
      childList: true,
      subtree: true,
      attributes: true,
      attributeFilter: Object.keys(this.directives),
    });

    return observer;
  };

  registerDirective = (name: string, callback: Function) => {
    this.directives[name] = callback;
  };

  private getDirectiveNameFromAttribute = (attributeName: string | null) => {
    if (attributeName && attributeName.startsWith('aq-')) return attributeName;
    return null;
  };

  private parseDirectiveValue = (value: string | null) => {
    if (!value) return null;
    try {
      return JSON.parse(value);
    } catch {
      return value;
    }
  };

  private cleanupDirectives(root: Node) {
    Object.keys(this.directives).forEach(directiveName => {
      const selector = `[${directiveName}]`;
      const elements =
        root instanceof HTMLElement && root.matches(selector)
          ? [root]
          : (root as HTMLElement).querySelectorAll(selector);

      elements.forEach(el => {
        if (this.directives[directiveName].destroy) {
          this.directives[directiveName].destroy(el);
        }
      });
    });
  }
}

export default InitDirectives.getInstance();



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/directives/spinner.ts
================================================
import { Directives } from 'enum';

export const AqDirectiveSpinner = (element: HTMLElement, content: any) => {
  const parent = element;

  const directiveContent = typeof content === 'object' ? content.show : content;

  if (parent && directiveContent) {
    const hasSpinner = parent.querySelector(`.${Directives.SPINNER}`);
    const hasSpinnerBackdrop = parent.querySelector(`.${Directives.SPINNER}-backdrop`);

    if (hasSpinner && hasSpinnerBackdrop) return;

    const backdropLoader = document.createElement('div');
    const divSpinner = document.createElement('div');
    divSpinner.classList.add(`${Directives.SPINNER}`);
    divSpinner.innerHTML = `
    <div class="${Directives.SPINNER}-load-animation">
      <div class="${Directives.SPINNER}-load-animation__1"></div>
      <div class="${Directives.SPINNER}-load-animation__2"></div>
      <div class="${Directives.SPINNER}-load-animation__3"></div>
    </div>
    `;
    divSpinner.style.position = typeof content === 'object' && content.isGlobal ? 'fixed' : '';
    backdropLoader.setAttribute('class', `${Directives.SPINNER}-backdrop`);
    backdropLoader.style.position = typeof content === 'object' && content.isGlobal ? 'fixed' : '';
    if (parent.style.position !== 'absolute') {
      // eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
      parent.style.position = 'relative';
    }
    parent.classList.add(`${Directives.SPINNER}-directive`);
    parent.appendChild(backdropLoader);
    parent.appendChild(divSpinner);
  } else if (parent && !directiveContent) {
    parent.classList.remove(`${Directives.SPINNER}-directive`);
    const childs = parent.children;
    const remove: Array<Element> = [];

    for (let i = 0; i <= childs.length - 1; i++) {
      if (childs[i].className.includes(`${Directives.SPINNER}`)) remove.push(childs[i]);
    }

    remove.forEach(x => {
      x.remove();
    });
  }
};

export default {};



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/directives/tooltip.ts
================================================
import { IPopover } from 'interfaces/common/IPopoverConfig';
import { Directives } from 'enum';
import { Popover } from 'utils/helpers/popover';
import { TOOLTIP_CONFIG } from 'constants/TooltipConfig';

const POPOVER_REGISTRY = new WeakMap<HTMLElement, Popover>();

export const AqDirectiveTooltip = (element: HTMLElement) => {
  const directiveValue = element.getAttribute(Directives.TOOLTIP);
  const directiveContent = typeof directiveValue === 'object' ? directiveValue : JSON.parse(directiveValue);

  const options: IPopover = { ...TOOLTIP_CONFIG, ...directiveContent };
  if (!!directiveContent) {
    const exists = POPOVER_REGISTRY.get(element);
    if (!!exists) {
      exists.updateInstance(options);
    } else {
      const newPopover = new Popover([element]);
      newPopover.buildInstance(options);
      POPOVER_REGISTRY.set(element, newPopover);
    }
  }
};

    '#24A852',

    '#EC7A22',

    '#FFFFFF',
    'rgba(0,0,0,0)',
  ];

================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/helpers/domManager.ts
================================================
export class DOMManager {
  static elementWidth;

  filterChildToGetContent(el: any) {
    if (!!el === false) return;

    const content = el.childNodes;
    let child;
    content.forEach(item => {
      if (item.nodeName !== '#text' && item.nodeName !== 'SLOT-FB' && item.nodeName !== '#comment') {
        child = item;
      }
    });
    return child;
  }

  filterValidChilds(content: NodeList) {
    if (content.length <= 0) return;

    let childs = [];
    content.forEach(item => {
      if (item.nodeName !== '#text' && item.nodeName !== 'SLOT-FB' && item.nodeName !== '#comment') {
        childs.push(item);
      }
    });
    return childs;
  }

  setElementWidth(width: number) {
    DOMManager.elementWidth = width;
  }

  get getElementWidth() {
    return DOMManager.elementWidth;
  }
}

export default {};



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/helpers/eventEmitter.ts
================================================
export function emitEvent<T extends Event>(
    eventName: string,
    hostElement: HTMLElement,
    detail?: any,
    event?: T,
    options?: CustomEventInit
) {
    if (event) event.stopPropagation();

    const customEvent = new CustomEvent(eventName, {
        detail: { ...detail },
        bubbles: true,
        cancelable: false,
        composed: true,
        ...options
    });

    hostElement.dispatchEvent(customEvent);
}

export type AqEvent = Event & { detail?: any };

import { StateStyle } from "enum";

export function HelperText(component: any) {
  return {
    get isHelperTextVisible() {
      return component.helperText?.length > 0;
    },
    get bindsHelperText() {
      return {
        [StateStyle.ERROR]: !component.disabled && !component.readonly && component.error,
      };
    },
  };
}

export function Label(component: any) {
  return {
    get isLabelVisible() {
      return component.label?.length > 0;
    },
    get bindsLabel() {
      return {
        info: component.info,
        isRequired: component.isRequired,
        isDisabled: component.isDisabled,
        tooltipWidth: component.tooltipWidth,
      };
    },
  };
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/helpers/loadDirectives.ts
================================================
import { Directives, DirectivesTypes } from 'enum';
import InitDirectives from '../directives/init';
import { AqDirectiveSpinner } from '../directives/spinner';
import { AqDirectiveDialog } from 'utils/directives/dialog';
import { AqDirectiveDrawer } from 'utils/directives/drawer';
import { AqDirectiveTooltip } from 'utils/directives/tooltip';

const DIRECTIVES_MAP = {
  [Directives.SPINNER]: AqDirectiveSpinner,
  [Directives.DIALOG]: AqDirectiveDialog,
  [Directives.DRAWER]: AqDirectiveDrawer,
  [Directives.TOOLTIP]: AqDirectiveTooltip,
};

export const setupDirectives = (directiveNames: DirectivesTypes[]) => {
  directiveNames.forEach(name => {
    const callback = DIRECTIVES_MAP[name];
    if (!callback) {
      console.warn(`❌ Callback for directive "${name}" not found. Please make sure the directive exists.`);
      return;
    }
    InitDirectives.registerDirective(name, callback);
  });

  InitDirectives.initDirectives();
};
