FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/helpers/popover.ts
================================================
import tippy, { Content, Instance, Props } from 'tippy.js';
import { Trigger } from '../../types/PopoverTrigger';
import { IPopover } from 'interfaces/common/IPopoverConfig';

interface IPopoverBuilder {
  trigger: string | Element[] | NodeList;
  instance: Instance;
  tooltipElement: Content;
  buildInstance: (config: Partial<Props>) => void;
}

export class Popover implements IPopoverBuilder {
  instance: Instance;
  trigger: Trigger;
  tooltipElement: Content;

  constructor(trigger: Trigger) {
    this.trigger = trigger;
    this.instance = null;
  }

  mountElement() {}

  buildInstance(config: IPopover) {
    this.tooltipElement = config.content;
    const localConfig = { ...config };
    if (!!localConfig.customMount) delete config.customMount;

    if (!!this.tooltipElement) {
      if (this.tooltipElement instanceof Element) this.tooltipElement = this.tooltipElement.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;

      let ts = tippy(this.trigger, {
        delay: 50,
        allowHTML: true,
        content: this.tooltipElement,
        interactive: !config.hideOnClick,
        // Modify base z index to the maximum
        popperOptions: {
          modifiers: [
            {
              name: 'zIndex',
              enabled: true,
              phase: 'write',
              fn({ state }) {
                state.elements.popper.style.zIndex = '20000';
              },
            },
          ],
        },
        onMount: instance => {
          if (!!localConfig.customMount) {
            localConfig.customMount(instance);
          }
          this.instance = instance;
          const tippyBox = instance.popper.querySelector('.tippy-box') as HTMLElement;

          // Modify the style of the tippy-box to delete the overflow: hidden
          if (tippyBox) {
            tippyBox.style.overflow = 'visible';
          }
        },
        onClickOutside: (instance: any, event: any) => {
          if (!!localConfig.onClickOutside) {
            localConfig.onClickOutside(instance, event);
          } else if (!!localConfig.hideOnClickOutside) {
            instance.hide();
          }
        },
        ...config,
      });

      if (typeof this.tooltipElement === 'string') return ts;
    } else {
      console.warn('Popover: Invalid content element provided for the tooltipElement.', this.tooltipElement, config);
      return null;
    }
  }

  updateInstance(config: IPopover) {
    this.instance.setProps(config);
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/helpers/sizes.ts
================================================
export function Sizes(component: any) {
  const mixinSizeGetValue = (value: any) => {
    return typeof value === 'string' || typeof value === 'undefined' ? value : `${value}px`;
  };

  return {
    get mixinSizeStyle() {
      return {
        maxHeight: mixinSizeGetValue(component.maxHeight),
        minHeight: mixinSizeGetValue(component.minHeight),
        maxWidth: mixinSizeGetValue(component.maxWidth),
        minWidth: mixinSizeGetValue(component.minWidth),
        height: mixinSizeGetValue(component.height),
        width: mixinSizeGetValue(component.width),
      };
    },
  };
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/helpers/uidGenerator.ts
================================================
export class UniqueIdGenerator {
  private static globalCounter = 0; // Contador global para asegurar unicidad entre instancias
  private localCounter = 0; // Contador específico de la instancia
  private prefix: string; // Prefijo opcional para los IDs

  constructor(prefix: string = 'id') {
    this.prefix = prefix; // Permite personalizar el formato del ID
  }

  /**
   * Genera un ID único basado en un contador interno y global
   * @returns {string} Un ID único
   */
  generateId(): string {
    // Incrementa el contador global y el local
    UniqueIdGenerator.globalCounter++;
    this.localCounter++;

    // Retorna el ID único con el prefijo
    return `${this.prefix}-${Date.now()}-${UniqueIdGenerator.globalCounter}-${this.localCounter}`;
  }

  assignIdToObject<T extends object>(obj: T, idKey: keyof T & string): T {
    const id = this.generateId();
    return { ...obj, [idKey]: id };
  }
}

FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/helpers/virtualScroll.ts
================================================
import { DOMManager } from './domManager';

export class VirtualScroll {
  renderRows;
  itemCount;
  viewportHeight;
  rowHeight;
  nodePadding;
  scrollTop;
  scrolledElement: HTMLElement;
  animationFrame;
  activeIndex = -1;
  activeItem = null;
  visibleChildren;
  scrollListener;
  container;
  id = '';
  maxWidth = 0;
  domManager: DOMManager;
  currentScrollTop = -1;

  constructor({ renderRows, itemCount, viewportHeight, rowHeight, nodePadding, container, scrollTop, scrolledElement, id }) {
    this.renderRows = renderRows;
    this.itemCount = itemCount;
    this.viewportHeight = viewportHeight;
    this.rowHeight = rowHeight;
    this.nodePadding = nodePadding;
    this.scrollTop = scrollTop;
    this.scrolledElement = scrolledElement;
    this.container = container;
    this.domManager = new DOMManager();
    this.id = id;
  }

  render() {
    this.scrolledElement.scrollTo({ top: this.scrollTop });
    let startNode = Math.floor(this.scrollTop / this.rowHeight) - this.nodePadding;
    startNode = Math.max(0, startNode);

    this.currentScrollTop = this.scrollTop;

    let visibleNodesCount = Math.ceil(this.viewportHeight / this.rowHeight) + 2 * this.nodePadding;
    visibleNodesCount = Math.min(this.itemCount - startNode, visibleNodesCount);
    const offsetY = startNode * this.rowHeight;

    this.visibleChildren = new Array(visibleNodesCount).fill(null).map((_, index) => this.renderRows[index + startNode]);
    return `
    <div aria-role="listbox">
      <div
        style="
          height:100%;
          overflow: hidden;
          position: relative;
          will-change: transform;
        "
      >
        <div
          class="result-list"
          id="${this.id}"
          tabindex="0"
          style="
            transform: translateY(${offsetY}px);
          "
        >
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }

  setScroll() {
    if (this.scrollListener) {
      return;
    }

    this.scrollListener = (e: any) => {
      if (this.animationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationFrame);
      }
      this.animationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        this.scrollTop = e.target.scrollTop;
        this.renderWindow();
      });
    };

    this.scrolledElement.addEventListener('scroll', this.scrollListener);
  }

  renderWindow() {
    this.currentScrollTop = this.scrollTop;

    const result = this.render();
    this.scrolledElement.innerHTML = result;
    const resultList = this.scrolledElement.querySelector(`#${this.id}`);

    this.visibleChildren.forEach((item: Element) => {
      resultList.appendChild(item);
    });

    if (this.activeIndex >= 0) {
      this.activeItem = document.getElementById(getResultItemId(this.activeIndex));
      if (this.activeItem) {
        this.activeItem.classList.add('focused');
        this.activeItem.scrollIntoView();
      }
    }
    this.setScroll();
  }

  removeControllers() {
    this.animationFrame = null;
  }
}

const getResultItemId = idx => `result-item-${idx}`;



================================================
FILE: packages/aqua-web-components/src/utils/helpers/zIndex.ts
================================================
export class ZIndex {
  private static instance: ZIndex;
  private aqZIndex: object;
  private numberZIndex: number;
  private baseZIndex: number;
  private step: number;

  constructor(baseZIndex: 13000, step: 30) {
    this.aqZIndex = {};
    this.numberZIndex = 1;
    this.baseZIndex = baseZIndex;
    this.step = step;
  }

  public static getInstance(): ZIndex {
    if (!ZIndex.instance) {
      ZIndex.instance = new ZIndex(13000, 30);
    }
    return ZIndex.instance;
  }
  getZIndex(idComponent: string) {
    if (this.aqZIndex[idComponent]?.zIndex) {
      return this.aqZIndex[idComponent].zIndex;
    }
    return null;
  }

  setZIndex(idComponent: string) {
    if (!(idComponent in this.aqZIndex)) {
      const lastZIndex = Object.values(this.aqZIndex).reduce((max, entry) => Math.max(max, entry.zIndex), this.baseZIndex - this.step);

      this.aqZIndex[idComponent] = {
        zIndex: lastZIndex + this.step,
        index: this.numberZIndex++,
      };
    }
    return this.aqZIndex[idComponent].zIndex;
  }

  deleteZIndex(idComponent: string) {
    delete this.aqZIndex[idComponent];
    this.numberZIndex = this.numberZIndex - 1;
  }

  getLastIndex(idComponent: string) {
    const lastZIndex = Object.values(this.aqZIndex).reduce((max, entry) => Math.max(max, entry.zIndex), this.baseZIndex - this.step);
    if (this.aqZIndex[idComponent]?.zIndex === lastZIndex) {
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/README.md
================================================
# AngularTestApp

This project was generated using [Angular CLI](https://github.com/angular/angular-cli) version 19.2.1.

## Development server

To start a local development server, run:

```bash
ng serve
```

Once the server is running, open your browser and navigate to `http://localhost:4200/`. The application will automatically reload whenever you modify any of the source files.

## Code scaffolding

Angular CLI includes powerful code scaffolding tools. To generate a new component, run:

```bash
ng generate component component-name
```

For a complete list of available schematics (such as `components`, `directives`, or `pipes`), run:

```bash
ng generate --help
```

## Building

To build the project run:

```bash
ng build
```

This will compile your project and store the build artifacts in the `dist/` directory. By default, the production build optimizes your application for performance and speed.

## Running unit tests

To execute unit tests with the [Karma](https://karma-runner.github.io) test runner, use the following command:

```bash
ng test
```

## Running end-to-end tests

For end-to-end (e2e) testing, run:

```bash
ng e2e
```

Angular CLI does not come with an end-to-end testing framework by default. You can choose one that suits your needs.

## Additional Resources

For more information on using the Angular CLI, including detailed command references, visit the [Angular CLI Overview and Command Reference](https://angular.dev/tools/cli) page.

<main class="app-header">
  <svg
    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    viewBox="0 0 982 239"
    fill="none"
    class="angular-logo"
  >
    <g clip-path="url(#a)">

import { TestBed } from '@angular/core/testing';
import { AppComponent } from './app.component';

describe('AppComponent', () => {
  beforeEach(async () => {
    await TestBed.configureTestingModule({
      imports: [AppComponent],
    }).compileComponents();
  });

  it('should create the app', () => {
    const fixture = TestBed.createComponent(AppComponent);
    const app = fixture.componentInstance;
    expect(app).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it(`should have the 'angular-test-app' title`, () => {
    const fixture = TestBed.createComponent(AppComponent);
    const app = fixture.componentInstance;
    expect(app.title).toEqual('angular-test-app');
  });

  it('should render title', () => {
    const fixture = TestBed.createComponent(AppComponent);
    fixture.detectChanges();
    const compiled = fixture.nativeElement as HTMLElement;
    expect(compiled.querySelector('h1')?.textContent).toContain('Hello, angular-test-app');
  });
});

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/actions/set-button-split/set-button-split.component.ts
================================================
import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButtonSplit } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-button-split',
  imports: [AqButtonSplit],
  templateUrl: './set-button-split.component.html',
})
export class SetButtonSplitComponent {
  items = [
    {
      id: 'id1',
      name: 'Item 1',
    },
    {
      id: 'id2',
      name: 'Item 2',
    },
  ];

  handleClickRight(event: CustomEvent<{ event: Event }>) {
    console.log('handleClickRight ', event, event.detail);
  }
  handleClickItem(event: CustomEvent<{ value: string }>) {
    console.log('handleClickItem ', event, event.detail.value);
  }
  handleClickLeft(event: CustomEvent<{ event: Event }>) {
    console.log('handleClickLeft ', event, event.detail);
  }
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/actions/set-drop-down/set-drop-down.component.ts
================================================
import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import {
  AqBadge,
  AqButton,
  AqCheckbox,
  AqDropdown,
  AqDropdownItem,
  AqSubheading,
  IDropdownItem,
} from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-drop-down',
  imports: [
    AqDropdown,
    AqButton,
    AqDropdownItem,
    AqBadge,
    AqCheckbox,
    AqSubheading,
    FormsModule,
  ],
  templateUrl: './set-drop-down.component.html',
})
export class SetDropDownComponent {
  handleSelection(event: CustomEvent<IDropdownItem>) {
    console.log('Dropdown selection: ', event, event.detail);
  }
  // Option 1: passing items as prop
  items = [
    {
      label: 'Option 1',
      icon: 'aq-icon-sight-on',
      callback: () => {
        console.log('VR Item 1 Selected');
      },
    },
    {
      label: 'Option 2',
      class: 'aq-dropdown-item--disabled',
      callback: () => {
        console.log('VR Item 2 Selected');
      },
    },
    {
      label: 'Option 3',
      callback: () => {
        console.log('VR Item 3 Selected');
      },
    },
  ];

  itemsLang: IDropdownItem[] = [
    {
      label: 'ES',
    },
    {
      label: 'EN',
    },
  ];
  langSelected: string = this.itemsLang[0].label;

  handleSelectionLang(event: CustomEvent<IDropdownItem>) {
    this.langSelected = event.detail.label;
  }
}

import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
import { AqToggle, AWCValueAccessor } from '@aqua-ds/angular';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-toggle',
  imports: [FormsModule, AqToggle, AWCValueAccessor],
  templateUrl: './set-toggle.component.html',
})
export class SetToggleComponent {
  toggleValue = false;

  handleInput(event: Event) {
    const detail = (event as CustomEvent).detail;
    console.log('input', event, detail.value);
  }

  handleChange(event: Event) {
    const detail = (event as CustomEvent).detail;
    console.log('change', event, detail.value);
  }
}

import { Component, ElementRef, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
import { AqButton, AqTreeMenu } from '@aqua-ds/angular';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-tree-menu',
  imports: [FormsModule, AqTreeMenu, AqButton],
  templateUrl: './set-tree-menu.component.html',
})
export class SetTreeMenuComponent {
  @ViewChild('treeMenuRef') treeMenuRef!: AqTreeMenu;

  handleToggleItem = (e: CustomEvent<{ clickedItem: {}, localOptions: [] }>) => {
    console.log('Tree menu toggle item: ', e, e.detail.clickedItem, e.detail.localOptions);
  };

  options: any = [
    {
      id: 1,
      label: 'Level A',
      isOpen: true,
      isDisabled: false,
      childrenItems: [
        {
          id: '1-1',
          label: 'Level 1.1',
        },
        {
          id: '1-2',
          label: 'Level 1.2'
        },
        {
          id: '1-3',
          label: 'Level 1.3',
          childrenItems: [
            {
              id: '1-3-1',
              label: 'Level 1.3.1',
              childrenItems: [
                {
                  id: '1-3-1-1',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.1',
                  childrenItems: [
                    {
                      id: '1-3-1-1',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.1'
                    },
                    {
                      id: '1-3-2',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                    },
                    {
                      id: '1-3-3',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                    }
                  ]
                },
                {
                  id: '1-3-2',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                },
                {
                  id: '1-3-3',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                }
              ]
            },
            {
              id: '1-3-2',
              label: 'Level 1.3.2'
            },
            {
              id: '1-3-3',
              label: 'Level 1.3.3'
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          id: '1-4',
          label: 'Level 1.4',
          childrenItems: [
            {
              id: '1-3-1',
              label: 'Level 1.3.1',
              childrenItems: [
                {
                  id: '1-3-1-1',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.1',
                  childrenItems: [
                    {
                      id: '1-3-1-1',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.1'
                    },
                    {
                      id: '1-3-2',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                    },
                    {
                      id: '1-3-3',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                    }
                  ]
                },
                {
                  id: '1-3-2',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                },
                {
                  id: '1-3-3',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                }
              ]
            },
            {
              id: '1-3-2',
              label: 'Level 1.3.2'
            },
            {
              id: '1-3-3',
              label: 'Level 1.3.3'
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      id: 2,
      label: 'Level B',
      isOpen: false,
    }
  ]

  // Component API
  setOptions = async() => {   
    const treeMenuEl = this.treeMenuRef;
    await treeMenuEl.setOptions([
      ...this.options,
      {
        idItem: 'add-option-1',
        label: 'Added option',
        childrenItems: [
          {
            idItem: '1-1',
            label: 'Level 1.1',
          },
        ]
      }
    ]);
  }
  getOptions = async() => {   
    const treeMenuEl = this.treeMenuRef;
    alert(JSON.stringify(await treeMenuEl.getOptions()));
  }
  collapseAll = async() => {   
    const treeMenuEl = this.treeMenuRef;
    await treeMenuEl.collapseAll();
  }
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/actions/set-voice-player/set-voice-player.component.ts
================================================
import { Component, ViewChild, ElementRef } from '@angular/core';
import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
import { AqVoicePlayer, AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/angular';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-voice-player',
  imports: [FormsModule, AqVoicePlayer, AqButton],
  templateUrl: './set-voice-player.component.html',
})
export class SetVoicePlayerComponent {
  // Usando la referencia del DOM
  @ViewChild('aqVoicePlayerRef', { static: true, read: ElementRef })
  aqVoicePlayerRef!: ElementRef;
  // Usando la referencia del componente
  @ViewChild('aqVoicePlayerRef', { static: true })
  aqVoicePlayer!: AqVoicePlayer;

  source: string =
    'https://interactive-examples.mdn.mozilla.net/media/cc0-audio/t-rex-roar.mp3';

  // 🔹 Voice Player API
  async playPause() {
    if (this.aqVoicePlayer) {
      await this.aqVoicePlayer.audioPlayPause();
      console.log('aqVoicePlayer', this.aqVoicePlayer);
    }
  }

  async getCurrentTime() {
    if (this.aqVoicePlayer) {
      const time = await this.aqVoicePlayer.getCurrentTime();
      console.log('⏱ Current time:', time);
    }
  }

  async getDuration() {
    if (this.aqVoicePlayerRef) {
      const duration = await this.aqVoicePlayerRef.nativeElement.getDuration();
      console.log('📏 Duration:', duration);
    }
  }

  // 🔹 Eventos
  handlePlay(e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) {
    console.log('Audio play:', e.detail.currentTime);
  }

  handlePause(e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) {
    console.log('Audio pause:', e.detail.currentTime);
  }

  handleEnded(e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) {
    console.log('Audio ended:', e.detail.currentTime);
  }

  handleError(e: CustomEvent<{ error: number }>) {
    console.log('Audio error:', e.detail.error);
  }

  handleLoadedAudio(e: CustomEvent<{ duration: number }>) {
    console.log('ℹAudio loaded:', e.detail.duration);
  }

  handlePositionChange(e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) {
    console.log('Audio position change:', e.detail.currentTime);
  }
}

import { Component, CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA, ElementRef, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-bar';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-chart-bar',
  standalone: true,
  templateUrl: './set-chart-bar.component.html',
  imports: [AqButton],
  schemas: [CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA],
})
export class SetChartBarComponent {
  @ViewChild('chartRef') chartRef!: ElementRef;

  private seriesBar = [
    {
      name: "Browsers",
      data: [
        { name: "Safari", y: 500, status: "danger" },
        { name: "Brave", y: 507, status: "success" },
        { name: "Opera", y: 205, status: "warning" },
        { name: "Mozilla", y: 409, status: "neutral" },
        { name: "Chrome", y: 602, status: "caution" },
      ],
    },
  ];

  private altSeries = [
    {
      name: "Browsers",
      data: [
        { name: "Safari", y: 300, status: "danger" },
        { name: "Brave", y: 307, status: "success" },
        { name: "Opera", y: 605, status: "warning" },
        { name: "Mozilla", y: 209, status: "neutral" },
        { name: "Chrome", y: 802, status: "caution" },
      ],
    },
  ];

  private showFirst = true;

  data: any = {
    title: {
      text: "Chart Title",
      align: "left",
    },
    subtitle: {
      text: "Subtitle Chart",
      align: "center",
    },
    tooltip: {
      enabled: true,
      pointFormat:
        '<span style="color:{point.color}; font-size: var(--font-size-xl)">{series.name}</span>: <br/><span style="font-style: italic">{point.y:.2f}%</span><b>&nbsp; format text</b>',
    },
    xAxis: {
      title: {
        text: "Label Axis X",
      },
      categories: ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun"],
    },
    yAxis: {
      title: {
        text: "Label Axis Y",
      },
    },
    series: this.seriesBar,
  };

  // Botón para alternar series
  changeSeries() {
    this.showFirst = !this.showFirst;
    const series = this.showFirst ? this.seriesBar : this.altSeries;
    this.chartRef.nativeElement.updateSeries(series);

    const currentTitle = this.showFirst
      ? { title: { text: 'Chart Bar' } }
      : { title: { text: 'Chart Bar 2' } };

    this.chartRef.nativeElement.updateOptions(currentTitle);
  }
}

// chart-column-set.component.ts
import { Component, CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA, ViewChild, ElementRef } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButton, AqCode, AqHelperText } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-column';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-chart-column',
  templateUrl: './set-chart-column.component.html',
  imports: [AqButton, AqCode, AqHelperText],
  schemas: [CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA],
})
export class SetChartColumnComponent {
  @ViewChild('chartRef', { static: false }) chartRef!: ElementRef;

  isGrouped = false;

  seriesColumnGrouped = [
    {
      name: "Tokyo",
      data: [49.9, 71.5, 106.4, 129.2, 144, 176, 135.6, 148.5, 216.4, 194.1, 95.6, 54.4],
    },
    {
      name: "New York",
      data: [83.6, 78.8, 98.5, 93.4, 106, 84.5, 105, 104.3, 91.2, 83.5, 106.6, 92.3],
    },
    {
      name: "London",
      data: [48.9, 38.8, 39.3, 41.4, 47, 48.3, 59, 59.6, 52.4, 65.2, 59.3, 51.2],
    },
    {
      name: "Berlin",
      data: [42.4, 33.2, 34.5, 39.7, 52.6, 75.5, 57.4, 60.4, 47.6, 39.1, 46.8, 51.1],
    },
    {
      name: "Amsterdam",
      data: [22.4, 53.2, 44.5, 29.7, 58.6, 95.5, 49.9, 71.5, 106.4, 129.2, 144, 176],
    },
    {
      name: "Madrid",
      data: [122.4, 93.2, 64.5, 49.7, 78.6, 55.5, 48.9, 38.8, 39.3, 41.4, 47, 48.3],
    },
  ];

  seriesColumn = [
    {
      name: "Browsers",
      data: [
        { name: "Safari", y: 500 },
        { name: "Brave", y: 507 },
        { name: "Opera", y: 205 },
        { name: "Mozilla", y: 409 },
        { name: "Chrome", y: 602 },
      ],
    },

    title: {
      text: "Chart Columns",
      align: "center",

    },
    yAxis: {
      title: { text: "Label Axis Y" },
    },
    series: this.seriesColumn,
  };

  handleClick() {
    this.isGrouped = !this.isGrouped;
    const chart = this.chartRef.nativeElement;
    chart.updateSeries(this.isGrouped ? this.seriesColumnGrouped : this.seriesColumn);
  }

  handleClickColumn(event: Event) {
    console.log("Handling click column from Angular", event);
  }
}

// set-chart-donut.component.ts
import { Component, CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA, ElementRef, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-donut';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-chart-donut',
  templateUrl: './set-chart-donut.component.html',
  imports: [AqButton],
  schemas: [CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA],
})
export class SetChartDonutComponent {
  @ViewChild('chartRef', { static: false }) chartRef!: ElementRef;

  chartSeries1 = true;

  seriesDonut = [
    {
      data: [
        { name: 'Safari', y: 500, status: 'danger' },
        { name: 'Brave', y: 507, status: 'success' },
        { name: 'Opera', y: 205, status: 'warning' },
        { name: 'Mozilla', y: 409, status: 'neutral' },
        { name: 'Chrome', y: 602, status: 'caution' },
      ],
    },
  ];

  seriesDonutAlt = [
    {
      data: [
        { name: 'Safari', y: 100, status: 'danger' },
        { name: 'Brave', y: 107, status: 'success' },
        { name: 'Opera', y: 265, status: 'warning' },
        { name: 'Mozilla', y: 709, status: 'neutral' },
        { name: 'Chrome', y: 102, status: 'caution' },
      ],
    },
  ];

  data: any = {
    series: this.seriesDonut,
    title: {
      text: 'Chart Donut',
      align: 'center',
    },
    subtitle: {
      text: 'Subtitle Donut',
      align: 'center',
    },
    plotOptions: {
      pie: {
        point: {
          events: {
            click: () => {
              alert('You clicked');
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  };

  changeSeries() {
    this.chartSeries1 = !this.chartSeries1;

    const chart = this.chartRef.nativeElement;

    const series = this.chartSeries1 ? this.seriesDonut : this.seriesDonutAlt;
    chart.updateSeries(series);

    const currentTitle = this.chartSeries1
      ? { title: { text: 'Chart Donut' } }
      : { title: { text: 'Chart Donut 2' } };

    chart.updateOptions(currentTitle);
  }
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/charts/set-chart-donut-thin/set-chart-donut-thin.component.ts
================================================
// set-chart-donut-thin.component.ts
import { Component, CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA, ElementRef, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-donut-thin';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-chart-donut-thin',
  standalone: true,
  templateUrl: './set-chart-donut-thin.component.html',
  schemas: [CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA],
})
export class SetChartDonutThinComponent {
  @ViewChild('chartRef', { static: false }) chartRef!: ElementRef;

  chartSeries1 = true;
  tooltipPositionerX = 0;
  tooltipPositionerY = 0;

  seriesDonutThin = [
    {
      name: 'Status',
      data: [
        { name: 'Delivered', y: 70, status: 'warning' },
        { name: 'Clicked', y: 45, status: 'neutral' },
        { name: 'Opened', y: 25, status: 'info' },
        { name: 'Error', y: 5, status: 'danger' },
        { name: 'Read', y: 20, status: 'success' },
        { name: 'Other', y: 20, status: 'caution' },
      ],
    },
  ];

  seriesDonutAlt = [
    {
      data: [
        { name: 'Safari', y: 100, status: 'danger' },
        { name: 'Brave', y: 107, status: 'success' },
        { name: 'Opera', y: 265, status: 'warning' },
        { name: 'Mozilla', y: 709, status: 'neutral' },
        { name: 'Chrome', y: 102, status: 'caution' },
      ],
    },
  ];

  data: any = {
    title: { text: 'Chart Title', align: 'center' },
    subtitle: { text: 'Subtitle Chart', align: 'left' },
    series: this.seriesDonutThin,
    tooltip: {
      borderWidth: 0,
      backgroundColor: 'none',
      valueSuffix: '%XD',
      shadow: false,
      headerFormat: '',
      useHTML: true,
      style: { fontSize: '20px' },
      pointFormat:
        "<span style=color:{point.color};font-size: 20px>{point.name}</span><br/><span style=font-style: italic>{point.y:.2f}%</span><br/><b>format text</b>",
    },
  };

  changeSeries() {
    this.chartSeries1 = !this.chartSeries1;

    const chart = this.chartRef.nativeElement;
    const series = this.chartSeries1 ? this.seriesDonutThin : this.seriesDonutAlt;
    chart.updateSeries(series);

    const currentTitle = this.chartSeries1
      ? { title: { text: 'Chart Donut Thin' } }
      : { title: { text: 'Chart Donut Thin 2' } };

    chart.updateOptions(currentTitle);
  }
}

                Update data
            </aq-button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

    this.chartSeries1 = !this.chartSeries1;

    const chart = this.chartRef.nativeElement;
    const series = this.chartSeries1 ? this.seriesGeoMap1 : this.seriesGeoMap2;
    chart.updateSeries(series);

    const currentTitle = this.chartSeries1
      ? { title: { text: 'Chart Geo Map 1' } }
      : { title: { text: 'Chart Geo Map 2' } };

    chart.updateOptions(currentTitle);
  }
}

import { Component, CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA, ViewChild, ElementRef } from '@angular/core';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-line';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-chart-line',
  standalone: true,
  templateUrl: './set-chart-line.component.html',
  schemas: [CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA],
})
export class SetChartLineComponent {
  @ViewChild('chartRef', { static: false }) chartRef!: ElementRef;

  chartSeries1 = true;

  seriesLine1 = [
    {
      name: 'Installation',
      data: [43934, 52503, 57177, 69658, 97031, 119931, 137133, 154175],
      status: 'success',
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: 'ohlc',
        forced: true,
        units: [['hour', [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
    {
      name: 'Project Development',
      data: [null, null, 7988, 12169, 15112, 22452, 34400, 34227],
      status: 'warning',
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: 'ohlc',
        forced: true,
        units: [['hour', [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
    {
      name: 'Other',
      data: [12908, 5948, 8105, 11248, 8989, 11816, 18274, 18111],
      status: 'neutral',
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: 'ohlc',
        forced: true,
        units: [['hour', [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
  ];

  seriesLine2 = [
    {
      name: 'Installation',
      data: [23934, 50003, 50717, 89658, 37031, 100931, 100133, 100175],
      status: 'success',
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: 'ohlc',
        forced: true,
        units: [['hour', [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
    {
      name: 'Project Development',
      data: [null, null, 7988, 19169, 10112, 2452, 30400, 30227],
      status: 'warning',
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: 'ohlc',
        forced: true,
        units: [['hour', [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
    {
      name: 'Other',
      data: [12908, 5948, 8105, 11248, 8989, 11816, 18274, 18111],
      status: 'neutral',
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: 'ohlc',
        forced: true,
        units: [['hour', [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
  ];

  data: any = {
    series: this.seriesLine1,
    title: {
      text: 'Chart Line 1',
      align: 'center',
    },
    subtitle: {
      text: 'Subtitle Line',
      align: 'center',
    },
    xAxis: {
      title: { text: 'Label Axis X' },
    },
    yAxis: {
      title: { text: 'Label Axis Y' },
    },
  };

  changeSeries() {
    this.chartSeries1 = !this.chartSeries1;
    const series = this.chartSeries1 ? this.seriesLine1 : this.seriesLine2;
    const currentTitle = this.chartSeries1
      ? { title: { text: 'Chart Line 1' } }
      : { title: { text: 'Chart Line 2' } };

    if (this.chartRef?.nativeElement) {
      this.chartRef.nativeElement.updateSeries(series);
      this.chartRef.nativeElement.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    }
  }
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/charts/set-chart-progress-bar/set-chart-progress-bar.component.ts
================================================
import { Component, CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA, ViewChild, ElementRef } from '@angular/core';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-progress-bar';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-chart-progress-bar',
  standalone: true,
  templateUrl: './set-chart-progress-bar.component.html',
  schemas: [CUSTOM_ELEMENTS_SCHEMA],
})
export class SetChartProgressBarComponent {
  @ViewChild('chartRef', { static: false }) chartRef!: ElementRef;

  chartSeries1 = true;
  maxValue = 10;
  height = 150;

  seriesProgress1 = [
    { name: 'Image - 2.5GB', data: [2.5], grouping: false, status: 'danger' },
    { name: 'Audio - 0.4GB', data: [0.4], grouping: false, status: 'success' },
    { name: 'Video - 0.9GB', data: [0.9], grouping: false, status: 'neutral' },
    { name: 'Docs - 1.2GB', data: [1.2], grouping: false, status: 'caution' },
    { name: 'Zip - 0.6GB', data: [0.6], grouping: false, status: 'info' },
    { name: 'HTML - 2.98GB', data: [2.98], grouping: false, status: 'warning' },
  ];

  seriesProgress2 = [
    { name: 'Image - 2GB', data: [2], grouping: false, status: 'danger' },
    { name: 'Audio - 0.8GB', data: [0.8], grouping: false, status: 'success' },
    { name: 'Video - 1GB', data: [1], grouping: false, status: 'neutral' },
    { name: 'Docs - 2GB', data: [2], grouping: false, status: 'caution' },
    { name: 'Zip - 1GB', data: [1], grouping: false, status: 'info' },
    { name: 'HTML - 1.98GB', data: [1.98], grouping: false, status: 'warning' },
  ];

  data: any = {
    title: { text: 'Chart Progress Bar 1', align: 'center' },
    subtitle: { text: 'Chart Subtitle', align: 'center' },
    legend: {
      enabled: true,
      layout: 'horizontal',
      align: 'center',
      verticalAlign: 'bottom',
      width: 0,
    },
    series: this.seriesProgress1,
  };

  dataString = JSON.stringify(this.data, null, 2);

  // cambia entre series1 y series2
  changeSeries() {
    this.chartSeries1 = !this.chartSeries1;
    const series = this.chartSeries1 ? this.seriesProgress1 : this.seriesProgress2;
    const currentTitle = this.chartSeries1
      ? { title: { text: 'Chart Progress Bar 1' } }
      : { title: { text: 'Chart Progress Bar 2' } };

    if (this.chartRef?.nativeElement) {
      this.chartRef.nativeElement.updateSeries(series);
      this.chartRef.nativeElement.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    }

    this.maxValue = this.chartSeries1 ? 10 : 20;
    this.height = this.chartSeries1 ? 150 : 200;
  }
}

<div class="container">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Card</div>
    <div class="components">
      <!-- Card with hover / leave -->
      <aq-card
        img="https://resources.masivapp.com/img/general/default_image.svg"
      >
        <aq-card-content>
          <h2>This is a simple card</h2>
        </aq-card-content>
      </aq-card>

      <!-- Card with is-reorder -->
      <aq-card img="https://resources.masivapp.com/img/general/default_image.svg">
        <aq-card-header (clickHeader)="headerClick($event)" (reorder)="clickReorder($event)" (return)="clickReturn($event)" is-reorder>
          <div slot="title">
            <em class="aq-icon-emoji-circle"></em>
            <aq-subheading>Card Title</aq-subheading>
          </div>
          <div slot="subtitle">
            <aq-helper-text>Card Subtitle</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
          <div slot="options">
            <aq-button><em class="aq-icon-three-dots-vertical"></em></aq-button>
          </div>
        </aq-card-header>
        <aq-card-content>
          <h2>This is a card with is-reorder icon.</h2>
        </aq-card-content>
        <aq-card-footer>
          <h3>Footer content</h3>
        </aq-card-footer>
      </aq-card>

      <!-- Card with has-return-icon -->
      <aq-card>
        <aq-card-header has-return-icon (return)="clickReturn($event)" (clickHeader)="headerClick($event)" >
          <div slot="title">
            <em class="aq-icon-emoji-circle"></em>
            <aq-subheading>Card Title</aq-subheading>
          </div>
          <div slot="subtitle">
            <aq-helper-text>Card Subtitle</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
          <div slot="options">
            <aq-button><em class="aq-icon-three-dots-vertical"></em></aq-button>
          </div>
        </aq-card-header>
        <aq-card-content>
          <h2>A card with return icon</h2>
        </aq-card-content>
        <aq-card-footer>
          <h3>Footer content</h3>
        </aq-card-footer>
      </aq-card>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/dataVisualization/set-card/set-card.component.ts
================================================
import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import {
  AqCard,
  AqCardHeader,
  AqCardContent,
  AqCardFooter,
  AqButton,
  AqHelperText,
  AqSubheading,
} from '@aqua-ds/angular';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-card',
  standalone: true,
  imports: [
    AqCard,
    AqCardHeader,
    AqCardContent,
    AqCardFooter,
    AqButton,
    AqHelperText,
    AqSubheading,
  ],
  templateUrl: './set-card.component.html',
})
export class SetCardComponent {
  headerClick(event: CustomEvent) {
    console.log('Card Header Clicked Angular',  event);
  }
  clickReorder(event: CustomEvent) {
    console.log('Card reorder Clicked Angular',  event);
  }
  clickReturn(event: CustomEvent) {
    console.log('Card Return Clicked Angular',  event);
  }
}

<div class="container">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Client Table</div>
    <div className="components" style="height: 500px">
      <aq-table
        (pinChange)="handlePinChange($event)"
        (sortChange)="handleSortChange($event)"
        (sizeChange)="handleSizeChange($event)"
        id="my-table"
        has-header
        [columns]="columns"
        [data]="data"
        [config]="config"
        [loading]="loading"
        [loadingCustomQueryFilter]="loadingCustomQueryFilter"
      >
        <em slot="title" className="aq-icon-table"></em>
        <aq-badge state="success" slot="header-left">U</aq-badge>
        <aq-button
          id="loadingButton"
          slot="header-right"
          is-outline
          (onClick)="handleClick()"
        >
          Loader
        </aq-button>
      </aq-table>
    </div>
    <br />
    <br />
    <div className="components" style="height: 500px">
      <aq-table
        id="my-table-sc"
        has-header
        [columns]="columns"
        [data]="data"
        [config]="extraConfig"
        [loading]="loading"
        (loadingCustomQueryFilter)="loadingCustomQueryFilter()"
      >
        <em slot="title" className="aq-icon-table"></em>
        <aq-badge state="success" slot="header-left">U</aq-badge>
        <aq-button
          id="loadingButton"
          slot="header-right"
          is-outline
          (onClick)="handleClick()"
        >
          Loader
        </aq-button>
      </aq-table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-client-table',
  imports: [AqTable, AqButton, AqBadge],
  templateUrl: './set-client-table.component.html',
})
export class SetClientTableComponent {
  data = [...dataTable];
  loading = false;
  handlePinChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string, value: boolean }>) => {
    console.log('Pin Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
  };
  handleSortChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string, value: string }>) => {
    console.log('Sort Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
  };
  handleSizeChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string, value: number }>) => {
    console.log('Size Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
  };

  columns = [
    {
      accessorKey: 'make',
      header: 'Make',
      size: 150,
      minSize: 100,
      maxSize: 200,
      meta: {
        label: 'Make',
        tooltip: 'Tooltip Make',
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'model',
      header: 'model',
      size: 150,
      meta: {
        icon: 'aq-icon-sms',
        label: 'Model custom title',
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'price',
      header: 'Price',
      size: 250,
      meta: {
        aligment: {
          content: Alignment.CENTER,
          header: Alignment.CENTER,
        },
        label: 'Price',
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'electric',
      header: 'Electric',
      meta: {
        label: 'Electric',
        formatter: (val: any) => {
          return `<aq-badge status="${val.value ? 'success' : 'danger'}">${
            val.value ? 'Yes' : 'No'
          }</aq-badge>`;
        },
      },
    },
  ];
  config = {
    state: {
      columnPinning: {},
    },
    title: 'My custom Title',
    titleTooltip: 'Is a tooltip',
    titleIcon: 'aq-icon-table',
    perPage: 5,
    chunk: 3,
    height: 450,
    perPageValues: [5, 10, 15, 20],
    errorValue: 'No data available',
  };
  loadingCustomQueryFilter = (query?: string) => {
    if (!query) return (this.data = [...dataTable]);
    const copy = [...dataTable];
    const filterData = copy.filter((item) =>
      item.model.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())
    );
    this.data = [...filterData];
    return this.data;
  };
  handleClick = () => {
    this.loading = !this.loading;
  };
  extraConfig = { ...this.config, perPage: 50 };
}

import { Component, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import { AqCollapse, AqButton, AqCollapseContent, AqCollapseHeader, AqSubheading } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-collapse',
  imports: [AqCollapse, AqButton, AqCollapseContent, AqCollapseHeader, AqSubheading, FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule],
  templateUrl: './set-collapse.component.html',
})
export class SetCollapseComponent {
  @ViewChild('collapseEl', { static: true }) collapseEl!: AqCollapse;

  showCollapse(): void {
    this.collapseEl.show();
  }

  hideCollapse(): void {
    this.collapseEl.hide();
  }

  toggleCollapse(): void {
    this.collapseEl.toggle();
  }

  handleOpen(): void {
    console.log('Collapse opened');
  }

  handleClose(): void {
    console.log('Collapse closed');
  }

  handleHeaderClick(event: Event): void {
    console.log('Collapse header click:', event);
  }
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/directives/set-spinner-directive/set-spinner-directive.component.ts
================================================
import { Component, ElementRef, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-spinner-directive',
  imports: [AqButton],
  templateUrl: './set-spinner-directive.component.html',
})
export class SetSpinnerDirectiveComponent {
  @ViewChild('spinner1', { static: true })
  spinner1Ref!: ElementRef<HTMLDivElement>;
  @ViewChild('spinner2', { static: true })
  spinner2Ref!: ElementRef<HTMLDivElement>;

  activeSpinner1 = false;
  activeSpinner2 = false;

  toggleSpinner1() {
    this.activeSpinner1 = !this.activeSpinner1;
    this.spinner1Ref.nativeElement.setAttribute(
      'aq-spinner',
      JSON.stringify({ show: this.activeSpinner1 })
    );
  }
  toggleSpinner2() {
    this.activeSpinner2 = !this.activeSpinner2;
    this.spinner2Ref.nativeElement.setAttribute(
      'aq-spinner',
      JSON.stringify({ show: this.activeSpinner2 })
    );
  }
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/directives/set-tooltip-directive/set-tooltip-directive.component.ts
================================================
import { Component, ElementRef, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { IPopover } from '@aqua-ds/web-components';
@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-tooltip-directive',
  imports: [AqButton],
  templateUrl: './set-tooltip-directive.component.html',
})
export class SetTooltipDirectiveComponent {
  @ViewChild('tooltipRefSimple', { static: true })
  tooltipRefSimple!: ElementRef<HTMLDivElement>;
  @ViewChild('tooltipRefWC', { static: true })
  tooltipRefWC!: ElementRef<HTMLDivElement>;
  @ViewChild('tooltipRefIcon', { static: true })
  tooltipRefIcon!: ElementRef<HTMLDivElement>;

  tooltipSimple: IPopover = {
    content: 'This is a tooltip',
  };
  tooltipWC: IPopover = {
    content: '<aq-heading level="1"><span slot="text">This is a heading</span></aq-heading>',
  };
  tooltipIcons: IPopover = {
    content:
      '<span>This is a helper text or caption <em class="aq-icon-email">Email</em></span>',
  };

  toJson(v: unknown) {
    return v == null ? null : JSON.stringify(v); // null/undefined → quita el atributo
  }

  updateTooltips() {
    this.tooltipSimple = { content: 'Update Tooltip' };
    this.tooltipWC = { content: 'Update Tooltip' };
    this.tooltipIcons = { content: 'Update Tooltip' };
  }
}

import { Component } from '@angular/core';

  selector: 'app-set-banner',
  imports: [AqBanner, AqButton, FormsModule, AWCValueAccessor],
  templateUrl: './set-banner.component.html',
})
export class SetBannerComponent {
  toggleValue = true;

  toggleToggle = () => {
    console.log(this.toggleValue);
  }
  closeBanner = () => {
    console.log('Get banner <close> event.')
  }

  alert1 = () => {
    alert('Action 1 executed');
  };

  alert2 = () => {
    alert('Action 2 executed');
  }
}

import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqCheckbox, BooleanValueAccessor } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-checkbox',
  imports: [FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule, AqCheckbox, BooleanValueAccessor],
  templateUrl: './set-checkbox.component.html',
})
export class SetCheckboxComponent {
  modelCheckbox = false;
  
  handleValueChanged1(event: Event) {
    console.log('Evento input recibido:', event);
  }
  handleValueChanged2(event: Event) {
    console.log('Evento change recibido:', event, (event as CustomEvent).detail.value);
  }
}

import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqCheckboxGroup, AWCValueAccessor } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-checkbox-group',
  imports: [AqCheckboxGroup, AWCValueAccessor, FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule],
  templateUrl: './set-checkbox-group.component.html',
})
export class SetCheckboxGroupComponent {
  modelCheckboxGroup: any = ['option-2'];

  infoCheckboxGroup = [
    {
      label: "Ross",
      isChecked: true,
      valueCheckbox: "option-1",
      subLabel: "This is a sublabel ",
      isDisabled: true,
      icon: "aq-icon-message"
    },
    {
      label: "Rachel",
      valueCheckbox: "option-2",
      icon: "aq-icon-message",
      subLabel: "This is a sublabel ",
      tooltipWidth: "100px"
    },
    {
      valueCheckbox: "option-3",
      label: "Chandler",
      subLabel: "This is a long sublabel to test multiline"
    }
  ];

  handleValueInput(event: Event) {
    console.log('CheckboxGroup Value Input: ', event, (event as CustomEvent).detail);
  }
  handleValueChanged(event: Event) {
    console.log('CheckboxGroup Value Changed: ', event, (event as CustomEvent).detail.value);
  }
}

    end: '2025-05-09T14:55',
  };

  modelIndHourDate = "2025-05-09T02:52"

    console.log('Handling datepicker custom aqinput from Angular ', e.detail.value);

<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Number Field</div>
  <div class="components">
    <!-- Componente principal con referencia -->
    <aq-number-field
      #aqNumberFieldRef
      id="aq-number-field-1"
      [(ngModel)]="numberValue"
      [step]="2"
      [minValue]="5"
      [strictLimitValue]="true"
      [format]="numberFieldMantissa"

      info="This is a tooltip"

      [minValue]="5"

      [isError]="true"

      info="This is a tooltip"

================================================
FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/forms/set-number-field/set-number-field.component.ts
================================================
import { Component, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import { AqNumberField, AqHelperText, AqButton, AWCValueAccessor } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-number-field',
  standalone: true,
  imports: [
    AqNumberField,
    AqHelperText,
    AqButton,
    AWCValueAccessor,
    FormsModule,
    ReactiveFormsModule,
  ],
  templateUrl: './set-number-field.component.html',
})
export class SetNumberFieldComponent {
  numberValue = '15';
  numberFieldMantissa = { thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 2 };

  // ViewChild para obtener la referencia al componente
  @ViewChild('aqNumberFieldRef') aqNumberFieldRef!: AqNumberField;

  handleAqChange(e: Event) {
    console.log('Handling number field change from Angular ', (e as CustomEvent).detail.value);
  }

  handleAqInput(e: Event) {
    console.log('Handling number field input from Angular ', (e as CustomEvent).detail.value);
  }

  async setFormat() {
    if (this.aqNumberFieldRef) {
      await this.aqNumberFieldRef.setFormat({ mantissa: 3 });
    }
  }
}



================================================

================================================
<div class="container">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">TagField</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-tag-field
        [(ngModel)]="tagFieldValue"
        (change)="handleValueChange($event)"
        (input)="handleValueInput($event)"
        (textChange)="handleTextChange($event)"
        (closeTag)="handleOnCloseTag($event)"
        [validator]="validator"
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
        icon="aq-icon-settings"
        placeholder="Your placeholder goes here"
        is-required
        has-clear
        show-selected-counter
        #aqTagFieldRef
      >
      </aq-tag-field>
      value: {{ tagFieldValue }}

      <!-- Component API -->
      <div>
        <aq-button style="margin: 2px;" is-outline (click)="addTag()">Add tag</aq-button>
        <aq-button style="margin: 2px;" is-outline (click)="removeTag()">Remove tag</aq-button>
        <aq-button style="margin: 2px;" is-outline (click)="setTagFieldValues()">Set tag field data</aq-button>
        <aq-button style="margin: 2px;" is-outline (click)="clearSelection()">Clear tag field selection</aq-button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/forms/set-tag-field/set-tag-field.component.ts
================================================
import { Component, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
import { AqTagField, AqButton, AWCValueAccessor } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-tag-field',
  imports: [AqTagField, AqButton, FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule, AWCValueAccessor],
  templateUrl: './set-tag-field.component.html',
})
export class SetTagFieldComponent {
  @ViewChild('aqTagFieldRef') aqTagFieldRef: any;
  
  tagFieldValue = ['Text tag'];

  // Component Events
  handleValueInput = (e: any) => {
    const event = e as CustomEvent<{ value: string }>;
    // This event triggers anytime the user inputs a new tag.
    // User can use input or change event.
    console.log('Handling tag field custom input from angular: ', event.detail.value);
  };
  handleValueChange = (e: any) => {
    const event = e as CustomEvent<{ value: string }>;
    // This event trigegrs anytime the user inputs a new tag and the value array changes.
    // User can use input or change event.
    console.log('Handling tag field custom change from angular: ', event.detail.value);
  };
  handleTextChange = (e: any) => {
    // This event triggers any time the user modifies the input text
    console.log('Handling tag field text change from angular: ', e.detail.value);
  };
  handleOnCloseTag = (e: any) => {
    console.log(e)
    // This event triggers any time the user closes a tag from the close icon in each tag
    console.log('Handling tag field close tag from angular. Closed tag: ', e.detail.value, ' index: ', e.detail.idx);
  };

  // Validator: A function that returns boolean.
  // Allows to include custom validations before the input of each tag
  validator = (val: string) => {
    const regex = /[A-Za-z]/;
    // Makes sure the input contains at least 1 letter
    return regex.test(val);
  }

  addTag() {
    if (this.aqTagFieldRef?.addTag) {
      this.aqTagFieldRef.addTag('Test');
    }
  }
  removeTag() {
    if (this.aqTagFieldRef?.removeTag) {
      this.aqTagFieldRef.removeTag(0);
    }
  }
  setTagFieldValues() {
    if (this.aqTagFieldRef?.setTagFieldValues) {
      this.aqTagFieldRef.setTagFieldValues(['a', 'b', 'c']);
    }
  }
  clearSelection() {
    if (this.aqTagFieldRef?.setTagFieldValues) {
      this.aqTagFieldRef.clearSelection();
    }
  }
  
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/overlays/set-dialog/set-dialog.component.html
================================================
<div class="container">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Dialog</div>
    <div className="components is-gap-4">
      <!-- Toggle externo -->
      <aq-toggle [(ngModel)]="toggleValue"></aq-toggle>

      <!-- Botón para abrir el diálogo como directiva (sin lógica aquí) -->
      <aq-button aq-dialog="dialog-1" is-outline info="Open dialog using directive">
        Open dialog as directive
      </aq-button>

    <!-- Diálogo controlado -->
    <aq-dialog
      id="dialog-1"
      size="small"
      title-dialog="Dialog Title Toggle"
      state="info"
      allow-maximize
      [(ngModel)]="toggleValue"
      (close)="onClose()"
      (open)="onOpen()"
    >
      <span>
        Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero.
        Sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Sed nisi. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum.
      </span>

        <div slot="header-right">
          <em class="aq-icon-three-dots-vertical"></em>
        </div>

        <div slot="footer-right">
          <aq-button>Secondary</aq-button>
          <aq-button (click)="closeDialog()">Close</aq-button>
        </div>

        <div slot="footer-left">
          <aq-button>Tertiary</aq-button>
        </div>
      </aq-dialog>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import {
  AqDialog,
  AqToggle,
  AqButton,
  AWCValueAccessor,
} from '@aqua-ds/angular';
import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-dialog',
  standalone: true,
  imports: [
    AqDialog,
    AqToggle,
    AqButton,
    FormsModule,
    ReactiveFormsModule,
    AWCValueAccessor,
  ],
  templateUrl: './set-dialog.component.html',
})
export class SetDialogComponent {
  toggleValue = false;

  closeDialog = () => {
    this.toggleValue = false;
    console.log('Dialog closed.');
  };
  
  onOpen() {
    console.log('Get dialog <open> event.');
  }

  onClose() {
    console.log('Get dialog <close> event.');
  }
}

FILE: test-apps/angular-test-app/src/app/components/titlesAndText/set-code/set-code.component.ts
================================================
import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { AqButton, AqCode } from '@aqua-ds/angular';
@Component({
  selector: 'app-set-code',
  imports: [AqCode, AqButton],
  templateUrl: './set-code.component.html',
})
export class SetCodeComponent {
  codeSmaller = 'This is a code';
  codeLarger =
    'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Sed nisi. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum.';

  handleUpdateContent = () => {
    this.codeSmaller = 'This is a new code';
    this.codeLarger =
      'New Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Sed nisi. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum.';
  };
}

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/README.md
================================================
# React + TypeScript + Vite

This template provides a minimal setup to get React working in Vite with HMR and some ESLint rules.

Currently, two official plugins are available:

- [@vitejs/plugin-react](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react/blob/main/packages/plugin-react/README.md) uses [Babel](https://babeljs.io/) for Fast Refresh
- [@vitejs/plugin-react-swc](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react-swc) uses [SWC](https://swc.rs/) for Fast Refresh

## Expanding the ESLint configuration

If you are developing a production application, we recommend updating the configuration to enable type-aware lint rules:

```js
export default tseslint.config({
  extends: [
    // Remove ...tseslint.configs.recommended and replace with this
    ...tseslint.configs.recommendedTypeChecked,
    // Alternatively, use this for stricter rules
    ...tseslint.configs.strictTypeChecked,
    // Optionally, add this for stylistic rules
    ...tseslint.configs.stylisticTypeChecked,
  ],
  languageOptions: {
    // other options...
    parserOptions: {
      project: ['./tsconfig.node.json', './tsconfig.app.json'],
      tsconfigRootDir: import.meta.dirname,
    },
  },
})
```

You can also install [eslint-plugin-react-x](https://github.com/Rel1cx/eslint-react/tree/main/packages/plugins/eslint-plugin-react-x) and [eslint-plugin-react-dom](https://github.com/Rel1cx/eslint-react/tree/main/packages/plugins/eslint-plugin-react-dom) for React-specific lint rules:

```js
// eslint.config.js
import reactX from 'eslint-plugin-react-x'
import reactDom from 'eslint-plugin-react-dom'

export default tseslint.config({
  plugins: {
    // Add the react-x and react-dom plugins
    'react-x': reactX,
    'react-dom': reactDom,
  },
  rules: {
    // other rules...
    // Enable its recommended typescript rules
    ...reactX.configs['recommended-typescript'].rules,
    ...reactDom.configs.recommended.rules,
  },
})
```



================================================
FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/eslint.config.js
================================================
import js from '@eslint/js'
import globals from 'globals'
import reactHooks from 'eslint-plugin-react-hooks'
import reactRefresh from 'eslint-plugin-react-refresh'
import tseslint from 'typescript-eslint'

export default tseslint.config(
  { ignores: ['dist'] },
  {
    extends: [js.configs.recommended, ...tseslint.configs.recommended],
    files: ['**/*.{ts,tsx}'],
    languageOptions: {
      ecmaVersion: 2020,
      globals: globals.browser,
    },
    plugins: {
      'react-hooks': reactHooks,
      'react-refresh': reactRefresh,
    },
    rules: {
      ...reactHooks.configs.recommended.rules,
      'react-refresh/only-export-components': [
        'warn',
        { allowConstantExport: true },
      ],
    },
  },
)

import { defineConfig } from 'vite'

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/App.css
================================================
body {
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 20px !important;
  min-height: 100vh;
  background-color: #f7f7f8;
  width: 100vw;
  height: auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/actions/sets/ButtonSplitSet.tsx
================================================
import { AqButtonSplit } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const ButtonSplitSet = () => {
    const items: Array<{id: string, name: string}> = [{
      id: "id1",
      name: "option1"
    },
    {
      id: "id2",
      name: "option2"
    }];
    const handleClickLeft = (e: CustomEvent<{ event: Event }>) => {
      console.log('Handling button split click left ', e, e.detail);
    };
    const handleClickRight = (e: CustomEvent<{ event: Event }>) => {
      console.log('Handling button split click right ', e);
    };
    const handleClickItem = (e: CustomEvent<{ value: string }>) => {
      console.log('Handling button split click item ', e);
    };
      

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Button split</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqButtonSplit 
          items={items} 
          variant="success"
          onClickLeft={handleClickLeft}
          onClickRight={handleClickRight} 
          onClickItem={handleClickItem}
        >
          Button
        </AqButtonSplit>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/actions/sets/DropdownSet.tsx
================================================
import {
  AqDropdown,
  AqButton,
  AqSubheading,
  AqDropdownItem,
  AqCheckbox,
  AqBadge,
} from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { IDropdownItem } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const DropdownSet = () => {
  // Option 1: passing items as prop
  const [items, _] = useState([
    {
      label: 'Option 1',
      icon: 'aq-icon-sight-on',
      callback: () => {
        console.log('VR Item 1 Selected');
      },
    },
    {
      label: 'Option 2',
      className: 'aq-dropdown-item--disabled',
      callback: () => {
        console.log('VR Item 2 Selected');
      },
    },
    {
      label: 'Option 3',
      callback: () => {
        console.log('VR Item 3 Selected');
      },
    },
  ]);

  const [itemsLang] = useState<IDropdownItem[]>([
    {
      label: 'ES',
    },
    {
      label: 'EN',
    },
  ]);
  const [langSelected, setLangSelected] = useState(itemsLang[0].label);

  const handleSelection = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    console.log('Dropdown selection: ', e);
  };
  const handleSelectionLang = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    setLangSelected(e.detail.label);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqDropdown</div>
      <div className="components">
        {/* Option 1: passing items as prop */}
        <AqDropdown
          id="dropdown-1"
          items={items}
          popover-width={300}
          onItemSelection={handleSelection}
        >
          <AqButton slot="activator" is-outline>
            <i className="aq-icon-three-dots-vertical"></i>
          </AqButton>
        </AqDropdown>

        {/* Option 2: passing items in slots */}
        <AqDropdown
          id="dropdown-3"
          placement="right"

        >
          <AqButton slot="activator" variant="default" is-outline hasDisclosure>
            Click Me!!
          </AqButton>
          <div slot="header">
            <AqSubheading>Custom Heading</AqSubheading>
          </div>
          <div slot="content">
            <AqDropdownItem className="dropdown_item"> Item 2 </AqDropdownItem>
            <AqDropdownItem className="dropdown_item">
              <AqCheckbox
                id="chk"
                value={true}
                value-checkbox="checkbox-7"

                isRequired
                label="Checkbox"
                icon="aq-icon-settings"
              ></AqCheckbox>

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/actions/sets/ToggleSet.tsx
================================================
  import { AqToggle } from '@aqua-ds/react';
  import { useState } from 'react';

  export const ToggleSet = () => {
    const [toggleValue, setToggleValue] = useState(false);
    const [textToggleValue, setTextToggleValue] = useState(false);

    type AqToggleChangeEvent = React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqToggleElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: boolean }> };

    const handleAqInput = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqToggleElement>) => {
      console.log('handleAqInput react', e, e.currentTarget.value,);
      setTextToggleValue(e.currentTarget.value);
    };

    const handleAqInput2Way = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqToggleElement>) => {
      console.log('handleAqInput2Way react', e, e.currentTarget.value);
      setToggleValue(e.currentTarget.value);
    };

    return (
      <div className="section">
        <div className="section-title">AqToggle</div>
        <div className="components">
          <div className="components">
            <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInput} helper-text="This is a helper text"></AqToggle>
            <div>
              <span>Selected Value: {textToggleValue.toString()}</span>
            </div>
            <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInput} is-disabled helper-text="This is a disabled toggle"></AqToggle>
            <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInput} is-disabled has-label helper-text="This is a disabled toggle with default label"></AqToggle>
            <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInput} has-label helper-text="This is a toggle with default label"></AqToggle>
            <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInput} has-label helper-text="This is a toggle with custom labels">
                <div slot="on"><span>Toggled on</span></div>
                <div slot="off"><span>Toggled off</span></div>
            </AqToggle>
          </div>
          <div className="components" style={{ paddingTop: "12px" }}>
              <p> Toggle 2-way binding alike: { toggleValue }</p>
              <AqToggle onInput={(e) => handleAqInput2Way(e)} value={toggleValue}></AqToggle>
              <AqToggle onInput={(e) => handleAqInput2Way(e)} value={toggleValue}></AqToggle>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

import { AqTreeMenu, AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useRef, useState } from 'react';

export const TreeMenuSet = () => {
  const aqTreeMenuRef = useRef<any>(null);
  let [options] = useState([
    {
      idItem: 1,
      label: 'Level 1',
      isOpen: true,
      childrenItems: [
        {
          idItem: '1-1',
          label: 'Level 1.1'
        },
        {
          idItem: '1-2',
          label: 'Level 1.2'
        },
        {
          idItem: '1-3',
          label: 'Level 1.3',
          childrenItems: [
            {
              idItem: '1-3-1',
              label: 'Level 1.3.1',
              childrenItems: [
                {
                  idItem: '1-3-1-1',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.1',
                  childrenItems: [
                    {
                      idItem: '1-3-1-1',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.1'
                    },
                    {
                      idItem: '1-3-2',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                    },
                    {
                      idItem: '1-3-3',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                    }
                  ]
                },
                {
                  idItem: '1-3-2',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                },
                {
                  idItem: '1-3-3',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                }
              ]
            },
            {
              idItem: '1-3-2',
              label: 'Level 1.3.2'
            },
            {
              idItem: '1-3-3',
              label: 'Level 1.3.3'
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          idItem: '1-4',
          label: 'Level 1.4',
          childrenItems: [
            {
              idItem: '1-3-1',
              label: 'Level 1.3.1',
              childrenItems: [
                {
                  idItem: '1-3-1-1',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.1',
                  childrenItems: [
                    {
                      idItem: '1-3-1-1',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.1'
                    },
                    {
                      idItem: '1-3-2',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                    },
                    {
                      idItem: '1-3-3',
                      label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                    }
                  ]
                },
                {
                  idItem: '1-3-2',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                },
                {
                  idItem: '1-3-3',
                  label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                }
              ]
            },
            {
              idItem: '1-3-2',
              label: 'Level 1.3.2'
            },
            {
              idItem: '1-3-3',
              label: 'Level 1.3.3'
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      idItem: 2,
      label: 'Level 2'
    }
  ]);

  // Component API
  const setOptions = async() => {
    if(aqTreeMenuRef.current !== null) {
      const treeMenuEl = aqTreeMenuRef.current;
      await treeMenuEl.setOptions([
        ...options,
        {
          idItem: 'add-option-1',
          label: 'Added option',
          childrenItems: [
            {
              idItem: '1-1',
              label: 'Level 1.1',
            },
          ]
        }
      ]);
    }
  }
  const getOptions = async() => {
    if(aqTreeMenuRef.current !== null) {
      const treeMenuEl = aqTreeMenuRef.current;
      alert(JSON.stringify(await treeMenuEl.getOptions()));
    }
  }
  const collapseAll = async() => {
    if(aqTreeMenuRef.current !== null) {
      const treeMenuEl = aqTreeMenuRef.current;
      await treeMenuEl.collapseAll();
    }
  }
  
  const handleToggleItem = (e: CustomEvent<{ clickedItem: {}, localOptions: [] }>) => {
    console.log('Tree menu toggle item: ', e, e.detail.clickedItem, e.detail.localOptions);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Tree Menu</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqTreeMenu onToggleItem={handleToggleItem} options={options} ref={aqTreeMenuRef}>
        </AqTreeMenu>
        <AqButton onClick={async() => await setOptions()} is-outline type="button">Set new options</AqButton>
        <AqButton onClick={async() => await getOptions()} is-outline type="button">Get current options</AqButton>
        <AqButton onClick={async() => await collapseAll()} is-outline type="button">Collapse items</AqButton>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/actions/sets/VoicePlayerSet.tsx
================================================
import { AqVoicePlayer, AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useRef } from 'react';

export const VoicePlayerSet = () => {
  const aqVoicePlayerRef = useRef<any>(null);

  // 🔹 Component API
  const playPause = async () => {
    if (aqVoicePlayerRef.current !== null) {
      await aqVoicePlayerRef.current.audioPlayPause();
    }
  };

  const getCurrentTime = async () => {
    if (aqVoicePlayerRef.current !== null) {
      const time = await aqVoicePlayerRef.current.getCurrentTime();
      console.log('Current time:', time);
    }
  };

  const getDuration = async () => {
    if (aqVoicePlayerRef.current !== null) {
      const duration = await aqVoicePlayerRef.current.getDuration();
      console.log('Duration:', duration);
    }
  };
  
  const handleAudioPlay = (e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) => {
    console.log('Audio play:', e.detail.currentTime);
  };

  const handleAudioPause = (e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) => {
    console.log('Audio pause:', e.detail.currentTime);
  };

  const handleAudioEnded = (e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) => {
    console.log('Audio ended:', e.detail.currentTime);
  };

  const handleAudioError = (e: CustomEvent<{ error: number }>) => {
    console.log('Audio error:', e.detail.error);
  };

  const handleLoadedAudio = (e: CustomEvent<{ duration: number }>) => {
    console.log('Audio loaded:', e.detail.duration);
  };

  const handlePositionChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) => {
    console.log('Audio position change:', e.detail.currentTime);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Voice Player</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqVoicePlayer
          ref={aqVoicePlayerRef}
          label="This is a label"
          is-required
          info="This is a tooltip"
          tooltip-width="90px"
          helper-text="This is a helper text"
          audio-source="https://interactive-examples.mdn.mozilla.net/media/cc0-audio/t-rex-roar.mp3"
          onAudioPlay={handleAudioPlay}
          onAudioPause={handleAudioPause}
          onAudioEnded={handleAudioEnded}
          onAudioError={handleAudioError}
          onLoadedAudio={handleLoadedAudio}
          onPositionChange={handlePositionChange}
        >
        </AqVoicePlayer>

        <div className="flex gap-2 mt-4">
          <AqButton onClick={async () => await playPause()} is-outline type="button">
            Play / Pause
          </AqButton>
          <AqButton onClick={async () => await getCurrentTime()} is-outline type="button">
            Get Current Time
          </AqButton>
          <AqButton onClick={async () => await getDuration()} is-outline type="button">
            Get Duration
          </AqButton>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const ChartAreaSet = () => {

      3346, 4259, 5242, 6144, 7091, 8400, 9490, 10671, 11736, 13279,

      5527, 5215, 4858, 4750, 4650, 4600, 4500, 4490, 4300, 4350, 4330,
      4310, 4495, 4477, 4489, 4380, 1
    ]
  }];

  const [chartSeriesUSA, setChartSeriesUSA] = useState(true);

  const [data, setData] = useState({
    series: seriesArea,
    title: {
      text: 'Chart Area',
      align: 'left',
    },
    subtitle: {
      text: 'Subtitle',
      align: 'left',
    },
    lang: {
      locale: 'en-US'
    },
    plotOptions: {
      area: {
        pointStart: 1940,
        marker: {
          enabled: false,
          symbol: 'circle',
          radius: 2,
          states: {
            hover: {
              enabled: true
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  });

  const chartRef = useRef<any>(null);

  const changeSeries = () => {
    const newSeries = chartSeriesUSA ? [{
      name: 'COL',
      data: [
        null, null, null, null, null, 2, 9, 13, 50, 170, 299, 438, 841,
        1169, 1703, 2422, 3692, 5543, 7345, 12298, 18638, 22229, 25540,
        28133, 29463, 31139, 31175, 31255, 29561, 27552, 26008, 25830,        
        10685, 10577, 10526, 10457, 10027, 8570, 8360, 7853, 5709, 5273,
        5113, 5066, 4897, 4881, 4804, 4717, 4571, 4018, 3822, 3785, 3805,
        3750, 3708, 3708, 3708, 3708
      ]
    }, {
      name: 'JPN',
      data: [
        null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null,
        1, 5, 25, 50, 120, 150, 200, 426, 660, 863, 1048, 1627, 2492,
        3346, 4259, 5242, 6144, 7091, 8400, 9490, 10671, 11736, 13279,              
        13188, 12188, 11152, 10114, 9076, 8038, 7000, 6643, 6286, 5929,
        5527, 5215, 4858, 4750, 4650, 4600, 4500, 4490, 4300, 4350, 4330,
        4310, 4495, 4477, 4489, 4380, 1
      ]
    }] : seriesArea;

    const newTitle = chartSeriesUSA ? { text: 'COL/JPN' } : { text: 'USA/Rusia' };

    setData(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      series: newSeries,
      title: { ...prev.title, ...newTitle }
    }));

    setChartSeriesUSA(!chartSeriesUSA);

    // También puedes usar la ref si quieres llamar a métodos del componente
    if (chartRef.current) {
      chartRef.current.updateSeries(newSeries);
      chartRef.current.updateOptions({ title: newTitle });
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Aq Chart Area</div>
      <div className="components">
        <aq-chart-area ref={chartRef} options={data}></aq-chart-area>
        <AqButton is-outline onClick={changeSeries}>Change Data</AqButton>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/charts/sets/ChartBarSet.tsx
================================================
import { useState, useRef } from 'react';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-bar';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const ChartBarSet = () => {
  const seriesBar = [
    {
      name: "Browsers",
      data: [
        { name: "Safari", y: 500, status: "danger" },
        { name: "Brave", y: 507, status: "success" },
        { name: "Opera", y: 205, status: "warning" },
        { name: "Mozilla", y: 409, status: "neutral" },
        { name: "Chrome", y: 602, status: "caution" },
      ],
    },
  ];

  const [chartSeries1, setChartSeries1] = useState(true);

  const [data, setData] = useState<any>({
    title: {
      text: "Chart Title",
      align: "left",
    },
    subtitle: {
      text: "Subtitle Chart",
      align: "center",
    },
    // Customize bar info banner
    tooltip: {
      enabled: true,
      pointFormat:
        '<span style="color:{point.color}; font-size: var(--font-size-xl)">{series.name}</span>: <br/><span style="font-style: italic">{point.y:.2f}%</span><b>&nbsp; format text</b>',
    },

    // Data display config
    xAxis: {
      title: {
        text: "Label Axis X",
      },
      categories: ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun"],
    },
    yAxis: {
      title: {
        text: "Label Axis Y",
      },
    },
    series: seriesBar,
  });

  const chartRef = useRef<any>(null);

  const changeSeries = () => {
    const newSeries = chartSeries1
      ? [
          {
            name: "Browsers",
            data: [
              { name: "Safari", y: 300, status: "danger" },
              { name: "Brave", y: 307, status: "success" },
              { name: "Opera", y: 605, status: "warning" },
              { name: "Mozilla", y: 209, status: "neutral" },
              { name: "Chrome", y: 802, status: "caution" },
            ],
          },
        ]
      : seriesBar;

    const newTitle = chartSeries1
      ? { text: "Chart Bar 2" }
      : { text: "Chart Bar" };

    setData((prev: any) => ({
      ...prev,
      series: newSeries,
      title: { ...prev.title, ...newTitle },
    }));

    setChartSeries1(!chartSeries1);

    if (chartRef.current) {
      chartRef.current.updateSeries(newSeries);
      chartRef.current.updateOptions({ title: newTitle });
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Chart Bar</div>
      <div className="components">
        <aq-chart-bar ref={chartRef} options={data} palette="Teal" />
        <AqButton is-outline onClick={changeSeries}>
          Update data
        </AqButton>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
