import { useState, useRef } from 'react';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-column';
import { AqButton, AqHelperText, AqCode } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const ChartColumnSet = () => {
  const chartRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const [isGrouped, setIsGrouped] = useState(false);

  const seriesColumnGrouped = [
    {
      name: "Tokyo",
      data: [49.9, 71.5, 106.4, 129.2, 144, 176, 135.6, 148.5, 216.4, 194.1, 95.6, 54.4]
    },
    {
      name: "New York",
      data: [83.6, 78.8, 98.5, 93.4, 106, 84.5, 105, 104.3, 91.2, 83.5, 106.6, 92.3]
    },
    {
      name: "London",
      data: [48.9, 38.8, 39.3, 41.4, 47, 48.3, 59, 59.6, 52.4, 65.2, 59.3, 51.2]
    },
    {
      name: "Berlin",
      data: [42.4, 33.2, 34.5, 39.7, 52.6, 75.5, 57.4, 60.4, 47.6, 39.1, 46.8, 51.1]
    },
    {
      name: "Amsterdam",
      data: [22.4, 53.2, 44.5, 29.7, 58.6, 95.5, 49.9, 71.5, 106.4, 129.2, 144, 176]
    },
    {
      name: "Madrid",
      data: [122.4, 93.2, 64.5, 49.7, 78.6, 55.5, 48.9, 38.8, 39.3, 41.4, 47, 48.3]
    }
  ];

  const seriesColumn = [
    {
      name: "Browsers",
      data: [
        { name: "Safari", y: 500 },
        { name: "Brave", y: 507 },
        { name: "Opera", y: 205 },
        { name: "Mozilla", y: 409 },
        { name: "Chrome", y: 602 }
      ]
    }
  ];

  const [data] = useState<any>({
    series: seriesColumn,
    title: {
      text: 'Chart Columns',
      align: 'center',
    },
    subtitle: {
      text: 'Subtitle column',
      align: 'center',
    },
    xAxis: {
      title: { text: "Label Axis X" },
      categories: [
        "Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul",
        "Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"
      ]
    },
    yAxis: {
      title: { text: "Label Axis Y" }
    },
  });

  const handleClick = () => {
    const nextIsGrouped = !isGrouped;
    setIsGrouped(nextIsGrouped);

    if (chartRef.current) {
      chartRef.current.updateSeries(nextIsGrouped ? seriesColumnGrouped : seriesColumn);
    }
  };

  const handleClickColumn = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    console.log('Handling click column from React ', e);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Aq Chart Column</div>
      <div className="pt-2 components">
        <aq-chart-column
          ref={chartRef}
          onClickColumn={handleClickColumn}
          is-grouped={isGrouped}
          options={data}
          palette="Purple"
        ></aq-chart-column>
        <div>
          <AqButton onClick={handleClick} variant="primary" type="submit">
            <em className="aq-icon-arrows-left-right"></em>
            Change column type
          </AqButton>
          <AqHelperText>- Changes type by doing:</AqHelperText>
          {/* TODO create API to do this */}
          <AqCode>data = &#123; ...data, series: seriesNewData &#125;</AqCode>
          <div className="pt-5">
            <AqHelperText>- Legend is hidden by a react state property</AqHelperText>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/charts/sets/ChartDonutSet.tsx
================================================
import { useRef, useState } from 'react';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-donut';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const ChartDonutSet = () => {
  const chartRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const [chartSeries1, setChartSeries1] = useState(true);

  const seriesDonut = [
    {
      data: [
        { name: "Safari", y: 500, status: "danger" },
        { name: "Brave", y: 507, status: "success" },
        { name: "Opera", y: 205, status: "warning" },
        { name: "Mozilla", y: 409, status: "neutral" },
        { name: "Chrome", y: 602, status: "caution" }
      ],
    }
  ];

  const altSeriesDonut = [
    {
      data: [
        { name: "Safari", y: 100, status: "danger" },
        { name: "Brave", y: 107, status: "success" },
        { name: "Opera", y: 265, status: "warning" },
        { name: "Mozilla", y: 709, status: "neutral" },
        { name: "Chrome", y: 102, status: "caution" }
      ],
    }
  ];

  const [data] = useState<any>({
    series: seriesDonut,
    title: {
      text: 'Chart Donut',
      align: 'center',
    },
    subtitle: {
      text: 'Subtitle Donut',
      align: 'center',
    },
    plotOptions: {
      pie: {
        point: {
          events: {
            click: () => {
              alert('You clicked');
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  });

  const changeSeries = () => {
    const next = !chartSeries1;
    setChartSeries1(next);

    if (chartRef.current) {
      chartRef.current.updateSeries(next ? seriesDonut : altSeriesDonut);
      chartRef.current.updateOptions({
        title: { text: next ? 'Chart Donut' : 'Chart Donut 2' }
      });
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Aq Chart Donut</div>
      <div className="components">
        <aq-chart-donut
          ref={chartRef}
          options={data}
          palette="Purple"
        ></aq-chart-donut>
        <AqButton isOutline onClick={changeSeries}>
          Update data
        </AqButton>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/charts/sets/ChartDonutThinSet.tsx
================================================
import { useRef, useState } from 'react';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-donut-thin';
import { AqButton, AqCodeEditor } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const ChartDonutThinSet = () => {
  const chartRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const [chartSeries1, setChartSeries1] = useState(true);

  const seriesDonutThin = [
    {
      name: "Status",
      data: [
        { name: "Delivered", y: 70, status: "warning" },
        { name: "Clicked", y: 45, status: "neutral" },
        { name: "Opened", y: 25, status: "info" },
        { name: "Error", y: 5, status: "danger" },
        { name: "Read", y: 20, status: "success" },
        { name: "Other", y: 20, status: "caution" }
      ]
    }
  ];

  const altSeriesDonutThin = [
    {
      data: [
        { name: "Safari", y: 100, status: "danger" },
        { name: "Brave", y: 107, status: "success" },
        { name: "Opera", y: 265, status: "warning" },
        { name: "Mozilla", y: 709, status: "neutral" },
        { name: "Chrome", y: 102, status: "caution" }
      ]
    }
  ];

  const [data, setData] = useState<any>({
    title: { text: "Chart Title", align: "center" },
    subtitle: { text: "Subtitle Chart", align: "left" },
    series: seriesDonutThin,
    tooltip: {
      borderWidth: 0,
      backgroundColor: 'none',
      valueSuffix: '%XD',
      shadow: false,
      headerFormat: '',
      useHTML: true,
      style: { fontSize: "20px" },
      pointFormat:
        "<span style=color:{point.color};font-size: 20px>{point.name}</span><br/><span style=font-style: italic>{point.y:.2f}%</span><br/><b>format text</b>"
    }
  });

  const [tooltipPositionerX, setTooltipPositionerX] = useState(0);
  const [tooltipPositionerY, setTooltipPositionerY] = useState(0);
  const [dataString, setDataString] = useState(JSON.stringify(data));

  const changeSeries = () => {
    const next = !chartSeries1;
    setChartSeries1(next);

    const series = next ? seriesDonutThin : altSeriesDonutThin;

    if (chartRef.current) {
      chartRef.current.updateSeries(series);
      chartRef.current.updateOptions({
        title: { text: next ? 'Chart Donut Thin' : 'Chart Donut Thin 2' }
      });
    }
  };

  const handleDataStringChange = (newVal: string) => {
    setDataString(newVal);
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(newVal);
      setData(parsed);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Invalid JSON in editor", e);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Chart Donut Thin</div>
      <div className="components">
        <aq-chart-donut-thin
          ref={chartRef}
          options={data}
          palette="Teal"
          tooltip-positioner-x={tooltipPositionerX}
          tooltip-positioner-y={tooltipPositionerY}
        ></aq-chart-donut-thin>

        <AqButton isOutline onClick={changeSeries}>
          Update data
        </AqButton>

        <AqCodeEditor value={dataString} onChange={handleDataStringChange} />

        <input
          type="number"
          value={tooltipPositionerX}
          onChange={(e) => setTooltipPositionerX(Number(e.target.value))}
        />
        <input
          type="number"
          value={tooltipPositionerY}
          onChange={(e) => setTooltipPositionerY(Number(e.target.value))}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

        "iso-a3",
        "code3"
      ],

        hover: {
          color: "#052533"
        }
      },
      tooltip: {
        valueSuffix: "/km²"
      }
    }
  ];
  const [data] = useState({
      title: {
        text: "Chart Title",
        "align": "center"
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: "Subtitle Chart",
        "align": "right"
      },
      legend: {
        enabled: true
      },
      tooltip: {
        enabled: true,
      },
      mapNavigation: {
        enabled: true,
        enableDoubleClickZoomTo: true
      },
      series: seriesGeoMap1,
      name: "Population density",
      joinBy: ["iso-a3", "code3"]
    });

  const changeSeries = () => {
    const newChartSeries1 = !chartSeries1;
    setChartSeries1(newChartSeries1);

    const series = newChartSeries1 ? seriesGeoMap1 : seriesGeoMap2;
    if (chartRef.current) {
      chartRef.current.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = newChartSeries1
        ? { title: { text: "Chart Line 1" } }
        : { title: { text: "Chart Line 2" } };
      chartRef.current.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Chart Line</div>
      <div className="components">
        <aq-chart-geo-map ref={chartRef} options={data} palette="Purple"></aq-chart-geo-map>
        <AqButton isOutline onClick={changeSeries}>
          Update data
        </AqButton>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};



================================================
FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/charts/sets/ChartLineSet.tsx
================================================
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-line';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useRef, useState } from 'react';

export const ChartLineSet = () => {
  const chartRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const [chartSeries1, setChartSeries1] = useState(true);

  const seriesLine1 = [
    {
      name: "Installation",
      data: [43934, 52503, 57177, 69658, 97031, 119931, 137133, 154175],
      status: "success",
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: "ohlc",
        forced: true,
        units: [["hour", [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
    {
      name: "Project Development",
      data: [null, null, 7988, 12169, 15112, 22452, 34400, 34227],
      status: "warning",
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: "ohlc",
        forced: true,
        units: [["hour", [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
    {
      name: "Other",
      data: [12908, 5948, 8105, 11248, 8989, 11816, 18274, 18111],
      status: "neutral",
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: "ohlc",
        forced: true,
        units: [["hour", [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
  ];

  const seriesLine2 = [
    {
      name: "Installation",
      data: [23934, 50003, 50717, 89658, 37031, 100931, 100133, 100175],
      status: "success",
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: "ohlc",
        forced: true,
        units: [["hour", [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
    {
      name: "Project Development",
      data: [null, null, 7988, 19169, 10112, 2452, 30400, 30227],
      status: "warning",
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: "ohlc",
        forced: true,
        units: [["hour", [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
    {
      name: "Other",
      data: [12908, 5948, 8105, 11248, 8989, 11816, 18274, 18111],
      status: "neutral",
      dataGrouping: {
        approximation: "ohlc",
        forced: true,
        units: [["hour", [1]]],
      },
      enabled: true,
      groupAll: true,
      groupPixelWidth: 100,
    },
  ];

  const [data] = useState<any>({
    series: seriesLine1,
    title: { text: "Chart Line 1", align: "center" },
    subtitle: { text: "Subtitle Line", align: "center" },
    xAxis: { title: { text: "Label Axis X" } },
    yAxis: { title: { text: "Label Axis Y" } },
  });

  const changeSeries = () => {
    const newChartSeries1 = !chartSeries1;
    setChartSeries1(newChartSeries1);

    const series = newChartSeries1 ? seriesLine1 : seriesLine2;
    if (chartRef.current) {
      chartRef.current.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = newChartSeries1
        ? { title: { text: "Chart Line 1" } }
        : { title: { text: "Chart Line 2" } };
      chartRef.current.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Chart Line</div>
      <div className="components">
        <aq-chart-line ref={chartRef} options={data}></aq-chart-line>
        <AqButton isOutline onClick={changeSeries}>
          Update data
        </AqButton>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/charts/sets/ChartProgressBarSet.tsx
================================================
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-progress-bar';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState, useRef } from 'react';

export const ChartProgressBarSet = () => {
  const chartRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const [chartSeries1, setChartSeries1] = useState(true);
  const [maxValue, setMaxValue] = useState(10);
  const [height, setHeight] = useState(150);

  const seriesProgress1 = [
    { name: "Image - 2.5GB", data: [2.5], grouping: false, status: "danger" },
    { name: "Audio - 0.4GB", data: [0.4], grouping: false, status: "success" },
    { name: "Video - 0.9GB", data: [0.9], grouping: false, status: "neutral" },
    { name: "Docs - 1.2GB", data: [1.2], grouping: false, status: "caution" },
    { name: "Zip - 0.6GB", data: [0.6], grouping: false, status: "info" },
    { name: "HTML - 2.98GB", data: [2.98], grouping: false, status: "warning" },
  ];

  const seriesProgress2 = [
    { name: "Image - 2GB", data: [2], grouping: false, status: "danger" },
    { name: "Audio - 0.8GB", data: [0.8], grouping: false, status: "success" },
    { name: "Video - 1GB", data: [1], grouping: false, status: "neutral" },
    { name: "Docs - 2GB", data: [2], grouping: false, status: "caution" },
    { name: "Zip - 1GB", data: [1], grouping: false, status: "info" },
    { name: "HTML - 1.98GB", data: [1.98], grouping: false, status: "warning" },
  ];

  const [data] = useState<any>({
    title: { text: "Chart Progress Bar 1", align: "center" },
    subtitle: { text: "Chart Subtitle", align: "center" },
    legend: {
      enabled: true,
      layout: "horizontal",
      align: "center",
      verticalAlign: "bottom",
      width: 0,
    },
    series: seriesProgress1,
  });

  const changeSeries = () => {
    const newChartSeries1 = !chartSeries1;
    setChartSeries1(newChartSeries1);

    const series = newChartSeries1 ? seriesProgress1 : seriesProgress2;
    if (chartRef.current) {
      chartRef.current.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = newChartSeries1
        ? { title: { text: "Chart Progress Bar 1" } }
        : { title: { text: "Chart Progress Bar 2" } };
      chartRef.current.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    }

    setMaxValue(newChartSeries1 ? 10 : 20);
    setHeight(newChartSeries1 ? 150 : 200);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Chart Progress Bar</div>
      <div className="components">
        <aq-chart-progress-bar
          ref={chartRef}
          options={data}
          palette="Teal"
          align-legend="bottomLeft"
          maxValue={maxValue}
          height={height}
        />
        <AqButton isOutline onClick={changeSeries}>
          Update data
        </AqButton>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export const CardSet = () => {

    console.log('Card header clicked', e);
  };

  const onClickReorder = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    console.log('Card reorder icon clicked', e);
  };

  const onClickReturn = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    console.log('Card return clicked', e);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqCards</div>

enum Alignment {
  LEFT = 'left',
  CENTER = 'center',
  RIGHT = 'right',
}
export const ClientTableSet = () => {
  const [data, setData] = useState<any[]>(dataTable);
  const [copyData, setCopyData] = useState([]);
  const [columns] = useState<any[]>([
    {
      accessorKey: 'make',
      header: 'Make',
      meta: {
        label: 'Make',
        tooltip: 'Tooltip Make',
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'model',
      header: 'model',
      meta: {
        icon: 'aq-icon-sms',
        label: 'Model custom title',
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'price',
      header: 'Price',
      meta: {
        aligment: {
          content: Alignment.CENTER,
          header: Alignment.CENTER,
        },
        label: 'Price',
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'electric',
      header: 'Electric',
      meta: {
        label: 'Electric',
        enableFormatterReact: true,
        formatter: (val: any) => {
          return `<aq-badge status="${val.value ? 'success' : 'danger'}">${
            val.value ? 'Yes' : 'No'
          }</aq-badge>`;
        },
      },
    },
  ]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [config] = useState({
    state: {
      columnPinning: {},
    },
    title: 'My custom Title',
    titleTooltip: 'Is a tooltip',
    titleIcon: 'aq-icon-table',
    perPage: 5,
    chunk: 3,
    height: 450,
    enableSelectable: true,
    perPageValues: [5, 10, 15, 20],
    errorValue: 'No data available',
  });
  const loadingCustomQueryFilter = (query: string) => {
    if (!query) return setData([...dataTable]);
    const copy = [...dataTable];
    const filterData = copy.filter((item) =>
      item.model.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()),
    );
    setData([...filterData]);
  };
  const handlePinChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string; value: boolean }>) => {
    console.log('Pin Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
  };
  const handleSortChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string; value: string }>) => {
    console.log('Sort Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
  };
  const handleSizeChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string; value: number }>) => {
    console.log('Size Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
  };

  const handleClick = () => {
    setLoading(!loading);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    setCopyData(copyData);
  }, [data]);

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Aq Client Table</div>
      <div className="components" style={{ height: '500px' }}>
        <AqButton
          id="loadingButton"
          slot="header-right"
          is-outline
          onClick={handleClick}
        >
          Loader
        </AqButton>
        <AqTable
          onPinChange={handlePinChange}
          onSortChange={handleSortChange}
          onSizeChange={handleSizeChange}
          id="my-table"
          has-header
          columns={columns}
          data={data}
          config={config}
          loading={loading}
          loadingCustomQueryFilter={loadingCustomQueryFilter}
        >
          <em slot="title" className="aq-icon-table"></em>
          <AqBadge state="success" slot="header-left">
            U
          </AqBadge>
          <AqButton
            id="loadingButton"
            slot="header-right"
            is-outline
            onClick={handleClick}
          >
            Loader
          </AqButton>
        </AqTable>
      </div>
      <br />
      <br />
      <div className="components" style={{ height: '500px' }}>
        <AqTable
          id="my-table"
          has-header
          columns={columns}
          data={data}
          config={{ ...config, perPage: 50 }}
          loading={loading}
          loadingCustomQueryFilter={loadingCustomQueryFilter}
        >
          <em slot="title" className="aq-icon-table"></em>
          <AqBadge state="success" slot="header-left">
            U
          </AqBadge>
          <AqButton
            id="loadingButton"
            slot="header-right"
            is-outline
            onClick={handleClick}
          >
            Loader
          </AqButton>
        </AqTable>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

import { useRef } from 'react';
import {
  AqCollapseGroup,

  AqSubheading,
  AqButton
} from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const CollapseGroupSet = () => {
  const collapseGroupRef = useRef<any>(null);

  const hideAll = () => {
    collapseGroupRef.current?.hideAll();
  };

  const handleOpen = () => {
    console.log('Collapse opened');
  };

  const handleClose = () => {
    console.log('Collapse closed');
  };

  const handleHeaderClick = (e: any) => {
    console.log('Collapse header click:', e);
  };

  return (
    <div className="container">
      <div className="section">
        <div className="section-title">Collapse group</div>
        <div className="components">

          <div>
            <AqButton isOutline onClick={hideAll}>Hide all</AqButton>
          </div>

          <AqCollapseGroup isAccordion ref={collapseGroupRef}>
            <AqCollapse onOpen={handleOpen} onClose={handleClose}>
              <AqCollapseHeader onClick={handleHeaderClick}>
                <span slot="title">
                  <em className="aq-icon-check-circle"></em>
                  <AqSubheading>Campaign</AqSubheading>
                </span>
              </AqCollapseHeader>
              <AqCollapseContent>
                Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Repudiandae,
                accusantium earum quidem ex, veritatis assumenda debitis accusamus
                inventore quae, voluptate sunt quas laborum. Voluptate earum velit
                autem sunt a labore?
              </AqCollapseContent>
            </AqCollapse>

            <AqCollapse onOpen={handleOpen} onClose={handleClose}>
              <AqCollapseHeader onClick={handleHeaderClick}>
                <span slot="title">
                  <em className="aq-icon-check-circle"></em>
                  <AqSubheading>Campaign</AqSubheading>
                </span>

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/data/sets/CollapseSet.tsx
================================================
import { useRef } from 'react';
import { AqCollapse, AqCollapseContent, AqCollapseHeader, AqSubheading, AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const CollapseSet = () => {
  const collapseRef = useRef<any>(null);

  const showCollapse = () => {
    collapseRef?.current.show();
  };

  const hideCollapse = () => {
    collapseRef.current?.hide();
  };

  const toggleCollapse = () => {
    collapseRef.current?.toggle();
  };

  const handleOpen = () => {
    console.log('Collapse opened');
  };

  const handleClose = () => {
    console.log('Collapse closed');
  };

  const handleHeaderClick = (e: any) => {
    console.log('Collapse header click:', e);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <div className="container">
        <div className="section">
          <div className="section-title">Collapse</div>
          <div className="components">

            <div>
              <AqButton isOutline onClick={showCollapse}>Show</AqButton>
              <AqButton isOutline onClick={hideCollapse}>Hide</AqButton>
              <AqButton isOutline onClick={toggleCollapse}>Toggle</AqButton>
            </div>

            <AqCollapse
              ref={collapseRef}
              onOpen={handleOpen}
              onClose={handleClose}
            >
              <AqCollapseHeader onClick={(e) => handleHeaderClick(e)}>
                <span slot="title">
                  <em className="aq-icon-check-circle"></em>
                  <AqSubheading>Campaign</AqSubheading>
                </span>
              </AqCollapseHeader>

              <AqCollapseContent>
                Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Repudiandae,
                accusantium earum quidem ex, veritatis assumenda debitis accusamus
                inventore quae, voluptate sunt quas laborum. Voluptate earum velit
                autem sunt a labore?
              </AqCollapseContent>
            </AqCollapse>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/data/sets/ServerTableSet.tsx
================================================
import { AqBadge, AqButton, AqTable } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';

enum Alignment {
  LEFT = 'left',
  CENTER = 'center',
  RIGHT = 'right',
}
enum TableMode {
  'CLIENT' = 'CLIENT_SIDE',
  'SERVER' = 'SERVER_SIDE',
}

export const ServerTableSet = () => {
  const [columns] = useState<any[]>([
    {
      accessorKey: 'name',
      header: 'Name',
      size: 250,
      meta: {
        label: 'Name',
        formatter: (params: any) => {
          let genderColor = '';
          let gender = params.data.gender;

          switch (gender) {
            case 'Male':
              genderColor = '#9ec5ff';
              break;
            case 'Female':
              genderColor = '#ff93c6';
              break;
            default:
              genderColor = '#ffc88a';
              break;
          }
          return `<aq-avatar background-color="${genderColor}" text="${params.value}"></aq-avatar>`;
        },
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'status',
      header: 'Status',
      size: 100,
      meta: {
        label: 'Status',
        aligment: {
          content: 'center',
        },
        formatter: (params: any) => {
          let statusVariant = '';
          let isDead = '';
          let genderClass = '';
          switch (params.value) {
            case 'Alive':
              genderClass = 'positive';
              break;
            case 'Dead':
              isDead = 'is-disabled';
              genderClass = 'alert';
              break;
            default:
              genderClass = '';
              break;
          }
          return `<aq-tag ${isDead} text="${params.value}" variant="${genderClass}"></aq-tag></aq-badge>`;
        },
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'gender',
      header: 'Gender',
      size: 100,
      meta: {
        label: 'Gender',
        aligment: {
          content: 'center',
        },
        formatter: (params: any) => {
          let genderClass = '';
          switch (params.value) {
            case 'Male':
              genderClass = 'info';
              break;
            case 'Female':
              genderClass = 'accent';
              break;
            default:
              genderClass = '';
              break;
          }
          return `<aq-tag text="${params.value}" variant="${genderClass}"></aq-tag></aq-badge>`;
        },
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'origin',
      header: 'Origin',
      size: 150,
      meta: {
        label: 'Origin',
        formatter: (params: any) => {
          return `${params.data.origin.name}`;
        },
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'species',
      header: 'Species',
      size: 120,
      meta: {
        label: 'Species',
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'created',
      header: 'Created',
      size: 120,
      meta: {
        aligment: {
          content: Alignment.CENTER,
        },
        label: 'Created',
        formatter: (params: any) => {
          return `<aq-badge>
            <em class="aq-icon-calendar-dots"></em>
            <span>${new Date(params.value).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
          </aq-badge>`;
        },
      },
    },
    {
      accessorKey: 'actions',
      header: 'Actions',
      meta: {
        label: 'Actions',
        aligment: {
          content: 'center',
        },
        formatter: (params: any) => {
          const button = document.createElement('aq-button');
          const outline = document.createAttribute('is-outline');
          outline.value = 'true';
          button.setAttributeNode(outline);

          // Agregar icono dentro del botón
          const icon = document.createElement('em');
          icon.classList.add('aq-icon-send');
          button.appendChild(icon);

          // Agregar evento manualmente
          button.addEventListener('click', () => {
            alert('TBB Action: ' + JSON.stringify(params.data));
          });

          return button;
        },
      },
    },
  ]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [config] = useState({
    state: {
      columnPinning: {},
    },
    requestData: (data: any) => {
      const query = {
        keyword: data.filter,
        pageSize: data.perPage,
        pageNumber: data.page,
      };

      setLoading(true);
      return fetch(
        `https://rickandmortyapi.com/api/character/?page=${query.pageNumber}&status=${query.keyword}`,
      )
        .then(async (response) => {
          const responseData = await response.json();
          return { data: responseData.results, count: responseData.info.count };
        })
        .finally(() => {
          setLoading(false);
        });
    },
    title: 'My custom Title',
    titleTooltip: 'Is a tooltip',
    titleIcon: 'aq-icon-table',
    perPage: 5,
    chunk: 3,
    height: 450,
    perPageValues: [5, 10, 15, 20],
    errorValue: 'No data available',
  });
  const handleClick = () => {
    setLoading(!loading);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Aq Server Table</div>
      <div className="components" style={{ height: '500px' }}>
        <AqTable
          id="my-table"
          has-header
          columns={columns}
          mode={TableMode.SERVER}
          config={config}
          loading={loading}
        >
          <em slot="title" className="aq-icon-table"></em>
          <AqBadge state="success" slot="header-left">
            U
          </AqBadge>
          <AqButton
            id="loadingButton"
            slot="header-right"
            is-outline
            onClick={handleClick}
          >
            Loader
          </AqButton>
        </AqTable>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/data/sets/SettingStepSet.tsx
================================================
import { AqButton, AqDivider, AqHelperText, AqRadioGroup, AqSettingStep, AqTextField } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { StepOption } from '@aqua-ds/web-components/types';
import { Fragment, useState } from 'react';

export const SettingStepSet = () => {
  const [options, setOptions] = useState<StepOption[]>( [
    {
      id: 'step-1',
      title: 'Step 1',
      subtitle: 'Description of the step',
      info: 'Info',
      stepStatus: 'is-default',
      state: 'warning',
      buttonEdit: 'Editar',
      buttonPrimary: 'Continue',
      contentState: 'editing',
      buttonTertiary: 'Tertiary',
      buttonSecondary: 'Dissmis',
    },
    {
      id: 'step-2',
      title: 'Step 2',
      subtitle: 'Description of the step',
      info: 'Info',
      state: 'success',
      stepStatus: 'complete',
      buttonEdit: 'Edit',
      buttonPrimary: 'Primary',
      contentState: 'summary',
      buttonTertiary: '',
      buttonSecondary: '',
    },
    {
      id: 'step-3',
      title: 'Step 3',
      subtitle: 'Description of the step',
      info: 'Info',
      state: 'error',
      stepStatus: 'active',
      contentState: 'initial',
      stepComplete: false,
      buttonEdit: 'Edit',
    },
  ]);
  const handleClickEdit = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    console.log('handleClickEdit', options);
  };
  const handleClickPrimary = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    console.log('Click Primary', e, e.detail);
    setOptions(prevOptions =>
      prevOptions.map(option =>
        option.id === e.detail
          ? {
              ...option,
              state: 'success',
              stepStatus: 'is-complete',
              contentState: 'initial',
            }
          : option
      )
    );
    console.log('options', options);
  };
  const handleClickSecondary = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    console.log('Click Secondary', e, e.detail);
  };
  const handleClickTertiary = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    console.log('Click Tertiary', e, e.detail);
  };
  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">SettingStepSet</div>
      <div className="components">
        {JSON.stringify(options)}
        <AqSettingStep
          options={options}
          onClickEdit={handleClickEdit}
          onClickPrimary={handleClickPrimary}
          onClickSecondary={handleClickSecondary}
          onClickTertiary={handleClickTertiary}
        >
          {options.map((item, index) => (
            <Fragment key={index}>
              {/* Define edit content */}
              <div slot={`edit-${item.id}`}>
                {item.id === 'step-1' && (
                  <>
                    <AqHelperText>Editing</AqHelperText>
                    <AqTextField label='Aler Name'></AqTextField>
                    <AqTextField label='Tecnology'></AqTextField>
                    <AqTextField label='Alert Type'></AqTextField>
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
              {/* Define summary content */}
              <div slot={`summary-${item.id}`}>
              {item.id === 'step-2' && (
                  <>
                    <AqTextField label='Transactions type'></AqTextField>
                    <AqRadioGroup options={['Incoming', 'Outgoing', 'Global']}></AqRadioGroup>
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
               
            </Fragment>
          ))}
          <AqDivider></AqDivider>
          <AqButton>Continue</AqButton>
        </AqSettingStep>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/directives/sets/SpinnerDirectiveSet.tsx

import { AqDivider, AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';

export const SpinnerDirectiveSet = () => {
  const [spinner1, setSpinner1] = useState(true);
  const [spinner2, setSpinner2] = useState(true);

  const handleClick1 = () => {
    setSpinner1(!spinner1);
  };
  const handleClick2 = () => {
    setSpinner2(!spinner2);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqSpinner</div>
      <div className="components components--center">
        <div className="container-center">
          <div
            id="spinner-1"
            aq-spinner={JSON.stringify({ show: spinner1 })}
            className="spinner spinner-left"
          >
            Spinner 1 Container
          </div>
          <div
            id="spinner-2"
            aq-spinner={JSON.stringify({ show: spinner2 })}
            className="spinner spinner-left"
          >
            Spinner 2 Container
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <AqDivider className="components-divider" />
      <div className="container-center">
        <AqButton
          is-ouline
          variant="primary"
          id="button-spinner1"
          onClick={() => handleClick1()}
        >
          Actualizar Spinner 1
        </AqButton>
        <AqButton
          is-ouline
          variant="primary"
          id="button-spinner2"
          onClick={() => handleClick2()}
        >
          Actualizar Spinner 2
        </AqButton>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/directives/sets/TooltipDirectiveSet.tsx
================================================
import { useState } from 'react';
import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { IPopover } from '@aqua-ds/web-components';

export const TooltipDirectiveSet = () => {
  const [tooltipSimple, setTooltipSimple] = useState<IPopover>({
    content: 'This is a tooltip',
  });
  const [tooltipWC, setTooltipWC] = useState<IPopover>({
    content: '<aq-heading level="1"><span slot="text">This is a heading</span></aq-heading>',
  });
  const [tooltipIcons, setTooltipIcons] = useState({
    content:
      '<span>This is a helper text or caption <em class="aq-icon-email">Email</em></span>',
  });
  const updateTooltips = () => {
    setTooltipSimple({ content: 'Update Tooltip' });
    setTooltipWC({ content: 'Update Tooltip' });
    setTooltipIcons({ content: 'Update Tooltip' });
  };

  return (
    <>
      <div className="container">
        <div className="section">
          <div className="section-title">Tooltip</div>
          <div className="components components--center">
            <AqButton is-outline aq-tooltip={JSON.stringify(tooltipSimple)}>
              Set Simple Tooltip
            </AqButton>
            <AqButton is-outline aq-tooltip={JSON.stringify(tooltipWC)}>
              Set Tooltip With WC
            </AqButton>
            <AqButton is-outline aq-tooltip={JSON.stringify(tooltipIcons)}>
              Set Tooltip With Icon
            </AqButton>

            <br />
            <br />
            <br />
            <AqButton variant="primary" onClick={() => updateTooltips()}>
              Update Tooltip
            </AqButton>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
};

import {
  AqButton,
  AqBanner,
} from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const BannerSet = () => {
  const handleCloseEvent = (event: CustomEvent<void>) => {
    console.log('Get Banner close event: ', event.detail);
  };

  const alert1 = () => {
    alert('Action 1 executed');
  };

  const alert2 = () => {
    alert('Action 2 executed');
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Banner</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqBanner
          titleBanner="Operación exitosa"
          state="success"
          onClose={handleCloseEvent}
        >
          Banner Description
          <div slot="actions">
            <AqButton onClick={alert1} variant="primary">
              Primary
            </AqButton>
            <AqButton onClick={alert2} variant="success" isOutline>
              Secondary
            </AqButton>
          </div>
        </AqBanner>

        <AqBanner
          titleBanner="Advertencia"
          state="warning"
          hasCloseIcon={false}
        >
          Este es un mensaje de advertencia sin opción de cerrar.
        </AqBanner>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/forms/sets/Autocomplete.tsx

import { AqToggle, AqAutocomplete, AqTextField, AqDivider } from "@aqua-ds/react";
import { useState } from "react";

export const AutocompleteSet = () => {
    const [valueAutocomplete, setValueAutocomplete] = useState("");
    const [items] = useState([
        {

        { value: 231, text: "Normal option 231" },
        { value: 232, text: "Normal option 232" },
        { value: 233, text: "Normal option 233" },
    ]);

    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
    const [isDisabled, setIsDisabled] = useState(false);
    const [isPlain, setIsPlain] = useState(false);
    const [isError, setIsError] = useState(false);
    const [cleanOnEscape, setCleanOnEscape] = useState(false);
    const [isReadonly, setIsReadonly] = useState(false);
    const [isMultiple, setIsMultiple] = useState(false);
    const [maxShow, setMaxShow] = useState(10);
    const [maxSelect, setMaxSelect] = useState(2);
    const [badgeCounter, setBadgeCounter] = useState(false);
    const [selecterCounter, setSelecterCounter] = useState(false);
    const [closeOnSelect, setCloseOnSelect] = useState(false);
    const [allowSelectAll, setAllowSelectAll] = useState(false);
    const [cleanFilterOnSelect, setCleanFilterOnSelect] = useState(false);
    const [showCheckbox, setShowCheckbox] = useState(false);
    const [showRadio, setShowRadio] = useState(false);
    const [isRequired, setIsRequired] = useState(false);
    const [infoBanner] = useState({
        title: "This is a title",
        message: "This is a message",
        state: "warning",
    });

    const handleAqInputDisabled = (e: any) => {
        console.log('e', e.nativeEvent.detail.value)
        setIsDisabled(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputPlain = (e: any) => {
        setIsPlain(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputError = (e: any) => {
        setIsError(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputCleanOnEscape = (e: any) => {
        setCleanOnEscape(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputReadonly = (e: any) => {
        setIsReadonly(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputMultiple = (e: any) => {
        setIsMultiple(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputMaxShow = (e: any) => {
        setMaxShow(e.target.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputMaxSelect = (e: any) => {
        setMaxSelect(e.target.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputBadgeCounter = (e: any) => {
        setBadgeCounter(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputSelecterCounter = (e: any) => {
        setSelecterCounter(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputCloseOnSelect = (e: any) => {
        setCloseOnSelect(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputAllowSelectAll = (e: any) => {
        setAllowSelectAll(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputCleanFilterOnSelect = (e: any) => {
        setCleanFilterOnSelect(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputShowCheckbox = (e: any) => {
        setShowCheckbox(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputShowRadio = (e: any) => {
        setShowRadio(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputIsLoading = (e: any) => {
        setIsLoading(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputDisableAllOptions = (e: any) => {
        setIsDisabled(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputIsRequired = (e: any) => {
        setIsRequired(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleOnChange = (e: any) => {
        console.log('e', e)
        setValueAutocomplete(JSON.stringify(e.nativeEvent.detail.value));
    }
    return (
        <div className="section">
            <div className="section-title">AqAutocomplete</div>
            <div className="components">
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputDisabled} > Disabled </AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputPlain}  > Plain </AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputError}  > Error </AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputCleanOnEscape}  > Clean On Escape </AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputReadonly}  > Read Only</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputMultiple}  > is Multiple</AqToggle>

                <AqTextField id="max-show" label="Max Show" onInput={handleAqInputMaxShow} ></AqTextField>
                <AqTextField id="max-select" label="Max Select" onInput={handleAqInputMaxSelect} ></AqTextField>

                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputBadgeCounter}  > Badge Counter</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputSelecterCounter}  > Selecter Counter</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputCloseOnSelect}  > Close On Selec</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputAllowSelectAll}  > Allow Selec All</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputCleanFilterOnSelect}  > Clean Filter on Select</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputShowCheckbox}  > Show Checkbox</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputShowRadio}  > Show Radio</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputIsLoading}  > Loading</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputDisableAllOptions}  > Disable all options</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputIsRequired}  > Required</AqToggle>

                <AqDivider></AqDivider>
                <AqAutocomplete items={items} icon="aq-icon-send" label="This is a label" sublabel="Sub"
                    placeholder="This is a placeholder" info="This is a tooltip" helperText="This is a helper text"
                    is-loading={isLoading} is-disabled={isDisabled} is-plain={isPlain} is-error={isError}
                    clean-on-escape={cleanOnEscape} is-readonly={isReadonly} is-multiple={isMultiple} max-show={maxShow}
                    max-select={maxSelect} badge-counter={badgeCounter} selecter-counter={selecterCounter}
                    close-on-select={closeOnSelect} allow-select-all={allowSelectAll}
                    clean-filter-on-select={cleanFilterOnSelect} show-checkbox={showCheckbox} is-required={isRequired}
                    info-banner={infoBanner} show-radio={showRadio} onInput={(e: any) => handleOnChange(e)}></AqAutocomplete>
                <span>Selected: {valueAutocomplete}</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/forms/sets/CheckboxGroupSet.tsx

import { AqCheckboxGroup } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';

export const CheckboxGroupSet = () => {
  const [selectedValueGroup, setSelectedValueGroup] = useState<any[]>(['option-3']);

  const infoCheckboxGroup = [
    {
      label: "Ross",
      valueCheckbox: "option-1",
      subLabel: "This is a sublabel ",
      isDisabled: true,
      icon: "aq-icon-message"
    },
    {
      label: "Rachel",
      valueCheckbox: "option-2",
      icon: "aq-icon-message",
      subLabel: "This is a sublabel ",
      tooltipWidth: "100px"
    },
    {
      valueCheckbox: "option-3",
      label: "Chandler",
      subLabel: "This is a long sublabel to test multiline"
    }
  ];

  const handleValueChange = (event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqCheckboxGroupElement> ) => {
    console.log("Handling checkbox custom change from react", event);
  };

  const handleValueInput = (event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqCheckboxGroupElement> ) => {
    console.log("Handling checkbox custom input from react", event);
    setSelectedValueGroup(event.currentTarget.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqCheckboxGroup</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqCheckboxGroup
          label="This is a checkbox 4"
          isRequired
          type="button"
          info="This is an information tooltip"
          value={selectedValueGroup}
          onChange={handleValueChange}
          onInput={handleValueInput}
          options={infoCheckboxGroup}
          ></AqCheckboxGroup>

        <div>
          <span>Selected Value: {JSON.stringify(selectedValueGroup)}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/forms/sets/CheckboxSet.tsx
================================================
import { AqCheckbox } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';

export const CheckboxSet = () => {
  const [selectedValue, setSelectedValue] = useState('');

  type AqCheckboxElement = React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqCheckboxElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string }> };
  
  
  const handleValueChanged = (event: AqCheckboxElement) => {
    console.log('event.detail changed', event, event.currentTarget.value, event.nativeEvent.detail);
    setSelectedValue(event.currentTarget.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqCheckbox</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqCheckbox
          id-checkbox="checkbox-1"
          name="checkbox-1"
          label="This is a checkbox 1"
          icon="aq-icon-message"
          isRequired
          info="This is an information tooltip"
          value-checkbox="option-1"
          onChange={handleValueChanged}
        ></AqCheckbox>
        <div>
          <span>Selected Value: {JSON.stringify(selectedValue)}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

import { AqColorPicker } from "@aqua-ds/react";
import { useState } from "react";

export const ColorPicker = () => {
  const [valueColorPicker, setValueColorPicker] = useState("");

  const handleAqInput = (e: any) => {
    setValueColorPicker(e.target.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqColorPicker</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqColorPicker
          helper-text="This is a helper text"
          label="This is a label"
          onInput={(e) => handleAqInput(e)}
          title="This is an information tooltip"
          is-required
        ></AqColorPicker>
        <div>
          <span>Selected Value: {valueColorPicker}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/forms/sets/DatePickerSet.tsx

import { AqDatePicker, AqSubheading, AqLabel } from "@aqua-ds/react";
import { useState } from "react";

export const DatePicker = () => {
  const [valueRangeDate, setValueRangeDate] = useState({
    start: '2025-02-01',
    end: '2025-05-09',
  });
  const [valueRangeHourDate, setValueRangeHourDate] = useState({
    start: '2025-05-07T23:59',
    end: '2025-05-09T14:55',
  });
  const [valueIndDate, setValueIndDate] = useState("2025-05-09");
  const [valueIndHourDate, setValueIndHourDate] = useState("2025-05-09T02:52");

  const handleIndDate = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqDatePickerElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string }> }) => {
    setValueIndDate(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };
  const handleIndHourDate = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqDatePickerElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string }> }) => {
    setValueIndHourDate(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };
  const handleRangeDate = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqDatePickerElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: { start: string; end: string } }> }) => {
    setValueRangeDate(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };
  const handleRangeHourDate = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqDatePickerElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: { start: string; end: string } }> }) => {
    setValueRangeHourDate(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqColorPicker</div>
      <div className="components">
        <div style={{width: '100%', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '4rem', flexWrap: 'wrap'}}>
          <div style={{width: '40%'}}>
            <AqSubheading>Individual</AqSubheading>
            <AqDatePicker value={valueIndDate} onInput={handleIndDate} format="DDDD" placement="bottom-start" label="Date Picker" sublabel="This is a sublabel"/>
            <AqLabel>
              { valueIndDate }
            </AqLabel>
          </div>
          <div style={{width: '40%'}}>
            <AqSubheading>Individual con Hora</AqSubheading>
            <AqDatePicker value={valueIndHourDate} onInput={handleIndHourDate} hasTime format="DDDD HH:mm" placement="bottom-start" label="Date Picker" sublabel="This is a sublabel"/>
            <AqLabel>
              { valueIndHourDate }
            </AqLabel>
          </div>
          <div style={{width: '40%'}}>
            <AqSubheading>Rango</AqSubheading>
            <AqDatePicker value={valueRangeDate} onInput={handleRangeDate} isRange format="yyyy/MM/dd" placement="bottom-start" label="Date Picker" sublabel="This is a sublabel"/>
            <AqLabel>
              {JSON.stringify(valueRangeDate)}
            </AqLabel>
          </div>
          <div style={{width: '40%'}}>
            <AqSubheading>Rango con Hora</AqSubheading>
            <AqDatePicker value={valueRangeHourDate} onInput={handleRangeHourDate} hasTime isRange format="cccc, d 'de' LLLL 'de' yyyy" placement="bottom-start" label="Date Picker" sublabel="This is a sublabel"/>
            <AqLabel>
              {JSON.stringify(valueRangeHourDate)}
            </AqLabel>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

import {
  AqAutocomplete,
  AqButton,
  AqCheckbox,
  AqDropdown,
  AqFieldGroup,
  AqFlagSelector,
  AqNumberField,
  AqRadio,
  AqTextField,
} from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState, SyntheticEvent } from 'react';

export const FieldGroupSet = () => {
  const [textFieldValue, setTextFieldValue] = useState('');

  const handleInput = (e: SyntheticEvent) => {
    const event = e.nativeEvent as CustomEvent;
    setTextFieldValue(event.detail.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Field group</div>
      <div className="components">

        {/* showCustomCounter con props */}
        <AqFieldGroup
          id="aq-field-group-1"
          show-custom-counter
          counter-source={['tag-1', 'tag-2']}
          counter-limit={5}
          label="This is a label"
          helper-text="Este es un texto de ayuda"
          info="Este es un tooltip"
          tooltip-width="20px"
          is-required
          is-error
        >
          <AqFlagSelector
            is-name={false}
            is-call-sign={false}
            placeholder="This is a placeholder"
            is-disabled={false}
          />
          <AqTextField placeholder="Este es un campo de texto" icon="aq-icon-settings" />
          <AqNumberField format='{thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1}' is-required />
        </AqFieldGroup>

        {/* Variación con botón primero */}
        <AqFieldGroup label="This is a label" helper-text="Este es un texto de ayuda" info="Este es un tooltip" is-required>
          <AqButton is-outline>Botón</AqButton>
          <AqTextField
            placeholder="Este es un campo de texto"
            icon="aq-icon-settings"
            onInput={handleInput}
          />
          <AqNumberField format='{thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1}' is-required />
        </AqFieldGroup>

        {/* Botón en el medio */}
        <AqFieldGroup label="This is a label" helper-text="Este es un texto de ayuda" info="Este es un tooltip" is-required>
          <AqTextField placeholder="Este es un campo de texto" icon="aq-icon-settings" />
          <AqButton is-outline>Botón</AqButton>
          <AqNumberField format='{thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1}' is-required />
        </AqFieldGroup>

        {/* Botón al final */}
        <AqFieldGroup label="This is a label" helper-text="Este es un texto de ayuda" info="Este es un tooltip" is-required>
          <AqTextField placeholder="Este es un campo de texto" icon="aq-icon-settings" />
          <AqNumberField format='{thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1}' is-required />
          <AqButton is-outline>Botón</AqButton>
        </AqFieldGroup>

        {/* Dropdown como primer hijo con error */}

        {/* Radio como último hijo y plain */}

import { AqToggle, AqFlagSelector, AqDivider } from "@aqua-ds/react";
import { useState } from "react";

export const FlagSelectorSet = () => {
    const [valueFlagSelector, setValueFlagSelector] = useState("");
    const [countries] = useState(["57",
        "503", // El Salvador
        "91", // India 
        "56", // Chile
        "32", // Belgium
        "52", // Mexico
        "51", // Peru
        "507", // Panama
        "54", // Argentina

        "1-787", // Puerto Rico
        "1-809", // Dominican Republic
        "1-829", // Dominican Republic
        "1-849", // Dominican Republic
        "1-868", // Trinidad and Tobago
        "1-869", // Saint Kitts and Nevis
        "1-876", // Jamaica
        "297", // Aruba
        "387", // Bosnia and Herzegovina
        "34", // Spain
        "49", // Germany
        "33", // France
        "39", // Italy
        "44", // United Kingdom
        "81", // Japan
        "86", // China
        "7", // Russia
        "55", // Brazil
        "61", // Australia
        "64", // New Zealand
        "31", // Netherlands
        "46", // Sweden
        "47", // Norway
        "45", // Denmark
        "358", // Finland
        "43", // Austria
        "41", // Switzerland
        "351", // Portugal
        "30", // Greece
        "48", // Poland
        "420", // Czech Republic
        "36", // Hungary
        "40", // Romania
        "359", // Bulgaria
        "353", // Ireland
        "352", // Luxembourg
        "356", // Malta
        "357", // Cyprus
        "372", // Estonia
        "371", // Latvia
        "370", // Lithuania
        "386", // Slovenia
        "421", // Slovakia
        "385", // Croatia
        "380" // Ukraine
    ]);

    const [showName, setIsName] = useState(true);
    const [showCallSign, setShowCallSign] = useState(false);
    const [isDisabled, setIsDisabled] = useState(false);
    const [showShortName, setShowShortName] = useState(false);
    const [isOutline, setIsOutline] = useState(false);
    const [isError, setIsError] = useState(false);
    const [cleanOnEscape, setCleanOnEscape] = useState(false);
    const [cleanOnSelect] = useState(false);
    const [isReadonly, setIsReadonly] = useState(false);
    const [isRequired, setIsRequired] = useState(false);

    const handleAqInputDisabled = (e: any) => {
        console.log('e', e.nativeEvent.detail.value)
        setIsDisabled(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };

    const handleAqInputError = (e: any) => {
        setIsError(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };

    const handleAqInputCleanOnEscape = (e: any) => {
        setCleanOnEscape(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
        console.log('close on escape ', cleanOnEscape);
        
    };
    const handleAqInputReadonly = (e: any) => {
        setIsReadonly(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputDisableAllOptions = (e: any) => {
        setIsDisabled(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputIsRequired = (e: any) => {
        setIsRequired(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputIsName = (e: any) => {
        setIsName(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputIsCallSign = (e: any) => {
        setShowCallSign(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputIsFullName = (e: any) => {
        setShowShortName(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    const handleAqInputIsOutline = (e: any) => {
        setIsOutline(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    };
    // const handleAqInputIsError = (e: any) => {
    //     setIsError(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    // };
    const handleOnChange = (e: any) => {
        setValueFlagSelector(e.nativeEvent.detail.value.value);
    };
    return (
        <div className="section">
            <div className="section-title">AqFlagSelector</div>
            <div className="components">
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputDisabled} > Disabled </AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputError}  > Error </AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputCleanOnEscape}  > Clean On Escape </AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputReadonly}  > Read Only</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputDisableAllOptions}  > Disable all options</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputIsRequired}  > Required</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputIsName}  > Name</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputIsCallSign}  > Call Sign</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputIsFullName}  > Full Name</AqToggle>
                <AqToggle onInput={handleAqInputIsOutline}  > Outline</AqToggle>

                <AqDivider></AqDivider>
                <AqFlagSelector countries={countries} label="This is a label"
                    placeholder="This is a placeholder" info="This is a tooltip" helper-text="This is a helper text"
                    showName={showName} show-call-sign={showCallSign} show-short-name={showShortName} is-outline={isOutline}
                    is-disabled={isDisabled} is-error={isError}
                    clean-on-select={cleanOnSelect} is-readonly={isReadonly} is-required={isRequired}
                    onInput={(e: any) => handleOnChange(e)}></AqFlagSelector>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

import { useState } from 'react';
import { AqNumberField } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const NumberFieldSet = () => {
  const [numberValue, setNumberValue] = useState('1');

  const handleAqInput = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqNumberFieldElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string, formattedValue: string, rawValue: string, valueAsNumber: number }> }) => {
    console.log('Handling number field input from React', e.currentTarget, e.nativeEvent.detail);
  };

  const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqNumberFieldElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string }> }) => {
    console.log('Handling number field change from React', e);

    setNumberValue(e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">Number Field</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqNumberField
          onInput={handleAqInput}
          onChange={handleChange}
          id="aq-number-field-1"
          step={2}
          minValue={5}
          isManualInputAllowed={false}
          strictLimitValue={true}
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 0 }}
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
          helperText="Number field"
          isRequired={true}
        />

        <AqNumberField
          minValue={5}
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }}
          isError={true}
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
        />

        <AqNumberField
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }}
          isError={true}
          isPlain={true}
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
        />

        <AqNumberField
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }}
          isPlain={true}
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
        />

        <AqNumberField
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }}
          isReadonly={true}
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
        />

        <AqNumberField
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }}
          isDisabled={true}
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
        />

        <AqNumberField
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }}
          size="small"
          leftButtonTooltip="This is small"
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
        />

        <AqNumberField
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }}
          size="small"
          isPlain={true}
          leftButtonTooltip="This is small"
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
        />
        <AqNumberField
          value={numberValue}
          format={{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 2 }}
          label="This is a number field"
          helperText="This is a helper text"
          isRequired
          isError
          onChange={handleChange}
          onInput={handleAqInput}
        />

        {/* Value */}
        <span>{numberValue}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { AqRadioGroup } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';

export const RadioSet = () => {
  const [selectedValue, setSelectedValue] = useState('');
  const [selectedValueObject, setSelectedValueObject] = useState<any>(null);

  const options = [
    {
      label: 'Completed',
      value: 'option1',
      subLabel: 'This is a sublabel ',
      info: 'This is short tooltip',
      icon: 'aq-icon-message',
    },
    {
      label: 'Rachel',
      value: 'option2',
      icon: 'aq-icon-message',
      subLabel: 'This is a sublabel ',
      info: 'This is long tooltip to allow the multiline variant of the component',
      tooltipWidth: '100px',
    },
    {
      label: 'Chandler',
      value: 'option3',
      subLabel: 'This is a long sublabel to test multiline',
    },
  ];

  const handleValueChanged = (event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqRadioGroupElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string }> }) => {
    console.log('Radio group changed:', event);
    setSelectedValue(event.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };

  const handleGetOriginalObject = (event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqRadioGroupElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string }> }) => {
    console.log('Radio group originalObject:', event);
    setSelectedValueObject(event.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqRadioGroup Example</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqRadioGroup
          orientation="horizontal"
          label="This is a radio common group"
          info="This is an information tooltip"
          isRequired
          helper-text="This is a helper text"
          options={options}
          value="option2"
          onInput={handleValueChanged}
          onChange={handleValueChanged}
        ></AqRadioGroup>

        <div>
          <span>Selected Value: {selectedValue}</span>
        </div>

        <AqRadioGroup
          orientation="horizontal"
          label="This is a radio common group with returnMode"
          info="This is an information tooltip"
          isRequired
          helper-text="This is a helper text"
          options={options}
          returnMode="originalObject"
          onInput={handleGetOriginalObject}
          onChange={handleValueChanged}
        ></AqRadioGroup>
        
        {JSON.stringify(selectedValueObject, null, 2)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

import { AqSearchBar } from "@aqua-ds/react";
import { useState } from "react";

export const SearchBarSet = () => {
  const [textSearchBar, setTextSearchBar] = useState('text default');
  const [isButton] = useState(true);

  const searchBarOpen = (e: Event) => {
    console.log('searchBarOpen', e);
  };
  const searchBarClose = (e: Event) => {
    console.log('searchBarClose', e);
  };

  const handleAqInput = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqSearchBarElement>) => {
    setTextSearchBar(e.currentTarget.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqSearchBar</div>
      <div className="components">
        <AqSearchBar
          onSearchBarClose={searchBarClose}
          onSearchBarOpen={searchBarOpen}
          value={textSearchBar}
          onInput={handleAqInput}
          placeholder="This is a placeholder normal"
        ></AqSearchBar>
        <AqSearchBar
          placeholder="This is a placeholder disabled"
          is-disabled
        ></AqSearchBar>
        <AqSearchBar
          placeholder="This is a placeholder loading"
          is-loading
        ></AqSearchBar>
        <AqSearchBar
          placeholder="This is a placeholder button"
          is-button={isButton}
        ></AqSearchBar>
        <div>
          <span>Selected Value: {textSearchBar}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

import { useRef, useState } from 'react';

import { AqTagField, AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/react';

export const TagFieldSet = () => {
  const aqTagFieldRef = useRef<any>(null);
  const [tagFieldValueCommon, setSelectedValueCommon] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [tagFieldValue, setSelectedValue] = useState(['Text tag']);

  // Component events:
  const handleValueInput = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqTagFieldElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string[] }> }) => {
    // This event triggers anytime the user inputs a new tag.
    // User can use input or change event.
    console.log('Handling tag field custom input from react ', e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    setSelectedValueCommon(e.nativeEvent.detail.value)
  };
  const handleValueChange =(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLAqTagFieldElement> & { nativeEvent: CustomEvent<{ value: string[] }> }) => {
    // This event trigegrs anytime the user inputs a new tag and the value array changes.
    // User can use input or change event.
    console.log('Handling tag field custom change from react ', e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };
  const handleTextChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ value: string }>) => {
    // This event triggers any time the user modifies the input text
    console.log('Handling tag field text change from react ', e.detail.value);
  };
  const handleOnCloseTag = (e: CustomEvent<{ value: string, idx: number }>) => {
    // This event triggers any time the user closes a tag from the close icon in each tag
    console.log('Handling tag field close tag from vue. Closed tag: ', e.detail.value, ' index: ', e.detail.idx);
  };

  const validator = (val: string) => {
    const regex = /[A-Za-z]/;
    return regex.test(val);
  }

  // Component API
  const addTag = async (newTag: string) => {
    if(aqTagFieldRef.current !== null)
      await aqTagFieldRef.current.addTag(newTag)
  };
  const removeTag = async (tagIndex: number) => {
    if(aqTagFieldRef.current !== null)
      await aqTagFieldRef.current.removeTag(tagIndex)
  };
  const setTagFieldValues = async (tagFieldValue: string[]) => {
    if(aqTagFieldRef.current !== null)
      await aqTagFieldRef.current.setTagFieldValues(tagFieldValue)
  };
  const clearSelection = async () => {
    if(aqTagFieldRef.current !== null)
      await aqTagFieldRef.current.clearSelection()
  };

  // Handle 2 way binding
  const handleValueInputTwoWay = (e: any) => {
    console.log('Handling tag field custom input from react ', e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
    setSelectedValue(e.nativeEvent.detail.value)
  };
  const handleValueChangeTwoWay = (e: any) => {
    console.log('Handling tag field custom change from react ', e.nativeEvent.detail.value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title" style={{ paddingTop: "2.5rem" }}>AqTagField: Normal implementation</div>
      <div className="components" style={{ flexDirection: "column" }}>
        <AqTagField
          onChange={(e) => handleValueChange(e)}
          onInput={(e) => handleValueInput(e)}
          onTextChange={(e) => handleTextChange(e)}
          onCloseTag={(e) => handleOnCloseTag(e)}
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
          icon="aq-icon-settings"
          placeholder="Your placeholder goes here"
          validator={validator}
          is-required
          has-clear
          show-selected-counter
          ref={aqTagFieldRef}
        >
        </AqTagField>
        Value: {JSON.stringify(tagFieldValueCommon)}

        {/* Component API usage */}
        <div>
          <AqButton style={{ margin: "2px" }} is-outline onClick={async () => addTag('New tag')}>Add tag</AqButton>
          <AqButton style={{ margin: "2px" }} is-outline onClick={async () => removeTag(-1)}>Remove tag</AqButton>
          <AqButton style={{ margin: "2px" }} is-outline onClick={async () =>  setTagFieldValues(['a','b','c'])}>Set tag field data</AqButton>
          <AqButton style={{ margin: "2px" }} is-outline onClick={async () =>  clearSelection()}>Clear tag field selection</AqButton>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Example replicating 2-way binding */}
      <div className="section-title" style={{ paddingTop: "2.5rem" }}>AqTagField: replicating 2-way binding</div>
      <div className="components" style={{ flexDirection: "column" }}>
        <AqTagField
          value={tagFieldValue}
          onChange={(e) => handleValueChangeTwoWay(e)}
          onInput={(e) => handleValueInputTwoWay(e)}
          onTextChange={(e) => handleTextChange(e)}
          validator={validator}
          label="This is a label"
          info="This is a tooltip"
          icon="aq-icon-settings"
          placeholder="Your placeholder goes here"
          is-required
          has-clear
          show-selected-counter
        >
        </AqTagField>
        Value: {JSON.stringify(tagFieldValue)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

	}

  return (

  return (
    <div className="component-type">
      <div className="title-type__container">
        <h1 className="type-title">Overlays</h1>
      </div>
      <DialogSet />
      <DrawerSet />
      <TooltipSet />
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/overlays/sets/DialogSet.tsx
================================================
import {
  AqDialog,
  AqToggle,
  AqButton,
} from '@aqua-ds/react';

import { useState } from 'react';

export const DialogSet = () => {
  const [toggleValue, setToggleValue] = useState(false);

  const closeDialog = () => {
    setToggleValue(false);
  };

  const handleClose = () => {
    setToggleValue(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqDialog</div>
      <div className="components is-gap-4">
        {/* Toggle externo */}
        <AqToggle
          onChange={(e: any) => setToggleValue(e.nativeEvent.detail.value)}
        />

        {/* Botón sin directiva */}
        <AqButton aq-dialog="dialog-1" is-outline info="Open dialog using directive">
          Open dialog as directive
        </AqButton>

        {/* Diálogo controlado */}
        <AqDialog
          id="dialog-1"
          size="small"
          title-dialog="Dialog Title Toggle"
          state="info"
          allow-maximize
          value={toggleValue}
          onClose={handleClose}
        >
          <span>
            Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero.
            Sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Sed nisi. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum.
          </span>

          <div slot="header-right">
            <em className="aq-icon-three-dots-vertical"></em>
          </div>

          <div slot="footer-right">
            <AqButton>Secondary</AqButton>
            <AqButton onClick={closeDialog}>Close</AqButton>
          </div>

          <div slot="footer-left">
            <AqButton>Tertiary</AqButton>
          </div>
        </AqDialog>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/overlays/sets/DrawerSet.tsx
================================================
// DrawerSet.tsx

import {
  AqDrawer,
  AqToggle,
  AqButton,
  AqLabel,
  AqBanner,
  AqSlider,
  AqAutocomplete,
} from '@aqua-ds/react';

import { useState } from 'react';

export const DrawerSet = () => {
  const [toggleValue, setToggleValue] = useState(false);

  const drawerOptions = [
    { text: "Option 1" },
    { text: "Option 2" },
    { text: "Option 3" },
  ];

  const onOpen = () => {
    console.log("Get drawer <open> event.");
  };

  const onClose = () => {
    console.log("Get drawer <close> event.");
  };

  return (
    <div className="container">
      <div className="section">
        <div className="section-title">Drawer</div>
        <div className="components is-gap-4">
          <AqToggle
            id="toggle"
            onChange={(e: any) => setToggleValue(e.nativeEvent.detail.value)}
          ></AqToggle>

          <AqDrawer
            size="small"
            id="drawerTest"
            title-drawer="Drawer title"
            state="warning"
            float-side="right"
            icon="aq-icon-message"
            options={drawerOptions}
            close-on-escape
            close-on-backdrop
            has-back-icon
            has-close-icon={false}
            value={toggleValue}
            onOpen={onOpen}
            onClose={() => {
              onClose();
              setToggleValue(false);
            }}
          >
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "8px" }}>
              <AqLabel>Drawer content:</AqLabel>
              <AqBanner title="title" state="danger">
                Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry.
              </AqBanner>

              <AqAutocomplete
                id="autocomplete-1"
                icon="aq-icon-send"
                label="This is a label"
                sublabel="Sub"
                placeholder="This is a placeholder"
                info="This is a tooltip"
                helper-text="This is a helper text"
                popover-width="full"
                disabled-all-options={false}
              >
                <div slot="header">
                  <AqButton>Select all</AqButton>
                </div>
                <div slot="footer">
                  <AqButton>Footer</AqButton>
                </div>
              </AqAutocomplete>

              <AqSlider
                handler-position="[60]"
                label="This is a label"
                info="This is a label tooltip"
              ></AqSlider>
            </div>

            <div slot="footer-right">
              <AqButton aq-dialog="dialogTest" info="Open modal">
                Open modal
              </AqButton>
              <AqButton variant="primary">Primary</AqButton>
            </div>

            <div slot="footer-left">
              <AqButton>Tertiary</AqButton>
            </div>
          </AqDrawer>

          <AqButton
            aq-drawer="drawerTest"
            is-outline
            info="Open drawer using a directive"
          >
            Open drawer
          </AqButton>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/titlesAndText/sets/CodeSet.tsx
================================================
import { AqButton, AqCode } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';

export const CodeSet = () => {
  const [valueSmaller, setValueSmaller] = useState('This is a code');
  const [valueLonger, setValueLonger] = useState(
    'Lorem, ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Debitis quod illum repellendus veritatis omnis repudiandae odio distinctio excepturi iure eveniet nostrum, libero velit iusto adipisci numquam asperiores laboriosam iste recusandae.',
  );

  const handleUpdateContent = () => {
    setValueSmaller('This is a new code');
    setValueLonger(
      'New Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Sed nisi. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum.',
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">1. AqCode</div>
      <AqButton isOutline onClick={() => handleUpdateContent()}>
        Update Content
      </AqButton>
      <div className="components">
        <AqCode>
          <span slot="text">{valueSmaller}</span>
        </AqCode>
        <AqCode>
          <slot slot="text">{valueLonger}</slot>
        </AqCode>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
