import { AqButton, AqHelperText } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';

export const HelperTextSet = () => {
  const [valueCommon, setValueCommon] = useState('This is a helper text');
  const [valueError, setValueError] = useState(
    'This is a helper text or caption with error',
  );

  const handleUpdateContent = () => {
    setValueCommon('This is a new helper text');
    setValueError('This is a new helper text or caption with error');
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqHelperText (Caption + Helper text)</div>
      <AqButton isOutline onClick={() => handleUpdateContent()}>
        Update content
      </AqButton>
      <div className="components">
        <AqHelperText>
          <span slot="text">{valueCommon}</span>
        </AqHelperText>
        <AqHelperText is-error>
          <span slot="text">{valueError}</span>
        </AqHelperText>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

FILE: test-apps/react-test-app/src/components/titlesAndText/sets/LinkSet.tsx
================================================
import { AqButton, AqLink } from '@aqua-ds/react';
import { useState } from 'react';

export const LinkSet = () => {
  const [valueLink, setValueLink] = useState('This is a link');
  const [valueLinkBlank, setValueLinkBlank] = useState(
    'This is a link with blank target',
  );
  const [valueLinkDisabled, setValueLinkDisabled] = useState(
    'This is a disabled link',
  );

  const handleUpdateContent = () => {
    setValueLink('This is a new link');
    setValueLinkBlank('This is a new link target blank');
    setValueLinkDisabled('This is a new disabled link');
  };

  return (
    <div className="section">
      <div className="section-title">AqLink</div>
      <AqButton isOutline onClick={() => handleUpdateContent()}>
        Update content
      </AqButton>
      <div className="components">
        <AqLink href="#">
          <span slot="text">{valueLink}</span>
        </AqLink>
        <AqLink href="#" target="blank">
          <span slot="text">{valueLinkBlank}</span>
        </AqLink>
        <AqLink is-disabled>
          <span slot="text">{valueLinkDisabled}</span>
        </AqLink>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export const SubheadingSet = () => {

    'This is a subheading',

    setValueSubheading('This is a new subheading');

  return (
    <>
      <div className="container">
        <div className="section">
          <div className="section-title">Subheading</div>
          <AqButton isOutline onClick={() => handleUpdateContent()}>
            Update content
          </AqButton>

              <span slot="text">{valueSubheading}</span>

              <span slot="text">{valueSubheading}</span>
            </AqSubheading>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/README.md
================================================
# vue-test-app

This template should help get you started developing with Vue 3 in Vite.

## Recommended IDE Setup

[VSCode](https://code.visualstudio.com/) + [Volar](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=Vue.volar) (and disable Vetur).

## Type Support for `.vue` Imports in TS

TypeScript cannot handle type information for `.vue` imports by default, so we replace the `tsc` CLI with `vue-tsc` for type checking. In editors, we need [Volar](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=Vue.volar) to make the TypeScript language service aware of `.vue` types.

## Customize configuration

See [Vite Configuration Reference](https://vite.dev/config/).

## Project Setup

```sh
npm install
```

### Compile and Hot-Reload for Development

```sh
npm run dev
```

### Type-Check, Compile and Minify for Production

```sh
npm run build
```

### Lint with [ESLint](https://eslint.org/)

```sh
npm run lint
```

import { defineConfigWithVueTs, vueTsConfigs } from '@vue/eslint-config-typescript'
import skipFormatting from '@vue/eslint-config-prettier/skip-formatting'

// To allow more languages other than `ts` in `.vue` files, uncomment the following lines:
// import { configureVueProject } from '@vue/eslint-config-typescript'
// configureVueProject({ scriptLangs: ['ts', 'tsx'] })
// More info at https://github.com/vuejs/eslint-config-typescript/#advanced-setup

export default defineConfigWithVueTs(
  {
    name: 'app/files-to-lint',
    files: ['**/*.{ts,mts,tsx,vue}'],
  },

  {
    name: 'app/files-to-ignore',
    ignores: ['**/dist/**', '**/dist-ssr/**', '**/coverage/**'],
  },

  pluginVue.configs['flat/essential'],
  vueTsConfigs.recommended,
  skipFormatting,
)

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/vite.config.ts
================================================
import { fileURLToPath, URL } from 'node:url'

import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue'
import vueDevTools from 'vite-plugin-vue-devtools'

import { visualizer } from 'rollup-plugin-visualizer'

// https://vite.dev/config/
export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    vue({
      template: {
        compilerOptions: {
          isCustomElement: (tag) => tag.startsWith('aq-'),
        },
      },
    }),
    vueDevTools(),
    visualizer({
      template: 'treemap', // or sunburst
      open: true,
      gzipSize: true,
    }),
  ],
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      '@': fileURLToPath(new URL('./src', import.meta.url)),
    },
  },
})

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/main.ts
================================================
import './assets/main.css'
import { LibraryDirectives } from '@aqua-ds/vue/lib/plugin.ts'

import { createApp } from 'vue'
import App from './App.vue'
import { Directives } from '@aqua-ds/vue'

const app = createApp(App)

// Init directives
app.use(LibraryDirectives, {
  directives: [Directives.DIALOG, Directives.DRAWER, Directives.TOOLTIP, Directives.SPINNER],
})
app.mount('#app')

/* color palette from <https://github.com/vuejs/theme> */
:root {
  --vt-c-white: #ffffff;
  --vt-c-white-soft: #f8f8f8;
  --vt-c-white-mute: #f2f2f2;

  --vt-c-black: #181818;
  --vt-c-black-soft: #222222;
  --vt-c-black-mute: #282828;

  --vt-c-indigo: #2c3e50;

  --vt-c-divider-light-1: rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.29);
  --vt-c-divider-light-2: rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.12);
  --vt-c-divider-dark-1: rgba(84, 84, 84, 0.65);
  --vt-c-divider-dark-2: rgba(84, 84, 84, 0.48);

  --vt-c-text-light-1: var(--vt-c-indigo);
  --vt-c-text-light-2: rgba(60, 60, 60, 0.66);
  --vt-c-text-dark-1: var(--vt-c-white);
  --vt-c-text-dark-2: rgba(235, 235, 235, 0.64);
}

}

    --color-background: var(--vt-c-black);

}

    const handleaqclick = (e: Event) => {

    };

      handleaqclick
    };
  },
});

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/actions/sets/ButtonSplit.vue
================================================
<script lang="ts">
  import { AqButtonSplit } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
  import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

  export default defineComponent({
    components: { AqButtonSplit },
    setup() {
      const handleClickLeft = (e: CustomEvent<{ event: Event }>) => {
        console.log('Handling button split clickLeft from vue ', e);
      };
      const handleClickRight = (e: CustomEvent<{ event: Event }>) => {
        console.log('Handling button split clickRight from vue ', e);
      };
      const handleClickItem = (e: CustomEvent<{ value: string }>) => {
        console.log('Handling button split clickItem from vue ', e, e.detail.value);
      };
      const items = ref([{
		      id: "id1",
		      name: "option1"
		    },
		    {
		      id: "id2",
		      name: "option2"
		    }
	    ]);

      return {
        handleClickLeft,
        handleClickRight,
        handleClickItem,
        items
      };
    },
  });
</script>

<template>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">Button split</div>
      <div class="components">
        <aq-button-split
          :items="items"
          variant="success"
          info="This is a tooltip"
          @clickLeft="handleClickLeft"
          @clickRight="handleClickRight"
          @clickItem="handleClickItem"
          >Button</aq-button-split
        >
      </div>
    </div>
  </div> 
</template>

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/actions/sets/DropdownSet.vue
================================================
<script lang="ts">
import {
  AqDropdown,
  AqButton,
  AqSubheading,
  AqDropdownItem,
  AqCheckbox,
  AqBadge,
} from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import type { IDropdownItem } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue'

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqDropdown,
    AqButton,
    AqSubheading,
    AqDropdownItem,
    AqCheckbox,
    AqBadge,
  },
  setup() {
    const items = [
      {
        label: 'Option 1',
        icon: 'aq-icon-sight-on',
        callback: () => {
          console.log('VR Item 1 Selected')
        },
      },
      {
        label: 'Option 2',
        class: 'aq-dropdown-item--disabled',
        callback: () => {
          console.log('VR Item 2 Selected')
        },
      },
      {
        label: 'Option 3',
        callback: () => {
          console.log('VR Item 3 Selected')
        },
      },
    ]

    const itemsLang = [
      {
        label: 'ES',
      },
      {
        label: 'EN',
      },
    ]
    const langSelected = ref(itemsLang[0].label)
    const handleSelectionLang = (event: CustomEvent<IDropdownItem>) => {
      console.log('Event selection: ', event)

      langSelected.value = event.detail.label
    }

    const handleSelection = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Dropdown selection: ', e)
    }

    return {
      items,
      handleSelection,
      itemsLang,
      langSelected,
      handleSelectionLang,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Dropdown Table</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-dropdown
        id="dropdown-1"
        :items="items"
        :popover-width="300"
        @itemSelection="(evt: any) => handleSelection(evt)"
      >
        <aq-button slot="activator" is-outline
          ><i class="aq-icon-three-dots-vertical"></i
        ></aq-button>
      </aq-dropdown>

      <aq-dropdown id="dropdown-3" placement="right" @itemSelection="(evt: any) => handleSelection(evt)">
        <aq-button slot="activator" variant="default" is-outline disclosure>Click Me!!</aq-button>
        <div slot="header">
          <aq-subheading>Custom Heading</aq-subheading>
        </div>
        <div slot="content">
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 2 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item">
            <aq-checkbox
              id="chk"
              :value="true"
              value-checkbox="checkbox-7"
              info="This is a required checkbox"
              required
              label="Checkbox"
              icon="aq-icon-settings"
            ></aq-checkbox>
          </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item">
            <aq-badge custom-class="is-background-blue-5 is-text-blue-70">
              <i class="aq-icon-circle-fill is-font-size-8 pr-1"></i>
              <span>I'm customized through the custom-class attribute</span>
            </aq-badge>
          </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 1 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 2 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 3 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 1 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 2 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 3 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 1 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 2 </aq-dropdown-item>
          <aq-dropdown-item class="dropdown_item"> Item 3 </aq-dropdown-item>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqToggle } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqToggle,
  },
  setup() {
    const toggleValue = ref(false);
    const handleInput = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('handleInput vue', e, e.detail.value);
    };
    const handleChange = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('handleChange vue', e, e.detail.value);
    };
    return {
      toggleValue,
      handleInput,
      handleChange,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Toggle</div>
    <div class="components">
      <div class="components">
        <aq-toggle helper-text="This is a helper text" @input="handleInput" @change="handleChange"q></aq-toggle>
        <aq-toggle is-disabled helper-text="This is a disabled toggle"></aq-toggle>
        <aq-toggle is-disabled has-label helper-text="This is a disabled toggle with default label"></aq-toggle>
        <aq-toggle has-label helper-text="This is a toggle with default label"></aq-toggle>
        <aq-toggle has-label helper-text="This is a toggle with custom labels">
          <div slot="on"><span>Toggled on</span></div>
          <div slot="off"><span>Toggled off</span></div>
        </aq-toggle>
      </div>
      <div class="components" style="padding-top: 12px;">
        <p> Toggle with v-model: {{ toggleValue }}</p>
        <aq-toggle v-model="toggleValue"></aq-toggle>
        <aq-toggle v-model="toggleValue"></aq-toggle>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqTreeMenu, AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqTreeMenu,
    AqButton,
  },
  setup() {
    const aqTreeMenuRef = ref();
    const options = ref([
      {
        idItem: 1,
        label: 'Level 1',
        isOpen: true,
        childrenItems: [
          {
            idItem: '1-1',
            label: 'Level 1.1'
          },
          {
            idItem: '1-2',
            label: 'Level 1.2'
          },
          {
            idItem: '1-3',
            label: 'Level 1.3',
            childrenItems: [
              {
                idItem: '1-3-1',
                label: 'Level 1.3.1',
                childrenItems: [
                  {
                    idItem: '1-3-1-1',
                    label: 'Level 1.3.1',
                    childrenItems: [
                      {
                        idItem: '1-3-1-1',
                        label: 'Level 1.3.1'
                      },
                      {
                        idItem: '1-3-2',
                        label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                      },
                      {
                        idItem: '1-3-3',
                        label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    idItem: '1-3-2',
                    label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                  },
                  {
                    idItem: '1-3-3',
                    label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                idItem: '1-3-2',
                label: 'Level 1.3.2'
              },
              {
                idItem: '1-3-3',
                label: 'Level 1.3.3'
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            idItem: '1-4',
            label: 'Level 1.4',
            childrenItems: [
              {
                idItem: '1-3-1',
                label: 'Level 1.3.1',
                childrenItems: [
                  {
                    idItem: '1-3-1-1',
                    label: 'Level 1.3.1',
                    childrenItems: [
                      {
                        idItem: '1-3-1-1',
                        label: 'Level 1.3.1'
                      },
                      {
                        idItem: '1-3-2',
                        label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                      },
                      {
                        idItem: '1-3-3',
                        label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    idItem: '1-3-2',
                    label: 'Level 1.3.2'
                  },
                  {
                    idItem: '1-3-3',
                    label: 'Level 1.3.3'
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                idItem: '1-3-2',
                label: 'Level 1.3.2'
              },
              {
                idItem: '1-3-3',
                label: 'Level 1.3.3'
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        idItem: 1,
        label: 'Level 1',
        isOpen: true
      }
    ]);
  
    const setOptions = async() => {
      if(aqTreeMenuRef.value)
        await aqTreeMenuRef.value.setOptions([
          {
            idItem: 'New option 1',
            label: 'New option 1',
            childrenItems: [
              {
                idItem: '1-1',
                label: 'Level 1.1',
              },
            ]
          },
          {
            idItem: 'New option 2',
            label: 'New option 2',
            childrenItems: [
              {
                idItem: '1-1',
                label: 'Level 1.1',
              },
            ]
          },
        ]);
    }
    const getOptions = async() => {
      if(aqTreeMenuRef.value)
        alert(JSON.stringify(await aqTreeMenuRef.value.getOptions()));
    }
    const collapseAll = async() => {
      if(aqTreeMenuRef.value)
        await aqTreeMenuRef.value.collapseAll();
    }

    const handleToggleItem = (e: CustomEvent<{ clickedItem: {}, localOptions: [] }>) => {
      console.log('Tree menu toggle item: ', e, e.detail.clickedItem, e.detail.localOptions);
    };

    return {
      aqTreeMenuRef,
      options,
      setOptions,
      getOptions,
      collapseAll,
      handleToggleItem
    }
  }
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Tree Menu</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-tree-menu :options="options" ref="aqTreeMenuRef" @toggleItem="handleToggleItem">
      </aq-tree-menu>
      <aq-button @click="setOptions()" is-outline type="button">Set new options</aq-button>
      <aq-button @click="getOptions()" is-outline type="button">Get current options</aq-button>
      <aq-button @click="collapseAll()" is-outline type="button">Collapse items</aq-button>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/actions/sets/VoicePlayerSet.vue
================================================
<script lang="ts">
import { AqVoicePlayer, AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqVoicePlayer,
    AqButton,
  },
  setup() {
    const aqVoicePlayerRef = ref();

    // 🔹 Voice Player API
    const playPause = async () => {
      if (aqVoicePlayerRef.value) {
        await aqVoicePlayerRef.value.audioPlayPause();
      }
    };

    const getCurrentTime = async () => {
      if (aqVoicePlayerRef.value) {
        const time = await aqVoicePlayerRef.value.getCurrentTime();
        console.log('Current time:', time);
      }
    };

    const getDuration = async () => {
      if (aqVoicePlayerRef.value) {
        const duration = await aqVoicePlayerRef.value.getDuration();
        console.log('Duration:', duration);
      }
    };

    const handleAudioPlay = (e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) => {
      console.log('Audio play:', e.detail.currentTime);
    };

    const handleAudioPause = (e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) => {
      console.log('Audio pause:', e.detail.currentTime);
    };

    const handleAudioEnded = (e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) => {
      console.log('Audio ended:', e.detail.currentTime);
    };

    const handleAudioError = (e: CustomEvent<{ error: number }>) => {
      console.log('Audio error:', e.detail.error);
    };

    const handleLoadedAudio = (e: CustomEvent<{ duration: number }>) => {
      console.log('Audio loaded:', e.detail.duration);
    };

    const handlePositionChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ currentTime: number }>) => {
      console.log('Audio position change:', e.detail.currentTime);
    };

    return {
      aqVoicePlayerRef,
      playPause,
      getCurrentTime,
      getDuration,
      handleAudioPlay,
      handleAudioPause,
      handleAudioEnded,
      handleAudioError,
      handleLoadedAudio,
      handlePositionChange
    };
  }
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">VoicePlayer</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-voice-player
        ref="aqVoicePlayerRef"
        label="This is a label"
        is-required
        info="This is a tooltip"
        tooltip-width="90px"
        helper-text="This is a helper text"
        audio-source="https://interactive-examples.mdn.mozilla.net/media/cc0-audio/t-rex-roar.mp3"
        @audioPlay="handleAudioPlay"
        @audioPause="handleAudioPause"
        @audioEnded="handleAudioEnded"
        @audioError="handleAudioError"
        @loadedAudio="handleLoadedAudio"
        @positionChange="handlePositionChange"
      >
      </aq-voice-player>

      <div class="flex gap-2 mt-4">
        <aq-button @click="playPause()" is-outline type="button">Play / Pause</aq-button>
        <aq-button @click="getCurrentTime()" is-outline type="button">Get Current Time</aq-button>
        <aq-button @click="getDuration()" is-outline type="button">Get Duration</aq-button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-area';

export default defineComponent({
  setup() {
    const seriesArea = [{
      name: 'USA',
      data: [
        null, null, null, null, null, 2, 9, 13, 50, 170, 299, 438, 841,
      1169, 1703, 2422, 3692, 5543, 7345, 12298, 18638, 22229, 25540,
      28133, 29463, 31139, 31175, 31255, 29561, 27552, 26008, 25830,
      26516, 27835, 28537, 27519, 25914, 25542, 24418, 24138, 24104,
      23208, 22886, 23305, 23459, 23368, 23317, 23575, 23205, 22217,
      21392, 19008, 13708, 11511, 10979, 10904, 11011, 10903, 10732,
      10685, 10577, 10526, 10457, 10027, 8570, 8360, 7853, 5709, 5273,
      5113, 5066, 4897, 4881, 4804, 4717, 4571, 4018, 3822, 3785, 3805,
      3750, 3708, 3708, 3708, 3708
    ]
    }, {
        name: 'USSR/Russia',
        data: [
            null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null,
            1, 5, 25, 50, 120, 150, 200, 426, 660, 863, 1048, 1627, 2492,
            3346, 4259, 5242, 6144, 7091, 8400, 9490, 10671, 11736, 13279,
            14600, 15878, 17286, 19235, 22165, 24281, 26169, 28258, 30665,
            32146, 33486, 35130, 36825, 38582, 40159, 38107, 36538, 35078,
            32980, 29154, 26734, 24403, 21339, 18179, 15942, 15442, 14368,
            13188, 12188, 11152, 10114, 9076, 8038, 7000, 6643, 6286, 5929,
            5527, 5215, 4858, 4750, 4650, 4600, 4500, 4490, 4300, 4350, 4330,
            4310, 4495, 4477, 4489, 4380, 1
        ]
    }]
    const title = ref("Chart Area");
    const chartRef = ref();
    const chartSeriesUSA = ref(true);
    const data = ref({
      series: seriesArea,
      title: {
        text: title.value,
        align: 'left',
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: 'Subtitle',
        align: 'left',
      },
      lang: {
        locale: 'en-US' // Make sure to use a valid locale
      },
      plotOptions: {
        area: {
          pointStart: 1940,
          marker: {
            enabled: false,
            symbol: 'circle',
            radius: 2,
            states: {
              hover: {
                enabled: true
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    })

    const changeSeries = () => {
      chartSeriesUSA.value = !chartSeriesUSA.value;
      const series = chartSeriesUSA.value ? seriesArea : [{
        name: 'COL',
        data: [
          null, null, null, null, null, 2, 9, 13, 50, 170, 299, 438, 841,
        1169, 1703, 2422, 3692, 5543, 7345, 12298, 18638, 22229, 25540,
        28133, 29463, 31139, 31175, 31255, 29561, 27552, 26008, 25830,        
        10685, 10577, 10526, 10457, 10027, 8570, 8360, 7853, 5709, 5273,
        5113, 5066, 4897, 4881, 4804, 4717, 4571, 4018, 3822, 3785, 3805,
        3750, 3708, 3708, 3708, 3708
      ]
      }, {
          name: 'JPN',
          data: [
              null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null,
              1, 5, 25, 50, 120, 150, 200, 426, 660, 863, 1048, 1627, 2492,
              3346, 4259, 5242, 6144, 7091, 8400, 9490, 10671, 11736, 13279,              
              13188, 12188, 11152, 10114, 9076, 8038, 7000, 6643, 6286, 5929,
              5527, 5215, 4858, 4750, 4650, 4600, 4500, 4490, 4300, 4350, 4330,
              4310, 4495, 4477, 4489, 4380, 1
          ]
      }];
      chartRef.value.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = chartSeriesUSA.value ? { title: {text: 'USA/Rusia' } } : { title: {text: 'COL/JPN' } };
      chartRef.value.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    };

    return {
      data,
      chartRef,
      changeSeries,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Aq Chart Area</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-chart-area :options="data" ref="chartRef"></aq-chart-area>
      <aq-button is-outline @click="changeSeries">Change Data</aq-button>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-bar';
import { defineComponent, ref, watch } from 'vue';
import { AqCodeEditor } from '@aqua-ds/vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqCodeEditor
  },
  setup() {
    const seriesBar = [
      {
        name: "Browsers",
        data: [
          { name: "Safari", y: 500, status: "danger" },
          { name: "Brave", y: 507, status: "success" },
          { name: "Opera", y: 205, status: "warning" },
          { name: "Mozilla", y: 409, status: "neutral" },
          { name: "Chrome", y: 602, status: "caution" },
        ],
      },
    ];
    const data = ref({
      title: {
        text: "Chart Title",
        align: "left",
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: "Subtitle Chart",
        align: "center",
      },
      // Customize bar info banner
      tooltip: {
        enabled: true,
        pointFormat:
          '<span style="color:{point.color}; font-size: var(--font-size-xl)">{series.name}</span>: <br/><span style="font-style: italic">{point.y:.2f}%</span><b>&nbsp; format text</b>',
      },

      // Data display config
      xAxis: {
        title: {
          text: "Label Axis X",
        },
        categories: ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun"],
      },
      yAxis: {
        title: {
          text: "Label Axis Y",
        },
      },
      series: seriesBar,
    });
    const chartRef = ref();
    const chartSeries1 = ref(true);

    const dataString = ref(JSON.stringify(data.value));

    watch(dataString, (newVal) => {
      data.value = JSON.parse(newVal);
    });

    const changeSeries = () => {
      chartSeries1.value = !chartSeries1.value;
      const series = chartSeries1.value ? seriesBar : [
        {
          name: "Browsers",
          data: [
            { name: "Safari", y: 300, status: "danger" },
            { name: "Brave", y: 307, status: "success" },
            { name: "Opera", y: 605, status: "warning" },
            { name: "Mozilla", y: 209, status: "neutral" },
            { name: "Chrome", y: 802, status: "caution" },
          ],
        },
      ];
      chartRef.value.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = chartSeries1.value ? { title: {text: 'Chart Bar' } } : { title: {text: 'Chart Bar 2' } };
      chartRef.value.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    };

    return {
      data,
      dataString,
      changeSeries,
      chartRef,
    };
  },
})

</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Chart Bar</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-chart-bar :options="data" palette="Teal" ref="chartRef" />
      <aq-button is-outline @click="changeSeries">Update data</aq-button>
      <aq-code-editor v-model="dataString"></aq-code-editor>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

        y: 500,
      },
      {
        name: "Brave",
        y: 507,
      },

        y: 205,
      },
      {
        name: "Mozilla",

        text: 'Chart Columns',
        align: 'center',
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: 'Subtitle column',
        align: 'center',
      },

        title: {
          text: "Label Axis X"
        },

          "Jan",
          "Feb",
          "Mar",
          "Apr",
          "May",
          "Jun",
          "Jul",
          "Aug",
          "Sep",
          "Oct",
          "Nov",
          "Dec"
        ]
      },
      yAxis: {
        title: {
          text: "Label Axis Y"
        }
      },
    });

    const handleClick = (e: Event) => {
      isGrouped.value = !isGrouped.value;

      chartRef.value.updateSeries(isGrouped.value ? seriesColumnGrouped : seriesColumn)
    };

    const handleClickColumn = (e: Event) => {
      console.log('Handling click column from vue ', e);
    };

    return {
      data,
      isGrouped,
      chartRef,
      handleClick,
      handleClickColumn,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Aq Chart Column</div>
    <div class="pt-2 components">
      <aq-chart-column
        ref="chartRef"

        :is-grouped="isGrouped"
        :options="data"
        palette="Purple"

<script lang="ts">
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-donut';

// @ts-ignore
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  setup() {
    const chartRef = ref();
    const chartSeries1 = ref(true);

    const seriesDonut = [
      {
        data: [
          {
            name: "Safari",
            y: 500,
            status: "danger"
          },
          {
            name: "Brave",
            y: 507,
            status: "success"
          },
          {
            name: "Opera",
            y: 205,
            status: "warning"
          },
          {
            name: "Mozilla",
            y: 409,
            status: "neutral"
          },
          {
            name: "Chrome",
            y: 602,
            status: "caution"
          }
        ],
      }
    ];
    const data = ref({
      series: seriesDonut,
      title: {
        text: 'Chart Donut',
        align: 'center',
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: 'Subtitle Donut',
        align: 'center',
      },
      plotOptions: {
        pie: {
          point: {
            events: {
              click: function() {
                alert('You clicked');
              }
            }
          }
        },
      },
    });

    const changeSeries = () => {
      chartSeries1.value = !chartSeries1.value;
      const series = chartSeries1.value ? seriesDonut : [
      {
        data: [
          {
            name: "Safari",
            y: 100,
            status: "danger"
          },
          {
            name: "Brave",
            y: 107,
            status: "success"
          },
          {
            name: "Opera",
            y: 265,
            status: "warning"
          },
          {
            name: "Mozilla",
            y: 709,
            status: "neutral"
          },
          {
            name: "Chrome",
            y: 102,
            status: "caution"
          }
        ],
      }
    ];
      chartRef.value.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = chartSeries1.value ? { title: { text: 'Chart Donut' } } : { title: { text: 'Chart Donut 2' } };
      chartRef.value.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    };

    return {
      data,
      changeSeries,
      chartRef,
    };
  }
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Aq Chart Donut</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-chart-donut ref="chartRef" :options="data"></aq-chart-donut>
      <aq-button is-outline @click="changeSeries">Update data</aq-button>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/charts/sets/ChartDonutThin.vue
================================================
<script lang="ts">
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-donut-thin';
import { defineComponent, ref, watch } from 'vue';
import { AqCodeEditor } from '@aqua-ds/vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqCodeEditor
  },
  setup() {
    const chartRef = ref();
    const chartSeries1 = ref(true);
    const seriesDonutThin = [
      {
        name: "Status",
        data: [
          {
            name: "Delivered ",
            y: 70,
            status: "warning"
          },
          {
            name: "Clicked",
            y: 45,
            status: "neutral"
          },
          {
            name: "Opened",
            y: 25,
            status: "info"
          },
          {
            name: "Error",
            y: 5,
            status: "danger"
          },
          {
            name: "Read",
            y: 20,
            status: "success"
          },
          {
            name: "Other",
            y: 20,
            status: "caution"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]

    const data = ref({
      title: {
        text: "Chart Title",
        align: "center"
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: "Subtitle Chart",
        align: "left"
      },
      series: seriesDonutThin,
      tooltip: {
        borderWidth: 0,
        backgroundColor: 'none',
        valueSuffix: '%XD',
        shadow: false,
        headerFormat: '',
        useHTML: true,
        style: {
          fontSize: "20px"
        },
        pointFormat: "<span style=color:{point.color};font-size: 20px>{point.name}</span><br/><span style=font-style: italic>{point.y:.2f}%</span><br/><b>format text</b>",
      }
    });
    const dataString = ref(JSON.stringify(data.value));
    const tooltipPositionerX = ref(0);
    const tooltipPositionerY = ref(0);

    watch(dataString, (newVal) => {
      data.value = JSON.parse(newVal);
    });

    const changeSeries = () => {
      chartSeries1.value = !chartSeries1.value;
      const series = chartSeries1.value ? seriesDonutThin : [
      {
        data: [
          {
            name: "Safari",
            y: 100,
            status: "danger"
          },
          {
            name: "Brave",
            y: 107,
            status: "success"
          },
          {
            name: "Opera",
            y: 265,
            status: "warning"
          },
          {
            name: "Mozilla",
            y: 709,
            status: "neutral"
          },
          {
            name: "Chrome",
            y: 102,
            status: "caution"
          }
        ],
      }
    ];
      chartRef.value.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = chartSeries1.value ?
        { title: { text: 'Chart Donut Thin' } }
        : { title: { text: 'Chart Donut Thin 2' } };
      chartRef.value.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    };

    return {
      data, dataString, tooltipPositionerX, tooltipPositionerY,
      changeSeries,
      chartRef,
    };
  },
})

</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Chart Bar</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-chart-donut-thin ref="chartRef" :options="data" palette="Teal" :tooltip-positioner-x="tooltipPositionerX"
        :tooltip-positioner-y="tooltipPositionerY" />
      <aq-button is-outline @click="changeSeries">Update data</aq-button>
      <aq-code-editor v-model="dataString"></aq-code-editor>
      <input type="number" v-model="tooltipPositionerX" />
      <input type="number" v-model="tooltipPositionerY" />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

            code: "AR",
            status: "danger"
          },

        }

      title: {
        text: "Chart Title",
        "align": "center"
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: "Subtitle Chart",
        "align": "right"
      },
      legend: {
        enabled: true
      },
      tooltip: {
        enabled: true,
      },
      mapNavigation: {
        enabled: true,
        enableDoubleClickZoomTo: true
      },
      series: seriesGeoMap1,
      name: "Population density",
      states: {
        hover: {
          color: "red"
        }
      },
      joinBy: ["iso-a3", "code3"]
    });
    const dataString = ref(JSON.stringify(data.value));

    watch(dataString, (newVal) => {
      data.value = JSON.parse(newVal);
    });

    const changeSeries = () => {
      chartSeries1.value = !chartSeries1.value;
      const series = chartSeries1.value ? seriesGeoMap1 : seriesGeoMap2;
      chartRef.value.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = chartSeries1.value ?
        { title: { text: 'Chart Geo Map 1' } } : { title: { text: 'Chart Geo Map 2' } };
      chartRef.value.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    };

    return {
      data, dataString, changeSeries, chartRef, chartSeries1
    };
  },
})

</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Chart Bar</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-chart-geo-map ref="chartRef" :options="data" palette="Cyan" />
      <aq-button is-outline @click="changeSeries">Update data</aq-button>
      <aq-code-editor v-model="dataString" :height="100" language="json"></aq-code-editor>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

        { title: { text: 'Chart Line 1' } }
        : { title: { text: 'Chart Line 2' } };
      chartRef.value.updateOptions(currentTitle);
    };

    return {
      data,
      chartRef,
      changeSeries,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Aq Chart Line</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-chart-line ref="chartRef" :options="data"></aq-chart-line>
      <aq-button is-outline @click="changeSeries">Update data</aq-button>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import '@aqua-ds/charts/aq-chart-progress-bar';
import { defineComponent, ref, watch } from 'vue';
import { AqCodeEditor } from '@aqua-ds/vue';

export default defineComponent({
    components: {
      AqCodeEditor,
    },
  setup() {
    const chartRef = ref();
    const chartSeries1 = ref(true);
    const maxValue = ref(10);
    const height = ref(150);

    const seriesProgress1 = [
      {
        name: "Image - 2.5GB",
        data: [2.5],
        grouping: false,
        status: "danger",
      },
      {
        name: "Audio - 0.4GB",
        data: [0.4],
        grouping: false,
        status: "success",
      },
      {
        name: "Video - 0.9GB",
        data: [0.9],
        grouping: false,
        status: "neutral",
      },
      {
        name: "Docs - 1.2GB",
        data: [1.2],
        grouping: false,
        status: "caution",
      },
      {
        name: "Zip - 0.6GB",
        data: [0.6],
        grouping: false,
        status: "info",
      },
      {
        name: "HTML - 2.98GB",
        data: [2.98],
        grouping: false,
        status: "warning",
      },
    ];
    const seriesProgress2 = [
      {
        name: "Image - 2GB",
        data: [2],
        grouping: false,
        status: "danger",
      },
      {
        name: "Audio - 0.8GB",
        data: [0.8],
        grouping: false,
        status: "success",
      },
      {
        name: "Video - 1GB",
        data: [1],
        grouping: false,
        status: "neutral",
      },
      {
        name: "Docs - 2GB",
        data: [2],
        grouping: false,
        status: "caution",
      },
      {
        name: "Zip - 1GB",
        data: [1],
        grouping: false,
        status: "info",
      },
      {
        name: "HTML - 1.98GB",
        data: [1.98],
        grouping: false,
        status: "warning",
      },
    ];

    const data = ref({
      title: {
        text: "Chart Progress Bar 1",
        align: "center",
      },
      subtitle: {
        text: "Chart Subtitle",
        align: "center",
      },
      legend: {
        enabled: true,
        layout: "horizontal",
        align: "center",
        verticalAlign: "bottom",
        width: 0,
      },
      series: seriesProgress1,
    });
    const dataString = ref(JSON.stringify(data.value));

    watch(dataString, (newVal) => {
        data.value = JSON.parse(newVal);
    });

    const changeSeries = () => {
      chartSeries1.value = !chartSeries1.value;
      const series = chartSeries1.value ? seriesProgress1 : seriesProgress2;
      chartRef.value.updateSeries(series);
      const currentTitle = chartSeries1.value ?
        { title: { text: 'Chart Progress Bar 1' } }
        : { title: { text: 'Chart Progress Bar 2' } };
      chartRef.value.updateOptions(currentTitle);

      maxValue.value = chartSeries1.value ? 10 : 20;
      height.value = chartSeries1.value ? 150 : 200;
    };

    return {
      data,dataString,
      changeSeries,
      chartRef,
      maxValue,
      height
    };
  },
})

</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Chart Bar</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-chart-progress-bar
        ref="chartRef"
        :options="data"
        palette="Teal"
        align-legend="bottomLeft"
        :max-value="maxValue"
        :height="height"
      />
      <aq-button is-outline @click="changeSeries">Update data</aq-button>
      <aq-code-editor v-model="dataString" :height="100" language="json"></aq-code-editor>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

  { make: 'GMC2', model: 'Hummer EV', price: 108700, electric: true },
  { make: 'Tesla2', model: 'Cybertruck', price: 79990, electric: true },
  { make: 'Audi2', model: 'e-tron', price: 65900, electric: true },
]

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqTable,
    AqSubheading,
    AqButton,

  },
  setup() {
    const loading = ref(false)
    const copyData = ref([] as any[])
    const data = ref(dataTable)
    const columns = ref([
      {
        accessorKey: 'make',
        header: 'Make',
        size: 150,
        minSize: 100,
        maxSize: 200,
        meta: {
          label: 'Make',
          tooltip: 'Tooltip Make',
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'model',
        header: 'model',
        size: 150,
        meta: {
          icon: 'aq-icon-sms',
          label: 'Model custom title',
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'price',
        header: 'Price',
        size: 250,
        meta: {
          alignment: {
            content: Alignment.CENTER,
            header: Alignment.CENTER,
          },
          label: 'Price',
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'electric',
        header: 'Electric',
        meta: {
          label: 'Electric',
          formatter: (val: any) => {
            return `<aq-badge status="${val.value ? 'success' : 'danger'}">${val.value ? 'Yes' : 'No'}</aq-badge>`
          },
        },
      },
    ])
    const config = ref({
      state: {
        columnPinning: {},
      },
      chunk: 3,
      title: 'My custom Title',
      titleTooltip: 'Is a tooltip',
      titleIcon: 'aq-icon-table',
      perPage: 5,
      height: 450,
      perPageValues: [5, 10, 15, 20],
      errorValue: 'No data available',
    })

    watch(
      data,
      (newVal) => {
        copyData.value = [...newVal] // Clon superficial
      },
      { immediate: true },
    )

    const loadingCustomQueryFilter = (query: string) => {
      if (!query) return (data.value = [...dataTable])
      const copy = [...dataTable]
      const filterData = copy.filter((item) =>
        item.model.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()),
      )
      data.value = [...filterData]
    }
    const handleClick = () => {
      loading.value = !loading.value
    }
    const handlePinChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string, value: boolean }>) => {
      console.log('Pin Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
    };
    const handleSortChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string, value: string }>) => {
      console.log('Sort Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
    };
    const handleSizeChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ id: string, value: number }>) => {
      console.log('Size Change', e, e.detail.id, e.detail.value);
    };
    return {
      columns,
      loading,
      handleClick,
      data,
      config,
      loadingCustomQueryFilter,
      handlePinChange,
      handleSortChange,
      handleSizeChange,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Client Table</div>
    <div class="components" style="height: 500px">
      <aq-table
        @pinChange="handlePinChange"
        @sortChange="handleSortChange"
        @sizeChange="handleSizeChange"
        id="my-table"
        has-header
        :columns="columns"
        :data="data"
        :config="config"
        :loading="loading"
        :loadingCustomQueryFilter="loadingCustomQueryFilter"
      >
        <em slot="title" class="aq-icon-table"></em>
        <aq-badge status="success" slot="header-left">U</aq-badge>
        <aq-button id="loadingButton" slot="header-right" is-outline @click="handleClick">
          Loader
        </aq-button>
      </aq-table>
    </div>
    <br />
    <br />
    <div class="components" style="height: 500px"></div>
  </div>
</template>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Collapse group</div>

      <aq-button is-outline @click="hideAll">Hide all</aq-button>
    </div>

            <aq-subheading>Campaign</aq-subheading>

            <aq-subheading>Campaign</aq-subheading>

<script lang="ts">
import {
  AqCollapseGroup,
  AqCollapse,
  AqCollapseHeader,
  AqCollapseContent,
  AqButton,
  AqSubheading,
} from '@aqua-ds/vue'
import { ref, defineComponent } from 'vue'

export default defineComponent({
  name: 'CollapseGroupSet',
  setup() {
    const collapseGroup1 = ref<any>(null)

    const hideAll = () => {
      if (collapseGroup1.value) {
        collapseGroup1.value.hideAll()
      }
    }

    const handleOpen = () => {
      console.log('Collapse opened')
    }

    const handleClose = () => {
      console.log('Collapse closed')
    }

    return {
      collapseGroup1,
      hideAll,
      handleOpen,
      handleClose,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<script lang="ts">
import {
  AqCollapse,
  AqCollapseHeader,
  AqCollapseContent,
  AqButton,
  AqSubheading,
} from '@aqua-ds/vue';

import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqCollapse,
    AqCollapseHeader,
    AqCollapseContent,
    AqButton,
    AqSubheading,
  },
  setup() {
    const collapseRef = ref<any>(null);

    const showCollapse = () => {
      collapseRef.value?.show();
    };

    const hideCollapse = () => {
      collapseRef.value?.hide();
    };

    const toggleCollapse = () => {
      collapseRef.value?.toggle();
    };

    const handleOpen = () => {
      console.log('Collapse opened');
    };

    const handleClose = () => {
      console.log('Collapse closed');
    };

    const handleHeaderClick = (e: any) => {
      console.log('Collapse header click:', e);
    };

    return {
      collapseRef,
      showCollapse,
      hideCollapse,
      toggleCollapse,
      handleOpen,
      handleClose,
      handleHeaderClick,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Collapse</div>

    <div>
      <aq-button is-outline @click="showCollapse">Show</aq-button>
      <aq-button is-outline @click="hideCollapse">Hide</aq-button>
      <aq-button is-outline @click="toggleCollapse">Toggle</aq-button>
    </div>

    <aq-collapse
      ref="collapseRef"
      @open="handleOpen"
      @close="handleClose"
    >
      <aq-collapse-header @click="handleHeaderClick">
        <span slot="title">
          <em class="aq-icon-check-circle"></em>
          <aq-subheading>Campaign</aq-subheading>
        </span>
      </aq-collapse-header>

      <aq-collapse-content>
        Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Repudiandae,
        accusantium earum quidem ex, veritatis assumenda debitis accusamus
        inventore quae, voluptate sunt quas laborum. Voluptate earum velit
        autem sunt a labore?
      </aq-collapse-content>
    </aq-collapse>
  </div>
</template>

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/dataVisualization/sets/ServerTableSet.vue

<script lang="ts">
import { AqTable, AqSubheading, AqButton, AqTooltip } from '@aqua-ds/vue'
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue'

enum Alignment {
  LEFT = 'left',
  CENTER = 'center',
  RIGHT = 'right',
}
enum TableMode {
  'CLIENT' = 'CLIENT_SIDE',
  'SERVER' = 'SERVER_SIDE',
}

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqTable,
    AqSubheading,
    AqButton,
  },
  setup() {
    const loading = ref(false)
    const columns = ref([
      {
        accessorKey: 'name',
        header: 'Name',
        size: 250,
        meta: {
          label: 'Name',
          formatter: (params: any) => {
            let genderColor = ''
            let gender = params.data.gender

            switch (gender) {
              case 'Male':
                genderColor = '#9ec5ff'
                break
              case 'Female':
                genderColor = '#ff93c6'
                break
              default:
                genderColor = '#ffc88a'
                break
            }
            return `<aq-avatar :aq-tooltip="This is a tooltip" background-color="${genderColor}" text="${params.value}"></aq-avatar>`
          },
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'status',
        header: 'Status',
        size: 100,
        meta: {
          label: 'Status',
          aligment: {
            content: Alignment.CENTER,
          },
          formatter: (params: any) => {
            let statusVariant = ''
            let isDead = ''
            let genderClass = ''
            switch (params.value) {
              case 'Alive':
                genderClass = 'positive'
                break
              case 'Dead':
                isDead = 'is-disabled'
                genderClass = 'alert'
                break
              default:
                genderClass = ''
                break
            }
            return `<aq-tag ${isDead} text="${params.value}" variant="${genderClass}"></aq-tag></aq-badge>`
          },
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'gender',
        header: 'Gender',
        size: 100,
        meta: {
          label: 'Gender',
          aligment: {
            content: Alignment.CENTER,
          },
          formatter: (params: any) => {
            let genderClass = ''
            switch (params.value) {
              case 'Male':
                genderClass = 'info'
                break
              case 'Female':
                genderClass = 'accent'
                break
              default:
                genderClass = ''
                break
            }
            return `<aq-tag text="${params.value}" variant="${genderClass}"></aq-tag></aq-badge>`
          },
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'origin',
        header: 'Origin',
        size: 150,
        meta: {
          label: 'Origin',
          formatter: (params: any) => {
            return `${params.data.origin.name}`
          },
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'species',
        header: 'Species',
        size: 120,
        meta: {
          label: 'Species',
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'created',
        header: 'Created',
        size: 120,
        meta: {
          aligment: {
            content: Alignment.CENTER,
          },
          label: 'Created',
          formatter: (params: any) => {
            return `<aq-badge>
              <aq-tooltip>
                <span>${params.value}</span>
              </aq-tooltip>
              <em class="aq-icon-calendar-dots"></em>
              <span>${new Date(params.value).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
            </aq-badge>`
          },
        },
      },
      {
        accessorKey: 'actions',
        header: 'Actions',
        meta: {
          label: 'Actions',
          aligment: {
            content: Alignment.CENTER,
          },
          formatter: (params: any) => {
            const button = document.createElement('aq-button')
            const outline = document.createAttribute('is-outline')
            outline.value = 'true'
            button.setAttributeNode(outline)

            // Agregar icono dentro del botón
            const icon = document.createElement('em')
            icon.classList.add('aq-icon-send')
            button.appendChild(icon)

            // Agregar evento manualmente
            button.addEventListener('click', () => {
              alert('TBB Action: ' + JSON.stringify(params.data))
            })

            return button
          },
        },
      },
    ])
    const config = ref({
      state: {
        columnPinning: {},
      },
      chunk: 3,
      title: 'My custom Title',
      titleTooltip: 'Is a tooltip',
      titleIcon: 'aq-icon-table',
      rowAutoGrown: false,
      perPage: 10,
      height: 650,
      perPageValues: [5, 10, 15, 20],
      errorValue: 'No data available',
      requestData: (data: any) => {
        const query = {
          keyword: data.filter,
          pageSize: data.perPage,
          pageNumber: data.page,
        }

        loading.value = true
        return fetch(
          `https://rickandmortyapi.com/api/character/?page=${query.pageNumber}&status=${query.keyword}`,
        )
          .then(async (response) => {
            const responseData = await response.json()
            return { data: responseData.results, count: responseData.info.count }
          })
          .finally(() => {
            loading.value = false
          })
      },
    })

    return {
      config,
      columns,
      TableMode,
      loading,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div className="section">
    <div className="section-title">Aq Server Table</div>
    <div className="components" style="height: 700px">
      <AqTable
        :config="config"
        :columns="columns"
        :mode="TableMode.SERVER"
        :loading="loading"
        has-header
        id="my-table-ssr"
      >
        <AqButton :aq-tooltip="JSON.stringify(`{content: 'This is a tooltip'}`)" slot="header-left" is-outline>A button Slot</AqButton>
        <AqButton slot="header-right" is-outline> Loading </AqButton>
      </AqTable>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqHelperText, AqSettingStep } from '@aqua-ds/vue'
import type { StepOption } from '@aqua-ds/web-components/types'
import { ref, defineComponent } from 'vue';

const options = ref<StepOption[]>([
  {
    id: 'step-1',
    title: 'Step 1',
    subtitle: 'Description of the step',
    info: 'Info',
    state: 'warning',
    buttonEdit: 'Editar',
    buttonPrimary: 'Primary',
    contentState: 'editing',
    buttonTertiary: 'Tertiary',
    buttonSecondary: 'Secondary',
  },
  {
    id: 'step-2',
    title: 'Step 2',
    subtitle: 'Description of the step',
    info: 'Info',
    state: 'success',
    stepStatus: 'complete',
    buttonEdit: 'Edit',
    buttonPrimary: 'Primary',
    contentState: 'summary',
    buttonTertiary: '',
    buttonSecondary: '',
  },
  {
    id: 'step-3',
    title: 'Step 3',
    subtitle: 'Description of the step',
    info: 'Info',
    state: 'error',
    stepStatus: 'active',
    contentState: 'initial',
    buttonSecondary: 'Descartar',
    buttonEdit: 'Edit',
  },
])

const slotEdit = (id: string) => {
  return `edit-${id}`
}
const slotSummary = (id: string) => {
  return `summary-${id}`
}

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqSettingStep,
    AqHelperText,
  },
  setup() {
    const handleClickEdit = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Click Edit', e, e.detail);
    };
    const handleClickPrimary = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Click Primary', e, e.detail);
      options.value = options.value.map((option: StepOption) =>
        option.id === 'step-1'
          ? {
              ...option,
              state: 'success',
              stepStatus: 'is-complete',
              contentState: 'initial',
            }
          : option
      );
    };
    const handleClickSecondary = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Click Secondary', e, e.detail);
    };
    const handleClickTertiary = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Click Tertiary', e, e.detail);
    };
    return {
      options,
      slotEdit,
      slotSummary,
      handleClickEdit,
      handleClickPrimary,
      handleClickSecondary,
      handleClickTertiary,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Setting Step</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-setting-step
        :options="options"
        @clickEdit="handleClickEdit"
        @clickPrimary="handleClickPrimary"
        @clickSecondary="handleClickSecondary"
        @clickTertiary="handleClickTertiary"
      >
        <template v-for="(item, index) in options" :key="index">
          <div :slot="slotEdit(item.id)">
            <aq-helper-text>Editing</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
          <div :slot="slotSummary(item.id)">
            <aq-helper-text>Summary</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
        </template>
      </aq-setting-step>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { AqButton, AqDivider } from '@aqua-ds/vue'
import { defineComponent } from 'vue'

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqButton,
    AqDivider,
  },
  setup() {
    const spinner1 = ref(true)
    const spinner2 = ref(true)
    const handleClick1 = () => {
      spinner1.value = !spinner1.value
    }
    const handleClick2 = () => {
      spinner2.value = !spinner2.value
    }
    return {
      handleClick1,
      handleClick2,
      spinner1,
      spinner2,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">AqSpinner</div>
    <div class="components components--center">
      <div class="container-center">
        <div id="spinner-1" :aq-spinner="spinner1" class="spinner spinner-left">
          Spinner 1 Container
        </div>
        <div id="spinner-2" :aq-spinner="spinner2" class="spinner spinner-left">
          Spinner 2 Container
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <AqDivider class="components-divider" />
    <div class="container-center">
      <aq-button is-ouline variant="primary" id="button-spinner1" @click="handleClick1">
        Actualizar Spinner 1
      </aq-button>
      <aq-button is-ouline variant="primary" id="button-spinner2" @click="handleClick2">
        Actualizar Spinner 2
      </aq-button>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
    components: {
      AqButton,

      AqHelperText,

      AqHeading,
      AqToggle,
      AqCard,
      AqCardHeader,

      AqCode,
    },
	setup() {
		const msg = 'Hello World';
		const htmlContent =  ref('<p><strong>Hola</strong> desde <em>v-html</em>!</p>');
		const isVisible = ref(true);
		const handleClick = () => {
			isVisible.value = !isVisible.value;
		};
		type ButtonVariantType1 = 'primary' | 'success' | 'danger';

		const botones = ref<Array<{id: number, label: string, variant: ButtonVariantType1}>>([
			{ id: 1, label: 'Botón 1', variant: 'primary' },
			{ id: 2, label: 'Botón 2', variant: 'success' },
			{ id: 3, label: 'Botón 3', variant: 'danger' },
		]);

			console.log('handleClickBtn', label, variant);
		};

		const tarjetas = ref<Array<{id: number, titulo: string, descripcion: string, footer: string}>>([
			{ id: 1, titulo: 'Tarjeta 1', descripcion: 'Descripción de la tarjeta 1' , footer: 'Footer de la tarjeta 1' },
			{ id: 2, titulo: 'Tarjeta 2', descripcion: 'Descripción de la tarjeta 2' , footer: 'Footer de la tarjeta 2' 	},
			{ id: 3, titulo: 'Tarjeta 3', descripcion: 'Descripción de la tarjeta 3' , footer: 'Footer de la tarjeta 3' 	},
		]);
			
		const handleClickBtn1 = () => {
			console.log('handleClickBtn1');
		};

		const statusToggle = ref(false);

		const handleToggleChange = (e: CustomEvent) => {
			console.log('handleToggleChange', e.detail.value);
			statusToggle.value = e.detail.value;
		};

		const textFieldValue = ref('');

		const textFieldValue1 = ref(0);
		
		const textFieldValue2 = ref('');

		const nombre = ref('');
		
		const mensaje = ref('Este texto se renderiza una sola vez');

		const version = ref('1.0.0');

		const productos = ref([
			{ id: 1, nombre: 'Monitor Aqua', precio: 120 },
			{ id: 2, nombre: 'Teclado Aqua', precio: 80 },
			{ id: 3, nombre: 'Mouse Aqua', precio: 45 },
		])
		const primary = ref('primary');
		const cambiarPrecioAleatorio = () => {
		const index = Math.floor(Math.random() * productos.value.length)
		productos.value[index].precio += 10
	}
		return {
			msg,
			htmlContent,
			isVisible,
			handleClick,
			botones,
			handleClickBtn,
			tarjetas,

			handleToggleChange,

			textFieldValue2,
			nombre,
			mensaje,
			version,
			productos,

			primary
		};
  },

						</slot>

				</aq-card-content>
			</aq-card>

			<aq-button variant="primary" @click="version = '2.0.0'">
				Actualizar versión
			</aq-button>
		</div>
		<div class="components">
			<div class="section-title">V-MEMO</div>
			<aq-card
				v-for="(producto) in productos"
				:key="producto.id"
				v-memo="[producto.precio]"
			>
				<h4>{{ producto.nombre }}</h4>
				<p>Precio: {{ producto.precio }} USD</p>
				<p v-once>ID: {{ producto.id }}</p>
			</aq-card>

			<aq-button variant="primary" @click="cambiarPrecioAleatorio">
				Cambiar precio aleatorio
			</aq-button>
		</div>
	</div>
</template>

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/directives/sets/TooltipDirectiveSet.vue
================================================
<script lang="ts">
	import { AqButton } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
	import type { IPopover } from '@aqua-ds/web-components';
	import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

	export default defineComponent({
	  components: {
	    AqButton,
	  },
	  setup() {
	    const tooltipConfigSimple = ref<IPopover>({
	      content: 'This is a tooltip',
	    })
	    const tooltipConfigWC = ref<IPopover>({
	      content: '<aq-heading level="1"><span slot="text">This is a heading</span></aq-heading>',
	    })
	    const tooltipConfigIcon = ref<IPopover>({
	      content: '<span>This is a helper text or caption <em class="aq-icon-email">Email</em></span>',
	    })
	    const updateTooltips = () => {
	      console.log('AQD Update Tooltips')
	
	      tooltipConfigSimple.value = { content: 'Update Tooltip' }
	      tooltipConfigWC.value = { content: 'Update Tooltip' }
	      tooltipConfigIcon.value = { content: 'Update Tooltip' }
	    }
	    return {
	      tooltipConfigSimple,
	      tooltipConfigWC,
	      tooltipConfigIcon,
	      updateTooltips,
	    }
	  },
	})
</script>

<template>
	<div>
	  <aq-button is-outline :aq-tooltip="JSON.stringify(tooltipConfigSimple)">
	    Set Simple Tooltip
	  </aq-button>
	  <aq-button is-outline :aq-tooltip="JSON.stringify(tooltipConfigWC)">
	    Set Tooltip With Web Component
	  </aq-button>
	  <aq-button is-outline :aq-tooltip="JSON.stringify(tooltipConfigIcon)">
	    Set Tooltip With HTML
	  </aq-button>
	
	  <br />
	  <br />
	  <br />
	  <aq-button variant="primary" @click="updateTooltips()"> Update Tooltip </aq-button>
	</div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import BadgeSet from './sets/BadgeSet.vue'
import BannerSet from './sets/BannerSet.vue'
import FlagSet from './sets/FlagSet.vue'
import ProgressSet from './sets/ProgressSet.vue'
import TagSet from './sets/TagSet.vue'
import TagGroupSet from './sets/TagGroupSet.vue'

</script>

<template>
  <div class="component-type">
    <div class="title-type__container">
      <h1 class="type-title">FeedBack</h1>
    </div>
    <BadgeSet />
    <BannerSet />
    <FlagSet />
    <ProgressSet />
    <TagSet />

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/feedback/sets/BannerSet.vue
================================================
<script lang="ts">
import { AqButton, AqBanner } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: { AqButton, AqBanner },
  setup() {
    const valueBanner = ref(true);
    const handleCloseEvent = (event: CustomEvent<void>) => {
      console.log('Get Banner close event: ', event.detail);
    };
    const alert1 = () => {
      alert('Action 1 executed');
    };

    const alert2 = () => {
      alert('Action 2 executed');
    };
    return { handleCloseEvent, alert1, alert2, valueBanner };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Banner</div>
    <div class="components">
      <div class="components">
        <aq-toggle v-model="valueBanner"></aq-toggle>

        <aq-banner title-banner="Operación exitosa" state="success" @close="handleCloseEvent" v-model="valueBanner">
          Banner Description
          <div slot="actions">
            <aq-button @click="alert1()" variant="primary">
              Primary
            </aq-button>
            <aq-button @click="alert2()" variant="success" is-outline>
              Secondary
            </aq-button>
          </div>
        </aq-banner>

        <aq-banner titleBanner="Advertencia" state="warning" :has-close-icon="false">
          Este es un mensaje de advertencia sin opción de cerrar.
        </aq-banner>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqCheckboxGroup } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { ref, defineComponent } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: { AqCheckboxGroup },
  setup() {
    const selectedValueGroup = ref(['option-3']);
    const infoCheckboxGroup = ref([
      {
        label: "Ross",
        valueCheckbox: "option-1",
        subLabel: "This is a sublabel ",
        isDisabled: true,
        icon: "aq-icon-message"
      },
      {
        label: "Rachel",
        isChecked: true,
        valueCheckbox: "option-2",
        icon: "aq-icon-message",
        subLabel: "This is a sublabel ",
        tooltipWidth: "100px"
      },
      {
        valueCheckbox: "option-3",
        label: "Chandler",
        subLabel: "This is a long sublabel to test multiline"
      }
    ]);

    const handleValueChange = (ev: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Handling checkbox custom change from vue ', ev, ev.detail.value);
    };
    const handleValueInput = (ev: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Handling checkbox custom input from vue ', ev, ev.detail.value);
    };

    return {
      handleValueChange,
      handleValueInput,
      selectedValueGroup,
      infoCheckboxGroup,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">CheckboxGroup</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-checkbox-group label="This is a checkbox 4" is-required   info="This is an information tooltip" :options="infoCheckboxGroup"
        @change="handleValueChange" @input="handleValueInput" v-model="selectedValueGroup"></aq-checkbox-group>

      <aq-checkbox-group label="This is a checkbox 4" is-required  type="button" info="This is an information tooltip" :options="infoCheckboxGroup"
        @change="handleValueChange" @input="handleValueInput" v-model="selectedValueGroup"></aq-checkbox-group>

      <aq-checkbox-group label="This is a checkbox 4" is-required  type="card" info="This is an information tooltip" :options="infoCheckboxGroup"
        @change="handleValueChange" @input="handleValueInput" v-model="selectedValueGroup"></aq-checkbox-group>
      <div>
        <span>Selected Value: {{ selectedValueGroup }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqCheckbox } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { ref, defineComponent } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: { AqCheckbox },
  setup() {
    const selectedValue = ref();
    const defaultCheckbox = ref();

    const handleValueChanged = (ev: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Handling checkbox custom aqchange from vue ', ev, ev.detail.value);
    };

    const checked = ref(true);

    return {
      handleValueChanged,
      selectedValue,
      defaultCheckbox,
      checked,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Checkbox</div>
    <div class="components">
      <input type="checkbox" name="Checkbox test" id="chk-test" checked v-model="selectedValue">
      
      <aq-checkbox id-checkbox="checkbox-1" name="checkbox-1" label="This is a checkbox 1" icon="aq-icon-message"
        required info="This is an information tooltip" value-checkbox="option-1" @change="handleValueChanged"
        :is-checked="true" v-model="selectedValue"></aq-checkbox>
        <div>
        <span>Selected Value: {{ selectedValue }}</span>
      </div>
      <aq-checkbox id-checkbox="checkbox-2" name="checkbox-2" label="This is a checkbox 2" icon="aq-icon-message"
        required info="This is an information tooltip" value-checkbox="option-2" @change="handleValueChanged"
        v-model="selectedValue"></aq-checkbox>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqDatePicker, AqLabel } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref, reactive } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqDatePicker,
    AqLabel,
  },
  setup() {
    const modelRangeDate = ref({
      start: '2025-02-01',
      end: '2025-05-09',
    });
    const modelRangeHourDate = ref({
      start: '2025-05-07T23:59',
      end: '2025-05-09T14:55',
    });
    const modelIndDate = ref('2025-05-09');
    const modelIndHourDate = ref('2025-05-09T02:52');

    const handleAqInput = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('handleAqInput vue', e, e.detail.value);
    };
    return {
      modelRangeDate,
      modelRangeHourDate,
      modelIndDate,
      modelIndHourDate,
      handleAqInput,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Date Picker</div>
    <div class="components">
      <div style="width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4rem; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="width: 40%;">
          <aq-subheading>Individual</aq-subheading>
          <aq-date-picker @input="handleAqInput($event)" v-model="modelIndDate" format="X" placement="bottom-start" label="Date Picker" sublabel="This is a sublabel"/>
          <aq-label>
            {{ modelIndDate }}
          </aq-label>
        </div>
        <div style="width: 40%;">
          <aq-subheading>Individual con Hora</aq-subheading>
          <aq-date-picker v-model="modelIndHourDate" hasTime format="f" placement="bottom-start" label="Date Picker" sublabel="This is a sublabel"/>
          <aq-label>
            {{ modelIndHourDate }}
          </aq-label>
        </div>
        <div style="width: 40%;">
          <aq-subheading>Rango</aq-subheading>
          <aq-date-picker v-model="modelRangeDate" isRange format="cccc, d 'de' LLLL 'de' yyyy" placement="bottom-start" label="Date Picker" sublabel="This is a sublabel"/>
          <aq-label>
            {{ JSON.stringify(modelRangeDate) }}
          </aq-label>
        </div>
        <div style="width: 40%;">
          <aq-subheading>Rango con Hora</aq-subheading>
          <aq-date-picker v-model="modelRangeHourDate" hasTime isRange format="MMMM dd, yyyy HH:mm" placement="bottom-start" label="Date Picker" sublabel="This is a sublabel"/>
          <aq-label>
            {{ JSON.stringify(modelRangeHourDate) }}
          </aq-label>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

        const isError = ref(false);

        const cleanOnSelect = ref(false);
        const isReadonly = ref(false);
        const isRequired = ref(false);

        return {
            isError,
            cleanOnEscape,
            cleanOnSelect,
            isReadonly,
            isRequired,
            countries,
            isName,
            isDisabled,
            showShortName,
            showCallSign,

});

<script lang="ts">
import { AqNumberField, AqHelperText, AqLabel } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, reactive, ref } from 'vue';

// Mejora: hacer formato opcional pa no cargar numbro siempre

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqNumberField,
    AqHelperText,
    AqLabel,
  },
  setup() {
    const aqTagFieldRef = ref();

    const numberfieldValue = ref('15');
    const numberFieldMantissa = reactive({ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 });

    const handleAqChange = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Handling number field change from vue ', e.detail);
    };

    const handleAqInput = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Handling number field input from vue ', e.detail);
    };

    const setFormat = async () => {
      if (aqTagFieldRef.value) {
        await aqTagFieldRef.value.setFormat({mantissa: 3});
      }
    };

    return {
      numberfieldValue,
      numberFieldMantissa,
      aqTagFieldRef,
      setFormat,
      handleAqChange,
      handleAqInput,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Number Field</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-number-field
        ref="aqTagFieldRef"
        id="aq-number-field-1"
        v-model="numberfieldValue"
        :step="2"
        :min-value="5"
        strict-limit-value
        :format="numberFieldMantissa"
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
        helper-text="Number field"
        is-required
        @input="handleAqInput"
        @change="handleAqChange"
      ></aq-number-field>
      <!-- Value -->
      <aq-helper-text>{{numberfieldValue}}</aq-helper-text>
      <aq-button @click="setFormat">Set format</aq-button>

      <aq-number-field
        v-model="numberfieldValue"
        :min-value="5"
        :format="{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }"
        is-error
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
      ></aq-number-field>

      <aq-number-field
        :format="{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }"
        is-error
        is-plain
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
      ></aq-number-field>

      <aq-number-field
        :format="{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }"
        is-plain
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
      ></aq-number-field>

      <aq-number-field
        :format="{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }"
        is-readonly
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
      ></aq-number-field>

      <aq-number-field
        :format="{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }"
        is-disabled
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
      ></aq-number-field>

      <aq-number-field
        :format="{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }"
        size="small"
        left-button-tooltip="This is small"
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
      ></aq-number-field>

      <aq-number-field
        :format="{ thousandSeparated: true, mantissa: 1 }"
        size="small"
        is-plain
        left-button-tooltip="This is small"
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
      ></aq-number-field>

    </div>
  </div>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqRadioGroup } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref, onMounted } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqRadioGroup
  },
  setup() {
    const selectedValue = ref('option2');
    const radioGroupRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null);

    const options = [
      {
        label: "Completed",
        value: "option1",
        subLabel: "This is a sublabel ",
        info: "This is short tooltip",
        icon: "aq-icon-message"
      },
      {
        label: "Rachel",
        value: "option2",
        icon: "aq-icon-message",
        subLabel: "This is a sublabel ",
        info: "This is long tooltip to allow the multiline variant of the component",
        tooltipWidth: "100px"
      },
      {
        label: "Chandler",
        value: "option3",
        subLabel: "This is a long sublabel to test multiline"
      }
    ];

    const handleValueChanged = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Radio group changed:', e.detail.value);
      selectedValue.value = e.detail.value;

    };
    const setValue = () => {
      selectedValue.value = 'option1';
      // (radioGroupRef.value as any).updateSelectedValue('option1');
    };

    return {
      selectedValue,
      handleValueChanged,
      setValue,
      radioGroupRef,
      options,
    };
  }
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Radio group</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-radio-group
        :options="options"
        id-radio-group="rd-grp-1"
        orientation="horizontal"
        label="This is a radio common group"
        info="This is an information tooltip"
        is-required
        return-mode="originalObject"
        helper-text="This is a helper text"
        @change="handleValueChanged"
        v-model="selectedValue"
      >
      </aq-radio-group>

      <aq-radio-group
        :options="options"
        type="card"
        id-radio-group="rd-grp-1"
        orientation="horizontal"
        label="This is a radio common group"
        info="This is an information tooltip"
        is-required
        return-mode="originalObject"
        helper-text="This is a helper text"
        @change="handleValueChanged"
        v-model="selectedValue"
      >
      </aq-radio-group>

      <aq-radio-group
        :options="options"
        id-radio-group="rd-grp-1"
        orientation="horizontal"
        label="This is a radio common group"
        info="This is an information tooltip"
        is-required
        return-mode="originalObject"
        helper-text="This is a helper text"
        @change="handleValueChanged"
        v-model="selectedValue"
      >
      </aq-radio-group>

      <span>Selected Value: {{ selectedValue }}</span>

      <aq-button @click="() => setValue()">Button</aq-button>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
