FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/forms/sets/TagFieldSet.vue
================================================
<script lang="ts">
import { AqButton, AqTagField } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqTagField,
    AqButton,
  },
  setup() {
    const aqTagFieldRef = ref();
    const tagFieldValue: any = ref(['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6']);

    const handleValueInput = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Handling tag field custom input from vue: ', e.detail.value);
    };
    const handleValueChange = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('Handling tag field custom change from vue: ', e.detail.value);
    };
    const handleTextChange = (e: CustomEvent<{ value: string }>) => {
      console.log('Handling tag field text change from vue: ', e.detail.value);
    };
    const handleOnCloseTag = (e: CustomEvent<{ value: string, idx: number }>) => {
      console.log('Handling tag field close tag from vue. Closed tag: ', e.detail.value, ' index: ', e.detail.idx);
    };

    const validator = (val: string) => {
      const regex = /[A-Za-z]/;
      return regex.test(val);
    };

    // ✅ Funciones limpias para usar en los botones
    const addTag = async () => {
      if (aqTagFieldRef.value) {
        await aqTagFieldRef.value.addTag('Added tag');
      }
    };

    const removeTag = async () => {
      if (aqTagFieldRef.value) {
        await aqTagFieldRef.value.removeTag(-1);
      }
    };

    const setTagFieldData = async () => {
      if (aqTagFieldRef.value) {
        await aqTagFieldRef.value.setTagFieldValues(['Set tags']);
      }
    };

    const clearSelection = async () => {
      if (aqTagFieldRef.value) {
        await aqTagFieldRef.value.clearSelection();
      }
    };

    return {
      aqTagFieldRef,
      tagFieldValue,
      validator,
      handleValueInput,
      handleValueChange,
      handleTextChange,
      handleOnCloseTag,
      addTag,
      removeTag,
      setTagFieldData,
      clearSelection,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">TagField</div>
    <div class="components" style="flex-direction: column;">
      <aq-tag-field
        v-model="tagFieldValue"
        label="This is a label"
        info="This is a tooltip"
        icon="aq-icon-settings"
        placeholder="Your placeholder goes here"
        is-required
        has-clear
        show-selected-counter
        ref="aqTagFieldRef"
        @input="handleValueInput"
        @change="handleValueChange"
        @textChange="handleTextChange"
        @closeTag="handleOnCloseTag"
        :validator="validator"
      />
      <div style="margin-top: 8px;">
        value: {{ tagFieldValue }}
      </div>

      <!-- Botones con funciones limpias -->
      <div>
        <aq-button style="margin: 2px;" is-outline @click="addTag">Add tag</aq-button>
        <aq-button style="margin: 2px;" is-outline @click="removeTag">Remove tag</aq-button>
        <aq-button style="margin: 2px;" is-outline @click="setTagFieldData">Set tag field data</aq-button>
        <aq-button style="margin: 2px;" is-outline @click="clearSelection">Clear tag field selection</aq-button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqBreadcrumb } from '@aqua-ds/vue'
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue'

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqBreadcrumb,
  },

  setup() {
    const breadcrumbs = ref([
      {
        url: 'https://www.google.com',
        label: 'Link 1',
      },
      {
        url: 'https://www.google.com',
        label: 'Link 2',
      },
      {
        url: 'https://www.google.com',
        label: 'Link 3',
        active: true,
      },
    ])

    const handleClick = (e: CustomEvent) => {
      console.log('e', e.detail.value.url)
    }

    return {
      handleClick,
      breadcrumbs,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Breadcrumb</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-breadcrumb :breadcrumbs="breadcrumbs" @click="handleClick" />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqStepGroup, AqStepContent, AqStepTitle } from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue';



export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqStepGroup,
    AqStepContent,
    AqStepTitle,
  },

  setup() {
    const currentStep = ref(1);
    const updateStatus = ref('is-complete');
    const updateStatus2 = ref('is-error');

    const handleClick = (number: number) => {
      currentStep.value += number;   
      updateStatus.value = 'is-active';
    } 
    const clickUpdateStatus2 = () => {
      updateStatus2.value = 'is-active';
    }

    return {
      updateStatus,
      updateStatus2,
      currentStep,
      handleClick,
      clickUpdateStatus2
    }
  }
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">Step Group</div>
    <div class="components">
       <aq-button @click="clickUpdateStatus2()">Update Status</aq-button>
        <aq-step-group is-vertical>
            <aq-step-title slot="title-1" id="step-title-1" status="is-complete">
              Step 1
            </aq-step-title>
            <aq-step-content slot="content-1"></aq-step-content>
            <aq-step-title slot="title-2" id="step-title-2" :status="updateStatus2">
              Step 2
            </aq-step-title>
            <aq-step-content slot="content-2" ></aq-step-content>
            <aq-step-title slot="title-3" id="step-title-3" status="is-error">
              Step 3
            </aq-step-title>
            <aq-step-title slot="title-4" id="step-title-4" status="is-active-with-error">
              Step 4
            </aq-step-title>
            <aq-step-title slot="title-5" id="step-title-5" status="is-default">
              Step 5

<script lang="ts">
import {
  AqTabGroup,
  AqTab,
  AqHelperText,
  AqTabItems,
  AqTabItem,
  AqDivider,
} from '@aqua-ds/vue';
import { defineComponent } from 'vue';

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqTabGroup,
    AqTab,
    AqHelperText,
    AqTabItems,
    AqTabItem,
    AqDivider,
  },
  setup() {
    const handleTapGroupChange = (event: CustomEvent<number>) => {
			console.log('Índice del tab seleccionado: ', event.detail);
		}
    return {
      handleTapGroupChange,
    };
  }
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">AqTag</div>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-tab-group @tapGroupChange="handleTapGroupChange">
        <aq-tab is-disabled :number="1" state="success" icon="aq-icon-whatsapp"
          >Title Tab 1
          <div slot="subtitle">
            <aq-helper-text>Subtitle Tab 1</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
        </aq-tab>
        <aq-tab icon="aq-icon-sms"
          >Title Tab 2
          <div slot="subtitle">
            <aq-helper-text>Subtitle Tab 2</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
        </aq-tab>
        <aq-tab :number="2" state="info" icon="aq-icon-email"
          >Title Tab 3
          <div slot="subtitle">
            <aq-helper-text>Subtitle Tab 3</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
        </aq-tab>
        <div slot="content">
          <aq-tab-items max-height="400px">
            <aq-tab-item>Content Tab 1</aq-tab-item>
            <aq-tab-item>Content Tab 2</aq-tab-item>
            <aq-tab-item>Content Tab 3</aq-tab-item>
          </aq-tab-items>
        </div>
      </aq-tab-group>

      <aq-divider className="components-divider" />
      <aq-tab-group vertical>
        <aq-tab is-disabled :number="1" state="success" icon="aq-icon-whatsapp"
          >Title Tab 1
          <div slot="subtitle">
            <aq-helper-text>Subtitle Tab 1</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
        </aq-tab>
        <aq-tab is-disabled icon="aq-icon-sms"
          >Title Tab 2
          <div slot="subtitle">
            <aq-helper-text>Subtitle Tab 2</aq-helper-text>
          </div>
        </aq-tab>
        <aq-tab :number="3" state="info" icon="aq-icon-email"

          <div slot="subtitle">
            <aq-helper-text>Subtitle Tab 3</aq-helper-text>
          </div>

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/overlays/sets/DialogSet.vue

<script lang="ts">
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue'
import { AqDialog, AqToggle, AqButton, AqLabel, AqBanner } from '@aqua-ds/vue'

export default defineComponent({
  name: 'DialogSection',
  components: {
    AqDialog,
    AqToggle,
    AqButton,
    AqLabel,
    AqBanner,
  },
  setup() {
    const toggleValue = ref(false)

    const closeDialog = () => {
      toggleValue.value = false
    }

    const handleClose = () => {
      toggleValue.value = false
    }

    return {
      toggleValue,
      closeDialog,
      handleClose,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">AqDialog</div>
    <div class="components is-gap-4">
      <!-- Toggle externo -->
      <aq-toggle v-model="toggleValue" />

      <!-- Botón para abrir el diálogo como directiva -->
      <aq-button
        aq-dialog="dialog-1"
        is-outline
        info="Open dialog using directive"
      >
        Open dialog as directive
      </aq-button>

      <!-- Dialog controlado -->
      <aq-dialog
        id="dialog-1"
        size="small"
        title-dialog="Dialog Title Toggle"
        state="info"
        allow-maximize
        :value="toggleValue"
        @close="handleClose"
      >
        <span>
          Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero.
          Sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Sed nisi. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum.
        </span>

        <div slot="header-right">
          <em class="aq-icon-three-dots-vertical"></em>
        </div>

        <div slot="footer-right">
          <aq-button>Secondary</aq-button>
          <aq-button @click="closeDialog">Close</aq-button>
        </div>

        <div slot="footer-left">
          <aq-button>Tertiary</aq-button>
        </div>
      </aq-dialog>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>



================================================
FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/overlays/sets/DrawerSet.vue

<script lang="ts">
import { AqDrawer, AqToggle, AqButton, AqLabel, AqBanner, AqSlider, AqAutocomplete } from "@aqua-ds/vue";
import { defineComponent, ref } from "vue";

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqDrawer,
    AqToggle,
    AqButton,
    AqLabel,
    AqBanner,
    AqSlider,
    AqAutocomplete
  },
  setup() {
    const toggleValue = ref(false);
    const drawerOptions = [
      { text: 'Option 1' },
      { text: 'Option 2' },
      { text: 'Option 3' },
    ];

    const onOpen = () => {
    console.log('Get drawer <open> event.')
    }
    const onClose = () => {
      console.log('Get drawer <close> event.')
    }

    return {
      toggleValue,
      drawerOptions,
      onOpen,
      onClose,
    };
  },
});
</script>

<template>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">Drawer</div>
      <div className="components is-gap-4">
        <aq-toggle v-model="toggleValue" id="toggle"></aq-toggle>

        <aq-drawer
          size="small"
          id="drawerTest"
          title-drawer="Drawer title"
          state="warning"
          float-side="right"
          icon="aq-icon-message"
          :options="drawerOptions"
          close-on-escape
          close-on-backdrop
          has-back-icon
          :has-close-icon="false"
          v-model="toggleValue"
          @open="onOpen"
          @close="onClose"
        >

          Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
          Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
          Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur.
          Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum.

          <div slot="footer-right">
            <aq-button aq-dialog='dialogTest' info="Open modal">Open modal</aq-button>
            <aq-button variant="primary">Primary</aq-button>
          </div>

          <div slot="footer-left">
            <aq-button> Tertiary </aq-button>
          </div>
        </aq-drawer>

        <aq-button
          aq-drawer="drawerTest"
          is-outline
          info="Open drawer using a directive"
          >Open drawer</aq-button
        >
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqButton, AqCode } from '@aqua-ds/vue'
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue'

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqCode,
    AqButton,
  },
  setup() {
    const codeSmaller = ref('This is a code')
    const codeLarger = ref(
      'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Sed nisi. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum.',
    )

    const handleUpdateContent = () => {
      codeSmaller.value = 'This is a new code'
      codeLarger.value =
        'New Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Sed cursus ante dapibus diam. Sed nisi. Nulla quis sem at nibh elementum imperdiet. Duis sagittis ipsum.'
    }

    return {
      handleUpdateContent,
      codeSmaller,
      codeLarger,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">1. AqCode</div>
    <aq-button is-outline @click="handleUpdateContent">Update content</aq-button>
    <div class="components">
      <aq-code>
        <span slot="text"> {{ codeSmaller }} </span>
      </aq-code>
      <aq-code>
        <span slot="text"> {{ codeLarger }} </span>
      </aq-code>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
import { AqButton, AqHelperText } from '@aqua-ds/vue'
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue'

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqButton,
    AqHelperText,
  },
  setup() {
    const helperText = ref('This is a helper text or caption')
    const helperTextError = ref('This is a helper text or caption with error')

    const handleUpdateContent = () => {
      helperText.value = 'This is a new helper text or caption'
      helperTextError.value = 'This is a new helper text or caption with error'
    }

    return {
      helperText,
      helperTextError,
      handleUpdateContent,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">3. HelperText (Caption + Helper text)</div>
    <aq-button is-outline @click="handleUpdateContent">Update content</aq-button>

    <div class="components">
      <aq-helper-text
        ><span slot="text"> {{ helperText }} </span></aq-helper-text
      >
      <aq-helper-text is-error
        ><span slot="text"> {{ helperTextError }} </span></aq-helper-text
      >
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

FILE: test-apps/vue-test-app/src/components/titlesAndText/sets/LinkSet.vue
================================================
<script lang="ts">
import { AqButton, AqLink } from '@aqua-ds/vue'
import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue'

export default defineComponent({
  components: {
    AqLink,
    AqButton,
  },
  setup() {
    const linkValue = ref('This is a link')
    const linkBlankValue = ref('This is a link with blank target')
    const linkDisabledValue = ref('This is a disabled link')

    const handleUpdateContent = () => {
      linkValue.value = 'This is a new link'
      linkBlankValue.value = 'This is a new link target blank'
      linkDisabledValue.value = 'This is a new disabled link'
    }

    return {
      linkValue,
      linkBlankValue,
      linkDisabledValue,
      handleUpdateContent,
    }
  },
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-title">5. Link</div>
    <aq-button is-outline @click="handleUpdateContent">Update content</aq-button>

    <div class="components">
      <aq-link href="#">
        <span slot="text">{{ linkValue }}</span>
      </aq-link>
      <aq-link href="#" target="blank">
        <span slot="text"> {{ linkBlankValue }} </span>
      </aq-link>
      <aq-link is-disabled>
        <span slot="text">{{ linkDisabledValue }}</span>
      </aq-link>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

    AqButton,
    AqSubheading,
  },

      handleUpdateContent,
    }
  },
})
</script>

      </aq-subheading>

        <span slot="text">{{ subheadingValue }}</span>
      </aq-subheading>
